    (hx_rec : ∀ n k, x (n + 1) k =
      (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1)) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), x n j)
    (k n : ℕ) :
    x (n + 1) (k + 1) =
      (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 2)) * x n (k + 1) +
        (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 2)) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), x n j := by
  have eq1 : x (n + 1) (k + 1) = (1 / (((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1)) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range ((k + 1) + 1), x n j := by
    specialize hx_rec (n) (k + 1)
    simpa using hx_rec
  have eq2 : x (n + 1) (k + 1) = (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 2)) * (∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1 + 1), x n j) := by
    rw [eq1]
    have h1 : ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (k : ℂ) + 1 := by
      simp
    rw [h1]
    all_goals
      ring_nf
  have eq3 : ∑ j in Finset.range (k + 1 + 1), x n j = (∑ j in Finset.range (k + 1), x n j) + x n (k + 1) := by
    rw [show k + 1 + 1 = (k + 1) + 1 by omega]
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
  rw [eq3] at eq2
  rw [eq2]
  all_goals
    ring

theorem subq_III_A_3_c
    (x : ℕ → ℕ → ℂ)
    (hx_rec : ∀ n k, x (n + 1) k =
      (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1)) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), x n j)
    (k n : ℕ) :
    x (n + 1) (k + 1) =
      (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 2)) * x n (k + 1) +
        (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 2)) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), x n j := by
  have eq1 : x (n + 1) (k + 1) = (1 / (((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1)) * ∑ j in Finset.range ((k + 1) + 1), x n j := by
    specialize hx_rec (n) (k + 1)
    simpa using hx_rec
  rw [eq1]
  have h1 : ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1 = (k : ℂ) + 2 := by
    simp [Complex.ext_iff]
    all_goals ring
  have h2 : ∑ j in Finset.range ((k + 1) + 1), x n j = (∑ j in Finset.range (k + 1), x n j) + x n (k + 1) := by
    rw [show (k + 1) + 1 = (k + 1) + 1 by omega]
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
  rw [h1, h2]
  ring

theorem subq_III_A_3_c
    (x : ℕ → ℕ → ℂ)
    (hx_rec : ∀ n k, x (n + 1) k =
      (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1)) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), x n j)
    (k n : ℕ) :
    x (n + 1) (k + 1) =
      (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 2)) * x n (k + 1) +
        (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 2)) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), x n j := by
  have eq1 := hx_rec (n) (k + 1)
  simp [show k + 1 + 1 = k + 2 by omega] at eq1 ⊢
  rw [eq1]
  have h1 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 = (k : ℂ) + 2 := by
    simp [Complex.ext_iff]
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : ∑ j in Finset.range (k + 1 + 1), x n j = (∑ j in Finset.range (k + 1), x n j) + x n (k + 1) := by
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
  rw [h2]
  ring_nf

    (x : ℕ → ℕ → ℂ)

    specialize hx_rec (n) (k + 1)

  have eq2 : ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1 = (k : ℂ) + 2 := by

    all_goals ring
  have eq3 : ∑ j in Finset.range ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1), x n j = (∑ j in Finset.range (k + 1), x n j) + x n (k + 1) := by
    rw [show (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 1) + 1 by omega]

  rw [eq2]

theorem subq_III_A_3_c
    (x : ℕ → ℕ → ℂ)
    (hx_rec : ∀ n k, x (n + 1) k =
      (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1)) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), x n j)

  rw [eq1]

  have eq3 : (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 2)) * x n (k + 1) + (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 2)) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1), x n j =
      (1 / ((k : ℂ) + 2)) * (∑ j ∈ Finset.range (k + 1 + 1), x n j) := by

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
        all_goals try { tauto }
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        have h5 : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by norm_num
        exact h5
      have h6 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      tauto
    | succ k ih =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h2]
      have h7 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h8 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
          ring_nf at h ⊢
          all_goals try { nlinarith }
        have eq2 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam - 1 = 0 := by
          have eq3 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := eq1
          calc
            (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam - 1 = ( (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 ) := by ring
            _ = (0 : ℂ) := by rw [eq3]
        have h10 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          have h11 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam - 1 = 0 := eq2
          have h12 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
            calc
              (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam = ( (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam - 1 ) + 1 := by ring
              _ = (0 : ℂ) + 1 := by rw [h11]
              _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring
          have h13 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h12 ⊢
            all_goals try { 
              ring_nf at h12 ⊢
              try { nlinarith }
            }
          exact h13
        have h11 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
        tauto
      have h13 : α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) ≠ 0 := by
        apply div_ne_zero
        exact h7
        exact h8
      simpa using h13
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  have h2 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    have h3 : lam = 1 := by
      have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        simpa using h
      calc
        lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
        _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h4]
        _ = 1 := by ring
    have h4 : 1 / lam = 1 := by
      rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
      all_goals norm_num
    have h5 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
      rw [h4]
      all_goals norm_num
    have h6 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
    contradiction
  have hα0_nonzero : α 0 ≠ 0 := by
    rw [hα0]
    field_simp [h2]
  have h3 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero => 
      exact hα0_nonzero
    | succ k ih =>
      have h4 : α (k + 1) ≠ 0 := by
        have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
          specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
          simpa using hαk
        rw [eq1]
        have h5 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have eq2 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          have eq3 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            have eq4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
              exact_mod_cast eq2
            have eq5 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
              have h6 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := eq4
              have h7 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
                calc
                  (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) - 1) := by ring_nf
                  _ = (0 - 1 : ℂ) := by rw [h6]
                  _ = -1 := by ring
              exact_mod_cast h7
            have eq6 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
              have h8 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := eq5
              have h9 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
                field_simp
              have h10 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
                field_simp at h8 ⊢
                ring_nf at h8 ⊢
                norm_cast at h8 ⊢
              exact_mod_cast h10
            have h11 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := eq6
            have h12 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 + (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
              have h13 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := h11
              have h14 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 - (1 - 1 / lam) := by
                ring_nf
              rw [h14, h13]
              all_goals ring_nf
            have h13 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
              rw [h12]
              all_goals ring_nf
            exact_mod_cast h13
          have eq4 : ∃ m : ℕ, lam = 1 / ((m : ℂ) + 1) := by
            use k + 1
            have eq11 : lam = 1 / (( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) + 1) := by
              have eq12 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq3
              have eq13 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)) := by
                have eq14 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq12
                have eq15 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℂ) : ℂ)) := by
                  ring_nf
                rw [eq14]
                all_goals try { norm_cast at * }
                all_goals try { ring_nf at * }
              have eq14 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = lam := by
                field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
              rw [eq14] at eq13
              all_goals try { norm_cast at * }
            exact_mod_cast eq11
          rcases eq4 with ⟨m, hm⟩
          have h13 : lam ≠ 1 / ((m : ℂ) + 1) := hlam_notA m
          contradiction
        have h6 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
        field_simp [h5, h6]
      exact h4
  exact h3

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h1 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h2 : lam = 1 := by
          have h3 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            exact h
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h3]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        have h3 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
          rw [show lam = 1 by exact h2]
          norm_num
        contradiction
      simp [h1]
    | succ k ih =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h5 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have h6 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            exact h
          have h7 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
            have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := h6
            calc
              (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (0 : ℂ) - 1 := by
                calc
                  (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ) - 1 := by ring_nf
                  _ = (0 : ℂ) - 1 := by rw [eq1]
              _ = -1 := by ring
          have h8 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
            have h9 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := h7
            have h10 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
              simp
            have h11 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
              field_simp at h9 ⊢
              all_goals try { ring_nf at h9 ⊢; norm_num at h9 ⊢ }
              all_goals try { tauto }
            exact h11
          have h12 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by
            have h13 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := h8
            have eq2 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) + (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
              calc
                (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - 1 / lam) := by ring_nf
                _ = (1 : ℂ) - (- (k + 1 : ℂ)) := by rw [h13]
                _ = (1 : ℂ) + (k + 1 : ℂ) := by ring
            calc
              (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) + (k + 1 : ℂ) := eq2
              _ = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
          exact h12
        have h6 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          have h7 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := h5
          have h8 : lam = 1 / (1 / lam : ℂ) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
          rw [h7] at h8
          rw [h8]
          all_goals try { simp }
        have h7 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
        contradiction
      field_simp [h4, h3]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : 1 / lam = 1 := by
          have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by simpa using h
          have h5 : lam = 1 := by
            have h6 : 1 - lam = 0 := h4
            have h7 : lam = 1 := by
              have h8 : 1 - lam = 0 := h6
              simp [sub_eq_zero] at h8 ⊢
              all_goals try tauto
            exact h7
          rw [h5]
          all_goals norm_num
        have h4 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
          rw [h3]
          all_goals norm_num
        contradiction
      have h3 : 1 / (1 - lam) ≠ 0 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := h2
        field_simp [h4]
      exact h3
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by linarith)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have h4 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq6 : lam * ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) = 1 := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq1 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
          nlinarith
        have eq7 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          field_simp [show (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ ≠ 0 by
            have h1 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 > 0 := by
              omega
            positivity
          ] at eq6 ⊢
          all_goals try nlinarith
        have h8 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
        contradiction
      field_simp [h4, h3]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero =>
    have h1 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra h
      have h2 : lam = 1 := by
        have h3 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
          exact h
        calc
          lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
          _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h3]
          _ = 1 := by ring
      have h3 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h2]
        norm_num
      contradiction
    rw [hα0]
    field_simp [h1]
  | succ k ih =>
    have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
      specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
      simpa using hαk
    have h2 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra h
      have eq4 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
        have h3 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact_mod_cast h
        field_simp at h3 ⊢
        ring_nf at h3 ⊢
        norm_num at h3 ⊢
        try { 
          nlinarith 
        }
      have h6 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
        have h7 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq4
        have h8 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
        have h10 : lam = 1 / (1 / lam : ℂ) := by
          field_simp [show lam ≠ 0 by exact h8]
        rw [h10, h7]
      have h12 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
        have h13 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = k + 2 := by
          omega
        rw [h13]
        exact_mod_cast h6
      have h13 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := hlam_notA (k + 1)
      contradiction
    have h3 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := eq1
    rw [h3]
    have h4 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
    have h5 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := h2
    field_simp [h5] at *

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        by_cases h3 : 1 - lam = 0
        · exact h3
        · -- If 1 - lam ≠ 0, then 1/(1 - lam) ≠ 0
          have h6 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
            tauto
          field_simp [h6, hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
          all_goals try { tauto }
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        have h5 : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by norm_num
        exact h5
      have h4 : 1 / lam = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        all_goals norm_num
      have h5 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [h4]
        simp
      tauto
    | succ k ih =>
      have h7 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by
        omega
      have h8 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      have h9 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq2 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h10 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
          rw [h10]
          simp
        have eq3 : 1 - 1 / lam = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
          field_simp [eq2] at eq1 ⊢
          all_goals try { ring_nf at eq1 ⊢; try { tauto } }
        have eq4 : 1 / lam = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have eq3' : 1 - 1 / lam = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := eq3
          calc
            1 / lam = 1 - (1 - 1 / lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - (- (k + 1 : ℂ)) := by rw [eq3']
            _ = 1 + (k + 1 : ℂ) := by ring
            _ = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
              ring_nf
        have eq5 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have h12 : 1 / lam = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq4
          have h13 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
          have h14 : lam = 1 / (1 / lam) := by
            field_simp [h13]
          rw [h14, h12]
        have h16 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
        have h17 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) = k + 2 := by
          omega
        rw [show (k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) = k + 2 by omega] at h16
        rw [eq5] at h16
        all_goals try { tauto }
      have h10 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      rw [h8]
      field_simp [h9, h10]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
        all_goals try tauto
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        calc
          lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
          _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h4]
          _ = 1 := by ring
      have h4 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      contradiction
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih
        all_goals omega
      have h3 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h5 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
          all_goals 
            ring_nf at h ⊢
            try nlinarith
        have h6 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have eq1 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := h5
          have eq2 : ((k + 1 : ℂ) + 1) * lam = 1 := by
            calc
              ((k + 1 : ℂ) + 1) * lam = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + 1 * lam := by ring
              _ = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam := by simp
              _ = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 + 1 := by ring
              _ = 0 + 1 := by rw [eq1]
              _ = 1 := by ring
          have eq3 : ((k + 1 : ℂ) + 1) * lam = 1 := eq2
          have h7 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℂ) + 1) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq3 ⊢
            all_goals try nlinarith
          exact_mod_cast h7
        have h7 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
        contradiction
      have h8 : α k ≠ 0 := h2
      field_simp [h4, h8]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        have h3 : 1 / (1 - lam) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
          simpa using h3
        exact h4
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        have h5 : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = (1 : ℂ) - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
            _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring
        exact h5
      have h4 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      have h5 : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
      contradiction
    | succ k ih =>
      have h6 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h6]
      have h7 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h8 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h
        have eq2 : (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
          have eq3 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := eq1
          have eq4 : (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
            calc
              (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ) - 1 := by ring
              _ = (0 : ℂ) - 1 := by rw [eq3]
              _ = -1 := by ring
          exact eq4
        have h10 : ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h11 : ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) = (k + 1 : ℂ) := by simp
          rw [h11]
          have h12 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ (0 : ℂ) := by
            norm_cast
            all_goals omega
          tauto
        have eq5 : (1 - 1 / lam) = - ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) := by
          field_simp [show ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) ≠ 0 by exact h10 ] at eq2 ⊢
          all_goals try { 
            ring_nf at eq2 ⊢
            try { 
              nlinarith
            } 
          }
        have eq6 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) + ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) := by
          have eq7 : (1 - 1 / lam) = - ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) := eq5
          calc
            (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - 1 / lam) := by ring
            _ = (1 : ℂ) - (- ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) ) := by rw [eq7]
            _ = (1 : ℂ) + ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) := by ring
        have eq8 : lam = 1 / ( ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) + 1 ) := by
          have eq7 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) + ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) := eq6
          have eq10 : lam = 1 / (1 / lam) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
          rw [eq10, eq7]
          all_goals field_simp
          all_goals ring_nf
        have eq9 : ∃ m : ℕ, lam = 1 / ( (m : ℂ) + 1 ) := by
          use (k + 1 : ℕ)
          rw [eq8]
          all_goals field_simp
          all_goals ring_nf
        rcases eq9 with ⟨m, hm⟩
        have h11 : lam ≠ 1 / ( (m : ℂ) + 1 ) := hlam_notA m
        contradiction
      field_simp [h7, h8]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero =>
    have h1 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra h
      have h2 : lam = 1 := by
        have h3 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        calc
          lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
          _ = 1 - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h3]
          _ = 1 := by ring
      have h3 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h2]
        all_goals norm_num
      have h4 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
        rw [h3]
        all_goals norm_num
      tauto
    have h2 : α 0 ≠ 0 := by
      rw [hα0]
      field_simp [h1]
    exact h2
  | succ k ih =>
    have h1 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
    have hk1 : 1 ≤ (k + 1 : ℕ) := by
      omega
    have h2 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
      specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
      simpa using hαk
    have h3 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra h
      have h5 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
        simpa using h
      have eq2 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = 1 / lam := by
        field_simp at h5 ⊢
        ring_nf at h5 ⊢
        try { nlinarith [h5] }
      have eq3 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
        have h9 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
        field_simp [h9] at eq2 ⊢
        all_goals try { 
          ring_nf at eq2 ⊢
          try { nlinarith }
        }
      have h12 : lam ≠ 1 / (( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) + 1) := by
        apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
      have h13 : (1 / (( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) + 1) : ℂ) = (1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
        have h14 : ( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          simp at *
          all_goals ring_nf
        rw [h14]
      have h14 : lam = 1 / (( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) + 1) := by
        rw [eq3]
        rw [h13]
      tauto
    rw [h2]
    field_simp [h3, h1]

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  induction k using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | ind k ih =>
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h1 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h2 : lam = 1 := by
          have h3 : 1 - lam = 0 := by exact_mod_cast h
          have h4 : lam = 1 := by
            calc
              lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring_nf
              _ = 1 - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h3]
              _ = 1 := by ring_nf
          exact h4
        have h3 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
          rw [show lam = 1 by exact h2]
          norm_num
        have h4 : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
        contradiction
      have h5 : 1 / (1 - lam) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        have h6 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
          field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, h1] at h ⊢
          all_goals try tauto
        contradiction
      exact h5
    | succ k =>
      have h1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      have h2 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have h3 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
          have h_eq : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (0 : ℂ) := by
            exact_mod_cast h
          have eq2 : (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
            calc
              (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) - 1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
              _ = (0 : ℂ) - 1 := by rw [h_eq]
              _ = -1 := by ring_nf
          exact_mod_cast eq2
        have eq2 : 1 / lam = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have eq3 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
            have eq4 : (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := eq1
            field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, hlam_ne_zero] at eq4 ⊢
            all_goals try { ring_nf at eq4 ⊢; try constructor <;> try linarith }
          have eq6 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - 1 / lam) := by ring_nf
              _ = (1 : ℂ) - (- ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) := by rw [eq3]
              _ = (1 : ℂ) + ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by ring_nf
              _ = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
                simp at *
                all_goals ring_nf
          exact_mod_cast eq6
        have eq3 : lam = 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          have eq4 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq2
          have eq5 : lam = 1 / (1 / lam) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
          rw [eq5, eq4]
          all_goals try { field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, hlam_ne_zero] }
        have h6 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          have h7 : ∀ (m : ℕ), lam ≠ 1 / ((m : ℂ) + 1) := hlam_notA
          specialize h7 (k + 1)
          have h8 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
            ring_nf
          rw [h8] at h7
          exact h7
        contradiction
      rw [h1]
      have h4 : α k ≠ 0 := h2
      have h5 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := h3
      field_simp [Complex.ext_iff, h4, h5]

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : lam = 1 := by
          have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            exact_mod_cast h
          have h5 : lam = 1 := by
            calc
              lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring_nf
              _ = 1 - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
              _ = 1 := by ring_nf
          exact h5
        have h6 : lam = 1 := h3
        specialize hlam_notA 0
        norm_num at hlam_notA
        tauto
      have h3 : 1 / (1 - lam) ≠ 0 := by
        rw [div_ne_zero_iff]
        simp [h2]
      exact h3
    | succ k =>
      have h8 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      have h9 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih
        all_goals omega
      have h10 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h12 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact_mod_cast h
        have eq2 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := by
          have h11 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have h12 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
            rw [h12]
            simp
          have eq1 : (1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
            simpa using h12
          have h14 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
          field_simp at eq1 ⊢
          all_goals
            ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
            all_goals
              try { tauto }
        have eq3 : lam = 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          have h14 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
            have h15 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := eq2
            calc
              (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + 1 * lam := by ring_nf
              _ = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam := by ring_nf
              _ = 1 := by
                have h16 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := h15
                have h17 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam = 1 := by
                  calc
                    (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam = ((k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1) + 1 := by ring_nf
                    _ = (0 : ℂ) + 1 := by rw [h16]
                    _ = 1 := by ring_nf
                exact h17
          field_simp at h14 ⊢
          all_goals
            try { tauto }
        have h14 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
        have h15 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by omega
        rw [h15] at h14
        rw [eq3] at h14
        all_goals
          exfalso
          all_goals
            tauto
      rw [h8]
      field_simp [h10, h9]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : lam = 1 := by
          have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          have h5 : lam = 1 := by
            calc
              lam = (1 - (1 - lam)) := by ring
              _ = (1 - 0) := by rw [h4]
              _ = 1 := by ring
          exact h5
        have h6 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
          rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
          norm_num
        contradiction
      have h7 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        have h8 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := h2
        field_simp [h8]
      exact h7
    | succ k ih =>
      have h8 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by omega
      have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [eq1]
      have h9 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        simpa using ih
      have h10 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq3 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h
        have eq12 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have eq14 : (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ≠ 0 := by
            have h13 : (k + 1 : ℕ) > 0 := by
              omega
            exact_mod_cast show (k + 1 : ℕ) ≠ 0 by omega
          field_simp [eq14] at eq3 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq3 ⊢
          all_goals try { 
            nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero (show (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ≠ 0 by exact_mod_cast show (k + 1 : ℕ) ≠ 0 by omega), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (show lam ≠ 0 by exact hlam_ne_zero)]
          }
        have eq14 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have eq15 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq12
          have h18 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
          field_simp [h18] at eq15 ⊢
          all_goals try { 
            ring_nf at eq15 ⊢
            all_goals try { nlinarith }
          }
        have h19 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          specialize hlam1 (k + 1)
          simpa using hlam1
        contradiction
      have h11 : α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) ≠ 0 := by
        have h12 : α k ≠ 0 := h9
        have h13 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := h10
        field_simp [h13, h12]
      exact h11
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        simpa using h
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        calc
          lam = (1 - (1 - lam)) := by ring
          _ = 1 - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h2]
          _ = 1 := by ring
      have h4 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [h3]
        norm_num
      tauto
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      have h3 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih
        all_goals omega
      by_contra h
      rw [h2] at h
      have h4 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
        by_contra h5
        have h6 : α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) ≠ 0 := by
          field_simp [h5, h3]
        tauto
      -- From eq1, we need to derive a contradiction.
      have eq1 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := h4
      have eq3 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) = 0 := by
        field_simp at eq1 ⊢
        all_goals
          ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
          norm_num [Complex.ext_iff] at eq1 ⊢
          all_goals try { nlinarith }
      have eq4 : 1 / lam = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
        have h8 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) = 0 := eq3
        have eq6 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          simp [Complex.ext_iff] at h8 ⊢
          constructor
          · ring_nf at h8 ⊢; try linarith
          · ring_nf at h8 ⊢; try linarith
        exact_mod_cast eq6
      have eq7 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
        have eq8 : 1 / lam = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq4
        field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq8 ⊢
        all_goals try { 
          ring_nf at eq8 ⊢
          norm_num [Complex.ext_iff] at eq8 ⊢
          all_goals try { nlinarith }
        }
      have h8 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq7
      have h9 : lam ≠ 1 / (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by
        apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
      have h10 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by ring
      rw [h10] at h9
      rw [h8] at h9
      all_goals contradiction
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
        all_goals tauto
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        have h5 : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = (1 : ℂ) - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
            _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring
        exact h5
      have h6 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = (1 : ℂ) by exact h3]
        field_simp
      contradiction
    | succ k =>
      cases k with
      | zero => 
        have h2 : α 1 = α 0 / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ))) := by
          specialize hαk 1 (by norm_num)
          simpa using hαk
        have h3 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h8 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ)) = (0 : ℂ) := by
            exact_mod_cast h
          have h9 : 1 / lam = 2 := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h8 ⊢
            all_goals
              ring_nf at h8 ⊢
              try { tauto }
          have h10 : lam = 1 / 2 := by
            have h11 : 1 / lam = 2 := h9
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h11 ⊢
            all_goals
              try { tauto }
          have h11 : lam ≠ 1 / 2 := by
            have h12 : lam ≠ 1 / (1 + (1 : ℂ)) := by
              specialize hlam_notA 1
              simpa using hlam_notA
            have h13 : (1 + (1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (2 : ℂ) := by
              norm_num
            rw [h13] at h12
            exact h12
          tauto
        have h4 : α 0 ≠ 0 := by
          apply ih 0
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h2]
        field_simp [h3, h4]
      | succ k =>
        have h4 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
          specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
          simpa using hαk
        have h5 : α k ≠ 0 := by
          apply ih k
          all_goals omega
        have h6 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h7 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (0 : ℂ) := by
            exact_mod_cast h
          have h8 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h7 ⊢
            all_goals
              ring_nf at h7 ⊢
              try { tauto }
          have h9 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℂ)) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h8 ⊢
            all_goals
              try { 
                ring_nf at h8 ⊢
                nlinarith 
              }
          have h10 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℂ)) := by
            have h11 : lam ≠ 1 / (( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1) := by
              apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
            have h12 : ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1 = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by
              simp at *
              all_goals
                ring_nf
            rw [h12] at h11
            exact h11
          tauto
        rw [h4]
        field_simp [h6, h5]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
        all_goals try { tauto }
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        have h5 : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = (1 - (1 - lam)) := by ring
            _ = (1 - (0 : ℂ)) := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by norm_num
        exact h5
      have h6 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      contradiction
    | succ k =>
      have h7 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by linarith)
        simpa using hαk
      have h8 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      rw [h7]
      have h9 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (0 : ℂ) := by
          simpa using h
        have eq3 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq1 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
          all_goals try { nlinarith }
        have h10 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq3 ⊢
          all_goals try { nlinarith }
        have h13 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have h17 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by omega
          rw [h17]
          norm_num at h10 ⊢
          all_goals try { exact_mod_cast h10 }
        have h15 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
        tauto
      field_simp [h8, h9]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h1 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h2 : lam = 1 := by
          have h3 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h3]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        have h3 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
          rw [h2]
          norm_num
        have h4 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
        contradiction
      have h2 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        field_simp [h1]
      exact h2
    | succ k ih =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) ≠ 0 := by
        have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
          specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
          simpa using hαk
        rw [eq1]
        have h3 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
        have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h6 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = ( (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 ) / ( (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam ) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
            ring
          rw [h6]
          have h7 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam ≠ 0 := by
            have h8 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
              simp
            have h9 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
            exact mul_ne_zero h8 h9
          have h8 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 ≠ 0 := by
            by_contra h
            have h9 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
              calc
                (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = ( (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 ) + 1 := by ring
                _ = (0 : ℂ) + 1 := by rw [h]
                _ = 1 := by ring
            have h10 : lam = 1 / ( (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ ) := by
              have h11 : ( (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
                simp at *
                all_goals ring_nf
              have h13 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := h9
              have h14 : lam = 1 / ( (k + 2 : ℂ) ) := by
                field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h13 ⊢
                all_goals try { tauto }
              rw [show (k + 2 : ℂ) = ( (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ ) by exact_mod_cast (show (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) by omega)] at h14
              exact h14
            have h19 : lam ≠ 1 / ( ( (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ ) ) := by
              apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
            contradiction
          apply div_ne_zero
          exact h8
          exact h7
        field_simp [h4, h3]
      exact h2
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        have h3 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) = 0 := by simpa using h
        have h4 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h5 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            field_simp [show (1 - lam : ℂ) ≠ 0 by assumption]
          tauto
        exact h4
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := h2
        have h9 : (1 : ℂ) - lam = 0 := by
          simpa using h4
        have h10 : (1 : ℂ) = lam := by
          calc
            (1 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) - lam + lam := by ring
            _ = (0 : ℂ) + lam := by rw [show (1 : ℂ) - lam = 0 by exact h9]
            _ = (0 : ℂ) + lam := by ring
        exact_mod_cast h10
      have h8 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 := by
        rw [show (1 : ℂ) = lam by exact_mod_cast h3]
        all_goals
          field_simp
      have h9 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [h8]
        all_goals
          simp
      contradiction
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [eq1]
      have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h5 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq1 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          field_simp at h5 ⊢
          ring_nf at h5 ⊢
          try { nlinarith }
          all_goals try { tauto }
        have eq4 : ∃ m : ℕ, (1 / lam : ℂ) = (m + 1 : ℂ) := by
          refine ⟨k + 1, by
            simp [eq1]
            all_goals
              ring_nf
          ⟩
        rcases eq4 with ⟨m, hm⟩
        have h6 : lam = 1 / (m + 1 : ℂ) := by
          rw [hm] at *
          field_simp at *
        have h7 : ∃ k : ℕ, lam = 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1) := by
          refine ⟨m, by
            simpa using h6
          ⟩
        rcases h7 with ⟨k, hk⟩
        have h8 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1) := hlam_notA k
        contradiction
      have h5 : α k ≠ 0 := h2
      field_simp [h4, h5]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      have h1 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h2 : lam = 1 := by
          have h3 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h3]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        have h4 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
          rw [h2]
          norm_num
        have h5 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
        contradiction
      rw [hα0]
      field_simp [h1]
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : k ≥ 0 := by omega
      have h3 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have hk1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h9 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 = 0 := by
          have h10 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          have h11 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = ( (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 ) / ( (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam ) := by
            field_simp [(show (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by
              have h19 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
              rw [h19]
              simp
              all_goals omega
            ), hlam_ne_zero]
            ring_nf
          rw [h11] at h10
          have h12 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam ≠ 0 := by
            have h19 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
              have h19 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
              rw [h19]
              simp
              all_goals omega
            have h20 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
            exact mul_ne_zero h19 h20
          have h13 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 = 0 := by
            field_simp at h10 ⊢
            all_goals try tauto
          assumption
        have h10 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
          have h11 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 = 0 := h9
          calc
            (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 + 1 := by ring
            _ = 0 + 1 := by rw [h11]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        have h14 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have h16 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := h10
          have h17 : (k + 2 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have h19 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by simp
            rw [h19]
            simp
            all_goals omega
          have h18 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            simp [show (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) by omega]
          have h19 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
            rw [show (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ = (k + 2 : ℂ) by
              simp [show (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) by omega]
            ]
          have h20 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = 1 := by
            rw [h19]
            field_simp [(show (k + 2 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by
              have h19 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by simp
              rw [h19]
              simp
              all_goals omega
            )]
          have h21 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = (k + 2 : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
            have h22 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := h16
            have h23 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = 1 := h20
            rw [h22, h23]
          have h22 : (k + 2 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := h17
          have h23 : lam = (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
            apply (mul_left_inj' (show (k + 2 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by exact h17)).mp
            simpa using h21
          exact h23
        have h15 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1 : ℕ)
        contradiction
      rw [hk1]
      field_simp [h3, h4]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero =>
    rw [hα0]
    have h1 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra h
      have h2 : lam = 1 := by
        have h3 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
          exact h
        calc
          lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
          _ = 1 - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h3]
          _ = 1 := by ring
      have h3 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h2]
        all_goals norm_num
      have h4 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
        rw [h3]
        all_goals norm_num
      contradiction
    have h2 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
      field_simp [h1]
    exact h2
  | succ k ih =>
    have h1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
      specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
      simpa using hαk
    rw [h1]
    have h2 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
    have h3 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
      by_contra h
      have eq1 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
        have h_eq : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h
        calc
          (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) - 1 := by ring_nf
          _ = (0 : ℂ) - 1 := by rw [h_eq]
          _ = -1 := by ring
      have eq2 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
        have h_eq2 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have h_eq3 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := eq1
          have h_eq4 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have h1 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
            rw [h1]
            simp
          field_simp [h_eq4] at h_eq3 ⊢
          all_goals 
            try { ring_nf at h_eq3 ⊢; tauto }
        calc
          (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 + (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) := by ring_nf
          _ = 1 + (- (k + 1 : ℂ)) := by rw [h_eq2]
          _ = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
      have h4 : ∃ m : ℕ, (1 / lam : ℂ) = (m + 1 : ℂ) := by
        refine ⟨k + 1, by simp [eq2]; all_goals ring_nf⟩
      rcases h4 with ⟨m, hm⟩
      have h5 : lam = 1 / ((m : ℂ) + 1) := by
        have h6 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (m + 1 : ℂ) := by
          exact_mod_cast hm
        have h7 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / ((m + 1 : ℂ))) := by
          rw [h6]
        have h9 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = lam := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
        have h10 : (1 / ((m + 1 : ℂ)) : ℂ) = (1 / ((m : ℂ) + 1) : ℂ) := by ring_nf
        rw [h9] at h7
        rw [h10] at h7
        exact_mod_cast h7
      have h6 : lam ≠ 1 / ((m : ℂ) + 1) := hlam_notA m
      contradiction
    field_simp [h3, h2]

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
        all_goals try tauto
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        have h5 : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        exact h5
      have h6 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      contradiction
    | succ k =>
      have h8 : α (k) ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have h9 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h9]
      have h10 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h12 : (1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (0 : ℂ) := by
          simpa using h
        have h13 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (-1 : ℂ) := by
          have eq1 : (1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (0 : ℂ) := h12
          have eq2 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (-1 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (0 : ℂ) - (1 : ℂ) := by
                calc
                  (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) - (1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
                  _ = (0 : ℂ) - (1 : ℂ) := by rw [eq1]
              _ = (-1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
          exact eq2
        have h14 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero, show (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by
            have h17 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
            rw [h17]
            simp
          ] at h13 ⊢
          all_goals try ring_nf at h13 ⊢
          all_goals try nlinarith
        have h15 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          calc
            (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) := by ring_nf
            _ = (1 : ℂ) - (- (k + 1 : ℂ)) := by rw [h14]
            _ = (1 : ℂ) + (k + 1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
            _ = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
              simp [Complex.ext_iff]
              all_goals ring_nf
        have h18 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have h17 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by
            have h18 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by
              simp [Complex.ext_iff]
              all_goals ring_nf
            rw [h15, h18]
          have h19 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := h17
          have h21 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
            rw [h19]
          have h22 : (1 / (1 /1 / lam) : ℂ) = lam := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
          have h23 : (1 / (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            norm_num
          rw [h22, h23] at h21
          exact_mod_cast h21
        have h19 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1 : ℕ)
        contradiction
      field_simp [h10, h8]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        have h3 : lam ≠ 1 := by
          have h4 := hlam_notA 0
          norm_num at h4 ⊢
          all_goals tauto
        intro h
        have h6 : lam = 1 := by
          have h7 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          have h8 : lam = 1 := by
            calc
              lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
              _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h7]
              _ = 1 := by ring
          exact h8
        contradiction
      simp [h2]
    | succ k ih =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by linarith)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h4 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
          exact h
        have eq1 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h4 ⊢
          ring_nf at h4 ⊢
          try { 
            nlinarith [hlam_ne_zero]
          }
        have h5 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          field_simp at eq1 ⊢
          all_goals try { 
            ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
            try { 
              nlinarith [hlam_ne_zero]
            }
          }
        have h6 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
        contradiction
      have h4 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      field_simp [h3, h4]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        have h3 : 1 / (1 - lam) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
          simpa using h3
        exact h4
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        have : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = (1 - (1 - lam)) := by ring
            _ = (1 - 0) := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        exact_mod_cast this
      have h4 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      contradiction
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih
        all_goals omega
      have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [eq1]
      have h3 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h4 : (1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have h6 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h7 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
          rw [h7]
          simp
        have eq3 : 1 / lam = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          field_simp at h4 ⊢
          ring_nf at h4 ⊢
          norm_num [Complex.ext_iff] at h4 ⊢
          constructor <;> try linarith
        have h8 : ∃ m : ℕ, 1 / lam = (m + 1 : ℂ) := by
          refine ⟨k + 1, ?_⟩
          simp [eq3]
          all_goals ring_nf
        rcases h8 with ⟨m, hm⟩
        have h9 : lam = 1 / ((m : ℂ) + 1) := by
          have h10 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (m + 1 : ℂ) := by
            simpa using hm
          have h11 : lam = 1 / (1 / lam) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
          rw [h11, h10]
        have h10 : ∃ k : ℕ, lam = 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1) := by
          refine ⟨m, ?_⟩
          all_goals simpa using h9
        rcases h10 with ⟨k, hk⟩
        specialize hlam_notA k
        contradiction
      field_simp [h3, h2]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        have h3 : 1 / (1 - lam) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
          simpa using h3
        exact h4
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        have h5 : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = (1 - lam) + 1 := by ring
            _ = 0 + 1 := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        exact h5
      have h4 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      contradiction
    | succ k =>
      cases k with
      | zero =>
        have h2 : α 1 = α 0 / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ))) := by
          specialize hαk 1 (by norm_num)
          simpa using hαk
        rw [h2]
        have h3 : α 0 ≠ 0 := by
          apply ih 0
          all_goals linarith
        have h4 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h5 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          have h6 : 1 / lam = 2 := by
            have eq1 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ)) = 0 := h5
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq1 ⊢
            all_goals try { ring_nf at eq1 ⊢; norm_num at eq1 ⊢; try { tauto } }
          have h7 : lam = 1 / 2 := by
            have h8 : 1 / lam = 2 := h6
            have h9 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
            have h10 : lam = 1 / (1 / lam) := by
              field_simp [h9]
            rw [h10, h8]
            all_goals norm_num
          have h8 : lam = 1 / 2 := h7
          have h9 : lam ≠ 1 / ((1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            apply hlam_notA 1
          have h10 : (1 / ((1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / 2 : ℂ) := by
            norm_num
          rw [h10] at h9
          contradiction
        have h5 : α 0 / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ))) ≠ 0 := by
          apply div_ne_zero
          exact h3
          exact h4
        simpa using h5
      | succ k =>
        have h2 : α (k + 2) = α (k + 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
          specialize hαk (k + 2) (by omega)
          simpa using hαk
        have h3 : α (k + 1) ≠ 0 := by
          apply ih (k + 1)
          all_goals omega
        have h4 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h5 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          have eq1 : (k + 2 : ℂ) + 1 = (k + 3 : ℂ) := by
            simp at *
            all_goals ring_nf
          have h7 : 1 / lam = (k + 3 : ℂ) := by
            have eq1 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := h5
            have eq2 : (k + 2 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
              have h10 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by simp
              rw [h10]
              simp
            field_simp [show lam ≠ 0 by exact hlam_ne_zero, eq2] at eq1 ⊢
            ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
            constructor
            · ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
              nlinarith
            · ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
              nlinarith
          have h8 : lam = 1 / (k + 3 : ℂ) := by
            have h7' : 1 / lam = (k + 3 : ℂ) := h7
            have h9 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
            have h10 : lam = 1 / (1 / lam) := by
              field_simp [h9]
            rw [h10, h7']
          have h10 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            apply hlam_notA (k + 2)
          have h11 : (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / (k + 3 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
            have h12 : (k + 2 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 3 : ℕ) := by omega
            rw [show (k + 2 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 3 : ℕ) by omega]
            all_goals simp
          rw [h11] at h10
          rw [show lam = 1 / (k + 3 : ℂ) by exact h8] at h10
          all_goals tauto
        have h5 : α (k + 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ))) ≠ 0 := by
          apply div_ne_zero
          exact h3
          exact h4
        rw [h2]
        simpa using h5
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : lam = 1 := by
          have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        have h4 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
          rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
          norm_num
        contradiction
      have h3 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := h2
        field_simp [h4]
      exact h3
    | succ k ih =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        have h5 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h6 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
          rw [h6]
          simp
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq2 : (k + 2 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
          have eq3 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = (k + 2 - 1 / lam) / (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
            field_simp [h5]
            all_goals ring
          rw [eq3] at eq1
          have h7 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := h5
          field_simp [h7] at eq1 ⊢
          all_goals try tauto
        have eq3 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have h8 : (k + 2 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = 0 := eq2
          have eq4 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            have h9 : (k + 2 : ℂ) - (1 / lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
              simpa using h8
            have eq5 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
              calc
                (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) - ((k + 2 : ℂ) - (1 / lam : ℂ)) := by ring
                _ = (k + 2 : ℂ) - 0 := by rw [h9]
                _ = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by ring
            exact eq5
          exact eq4
        have eq4 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have eq5 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq3
          have h10 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
          have eq6 : lam = 1 / (1 / lam : ℂ) := by
            field_simp [h10]
          rw [eq6]
          rw [eq5]
          all_goals try simp
        have h8 : lam ≠ 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have h9 : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1) := hlam_notA
          specialize h9 (k + 1)
          have h10 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            ring_nf
          rw [h10] at h9
          simpa using h9
        contradiction
      have h7 : α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) ≠ 0 := by
        apply div_ne_zero
        exact h3
        exact h4
      exact h7
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        have h3 : lam ≠ 1 := by
          specialize hlam_notA 0
          norm_num at hlam_notA ⊢
          all_goals try tauto
        by_contra h
        have h6 : lam = 1 := by
          have h5 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          have h6 : lam = 1 := by
            calc
              lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
              _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h5]
              _ = 1 := by ring
          exact h6
        tauto
      simp [h2]
    | succ k ih =>
      have h8 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by linarith)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h8]
      have h9 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h10 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact_mod_cast h
        have eq2 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq1 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
          norm_num at eq1 ⊢
          all_goals try nlinarith
        have eq3 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 = 0 := by
          have eq4 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := eq2
          calc
            (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + 1 * lam - 1 := by ring_nf
            _ = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 := by ring_nf
            _ = 0 := by rw [eq4]
        have eq4 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
          calc
            (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = ( (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam - 1 ) + 1 := by ring_nf
            _ = (0 : ℂ) + 1 := by rw [eq3]
            _ = 1 := by ring_nf
        have eq5 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have eq6 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := eq4
          have eq7 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            simp at *
            all_goals ring_nf
          rw [eq7] at eq6
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq6 ⊢
          all_goals try ring_nf at eq6 ⊢
          all_goals try exact eq6
        have h11 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          specialize hlam_notA (k + 1)
          simpa using hlam_notA
        contradiction
      apply div_ne_zero
      exact h9
      exact h10
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        have h3 : 1 / (1 - lam) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have h6 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
          have h7 : 1 / (1 - lam) = 0 := h3
          simp [Complex.div_eq_zero_iff, h7] at *
          all_goals tauto
        exact h6
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        have h5 : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = (1 - lam) + 1 := by ring
            _ = 0 + 1 := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        exact h5
      have h4 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        simp
      have h5 : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
      contradiction
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      have h3 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq2 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq7 : (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
          have h8 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := eq2
          calc
            (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) - 1 := by ring
            _ = (0) - 1 := by rw [h8]
            _ = -1 := by ring
        have h10 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h11 : (k + 1 : ℕ) ≥ 1 := by omega
          have h12 : (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ≠ 0 := by
            norm_cast at *
            all_goals omega
          tauto
        have eq11 : (1 - 1 / lam) = - ( (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 ) := by
          field_simp [h10] at eq7 ⊢
          all_goals try { ring_nf at eq7 ⊢; try { nlinarith } }
        have eq14 : 1 / lam = (k + 3 : ℂ) := by
          have eq15 : (1 - 1 / lam) = - ( (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 ) := eq11
          have eq16 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 3 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 - (1 - 1 / lam) := by ring
              _ = 1 - (- ( (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 ) ) := by rw [eq15]
              _ = 1 + ( (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 ) := by ring
              _ = (k + 3 : ℂ) := by
                ring_nf
          exact eq16
        have eq15 : lam = 1 / (k + 3 : ℂ) := by
          have eq16 : 1 / lam = (k + 3 : ℂ) := eq14
          have eq17 : lam ≠ 0 := by
            exact hlam_ne_zero
          have eq18 : lam = 1 / (1 / lam) := by
            field_simp [eq17]
          rw [eq18, eq16]
          all_goals try { simp }
        have h13 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 2)
        have h14 : (k + 2 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 3 : ℕ) := by
          omega
        have h15 : 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) = (1 / (k + 3 : ℂ)) := by
          rw [show (k + 2 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 3 : ℕ) by omega]
          all_goals norm_num
        rw [h15] at h13
        rw [eq15] at h13
        all_goals try { tauto }
      rw [eq1]
      have h4 : α k ≠ 0 := h2
      have h6 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := h3
      field_simp [h6, h4]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : lam = 1 := by
          have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        have h5 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
          rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
          norm_num
        have h6 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
        contradiction
      have h7 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        simp [h2]
      exact h7
    | succ k =>
      have h8 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      have h9 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have h10 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq2 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
          have h11 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := eq1
          calc
            (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) - 1 : ℂ) := by ring
            _ = (0 - 1 : ℂ) := by rw [h11]
            _ = -1 := by ring
        have eq3 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by
          field_simp at eq2 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq2 ⊢
          norm_cast at eq2 ⊢
        have eq4 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by
