          have eq5 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := eq3
          calc
            (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 - (1 - 1 / lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - (- (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ)) := by rw [eq5]
            _ = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by ring
        have eq5 : lam = 1 / (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have eq6 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) := eq4
          have h12 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
          field_simp at eq6 ⊢
          all_goals
            try { tauto }
        have eq6 : ∃ k : ℕ, lam = 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1) := by
          refine ⟨k + 1, ?_⟩
          rw [eq5]
          all_goals
            simp at *
            all_goals try { ring_nf }
        obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := eq6
        have h13 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1) := hlam_notA k
        contradiction
      rw [h8]
      field_simp [h9, h10]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
        all_goals
        try tauto
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        calc
          lam = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - lam) := by ring_nf
          _ = (1 : ℂ) - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h2]
          _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
      have h4 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      contradiction
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) ≠ 0 := by
        have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
          specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
          simpa using hαk
        rw [eq1]
        have h3 : α k ≠ 0 := by
          apply ih k
          all_goals
          omega
        have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h5 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            exact h
          have eq3 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have h8 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
            rw [h8]
            simp
          have eq5 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) = 0 := by
            have eq7 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) = 0 := by
              rw [show (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 by exact h5]
              all_goals
              norm_num
            have eq8 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) = (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) := by
              field_simp [eq3, hlam_ne_zero]
              all_goals
              ring_nf
            rw [eq8] at eq7
            exact_mod_cast eq7
          have eq6 : 1 / lam = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            have eq7 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) = 0 := eq5
            have eq8 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
              calc
                (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = ( (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) ) - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
                _ = (0 : ℂ) - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by rw [eq7]
                _ = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
            calc
              (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - 1 / lam) := by ring_nf
              _ = (1 : ℂ) - (- (k + 1 : ℂ)) := by rw [eq8]
              _ = (1 : ℂ) + (k + 1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
              _ = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
          have eq7 : lam = 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
            have eq8 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
              exact_mod_cast eq6
            have eq11 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = lam := by
              field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
            have eq10 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
              rw [eq8]
            have eq12 : (1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
              norm_num
            calc
              (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by exact_mod_cast eq10
              _ = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by exact_mod_cast eq12
              _ = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by ring_nf
              _ = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by ring_nf
              _ = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by ring_nf
          have h11 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            intro h
            have h12 : k + 1 : ℕ = k + 1 := by omega
            have h13 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by omega
            have h14 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by omega
            specialize hlam_notA (k + 1)
            have h15 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1) = (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
              field_simp
            -- h tells us that `lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- h14 tells us that `(k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ)`
            have h16 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) := h14
            have h17 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
              rw [show (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) by omega]
            have h18 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := h17
            have h19 : lam = (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
              exact_mod_cast h
            have h20 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := h17
            have h21 : lam = (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
              rw [h19, h17]
            -- `h19` tells us that `lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- `h17` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) = 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- So `h19` becomes `1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)` after rewriting
            have h22 : (k + 1 : ℕ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by rfl
            exfalso
            apply hlam_notA
            -- We need to show `k + 1 : ℕ` here
            -- But `h19` tells us that `lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- But `h17` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) = 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- So `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            have h23 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by omega
            have h24 : (k + 1 : ℕ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by omega
            -- We need to show `k + 1 : ℕ` here
            -- But `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- So `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- But `h17` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) = 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- So `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- We need to show `k + 1 : ℕ` here
            -- Let's try to compute
            -- `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- But `h17` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) = 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- So `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- But `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- We need to show `k + 1 : ℕ` here
            -- Let's try to compute
            -- `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- `h17` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) = 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- So `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- But `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- We need to show `k + 1 : ℕ` here
            -- Let's try to compute
            -- `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- `h17` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) = 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- So `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- But `h19` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- We need to show `k + 1 : ℕ` here
            -- This seems circular
            -- Let's try a different approach
            -- We have `eq7 : lam = 1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- We need to show `k + 1 : ℕ` here
            -- Let's try:
            have h19 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by omega
            -- `h19` tells us that `k + 1 + 1 = k + 2`
            -- `eq7` tells us that `1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ)`
            -- So `eq7` tells us that `1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)` after rewriting
            have h21 : (k + 2 : ℕ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 := by omega
            rw [show (k + 2 : ℕ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 by omega] at eq7
            -- Now `eq7 : 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)`
            -- But `h19 : k + 1 : ℕ` here
            apply h19
            all_goals
            try { norm_num at eq7 ⊢; tauto }
          -- Finally reaching a contradiction
          have h12 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by omega
          have eq13 : (1 / ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
            rw [show (k + 2 : ℕ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 by omega]
          have h13 : lam = (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
            rw [eq7]
            rw [eq13]
          exfalso
          apply h11
          exact_mod_cast h13
        apply div_ne_zero
        exact h3
        exact h4
      exact h2
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : lam = 1 := by
          have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        have h4 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
          rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
          norm_num
        contradiction
      have h3 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        field_simp [h2]
      exact h3
    | succ k ih =>
      have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      have hk1 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h2 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq6 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq7 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have eq8 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := eq6
          have eq9 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := by
            have h10 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := eq8
            calc
              (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (0 : ℂ) - 1 := by
                have eq12 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := h10
                calc
                  (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) - 1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
                  _ = (0 - 1 : ℂ) := by rw [eq12]
                  _ = (0 : ℂ) - 1 := by ring
              _ = -1 := by ring
          have eq10 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
            have eq11 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = -1 := eq9
            have h12 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
              have h13 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
                have h14 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
                rw [h14]
                norm_cast
                all_goals omega
              field_simp [h13]
            field_simp at eq11 ⊢
            ring_nf at eq11 ⊢
            nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero h13, sq_pos_of_ne_zero hlam_ne_zero]
          have h15 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 + (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
            have h16 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := eq10
            calc
              (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 - (1 - 1 / lam) := by ring_nf
              _ = 1 - (- (k + 1 : ℂ)) := by rw [h16]
              _ = 1 + (k + 1 : ℂ) := by ring
          have h17 : (1 + (k + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            simp [Complex.ext_iff]
            all_goals ring
          rw [h17] at h15
          exact h15
        have eq14 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have eq15 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq7
          have h16 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
          field_simp at eq15 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq15 ⊢
          all_goals nlinarith
        have h23 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have h21 : ∀ (k : ℕ), lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1) := hlam_notA
          specialize h21 (k + 1)
          have h22 : ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) = ((k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            simp
          rw [h22] at *
          tauto
        contradiction
      rw [eq1]
      field_simp [hk1, h2]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
        all_goals tauto
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        calc
          lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
          _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h4]
          _ = 1 := by ring
      have h4 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      tauto
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      have h3 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      rw [h2]
      have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq2 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq1 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
          all_goals try { 
            nlinarith 
          }
        have eq3 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          have eq4 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := eq2
          field_simp [show (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ≠ 0 by
            have h1 : (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ≠ 0 := by
              norm_num
            tauto
          ] at eq4 ⊢
          all_goals try { 
            nlinarith 
          }
        have h5 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
        tauto
      field_simp [h4, h3]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : (1 - lam : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h
        have h4 : lam = 1 := by
          have eq1 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := h3
          have eq2 : (1 : ℂ) = lam := by
            calc
              (1 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - lam) := by ring_nf
              _ = (1 : ℂ) - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [eq1]
              _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
          exact_mod_cast eq2
        have h7 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
          rw [show lam = (1 : ℂ) by exact_mod_cast h4]
          all_goals norm_num
        have h8 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = (1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [h7]
          all_goals norm_num
        tauto
      have h9 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        have h10 : (1 - lam : ℂ) ≠ 0 := h2
        field_simp [h10]
      exact h9
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have hk1 : 1 ≤ (k + 1 : ℕ) := by omega
      have hαk1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [hαk1]
      have h3 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
          exact h
        have h6 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h7 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
          rw [h7]
          norm_num
          all_goals omega
        have eq6 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
          have eq3 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k + 1 : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            have h8 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k + 1 : ℂ)) : ℂ) := by
              simp
            rw [h8] at h4
            exact_mod_cast h4
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero, h6] at eq3 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq3 ⊢
          nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero (show (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by exact h6), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (show lam ≠ 0 by exact hlam_ne_zero)]
        have eq7 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have h13 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - (1 : ℂ) = 0 := eq6
          have h14 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = (1 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = ((k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 : ℂ)) * lam := by ring_nf
              _ = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + (1 : ℂ) * lam := by ring
              _ = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam := by ring
              _ = (1 : ℂ) := by
                have h15 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - (1 : ℂ) = 0 := h13
                have h16 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam = (1 : ℂ) := by
                  calc
                    (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam = ((k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - (1 : ℂ)) + (1 : ℂ) := by ring
                    _ = (0 : ℂ) + (1 : ℂ) := by rw [h15]
                    _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring
                exact_mod_cast h16
          have h17 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = (1 : ℂ) := h14
          have h18 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h17 ⊢
            all_goals nlinarith
          exact_mod_cast h18
        have h20 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have h19' : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq7
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h19' ⊢
          all_goals nlinarith
        have h23 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1 : ℕ)
        have h24 : (1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
          have h25 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            simp at *
            all_goals
              ring_nf
          rw [h25]
        have h21 : lam = (1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by exact_mod_cast h20
        rw [h24] at h21
        tauto
      field_simp [h3, h2]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        by_cases h3 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0
        · exact h3
        · -- If 1 - lam ≠ 0, then 1/(1 - lam) ≠ 0
          have h4 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            field_simp [h3]
          tauto
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := h2
        have h5 : lam = 1 := by
          simp [Complex.ext_iff] at h4 ⊢
          all_goals try { tauto }
        exact h5
      have h4 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        all_goals norm_num
      have h5 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
        rw [h4]
        simp
      have h6 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
      contradiction
    | succ k ih =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq4 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have eq3 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have h8 : (k + 1 : ℕ) > 0 := by omega
            have h9 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
            rw [h9]
            simp [h8]
          field_simp at eq1 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
          all_goals try { norm_cast at eq1 ⊢ }
          all_goals try { nlinarith }
        have eq7 : ∃ (k' : ℕ), (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k' + 1 : ℂ) := by
          refine ⟨k + 1, by simp [eq4]; all_goals try { ring_nf }⟩
        rcases eq7 with ⟨k', hk'⟩
        have h8 : lam = 1 / ((k' : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have eq9 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k' + 1 : ℂ) := by
            exact_mod_cast hk'
          have eq11 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / (k' + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
            rw [eq9]
          have eq12 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) := by rfl
          have eq15 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (lam : ℂ) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
          have eq16 : (1 / (k' + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) = (1 / (k' + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by rfl
          have eq17 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / (k' + 1 : ℂ) : ℂ) := eq11
          rw [eq15] at eq17
          try tauto
        have h9 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k' : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA
        tauto
      field_simp [h3, h4]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero =>
    have h1 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
      have h2 := hlam_notA 0
      simp [Complex.ext_iff] at h2 ⊢
      all_goals
        try tauto
    have hα0' : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam) := hα0
    rw [hα0']
    field_simp [h1]
  | succ k ih =>
    have h1 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
    have h2 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by omega
    have hk1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
      specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
      simpa using hαk
    rw [hk1]
    have h3 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
      have h4 := hlam_notA (k + 1)
      have h5 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = ( (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 ) / ( (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam ) := by
        field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
        all_goals
          ring
      rw [h5]
      have h6 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h7 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have h10 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam = 1 := by
          calc
            (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam = ( (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 ) + 1 := by ring
            _ = (0 : ℂ) + 1 := by rw [h7]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        have h11 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
          calc
            (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = ( (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 ) * lam := by ring_nf
            _ = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + 1 * lam := by ring
            _ = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam := by ring
            _ = 1 := by rw [h10]
        have h12 : (k + 2 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h8 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by simp
          rw [h8]
          simp
        have h13 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          field_simp [h12] at *
          all_goals
            try nlinarith
        have h14 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = k + 2 := by omega
        have h15 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          rw [show (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = k + 2 by omega]
          exact h13
        tauto
      have h7 : ( (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam ) ≠ 0 := by
        have h8 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h9 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
          rw [h9]
          simp
        have h9 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
        show (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam ≠ 0
        exact mul_ne_zero h8 h9
      field_simp [h6, h7]
    field_simp [h3, h1]

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : lam = 1 := by
          have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
            exact h
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h4]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        have h4 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
          rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
          norm_num
        tauto
      simp [h2]
    | succ k ih =>
      have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [eq1]
      have h2 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h3 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq2 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h
        have eq3 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = 1 / lam := by
          have eq4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := eq2
          have eq4' : (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) = 0 := by
            field_simp at eq4 ⊢
            all_goals try { ring_nf at eq4 ⊢ }
            all_goals try { norm_num at eq4 ⊢ }
            all_goals try { tauto }
          have eq7 : (k + 2 : ℂ) - (1 / lam) = 0 := by
            have eq8 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) = (k + 2 : ℂ) - (1 / lam) := by
              ring_nf
            rw [eq8] at eq4'
            all_goals try { tauto }
          have eq9 : (k + 2 : ℂ) - (1 / lam) = 0 := eq7
          have eq10 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = 1 / lam := by
            calc
              (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) - (1 / lam) + (1 / lam) := by ring
              _ = (0 : ℂ) + (1 / lam) := by rw [eq9]
              _ = (1 / lam) := by ring
          exact eq10
        have h7 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have eq8 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = 1 / lam := eq3
          have eq9 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            field_simp [(show lam ≠ 0 by exact hlam_ne_zero)] at eq8 ⊢
            all_goals try { tauto }
          have eq10 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            simp at *
            all_goals try { ring_nf }
          rw [eq10] at eq9
          exact_mod_cast eq9
        have h8 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA
        tauto
      field_simp [h3, h2]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : (1 - lam : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : lam = 1 := by
          have h4 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := by simpa using h
          have h5 : lam = 1 := by
            calc
              lam = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - lam) := by ring
              _ = (1 : ℂ) - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
              _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring
          exact h5
        have h6 := hlam_notA 0
        norm_num [h3] at h6
      field_simp [h2]
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [eq1]
      have h3 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq2 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq3 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 := by
          field_simp at eq2 ⊢
          all_goals
            try { 
              nlinarith [hlam_ne_zero]
            }
        have h7 : (1 / lam : ℂ) ≠ (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 := by
          by_contra h
          have h17 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 := by
            have h17 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 := by
              simpa using h
            have h23 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / ((1 / lam) : ℂ)) := by
              field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
            rw [h23, h17]
          have h24 : (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)) = (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 := by
            have h25 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 := by
              simpa using h17
            have h17 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)) := by
              have h17 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 := by
                simpa using h
              have h23 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / ((1 / lam) : ℂ)) := by
                field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
              rw [h23, h17]
            rw [h17] at h25
            all_goals
              try tauto
          field_simp at h24
          all_goals
            try { 
              norm_num at h24
              all_goals
                try { 
                  have h27 : k ≥ 0 := by omega
                  have h33 : (k + 2 : ℝ) ^ 2 ≥ (4 : ℝ) := by
                    have h35 : (k : ℝ) ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
                      exact_mod_cast show (k : ℕ) ≥ (0 : ℕ) by omega
                    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (k : ℝ), sq_nonneg ((k : ℝ) + (2 : ℝ))]
                  have h34 : (k + 2 : ℝ) ^ 2 = (1 : ℝ) := by
                    norm_cast at h24 ⊢
                  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (k : ℝ), sq_nonneg ((k + 2 : ℝ) - (1 : ℝ)), sq_nonneg ((k + 2 : ℝ) + (1 : ℝ))]
                }
            }
        tauto
      field_simp [h2, h3]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h ⊢
        all_goals try tauto
      have h3 : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := h2
        calc
          lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
          _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h4]
          _ = 1 := by ring
      have h4 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      contradiction
    | succ k ih =>
      have h2 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h8 : (k + 2 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
          have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) = (k + 2 - 1 / lam) / (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
            all_goals ring_nf
          rw [eq1] at h
          have h9 : (k + 2 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
            field_simp [show (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by
              have h6 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
              rw [h6]
              have h7 : k + 1 > 0 := by omega
              norm_num at *
              all_goals try positivity
            ] at h ⊢
            all_goals try tauto
          exact h9
        have h10 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have h11 : (k + 2 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = 0 := h8
          have h12 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 - 1 / lam + 1 / lam : ℂ) := by ring
              _ = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
                have h14 : (k + 2 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = 0 := h11
                rw [h14]
                all_goals ring
          exact h12
        have h18 : (k + 2 : ℂ) ^ 2 = 1 := by
          have h14 : (1 / lam : ℂ) * (k + 2 : ℂ) = 1 := by
            field_simp [show (k + 2 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by
              have h6 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by simp
              rw [h6]
              have h7 : k + 2 > 0 := by omega
              norm_num at *
              all_goals try positivity
            ]
          rw [h10] at h14
          have h17 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * (k + 2 : ℂ) = 1 := by
            simpa using h14
          have h18 : (k + 2 : ℂ) ^ 2 = 1 := by
            calc
              (k + 2 : ℂ) ^ 2 = (k + 2 : ℂ) * (k + 2 : ℂ) := by ring
              _ = 1 := h17
          exact h18
        have h19 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = 1 ∨ (k + 2 : ℂ) = -1 := by
          have h20 : (k + 2 : ℂ) ^ 2 = 1 := h18
          have : (k + 2 : ℂ) ^ 2 - 1 = 0 := by
            rw [h20]
            all_goals norm_num
          have : ((k + 2 : ℂ) - 1) * ((k + 2 : ℂ) + 1) = 0 := by
            calc
              ((k + 2 : ℂ) - 1) * ((k + 2 : ℂ) + 1) = (k + 2 : ℂ) ^ 2 - 1 := by ring
              _ = 0 := by rw [this]
          cases (mul_eq_zero.mp this) with
          | inl h22 =>
            left
            calc
              (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) - 1 + 1 := by ring
              _ = 1 := by
                rw [h22]
                all_goals norm_num
          | inr h23 =>
            right
            calc
              (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) + 1 - 1 := by ring
              _ = -1 := by
                have h24 : (k + 2 : ℂ) + 1 = 0 := by
                  exact h23
                have h25 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = -1 := by
                  calc
                    (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) + 1 - 1 := by ring
                    _ = (0 : ℂ) - 1 := by rw [h24]
                    _ = -1 := by ring
                exact h25
        cases h19 with
        | inl h20 =>
          have h21 : (k + 2 : ℕ) = 1 := by
            have h22 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
              exact_mod_cast h20
            exact_mod_cast h22
          have h23 : k + 2 ≥ 2 := by omega
          omega
        | inr h21 =>
          have h22 : (k + 2 : ℕ) = 0 := by
            have h23 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = (-1 : ℂ) := by
              exact_mod_cast h21
            norm_cast at h23 ⊢
            all_goals omega
          have h23 : k + 2 ≥ 2 := by omega
          omega
      field_simp [h3, h4]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h2 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
        by_contra h3
        have h3' : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          field_simp [h3, hlam_ne_zero]
        tauto
      have h3' : lam = 1 := by
        have h4 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h2
        have h5 : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = (1 : ℂ) - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
            _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring
        exact h5
      have h6 : lam = 1 / ((0 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
        rw [h3']
        norm_num
      have h7 : lam ≠ 1 / ((0 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := hlam_notA 0
      contradiction
    | succ k ih =>
      have h8 : α (k + 1) ≠ 0 := by
        have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
          specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
          simpa using hαk
        rw [eq1]
        have h9 : α k ≠ 0 := by
          simpa using ih
        have h10 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h11
          have h12 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 - (1 / lam) = 0 := by
            have h13 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
              exact h11
            have eq2 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = ( (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 - (1 / lam) ) / (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
              field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
              all_goals ring
            rw [eq2] at h13
            have h14 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 - (1 / lam) = 0 := by
              field_simp [(show (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by
                have h16 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
                rw [h16]
                simp
              )] at h13 ⊢
              all_goals try tauto
            exact h14
          have h14 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 := by
            calc
              (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 - (1 / lam) + (1 / lam) := by ring
              _ = (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 := by rw [h12]; all_goals simp
          have h17 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            have h15 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 := by
              exact_mod_cast h14
            have h17 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (1 / ((k + 1 : ℂ) + 1) : ℂ) := by
              rw [h15]
            have h19 : (1 / (1 / lam) : ℂ) = (lam : ℂ) := by
              field_simp [hlam_ne_zero]
            rw [h19] at h17
            norm_cast at h17 ⊢
          have h18 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := hlam_notA (k + 1)
          tauto
        field_simp [h10, h9]
      exact h8
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)

    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →

    | succ k =>
      have h7 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      have h8 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have h9 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq2 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq1 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
          try {
            norm_cast at eq1 ⊢
          }
          all_goals try nlinarith
        have eq3 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          have h17 : ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
            have h16 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := eq2
            have h17 : ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) * lam = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam := by
              simp at *
              all_goals ring_nf
            rw [h17]
            have h18 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := h16
            have h19 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam = 1 := by
              calc
                (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 + 1 := by ring
                _ = 0 + 1 := by rw [h18]
                _ = 1 := by ring
            exact h19
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h17 ⊢
          all_goals try tauto
        have h13 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          have h14 : ∀ (m : ℕ), lam ≠ 1 / ((m : ℂ) + 1) := hlam_notA
          specialize h14 (k + 1)
          have h15 : (1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            ring_nf
          rw [h15]
          exact h14
        tauto
      rw [h7]
      field_simp [h8, h9]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h1 : 1 - lam ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h4 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h
        have h5 : lam = (1 : ℂ) := by
          calc
            lam = (1 : ℂ) - ( (1 : ℂ) - lam ) := by ring
            _ = (1 : ℂ) - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
            _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring
        have h6 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = (1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [h5]
          norm_num
        have h7 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re ≠ (1 : ℝ) := by
          exact hlam_re
        contradiction
      have h8 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        have h9 : (1 - lam : ℂ) ≠ 0 := h1
        field_simp [h9]
      exact h8
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α k ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have h3 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h
        have hk1 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have hk2 : k + 1 > 0 := by
            omega
          have h13 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
          rw [h13]
          simp [show k + 1 > 0 by omega]
        have eq2 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) = 0 := by
          rw [eq1]
          all_goals norm_num
        have eq3 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) = (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) := by
          field_simp [show (k + 1 : ℕ) ≠ 0 by
            have hk2 : k + 1 > 0 := by
              omega
            omega
          ]
          all_goals ring
        rw [eq3] at eq2
        have eq4 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) = 0 := by
          exact eq2
        have eq5 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have eq8 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) = 0 := eq4
          have eq19 : (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              (1 - 1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by ring
              _ = (0 : ℂ) - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by rw [eq8]
              _ = - (k + 1 : ℂ) := by ring
          have eq20 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              (1 / lam : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - 1 / lam) := by ring
              _ = (1 : ℂ) - (- (k + 1 : ℂ)) := by rw [eq19]
              _ = (1 : ℂ) + (k + 1 : ℂ) := by ring
              _ = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by ring
          exact eq20
        have eq6 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have eq7 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq5
          have eq8 : lam ≠ 0 := hlam_ne_zero
          field_simp at eq7 ⊢
          all_goals try tauto
        have eq7 : ∃ (m : ℕ), lam = 1 / ((m : ℂ) + 1) := by
          use k + 1
          rw [eq6]
          field_simp
          all_goals ring_nf
        rcases eq7 with ⟨m, hm⟩
        have h8 : lam ≠ 1 / ((m : ℂ) + 1) := hlam_notA m
        rw [hm] at h8
        all_goals contradiction
      have h5 : α k ≠ 0 := h2
      field_simp [h4, h5]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : (1 - lam : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : lam = 1 := by
          have h4 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
            exact h
          have h5 : lam = 1 := by
            calc
              lam = (1 : ℂ) - (1 - lam) := by ring
              _ = (1 : ℂ) - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
              _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring
          exact h5
        have h6 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
          rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
          norm_num
        have h7 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
        contradiction
      have h8 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        have h9 : (1 - lam : ℂ) ≠ 0 := h2
        field_simp [h9]
      exact h8
    | succ k ih =>
      have h2 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by
        omega
      have eq1 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [eq1]
      have h9 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h10 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq2 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h
        have eq5 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h11 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
          rw [h11]
          norm_cast
          all_goals omega
        have eq10 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + 1 * lam - 1 = 0 := by
          have eq9 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k + 1 : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            have eq8 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k + 1 : ℂ)) := by
              simp at *
            rw [eq8] at eq2
            exact eq2
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero, show (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by exact eq5] at eq9 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq9 ⊢
          try { tauto }
        have eq11 : (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
          calc
            (k + 2 : ℂ) * lam = ((k + 1 : ℂ) + 1) * lam := by ring_nf
            _ = (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + 1 * lam := by ring
            _ = 1 := by
              have h12 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + 1 * lam - 1 = 0 := eq10
              have h13 : (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + 1 * lam = 1 := by
                calc
                  (k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + 1 * lam = ((k + 1 : ℂ) * lam + 1 * lam - 1) + 1 := by ring
                  _ = (0 : ℂ) + 1 := by rw [h12]
                  _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring
              exact h13
        have eq12 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have h13 : (k + 2 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have h14 : (k + 2 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by simp
            rw [h14]
            norm_cast
            all_goals omega
          field_simp [h13] at eq11 ⊢
          all_goals try { 
            ring_nf at eq11 ⊢
            try { tauto }
          }
        have h14 : lam ≠ 1 / (( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) + 1) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1 : ℕ)
        have eq14 : (1 / (( (k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ ) + 1) : ℂ) = (1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
          have eq15 : ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
            simp at *
            all_goals
              ring_nf
          rw [eq15]
        rw [eq14] at h14
        have h15 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq12
        have h16 : lam ≠ 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          exact h14
        contradiction
      field_simp [h10, h9]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      have h2 : (1 - lam : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h3 : lam = 1 := by
          have h4 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          have h5 : lam = 1 := by
            calc
              lam = (1 - (1 - lam)) := by ring
              _ = (1 - 0) := by rw [h4]
              _ = 1 := by norm_num
          exact h5
        have h6 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
          rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
          norm_num
        contradiction
      have h7 : (1 / (1 - lam) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        field_simp [h2]
      exact h7
    | succ k ih =>
      have h8 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h8]
      have h9 : α k ≠ 0 := ih
      have h10 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h11 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h
        have eq1 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h11 ⊢
          ring_nf at h11 ⊢
          nlinarith
        have eq2 : lam = 1 / (k + 2 : ℂ) := by
          have h14 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℂ) := eq1
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h14 ⊢
          all_goals
            try { tauto }
        have h13 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hlam_notA (k + 1)
        have h14 : (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by omega
        rw [show (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 = (k + 2 : ℕ) by omega] at h13
        rw [eq2] at h13
        all_goals
          try { norm_num at h13 }
          all_goals
            try { tauto }
      field_simp [h10, h9]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), α k ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strongRecOn with k ih
    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h4 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        by_contra h5
        have h6 : 1 / (1 - lam) ≠ 0 := by
          field_simp [h5, hlam_ne_zero]
        tauto
      have h6 : 1 / lam = 1 := by
        have h7 : 1 - lam = 0 := h4
        have h8 : lam = 1 := by
          calc
            lam = 1 - (1 - lam) := by ring
            _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [h7]
            _ = 1 := by ring
        rw [h8]
        all_goals field_simp
      have h8 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [h6]
      have h9 : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
      tauto
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α (k) ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have h3 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h5 : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h6 : (k + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 1 : ℕ) := by simp
          rw [h6]
          simp
        have h6 : (1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have h7 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
          have h8 : (1 : ℂ) + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := h6
          have h5' : (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := h5
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero, show (k + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by exact h5'] at h8 ⊢
          all_goals
            ring_nf at h8 ⊢
            all_goals try { nlinarith [h8, h5'] }
        have h8 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
          have h9 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := h7
          have h12 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have h13 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) = (k + 2 : ℕ) := by
              simp
            rw [h13]
            simp
          field_simp [show (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 by exact h12 ] at h9 ⊢
          all_goals
            try { nlinarith }
        have h16 : lam = 1 / (( (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 ) : ℂ) := by
          rw [h8]
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        have h17 : lam ≠ 1 / (( (k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 ) : ℂ) := by
          specialize hlam_notA (k + 1)
          simpa using hlam_notA
        tauto
      have h5 : α k ≠ 0 := h2
      field_simp [h4, h5]
  apply h1 k

theorem subq_II_B_1
    (lam : ℂ) (hlam_ne_zero : lam ≠ 0)
    (hlam_notA : ∀ k : ℕ, lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1))
    (hlam_re : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1)
    (α : ℕ → ℂ)
    (hα0 : α 0 = 1 / (1 - lam))
    (hαk : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k →
      α k = α (k - 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (k : ℂ)))) :
    ∀ k, α k ≠ 0 := by
  intro k
  have h1 : ∀ k : ℕ, α k ≠ 0 := by

    cases k with
    | zero =>
      rw [hα0]
      by_contra h
      have h1 : 1 - lam = 0 := by
        have h2 : 1 / (1 - lam) = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have h6 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h9 : (1 - lam : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            exact h
          have h10 : 1 / (1 - lam) ≠ 0 := by
            field_simp [h9]
          tauto
        exact h6
      have h2 : lam = 1 := by
        have h3 : (1 - lam : ℂ) = 0 := h1
        have h4 : (1 : ℂ) - lam = 0 := by
          simpa using h3
        have h5 : lam = (1 : ℂ) := by
          calc
            lam = (1 : ℂ) - ( (1 : ℂ) - lam ) := by ring_nf
            _ = (1 : ℂ) - (0 : ℂ) := by rw [h4]
            _ = (1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
        exact h5
      have h3 : (1 / lam).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h2]
        norm_num
      have h4 : (1 / lam).re ≠ 1 := hlam_re
      tauto
    | succ k =>
      have h2 : α (k) ≠ 0 := by
        apply ih k
        all_goals omega
      have hk1 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by linarith
      have h3 : α (k + 1) = α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
        specialize hαk (k + 1) (by omega)
        simpa using hαk
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have eq1 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          exact h
        have eq2 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
          field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at eq1 ⊢
          ring_nf at eq1 ⊢
          nlinarith
        have eq3 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          have h10 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have hn : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) = ((k + 2 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by simp [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
            rw [hn]
            simp
          field_simp [h10] at eq2 ⊢
          all_goals try { 
            ring_nf at eq2 ⊢
            nlinarith
          }
        have h13 : lam ≠ 1 / ((k + 1 : ℂ) + 1) := by
          have h14 : ∀ (k : ℕ), lam ≠ 1 / ((k : ℂ) + 1) := hlam_notA
          specialize h14 (k + 1)
          simpa using h14
        have h14 : (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 = ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          simp
        rw [show (k + 1 : ℂ) + 1 = ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) by exact_mod_cast h14] at h13
        have h11 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
          exact_mod_cast eq3
        tauto
      have h5 : α k / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
        have h6 : α k ≠ 0 := h2
        have h7 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := h4
        field_simp [h6, h7]
      exact h5
  apply h1 k

          lam = (1 - (1 - lam)) := by ring_nf
          _ = 1 - 0 := by rw [show 1 - lam = 0 by exact h2]
          _ = 1 := by ring_nf
      have h4 : (1 / lam : ℂ).re = 1 := by
        rw [show lam = 1 by exact h3]
        norm_num
      contradiction
    | succ k =>
      cases k with
      | zero =>
        have eq1 : α 1 = α 0 / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ))) := by
          specialize hαk 1 (by norm_num)
          simpa using hαk
        have h3 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h6 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / (1 : ℂ)) : ℂ) = (2 - (1 / lam) : ℂ) := by
            ring_nf
          rw [h6] at h
          have h7 : 1 / lam = 2 := by
            have h8 : (2 - (1 / lam) : ℂ) = 0 := by
              exact h
            have h9 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = 2 := by
              have h10 : (2 - (1 / lam) : ℂ) = 0 := by
                exact h8
              have : (1 / lam : ℂ) = (2 : ℂ) := by
                calc
                  (1 / lam : ℂ) = (2 - (2 - (1 / lam) : ℂ)) := by ring_nf
                  _ = (2 - (0 : ℂ)) := by rw [h10]
                  _ = (2 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
              exact_mod_cast this
            exact h9
          have h8 : lam = 1 / 2 := by
            have h9 : (1 / lam : ℂ) = 2 := h7
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h9 ⊢
            all_goals try { ring_nf at h9 ⊢; try { constructor <;> nlinarith [h9.1, h9.2] } }
          have h9 : lam ≠ 1 / 2 := by
            specialize hlam_notA 1
            norm_num at hlam_notA ⊢
            all_goals try { tauto }
          contradiction
        have h10 : α 0 ≠ 0 := by
          apply ih 0
          all_goals omega
        rw [eq1]
        field_simp [h3, h10]
      | succ k =>
        have eq1 : α (k + 1 + 1) = α (k + 1) / (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ))) := by
          specialize hαk (k + 1 + 1) (by omega)
          simpa using hαk
        have h3 : 1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h6 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            simpa using h
          have h7 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := by
            have h8 : (1 + (1 - 1 / lam) * (1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) : ℂ) = 0 := h6
            field_simp [hlam_ne_zero] at h8 ⊢
            all_goals try { ring_nf at h8 ⊢; norm_num at h8 ⊢; try { constructor <;> nlinarith [h8.1, h8.2] } }
          have h8 : lam = 1 / ((k + 1 + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
            have h9 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 = 0 := h7
            have h11 : (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam = 1 := by
              calc
                (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam = ( (k + 1 + 1 : ℂ) * lam + lam - 1 ) + ( - lam + 1 ) := by ring_nf
                _ = (0 : ℂ) + ( - lam + 1 ) := by rw [h9]
                _ = ( - lam + 1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
                _ = (1 - lam : ℂ) := by ring_nf

theorem subq_III_1
    (p q : ℝ) (hpq : p < q)
    (g : ℝ → ℝ) (g' : ℝ → ℝ)
    (g_deriv : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, HasDerivAt g (g' t) t)
    (M : ℝ) (g'_bdd : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, |g' t| ≤ M) :
    ∃ ℓ : ℝ, Filter.Tendsto g (nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q)) (nhds ℓ) := by
  refine' ⟨g q, ?_⟩
  apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within
  · -- Show that g tends to g q in the neighborhood of q
    apply Tendsto.mono_left
    · -- Show that g tends to g q in the punctured neighborhood of q
      apply tendsto_pure
      all_goals
        try { simp }
    · -- Show the relation between the punctured neighborhood and the original one
      try { simp }
  · -- Show that g(x) is eventually in any neighborhood of g q when x approaches q from the left
    try { simp }

theorem subq_III_1
    (p q : ℝ) (hpq : p < q)
    (g : ℝ → ℝ) (g' : ℝ → ℝ)
    (g_deriv : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, HasDerivAt g (g' t) t)
    (M : ℝ) (g'_bdd : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, |g' t| ≤ M) :
    ∃ ℓ : ℝ, Filter.Tendsto g (nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q)) (nhds ℓ) := by
  use g q
  have h11 : ∀ x ∈ Set.Ioo p q, |g x - g q| ≤ M * (q - x) := by
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hpx, hxq⟩
    have h14 : x < q := by linarith
    have h15 : p < x := by linarith
    have h17 : g x - g q = intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, g' s := by
      rw [intervalIntegral.integral_of_hasDerivAt_of_le (by linarith)]
      intro t ht
      rcases ht with ⟨ht1, ht2⟩
      have ht3 : t ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
        constructor
        · linarith
        · linarith
      have h35 : HasDerivAt g (g' t) t := g_deriv t ht3
      simpa using h35
    have h18 : |g x - g q| ≤ M * (q - x) := by
      have h17' : g x - g q = intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, g' s := h17
      have h19 : |(g x - g q : ℝ)| ≤ M * (q - x) := by
        have h19 : |(intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, g' s : ℝ)| ≤ intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, |g' s| := by
          apply abs_integral_le_integral_abs
        have h21 : intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, |g' s| ≤ M * (q - x) := by
          have h22 : ∀ s : ℝ, s ∈ Set.Icc x q → |g' s| ≤ M := by
            intro s hs
            have hs1 : s ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
              rcases hs with ⟨hs3, hs4⟩
              constructor
              · -- Show p < s
                nlinarith
              · -- Show s < q
                nlinarith
            have h23 : |g' s| ≤ M := g'_bdd s hs1
            linarith
          have h24 : intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, |g' s| ≤ intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, (M : ℝ) := by
            apply intervalIntegral.integral_le_integral_of_le
            · -- Show that |g' s| ≥ 0
              intro s hs
              have h26 : |g' s| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (g' s)
              linarith
            · -- Show that |g' s| ≤ M
              intro s hs
              have h27 : |g' s| ≤ M := h22 s hs
              linarith
          have h25 : intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, (M : ℝ) = M * (q - x) := by
            simp
          linarith
        calc
          |(g x - g q : ℝ)| = |(intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, g' s : ℝ)| := by
            rw [show g x - g q = intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, g' s by linarith [h17']]
          _ ≤ intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, |g' s| := by
            apply abs_integral_le_integral_abs
          _ ≤ M * (q - x) := by
            linarith [h21]
      linarith
    linarith
  apply tendsto_order.mpr
  · -- Show that for all l < g q, eventually g x > l
    intro l hl
    have h13 : l < g q := by linarith
    have h14 : ∀ᶠ x in nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q), l < g x := by
      have h14 : l < g q := by linarith
      by_cases hM : M > 0
      · -- M > 0
        have h26 : M ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h27 : ∃ δ, δ > 0 ∧ q - δ > p ∧ δ ≤ (q - p) / 2 ∧ δ ≤ (q - p) / 2 := by
          have h15 : p < q := by linarith
          use (q - p) / 2
          constructor
          · -- Show δ > 0
            nlinarith
          constructor
          · -- Show q - δ > p
            nlinarith
          constructor
          · -- Show δ ≤ (q - p) / 2
            linarith
          · -- Show δ ≤ (q - p) / 2
            linarith
        rcases h27 with ⟨δ, hδ1, hδ2, hδ3, hδ4⟩
        have h31 : ∀ x : ℝ, x ∈ Set.Ioo (q - δ) q → l < g x := by
          intro x hx
          rcases hx with ⟨hx1, hx2⟩
          have h21 : x ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
            constructor
            · -- Show p < x
              nlinarith
            · -- Show x < q
              linarith
          have h22 : |g x - g q| ≤ M * (q - x) := h11 x h21
          have h23 : q - x > 0 := by linarith
          have h24 : q - x < δ := by linarith
          have h25 : g x > l := by
            cases' abs_le.mp h22 with h26 h27
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have h32 : Set.Ioo (q - δ) q ∈ nhdsWithin (q : ℝ) (Set.Iio q) := by
          apply mem_nhdsWithin.mpr
          use Set.Ioo (q - δ) (q + 1)
          constructor
          · -- Show that Set.Ioo (q - δ) (q + 1) is open
            apply isOpen_Ioo
          · -- Show that q ∈ Set.Ioo (q - δ) (q + 1) ∧ Set.Ioo (q - δ) (q + 1) ∩ Set.Iio q = Set.Ioo (q - δ) q
            constructor
            · -- Show that q ∈ Set.Ioo (q - δ) (q + 1)
              constructor
              · -- Show q - δ < q
                nlinarith
              · -- Show q < q + 1
                nlinarith
            · -- Show Set.Ioo (q - δ) (q + 1) ∩ Set.Iio q = Set.Ioo (q - δ) q
              ext x
              simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_Ioo, Set.mem_Iio, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
              constructor
              · -- Assume x ∈ Set.Ioo (q - δ) (q + 1) ∩ Set.Iio q
                rintro ⟨⟨h1, h2⟩, h3⟩
                constructor
                · -- Show q - δ < x
                  linarith
                · -- Show x < q
                  linarith
              · -- Assume x ∈ Set.Ioo (q - δ) q
                rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩
                constructor
                · -- Show x ∈  Set.Ioo (q - δ) (q + 1)
                  constructor
                  · -- Show q - δ < x
                    linarith
                  · -- Show x < q + 1
                    nlinarith
                · -- Show x ∈ Set.Iio q
                  linarith
        apply eventually_of_mem h32
        intro x hx
        specialize h31 x hx
        linarith
      · -- M = 0
        have h30 : M = 0 := by linarith
        have h31 : ∀ t : ℝ, t ∈ Set.Ioo p q → g' t = 0 := by
          intro t ht
          have h32 : |g' t| ≤ M := g'_bdd t ht
          rw [h30] at h32
          have h33 : |g' t| ≤ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
          have h34 : |g' t| = 0 := by
            linarith [abs_nonneg (g' t), h33]
          have h35 : g' t = 0 := abs_eq_zero.mp h34
          linarith
        have h32 : ∀ x : ℝ, x ∈ Set.Ioo p q → g x = g q := by
          intro x hx
          rcases hx with ⟨hx1, hx2⟩
          have h33 : g x - g q = 0 := by
            have h34 : g x - g q = intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, g' s := by
              rw [intervalIntegral.integral_of_hasDerivAt_of_le (by linarith)]
              intro t ht
              rcases ht with ⟨ht1, ht2⟩
              have ht3 : t ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
                constructor
                · linarith
                · linarith
              have h35 : HasDerivAt g (g' t) t := g_deriv t ht3
              simpa using h35
            rw [h34]
            have h36 : ∀ s : ℝ, s ∈ Set.Icc x q → g' s = 0 := by
              intro s hs
              have hs1 : s ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
                rcases hs with ⟨hs3, hs4⟩
                constructor
                · -- Show p < s
                  nlinarith
                · -- Show s < q
                  nlinarith
              have h37 : g' s = 0 := h31 s hs1
              linarith
            have h37 : intervalIntegral ∫ s in Set.Icc x q, g' s = 0 := by
              have h38 : g' = fun s : ℝ => (0 : ℝ) on Set.Icc x q := by
                intro s hs
                specialize h36 s hs
                simpa using h36
              rw [h38]
              simp
            linarith
          linarith
        have h33 : g x = g q := h32 x (by
          constructor
          · -- Show p < x
            have h1 : x ∈ Set.Iio q := by
              simpa using show x ∈ Set.Iio q by
                apply mem_nhdsWithin.mp
                exact show x ∈ Set.Iio q by
                  have h1 : x ∈ Set.Iio q := by
                    simpa using (show x ∈ Set.Iio q by
                      try { tauto }
                    )

theorem subq_III_1
    (p q : ℝ) (hpq : p < q)
    (g : ℝ → ℝ) (g' : ℝ → ℝ)
    (g_deriv : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, HasDerivAt g (g' t) t)
    (M : ℝ) (g'_bdd : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, |g' t| ≤ M) :
    ∃ ℓ : ℝ, Filter.Tendsto g (nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q)) (nhds ℓ) := by
  have h4 : IsBounded (g '' Set.Ioo p q) := by
    have h6 : ∃ m M : ℝ, ∀ y ∈ g '' (Set.Ioo p q), m ≤ y ∧ y ≤ M := by
      use g ( (p + q) / 2 ) - M * (q - p) / 2, g ( (p + q) / 2 ) + M * (q - p) / 2
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      have hx1 : p < x := by
        have h1 : x ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hx
        exact h1.1
      have hx2 : x < q := by
        have h1 : x ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hx
        exact h1.2
      have h7 : x ≥ (p + q) / 2 ∨ x ≤ (p + q) / 2 := by
        by_cases h : x ≥ (p + q) / 2
        · tauto
        · push_neg at h
          right
          linarith
      cases h7 with
      | inl h7 =>
        have h7 : (p + q) / 2 ≤ x := by linarith
        have h11 : x - (p + q) / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h12 : (p + q) / 2 ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        have h13 : x ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
          exact hx
        have h14 : g x - g ((p + q) / 2) ≤ M * (x - (p + q) / 2) := by
          have h14 : (p + q) / 2 < x := by nlinarith
          have h15 : ∃ c, c ∈ Set.Ioo ((p + q) / 2) x ∧ g x - g ((p + q) / 2) = g' c * (x - (p + q) / 2) := by
            apply HasDerivAt.exists_hasDerivAt_of_hasDerivAt_of_le
            · -- Show that g is differentiable on the interval
              intro t ht
              have ht1 : t ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
                have h1 : t > (p + q) / 2 := by
                  have h3 : t ∈ Set.Ioo ((p + q) / 2) x := ht
                  rcases h3 with ⟨h31, h32⟩
                  nlinarith
                have h2 : t < x := by
                  have h3 : t ∈ Set.Ioo ((p + q) / 2) x := ht
                  rcases h3 with ⟨h31, h32⟩
                  nlinarith
                have ht3 : p < t := by nlinarith
                have ht4 : t < q := by nlinarith
                exact ⟨ht3, ht4⟩
              have h17 : HasDerivAt g (g' t) t := g_deriv t ht1
              exact h17
            all_goals nlinarith
          rcases h15 with ⟨c, hc1, hc2⟩
          have hc3 : |g' c| ≤ M := by
            have hc4 : c ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
              have hc11 : c > (p + q) / 2 := by
                have h1 : c ∈ Set.Ioo ((p + q) / 2) x := hc1
                rcases h1 with ⟨h11, h12⟩
                nlinarith
              have hc12 : c < x := by
                have h1 : c ∈ Set.Ioo ((p + q) / 2) x := hc1
                rcases h1 with ⟨h11, h12⟩
                nlinarith
              have hc3 : p < c := by nlinarith
              have hc4 : c < q := by nlinarith
              exact ⟨hc3, hc4⟩
            specialize g'_bdd c hc4
            simpa using g'_bdd
          have h18 : g' c ≤ M := by
            linarith [abs_le.mp hc3]
          have h19 : g x - g ((p + q) / 2) = g' c * (x - (p + q) / 2) := by linarith
          rw [h19]
          nlinarith
        have h15 : g ((p + q) / 2) - g x ≤ M * (x - (p + q) / 2) := by
          have h14 : (p + q) / 2 < x := by nlinarith
          have h15 : ∃ c, c ∈ Set.Ioo ((p + q) / 2) x ∧ g x - g ((p + q) / 2) = g' c * (x - (p + q) / 2) := by
            apply HasDerivAt.exists_hasDerivAt_of_hasDerivAt_of_le
            · -- Show that g is differentiable on the interval
              intro t ht
              have ht1 : t ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
                have h1 : t > (p + q) / 2 := by
                  have h3 : t ∈ Set.Ioo ((p + q) / 2) x := ht
                  rcases h3 with ⟨h31, h32⟩
                  nlinarith
                have h2 : t < x := by
                  have h3 : t ∈ Set.Ioo ((p + q) / 2) x := ht
                  rcases h3 with ⟨h31, h32⟩
                  nlinarith
                have ht3 : p < t := by nlinarith
                have ht4 : t < q := by nlinarith
                exact ⟨ht3, ht4⟩
              have h17 : HasDerivAt g (g' t) t := g_deriv t ht1
              exact h17
            all_goals nlinarith
          rcases h15 with ⟨c, hc1, hc2⟩
          have hc3 : |g' c| ≤ M := by
            have hc4 : c ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
              have hc11 : c > (p + q) / 2 := by
                have h1 : c ∈ Set.Ioo ((p + q) / 2) x := hc1
                rcases h1 with ⟨h11, h12⟩
                nlinarith
              have hc12 : c < x := by
                have h1 : c ∈ Set.Ioo ((p + q) / 2) x := hc1
                rcases h1 with ⟨h11, h12⟩
                nlinarith
              have hc3 : p < c := by nlinarith
              have hc4 : c < q := by nlinarith
              exact ⟨hc3, hc4⟩
            specialize g'_bdd c hc4
            simpa using g'_bdd
          have h18 : g' c ≥ -M := by
            linarith [abs_le.mp hc3]
          have h19 : g x - g ((p + q) / 2) = g' c * (x - (p + q) / 2) := by linarith
          nlinarith
        have h16 : g x ≤ g ((p + q) / 2) + M * (q - p) / 2 := by
          nlinarith
        have h17 : g x ≥ g ((p + q) / 2) - M * (q - p) / 2 := by
          nlinarith
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      | inr h7 =>
        have h7 : x ≤ (p + q) / 2 := by linarith
        have h11 : (p + q) / 2 - x ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h12 : (p + q) / 2 ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        have h13 : x ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
          exact hx
        have h14 : g ((p + q) / 2) - g x ≤ M * ((p + q) / 2 - x) := by
          have h14 : x < (p + q) / 2 := by nlinarith
          have h15 : ∃ c, c ∈ Set.Ioo x ((p + q) / 2) ∧ g ((p + q) / 2) - g x = g' c * ((p + q) / 2 - x) := by
            apply HasDerivAt.exists_hasDerivAt_of_hasDerivAt_of_le
            · -- Show that g is differentiable on the interval
              intro t ht
              have ht1 : t ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
                have h1 : t > x := by
                  have h3 : t ∈ Set.Ioo x ((p + q) / 2) := ht
                  rcases h3 with ⟨h31, h32⟩
                  nlinarith
                have h2 : t < (p + q) / 2 := by
                  have h3 : t ∈ Set.Ioo x ((p + q) / 2) := ht
                  rcases h3 with ⟨h31, h32⟩
                  nlinarith
                have ht3 : p < t := by nlinarith
                have ht4 : t < q := by nlinarith
                exact ⟨ht3, ht4⟩
              have h17 : HasDerivAt g (g' t) t := g_deriv t ht1
              exact h17
            all_goals nlinarith
          rcases h15 with ⟨c, hc1, hc2⟩
          have hc3 : |g' c| ≤ M := by
            have hc4 : c ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
              have hc11 : c > x := by
                have h1 : c ∈ Set.Ioo x ((p + q) / 2) := hc1
                rcases h1 with ⟨h11, h12⟩
                nlinarith
              have hc12 : c < (p + q) / 2 := by
                have h1 : c ∈ Set.Ioo x ((p + q) / 2) := hc1
                rcases h1 with ⟨h11, h12⟩
                nlinarith
              have hc3 : p < c := by nlinarith
              have hc4 : c < q := by nlinarith
              exact ⟨hc3, hc4⟩
            specialize g'_bdd c hc4
            simpa using g'_bdd
          have h18 : g' c ≤ M := by
            linarith [abs_le.mp hc3]
          have h19 : g ((p + q) / 2) - g x = g' c * ((p + q) / 2 - x) := by linarith
          nlinarith
        have h15 : g x - g ((p + q) / 2) ≤ M * ((p + q) / 2 - x) := by
          have h14 : x < (p + q) / 2 := by nlinarith
          have h15 : ∃ c, c ∈ Set.Ioo x ((p + q) / 2) ∧ g ((p + q) / 2) - g x = g' c * ((p + q) / 2 - x) := by
            apply HasDerivAt.exists_hasDerivAt_of_hasDerivAt_of_le
            · -- Show  that g is differentiable on the interval
              intro t ht
              have ht1 : t ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
                have h1 : t > x := by
                  have h3 : t ∈ Set.Ioo x ((p + q) / 2) := ht
                  rcases h3 with ⟨h31, h32⟩
                  nlinarith
                have h2 : t < (p + q) / 2 := by
                  have h3 : t ∈ Set.Ioo x ((p + q) / 2) := ht
                  rcases h3 with ⟨h31, h32⟩
                  nlinarith
                have ht3 : p < t := by nlinarith
                have ht4 : t < q := by nlinarith
                exact ⟨ht3, ht4⟩
              have h17 : HasDerivAt g (g' t) t := g_deriv t ht1
              exact h17
            all_goals nlinarith
          rcases h15 with ⟨c, hc1, hc2⟩
          have hc3 : |g' c| ≤ M := by
            have hc4 : c ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
              have hc11 : c > x := by
                have h1 : c ∈ Set.Ioo x ((p + q) / 2) := hc1
                rcases h1 with ⟨h11, h12⟩
                nlinarith
              have hc12 : c < (p + q) / 2 := by
                have h1 : c ∈ Set.Ioo x ((p + q) / 2) := hc1
                rcases h1 with ⟨h11, h12⟩
                nlinarith
              have hc3 : p < c := by nlinarith
              have hc4 : c < q := by nlinarith
              exact ⟨hc3, hc4⟩
            specialize g'_bdd c hc4
            simpa using g'_bdd
          have h18 : g' c ≥ -M := by
            linarith [abs_le.mp hc3]
          have h19 : g ((p + q) / 2) - g x = g' c * ((p + q) / 2 - x) := by linarith
          nlinarith
        have h16 : g x ≤ g ((p + q) / 2) + M * (q - p) / 2 := by
          nlinarith
        have h17 : g x ≥ g ((p + q) / 2) - M * (q - p) / 2 := by
          nlinarith
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
    exact h6
  have h3 : ∃ ℓ, Tendsto g (nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q)) (nhds ℓ) := by
    apply exists_tendsto_ofCauchy
    · -- Show that the image is bounded
      exact h4
    all_goals
      try { 
        have h4 : Cauchy (g ∘ (fun n : ℕ => q - 1 / (n + 1 : ℝ))) := by
          have h11 : (g ∘ (fun n : ℕ => q - 1 / (n + 1 : ℝ))) = (fun n : ℕ => g (q - 1 / (n + 1 : ℝ))) := by
            funext n
            simp
          rw [h11]
          have h12 : Cauchy (fun n : ℕ => g (q - 1 / (n + 1 : ℝ))) := by
            have h13 : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ m n, N ≤ m → N ≤ n → dist (g (q - 1 / (m + 1 : ℝ))) (g (q - 1 / (n + 1 : ℝ))) < ε := by
              intro ε hε
              have h14 : ε > 0 := hε
              have h15 : ∃ δ > 0, ∀ x y : ℝ, dist x y < δ → dist (g x) (g y) < ε := by
                have h16 : ε > 0 := h14
                use (ε / (M + 1))
                constructor
                · -- Show δ > 0
                  nlinarith
                · -- Show that if dist(x, y) < δ, then dist(g(x), g(y)) < ε
                  intro x y h17
                  have h171 : dist x y < ε / (M + 1) := by
                    simpa using h17
                  have h18 : x ≤ q := by
                    have h19 : x ≤ q := by
                      have h191 : x ≤ q := by
                        try { linarith [h171] }
                        try { nlinarith }

theorem subq_III_1
    (p q : ℝ) (hpq : p < q)
    (g : ℝ → ℝ) (g' : ℝ → ℝ)
    (g_deriv : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, HasDerivAt g (g' t) t)
    (M : ℝ) (g'_bdd : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, |g' t| ≤ M) :
    ∃ ℓ : ℝ, Filter.Tendsto g (nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q)) (nhds ℓ) := by
  have h1 : p < q := hpq
  have h2 : IsOpen (Set.Ioo p q) := by
    apply isOpen_Ioo
  have h7 : ∃ L : ℝ, CauchySeq (fun n : ℕ => g (q - (1 / (n + (Nat.ceil (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ)) )) := by
    set k := Nat.ceil (1 / (q - p) + 1) with hk
    have hk1 : (k : ℝ) ≥ (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) := by
      have h10 : (Nat.ceil (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) ≥ (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) := by
        exact Nat.le_ceil (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ)
      have h11 : (k : ℝ) = (Nat.ceil (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        linarith [hk]

      intro n

        nlinarith
      have hk3 : (1 / (n + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) ≤ (1 / (k : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        apply one_div_le_one_div_of_le

          have h11 : (k : ℝ) ≥ (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) := hk1
          have h12 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
          have h13 : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by
            nlinarith
          positivity
        all_goals nlinarith

        have h14 : (k : ℝ) ≥ (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) := hk1
        have h15 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith

          have h18 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
          have h19 : (1 / (k : ℝ) : ℝ) ≤ (1 / (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
            apply one_div_le_one_div_of_le
            · -- Show that (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) > 0
              have h18 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
              positivity
            all_goals nlinarith
          have h20 : (1 / (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) < (q - p : ℝ) := by
            have h18 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
            have h21 : (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) > 0 := by positivity
            have h22 : (1 / (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) = (q - p) / (1 + (q - p)) := by
              field_simp

            have h24 : (1 + (q - p) : ℝ) > 1 := by nlinarith
            have h25 : (q - p) / (1 + (q - p)) < (q - p) := by
              apply (div_lt_iff₀ (by nlinarith)).mpr
              nlinarith
            nlinarith
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      nlinarith
    have h11 : CauchySeq (fun n : ℕ => g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))))) := by
      have h13 : ∀ (m n : ℕ), m ≥ 0 ∧ n ≥ 0 → |g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ)))) - g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))))| ≤ M * |(1 / (m + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ)| := by
        intro m n h
        have hx1 : q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
          constructor
          · -- Show greater than p
