            linarith
          · -- Show less than q
            have h101 : (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) < q := by
              have h12 : (1 / (m + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) > 0 := by
                have h13 : (m + (k : ℝ) : ℝ) > 0 := by
                  have hm : (m : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast show (m : ℕ) ≥ 0 by omega
                  have hk2 : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by
                    have h11 : (k : ℝ) ≥ (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) := hk1
                    have h12 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
                    nlinarith
                  nlinarith
                positivity
              nlinarith
            linarith
        have hy1 : q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
          constructor
          · -- Show greater than p
            have h100 : q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) > p := by
              apply h10 n
            linarith
          · -- Show less than q
            have h101 : (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) < q := by
              have h12 : (1 / (n + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) > 0 := by
                have h13 : (n + (k : ℝ) : ℝ) > 0 := by
                  have hn : (n : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast show (n : ℕ) ≥ 0 by omega
                  have hk2 : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by
                    have h11 : (k : ℝ) ≥ (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) := hk1
                    have h12 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
                    nlinarith
                  nlinarith
                positivity
              nlinarith
            linarith
        have h17 : (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) < (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) ∨ (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) > (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) ∨ (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) = (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) := by
          by_cases h : (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) < (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)

            have h3 : (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) = (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) := by linarith

        rcases h17 with h18 | h19 | h20
        · -- Case where `q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) < q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ)))`
          have h18' : (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) < (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) := h18
          have h20 : ∃ c ∈ Set.Ioo (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ) (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ), g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) - g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ) = g' c * ((q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) )) := by
            apply HasDerivAt.exists_hasDerivAt_of_hasDerivWithinAt_of_Ioo
            all_goals

                all_goals
                  try { tauto }
              }
          rcases h20 with ⟨c, hc, heq⟩
          have hc4 : c ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
            constructor
            · -- Show c > p
              nlinarith [show (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) > p from by
                have h100 : q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) > p := by
                  apply h10 m
                linarith
              ]
            · -- Show c < q
              nlinarith [show (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) < q from by
                have h101 : (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) < q := by
                  have h12 : (1 / (n + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) > 0 := by
                    have h13 : (n + (k : ℝ) : ℝ) > 0 := by
                      have hn : (n : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast show (n : ℕ) ≥ 0 by omega
                      have hk2 : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by
                        have h11 : (k : ℝ) ≥ (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) := hk1
                        have h12 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
                        nlinarith
                      nlinarith
                    positivity
                  nlinarith
                linarith
              ]
          have h24 : |g' c| ≤ M := by
            have h25 : c ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hc4
            specialize g'_bdd c h25
            simpa using g'_bdd
          have h25 : |g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) - g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) )| = |g' c| * |(q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)| := by
            have h26 : (g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) - g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ) : ℝ) = g' c * ((q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) )) := by linarith [heq]
            have h27 : |g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) - g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) )| = |g' c * ((q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ))| := by
              rw [show g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) - g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ) = g' c * ((q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) )) by linarith [heq]]
            have h28 : |g' c * ((q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ))| = |g' c| * |(q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)| := by
              rw [abs_mul]

          have h26 : |g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) - g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) )| ≤ M * |(q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)| := by
            rw [h25]
            have h27 : |g' c| ≤ M := h24
            have h28 : |g' c| * |(q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)| ≤ M * |(q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)| := by
              nlinarith [h27, show |(q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)| ≥ 0 by positivity]
            linarith

          have h18' : (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) > (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) := by linarith
          have h23 : ∃ c ∈ Set.Ioo (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ), g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ) - g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) = g' c * ((q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ) - (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) )) := by

          have hc4 : c ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by

            · -- Show c > p

                have h100 : q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) > p := by

                  have h12 : (1 / (m + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) > 0 := by
                    have h13 : (m + (k : ℝ) : ℝ) > 0 := by
                      have hm : (m : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast show (m : ℕ) ≥ 0 by omega
                      have hk2 : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by
                        have h11 : (k : ℝ) ≥ (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) := hk1
                        have h12 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
                        nlinarith
                      nlinarith
                    positivity

                linarith

          have h24 : |g' c| ≤ M := by
            have h25 : c ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hc4
            specialize g'_bdd c h25
            simpa using g'_bdd

            have h26 : (g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ) - g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ) : ℝ) = g' c * ((q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ) - (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) )) := by linarith [heq]
            have h27 : |g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ) - g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) )| = |g' c * ((q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) ) - (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) ))| := by

            have h28 : |g' c| * |(q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)| ≤ M * |(q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)| := by
              nlinarith [h27, show |(q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)| ≥ 0 by positivity]
            linarith

          have h23 : M * |(q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ)| = 0 := by
            have h24 : (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))) : ℝ) = 0 := by linarith [h21]

      have h14 : ∀ (ε : ℝ), ε > 0 → ∃ N, ∀ (m n : ℕ), m ≥ N ∧ n ≥ N → |g (q - (1 / (m + (k : ℝ)))) - g (q - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ))))| < ε := by
        intro ε hε
        have h15 : ∃ N, ∀ (m n : ℕ), m ≥ N ∧ n ≥ N → |(1 / (m + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ)| < ε / (M + 1) := by

            nlinarith

            have h21 : (Nat.ceil ( (M + 1) / ε - (k : ℝ) ) + 1 : ℝ) > ( (M + 1) / ε - (k : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
              have h22 : (Nat.ceil ( (M + 1) / ε - (k : ℝ) ) : ℝ) ≥ ( (M + 1) / ε - (k : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
                exact Nat.le_ceil ( (M + 1) / ε - (k : ℝ) )
              nlinarith
            nlinarith
          have h21 : (1 / (m + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) > 0 := by

              have hk2 : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by
                have h11 : (k : ℝ) ≥ (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) := hk1
                have h12 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
                nlinarith

            positivity
          have h22 : (1 / (n + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) > 0 := by
            have h13 : (n + (k : ℝ) : ℝ) > 0 := by
              have hn : (n : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast show (n : ℕ) ≥ 0 by omega
              have hk2 : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by
                have h11 : (k : ℝ) ≥ (1 / (q - p) + 1 : ℝ) := hk1
                have h12 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
                nlinarith
              nlinarith
            positivity
          have h23 : |(1 / (m + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) - (1 / (n + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ)| < ε / (M + 1) := by
            have h24 : (1 / (m + (k : ℝ)) : ℝ) < ε / (M + 1) := by

theorem subq_III_1
    (p q : ℝ) (hpq : p < q)
    (g : ℝ → ℝ) (g' : ℝ → ℝ)
    (g_deriv : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, HasDerivAt g (g' t) t)
    (M : ℝ) (g'_bdd : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, |g' t| ≤ M) :
    ∃ ℓ : ℝ, Filter.Tendsto g (nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q)) (nhds ℓ) := by
  have h7 : ∃ s : ℕ → ℝ, (∀ (n : ℕ), s n ∈ Set.Ioo p q) ∧ Tendsto s atTop (nhds q) := by
    use fun n => (q - (q - p) / 2 ^ (n + 1))
    constructor
    · -- Show that all terms are in (p, q)
      intro n
      have h1 : p < q - (q - p) / 2 ^ (n + 1) := by
        have h2 : (q - p : ℝ) / 2 ^ (n + 1) < (q - p : ℝ) := by
          have h3 : (2 : ℝ) ^ (n + 1) > 1 := by
            have h4 : (2 : ℝ) > 1 := by norm_num
            have h5 : (2 : ℝ) ^ (n + 1) ≥ (2 : ℝ) ^ (0 : ℕ) := by
              apply pow_le_pow_right
              all_goals linarith
            norm_num at h5 ⊢
            all_goals nlinarith
          have h6 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
          apply (div_lt_iff₀ (by positivity)).mpr
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h2 : q - (q - p) / 2 ^ (n + 1) < q := by
        have h6 : (q - p : ℝ) / 2 ^ (n + 1) > 0 := by
          apply div_pos
          all_goals linarith
        nlinarith
      exact ⟨h1, h2⟩
    · -- Show that s tends to q
      apply Tendsto.add
      · -- Show that (q : ℝ) tends to (q : ℝ)
        apply tendsto_const_nhds
      · -- Show that -( (q - p) / 2 ^ (n + 1) ) tends to 0
        have h14 : Tendsto (fun (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℝ => (q - p) / 2 ^ (n + 1)) atTop (nhds (0 : ℝ)) := by
          have h14 : Tendsto (fun (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / 2 ^ (n + 1)) atTop (nhds (0 : ℝ)) := by
            have h16 : Tendsto (fun (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℝ => (2 : ℝ) ^ (n + 1)) atTop atTop := by
              apply tendsto_pow_atTop
              all_goals linarith
            have h17 : Tendsto (fun (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℝ => (1 : ℝ) / 2 ^ (n + 1)) atTop (nhds (0 : ℝ)) := by
              rw [show (0 : ℝ) = (0 : ℝ) by rfl]
              apply tendsto_div_zero
              all_goals exact h16
            exact h17
          have h15 : Tendsto (fun (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℝ => (q - p) * ((1 : ℝ) / 2 ^ (n + 1))) atTop (nhds (0 : ℝ)) := by
            apply Tendsto.mul
            · -- Show that (q - p) tends to (q - p)
              apply tendsto_const_nhds
            · -- Show that (1 / 2 ^ (n + 1)) tends to 0
              exact h14
          have h16 : (fun (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℝ => (q - p) / 2 ^ (n + 1)) = (fun (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℝ => (q - p) * ((1 : ℝ) / 2 ^ (n + 1))) := by
            funext n
            ring_nf
          rw [h16]
          exact h15
        have h15 : Tendsto (fun (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℝ => - ((q - p) / 2 ^ (n + 1))) atTop (nhds (0 : ℝ)) := by
          have h16 : Tendsto (fun (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℝ => (q - p) / 2 ^ (n + 1)) atTop (nhds (0 : ℝ)) := h14
          have h17 : Tendsto (fun (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℝ => - ((q - p) / 2 ^ (n + 1))) atTop (nhds (0 : ℝ)) := by
            apply Tendsto.neg
            exact h16
          exact h17
        simpa using h15
  rcases h7 with ⟨s, hs, h8⟩
  have h8' : CauchySeq (g ∘ s) := by
    apply Metric.cauchySeq_iff_tendsto_dist_zero.mpr
    have h18 : Tendsto (fun (n : ℕ) => dist ((g ∘ s) (n + 1)) ((g ∘ s) n)) atTop (nhds (0 : ℝ)) := by
      have h19 : ∀ (n : ℕ), dist ((g ∘ s) (n + 1)) ((g ∘ s) n) ≤ M * (s (n + 1) - s n) := by
        intro n
        have h24 : dist ((g ∘ s) (n + 1)) ((g ∘ s) n) = |(g (s (n + 1)) - g (s n))| := by

        rw [h24]
        have h25 : s n ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hs n
        have h26 : s (n + 1) ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hs (n + 1)
        have h27 : s n < s (n + 1) := by
          have h19 : s (n) = q - (q - p) / 2 ^ (n + 1) := by

            have h21 : (q - p : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
            apply (div_lt_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)).mpr

          nlinarith
        have h47 : |g (s (n + 1)) - g (s n)| ≤ M * (s (n + 1) - s n) := by
          have h48 : s n ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hs n
          have h49 : s (n + 1) ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hs (n + 1)
          have h50 : s n < s (n + 1) := h27
          have h51 : |g (s (n + 1)) - g (s n)| ≤ M * (s (n + 1) - s n) := by
            have h52 : HasDerivAt g (g' (s n)) (s n) := g_deriv (s n) (by
              tauto
            )

theorem subq_III_1
    (p q : ℝ) (hpq : p < q)
    (g : ℝ → ℝ) (g' : ℝ → ℝ)
    (g_deriv : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, HasDerivAt g (g' t) t)

    ∃ ℓ : ℝ, Filter.Tendsto g (nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q)) (nhds ℓ) := by
  apply Metric.exists_tendsto_of_cauchy
  have h3 : Cauchy (fun n : ℕ => g (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ))) ) := by
    have hM : M ≥ 0 := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have h8 := g'_bdd ( (p + q) / 2 ) (by
        constructor
        · -- Show p < (p + q) / 2
          linarith
        · -- Show (p + q) / 2 < q
          linarith
      )
      have h10 : |g' ((p + q) / 2 )| ≥ 0 := by positivity
      cases' abs_le.mp h8 with h11 h12
      all_goals linarith
    have h5 : M + 1 > 0 := by
      linarith
    have h4 : ∀ (ε : ℝ), ε > 0 → ∃ (N : ℕ), ∀ (m n : ℕ), N ≤ m → N ≤ n → dist (g (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ))) ) (g (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ))) ) < ε := by
      intro ε hε
      have h4 : ∃ δ, δ > 0 ∧ δ < ε / (M + 1) := by
        have h5 : M + 1 > 0 := h5
        use ε / (2 * (M + 1))
        constructor
        · -- Show ε/(2*(M+1)) > 0
          positivity
        · -- Show ε/(2*(M+1)) < ε/(M+1)
          have h7 : 2 * (M + 1) > M + 1 := by
            nlinarith
          apply (div_lt_div_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)).mpr

      rcases h4 with ⟨δ, hδ1, hδ2⟩
      have h7 : ∃ N : ℕ, (1 / (N + 1 : ℝ)) < δ := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have h8 : ∀ (N : ℕ), (1 / (N + 1 : ℝ)) ≥ δ := by
          intro N
          specialize h N
          linarith
        have h9 : (1 / ( (0 : ℕ) + 1 : ℝ ) : ℝ) ≥ δ := h8 0
        norm_num at h9
        all_goals
          nlinarith
      rcases h7 with ⟨N, hN⟩
      use N
      intro m n hm hn
      have h10 : (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) > p := by
        have h11 : (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) > 0 := by
          apply div_pos
          all_goals linarith

      have h11 : (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) < q := by
        have h12 : (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) > 0 := by

      have h12 : (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) > p := by
        have h13 : (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) > 0 := by

          all_goals linarith
        nlinarith
      have h13 : (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) < q := by
        have h14 : (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) > 0 := by
          apply div_pos
          all_goals linarith
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) > q - (1 / (N + 1 : ℝ)) := by
        have h15 : (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) < (1 / (N + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) := by

        nlinarith
      have h15 : (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) > q - (1 / (N + 1 : ℝ)) := by
        have h16 : (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) < (1 / (N + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) := by

            have h18 : (N : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by

            nlinarith
          have h18 : (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) ≤ (1 / (N + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) := by

      have h16 : dist (g (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ))) ) (g (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ))) ) < ε := by

        have h18 : (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) > p := h10

        have h27 : (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) < q := by

            all_goals linarith

        have h28 : (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) > (q - (1 / (N + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h29 : (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) > (q - (1 / (N + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h30 : (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) < q := by linarith
        have h31 : (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) < q := by linarith
        have h32 : (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) = (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ) : ℝ) := by

        have h35 : |g (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ))) - g (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)))| ≤ M * |(q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ)| := by

          have h38 : (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) > p := h10

          by_cases h : (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) ≤ (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ)

            have h14 : (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) < (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) ∨ (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) = (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) := by

            have h14 : (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) < (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) := h12

                  · -- Show t < q

            have hc7 : |g' c| ≤ M := by

              exact hc6
            have h16 : |g (q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) ) - g (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) )| ≤ M * |(q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ)| := by

            have h24 : δ < ε / (M + 1) := hδ2
            have h25 : M + 1 > 0 := h5
            have h28 : M ≥ 0 := hM
            have h29 : M * δ < ε := by
              have h30 : M + 1 > 0 := h5

                have h33 : M + 1 > 0 := h5
                apply (lt_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h32
                nlinarith
              have h34 : M * δ ≤ δ * (M + 1) := by
                have h35 : δ ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h36 : M ≤ M + 1 := by linarith
                nlinarith
              nlinarith
            linarith
          have h40 : |(q - (1 / (m + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ) - (q - (1 / (n + 1 : ℝ)) : ℝ)| ≥ 0 := by positivity

theorem subq_III_1
    (p q : ℝ) (hpq : p < q)
    (g : ℝ → ℝ) (g' : ℝ → ℝ)
    (g_deriv : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, HasDerivAt g (g' t) t)
    (M : ℝ) (g'_bdd : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, |g' t| ≤ M) :
    ∃ ℓ : ℝ, Filter.Tendsto g (nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q)) (nhds ℓ) := by
  -- Use the existence of a limit point.
  refine' ⟨g (q - (q - p) / 2), ?_⟩
  -- Show that g(x) converges to g(q - (q-p)/2) as x approaches q from the left.
  apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within
  · -- Show that g(x) converges to g(q - (q-p)/2) as x approaches q.
    -- But this is not necessarily true. The function g(x) may not be defined at q.
    -- Hmm, this is wrong.
    sorry

theorem subq_III_1
    (p q : ℝ) (hpq : p < q)
    (g : ℝ → ℝ) (g' : ℝ → ℝ)
    (g_deriv : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, HasDerivAt g (g' t) t)
    (M : ℝ) (g'_bdd : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, |g' t| ≤ M) :
    ∃ ℓ : ℝ, Filter.Tendsto g (nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q)) (nhds ℓ) := by
  have h1 : ∃ L, Tendsto g (𝓝[<] q) (𝓝 L) := by
    have h2 : IsCauchy (fun x : ℝ => g x) (𝓝[<] q) := by
      apply Metric.cauchy_iff.2
      intro ε hε
      have h3 : ∃ s > 0, s < ε / (M + 1) := by
        have h4 : ε / (M + 1) > 0 := by
          apply div_pos
          all_goals linarith
        exact ⟨ε / (M + 1), by linarith, by linarith⟩
      rcases h3 with ⟨s, hs1, hs2⟩
      have h8 : q - p > 0 := by linarith
      have ht1 : min s ((q - p) / 2) > 0 := by
        cases min_cases s ((q - p) / 2) with
        | inl h =>
          linarith
        | inr h =>
          linarith
      have ht2 : min s ((q - p) / 2) ≤ s := by
        cases min_cases s ((q - p) / 2) with
        | inl h =>
          linarith
        | inr h =>
          linarith
      have ht3 : min s ((q - p) / 2) ≤ (q - p) / 2 := by
        cases min_cases s ((q - p) / 2) with
        | inl h =>
          linarith
        | inr h =>
          linarith
      have ht4 : q - min s ((q - p) / 2) > p := by
        nlinarith
      have h11 : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ∈ Set.Ioo (q - min s ((q - p) / 2)) q → y ∈ Set.Ioo (q - min s ((q - p) / 2)) q → dist (g x) (g y) < ε := by
        intro x y hx hy
        have hx1 : q - min s ((q - p) / 2) < x := by
          have h12 : x ∈ Set.Ioo (q - min s ((q - p) / 2)) q := hx
          exact h12.1
        have hx2 : x < q := by
          have h12 : x ∈ Set.Ioo (q - min s ((q - p) / 2)) q := hx
          exact h12.2
        have hy1 : q - min s ((q - p) / 2) < y := by
          have h13 : y ∈ Set.Ioo (q - min s ((q - p) / 2)) q := hy
          exact h13.1
        have hy2 : y < q := by
          have h13 : y ∈ Set.Ioo (q - min s ((q - p) / 2)) q := hy
          exact h13.2
        have hx3 : p < x := by
          nlinarith [ht4]
        have hx4 : x < q := by linarith
        have hy3 : p < y := by
          nlinarith [ht4]
        have hy4 : y < q := by linarith
        have h14 : |g x - g y| ≤ M * |x - y| := by
          cases' abs_cases (x - y) with h h <;> 
          cases' abs_cases (g x - g y) with h1 h1 <;> 
          try { 
            have h16 : x < y ∨ y < x ∨ x = y := by
              by_cases h : x < y
              · tauto
              by_cases h2 : y < x
              · tauto
              · 
                have h3 : x = y := by linarith
                tauto
            rcases h16 with h16 | h16 | h16
            · -- Assume x < y
              have h17 : ∃ c, x < c ∧ c < y ∧ g y - g x = g' c * (y - x) := by
                apply HasDerivAt.exists_hasDerivAt_of_hasDerivAt_of_le
                · -- Show g is differentiable on (x, y)
                  intro t ht
                  rcases ht with ⟨ht1, ht2⟩
                  have h19 : t ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
                    have h20 : x > p := by nlinarith
                    have h21 : y < q := by nlinarith
                    have h16 : x < y := h16
                    have h22 : x < t := by linarith
                    have h23 : t < y := by linarith
                    have h24 : p < t := by nlinarith
                    have h25 : t < q := by nlinarith
                    exact ⟨h24, h25⟩
                  apply g_deriv t h19
                all_goals try linarith
              rcases h17 with ⟨c, hc1, hc2, heq⟩
              have h18 : |g y - g x| ≤ M * (y - x) := by
                have h19 : g y - g x = g' c * (y - x) := by linarith
                rw [h19]
                have h20 : |g' c| ≤ M := by
                  have h21 : c ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
                    have h22 : p < x := by nlinarith
                    have h23 : x < c := by linarith
                    have h24 : c < y := by linarith
                    have h25 : y < q := by nlinarith
                    have h26 : p < c := by nlinarith
                    have h27 : c < q := by nlinarith
                    exact ⟨h26, h27⟩
                  apply g'_bdd c h21
                have h21 : |g' c * (y - x)| ≤ M * (y - x) := by
                  calc
                    |g' c * (y - x)| = |g' c| * |y - x| := by
                      rw [abs_mul]
                    _ ≤ M * |y - x| := by
                      nlinarith [h20]
                    _ = M * (y - x) := by
                      have h22 : y - x ≥ 0 := by linarith
                      have h23 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_nonneg h22
                      rw [h23]
                linarith
              have h22 : |g x - g y| = |g y - g x| := by
                rw [show g x - g y = -(g y - g x) by ring]
                rw [abs_neg]
              have h23 : |g x - g y| ≤ M * (y - x) := by
                linarith [h22, h18]
              have h24 : |x - y| = y - x := by
                have h25 : x < y := h16
                have h26 : x - y < 0 := by linarith
                have h27 : |x - y| = -(x - y) := abs_of_neg h26
                have h28 : -(x - y) = y - x := by ring
                rw [h27, h28]
              nlinarith
            · -- Assume y < x
              have h17 : ∃ c, y < c ∧ c < x ∧ g x - g y = g' c * (x - y) := by
                apply HasDerivAt.exists_hasDerivAt_of_hasDerivAt_of_le
                · -- Show g is differentiable on (y, x)
                  intro t ht
                  rcases ht with ⟨ht1, ht2⟩
                  have h19 : t ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
                    have h20 : y > p := by nlinarith
                    have h21 : x < q := by nlinarith
                    have h16 : y < x := h16
                    have h22 : y < t := by linarith
                    have h23 : t < x := by linarith
                    have h24 : p < t := by nlinarith
                    have h25 : t < q := by nlinarith
                    exact ⟨h24, h25⟩
                  apply g_deriv t h19
                all_goals try linarith
              rcases h17 with ⟨c, hc1, hc2, heq⟩
              have h18 : |g x - g y| ≤ M * (x - y) := by
                have h19 : g x - g y = g' c * (x - y) := by linarith
                rw [h19]
                have h20 : |g' c| ≤ M := by
                  have h21 : c ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
                    have h22 : p < y := by nlinarith
                    have h23 : y < c := by linarith
                    have h24 : c < x := by linarith
                    have h25 : x < q := by nlinarith
                    have h26 : p < c := by nlinarith
                    have h27 : c < q := by nlinarith
                    exact ⟨h26, h27⟩
                  apply g'_bdd c h21
                have h21 : |g' c * (x - y)| ≤ M * (x - y) := by
                  calc
                    |g' c * (x - y)| = |g' c| * |x - y| := by
                      rw [abs_mul]
                    _ ≤ M * |x - y| := by
                      nlinarith [h20]
                    _ = M * (x - y) := by
                      have h22 : x - y ≥ 0 := by linarith
                      have h23 : |x - y| = x - y := abs_of_nonneg h22
                      rw [h23]
                linarith
              have h24 : |x - y| = x - y := by
                have h25 : y < x := h16
                have h26 : x - y > 0 := by linarith
                have h27 : |x - y| = x - y := abs_of_pos h26
                linarith
              nlinarith
            · -- Assume x = y
              have h16 : x = y := h16
              have h17 : |x - y| = 0 := by
                rw [show x - y = (0 : ℝ) by linarith [h16]]
                norm_num
              have h18 : |g x - g y| = 0 := by
                have h19 : g x = g y := by
                  rw [show y = x by linarith [h16]]
                have h20 : g x - g y = 0 := by linarith
                rw [h20]
                norm_num
              rw [h17, h18]
              all_goals try nlinarith
          }
        have h15 : |x - y| < s := by
          have h16 : x > q - min s ((q - p) / 2) := by linarith
          have h17 : y > q - min s ((q - p) / 2) := by linarith
          have h18 : x < q := by linarith
          have h19 : y < q := by linarith
          cases' abs_cases (x - y) with h h <;> 
          all_goals
            nlinarith
        have h16 : |g x - g y| < ε := by
          have h17 : |g x - g y| ≤ M * |x - y| := h14
          have h18 : |x - y| < s := h15
          have h19 : M * |x - y| < M * s := by
            apply mul_lt_mul_of_nonneg_left
            linarith
            all_goals try linarith
          have h20 : M * s < ε := by
            have h21 : s < ε / (M + 1) := by linarith
            have h22 : M * s < M * (ε / (M + 1)) := by nlinarith
            have h23 : M * (ε / (M + 1)) < ε := by
              have h24 : M + 1 > 0 := by nlinarith
              have h25 : M * (ε / (M + 1)) = M * ε / (M + 1) := by ring
              rw [h25]
              have h26 : M * ε / (M + 1) < ε := by
                apply (div_lt_iff₀ (by nlinarith)).mpr
                nlinarith
              linarith
            nlinarith
          nlinarith
        simpa using h16
      have h13 : (Set.Ioo (q - min s ((q - p) / 2)) q : Set ℝ) ∈ 𝓝[<] q := by
        have h14 : q - min s ((q - p) / 2) < q := by
          have h15 : min s ((q - p) / 2) > 0 := ht1
          nlinarith
        have h15 : (q - min s ((q - p) / 2) : ℝ) < q := h14
        have h16 : Set.Ioo (q - min s ((q - p) / 2)) q ⊆ Set.Iio q := by
          intro x hx
          have h17 : x < q := by
            have h18 : x ∈ Set.Ioo (q - min s ((q - p) / 2)) q := hx
            exact h18.2
          exact h17
        apply mem_nhdsWithin.mpr
        refine ⟨Set.Ioo (q - min s ((q - p) / 2)) q, ?_, ?_⟩
        · -- Show that the set is open
          apply isOpen_Ioo
        · -- Show that the intersection is contained in the neighborhood
          ext x
          simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_Ioo, Set.mem_Iio, and_imp]
          intro h17 h18
          tauto
      refine' ⟨h13, h11⟩
    apply cauchy_iff_exists_tendsto.mp at h2
    rcases h2 with ⟨L, hL⟩
    exact ⟨L, hL⟩
  simpa using h1

theorem subq_III_1
    (p q : ℝ) (hpq : p < q)
    (g : ℝ → ℝ) (g' : ℝ → ℝ)
    (g_deriv : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, HasDerivAt g (g' t) t)
    (M : ℝ) (g'_bdd : ∀ t ∈ Set.Ioo p q, |g' t| ≤ M) :
    ∃ ℓ : ℝ, Filter.Tendsto g (nhdsWithin q (Set.Iio q)) (nhds ℓ) := by
  have h12 : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ∈ Set.Ioo p q → y ∈ Set.Ioo p q → x < y → |g x - g y| ≤ M * (y - x) := by
    intro x y hx hy hxy
    have h13 : x ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hx
    have h14 : y ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hy
    have hx1 : p < x := h13.1
    have hx2 : x < q := h13.2
    have hy1 : p < y := h14.1
    have hy2 : y < q := h14.2
    have h15 : x < y := hxy
    have h16 : g y - g x = ∫ s in x..y, g' s := by
      apply intervalIntegral.integral_of_hasDerivAt_of_le (by linarith)
      intro t ht
      have h19 : t ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
        have h19 : t ∈ Set.Icc x y := by
          simpa using ht
        have hx3 : x ≥ p := by linarith
        have hy3 : y < q := by linarith
        have hx4 : p < t := by
          nlinarith [h19.1, h19.2, hx1, hy2]
        have hy4 : t < q := by
          nlinarith [h19.1, h19.2, hx1, hy2]
        exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
      have h20 : HasDerivAt g (g' t) t := g_deriv t h19
      exact h20
    have h19 : |g y - g x| ≤ M * (y - x) := by
      have h18' : g y - g x = ∫ s in x..y, g' s := h16
      have h20 : |g y - g x| = |∫ s in x..y, g' s| := by
        rw [h18']
      rw [h20]
      have h21 : |∫ s in x..y, g' s| ≤ ∫ s in x..y, |g' s| := by
        apply abs_integral_le_integral_abs
      have h22 : ∫ s in x..y, |g' s| ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h23 : ∀ s : ℝ, s ∈ Set.Icc x y → |g' s| ≤ M := by
          intro s hs
          have h24 : s ∈ Set.Ioo p q := by
            have hx3 : p < x := by linarith
            have hy3 : y < q := by linarith
            have hx4 : x ≤ s := by
              have h19 : s ∈ Set.Icc x y := by
                simpa using hs
              exact h19.1
            have hy4 : s ≤ y := by
              have h19 : s ∈ Set.Icc x y := by
                simpa using hs
              exact h19.2
            have hp2 : p < s := by nlinarith
            have hq2 : s < q := by nlinarith
            exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
          have h25 : |g' s| ≤ M := g'_bdd s h24
          linarith
        have h24 : ∫ s in x..y, |g' s| ≤ ∫ s in x..y, (M : ℝ) := by
          apply intervalIntegral.integral_le_of_le
          · -- Show that |g' s| ≥ 0
            intro s hs
            have h26 : |g' s| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (g' s)
            all_goals linarith
          · -- Show that |g' s| ≤ M
            intro s hs
            specialize h23 s (show s ∈ Set.Icc x y by simpa using hs)
            all_goals linarith
          all_goals try { linarith }
        have h25 : ∫ s in x..y, (M : ℝ) = M * (y - x) := by
          simp
        nlinarith
      nlinarith
    have h23 : |g x - g y| = |g y - g x| := by
      rw [show g x - g y = -(g y - g x) by ring]
      rw [abs_neg]
    nlinarith
  have h14 : Cauchy (g : Set.Iio q → ℝ) := by
    apply Metric.cauchySeq_iff'.mpr
    intro ε hε
    have h15 : ∃ δ > 0, ∀ x y : ℝ, (x ∈ Set.Ioo p q ∧ x > q - δ) → (y ∈ Set.Ioo p q ∧ y > q - δ) → |g x - g y| < ε := by
      use ε / (2 * M + 1)
      constructor
      · -- Show δ > 0
        have h17 : 2 * M + 1 > 0 := by
          cases abs_cases M with
          | inl h =>
            nlinarith
          | inr h =>
            nlinarith
        nlinarith
      · -- Show the implication holds
        intro x y hx hy
        rcases hx with ⟨hx1, hx2⟩
        rcases hy with ⟨hy1, hy2⟩
        have h16 : x > q - ε / (2 * M + 1) := by linarith
        have h17 : y > q - ε / (2 * M + 1) := by linarith
        have h18 : x < q := by
          have h19 : x ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hx1
          exact h19.2
        have h19 : y < q := by
          have h19 : y ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hy1
          exact h19.2
        by_cases h : x < y
        · -- Case x < y
          have h21 : x < y := by linarith
          have h22 : |g x - g y| ≤ M * (y - x) := by
            have h23 : x ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hx1
            have h24 : y ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hy1
            have h25 : x < y := h21
            apply h12 x y h23 h24 h25
          have h17 : y - x < 2 * (ε / (2 * M + 1)) := by
            nlinarith
          have h18 : M * (y - x) < ε := by
            have h19 : 2 * M / (2 * M + 1) < 1 := by
              have h20 : 2 * M + 1 > 0 := by
                cases abs_cases M with
                | inl h =>
                  nlinarith
                | inr h =>
                  nlinarith
              have h21 : 2 * M < 2 * M + 1 := by nlinarith
              have h22 : (2 * M : ℝ) / (2 * M + 1) < 1 := by
                apply (div_lt_iff₀ (by positivity)).mpr
                nlinarith
              linarith
            have h20 : M * (y - x) < M * (2 * (ε / (2 * M + 1))) := by
              nlinarith [h17, show M ≥ 0 by cases abs_cases M with | inl h => linarith | inr h => linarith]
            have h21 : M * (2 * (ε / (2 * M + 1))) < ε := by
              have h22 : 2 * M / (2 * M + 1) < 1 := h19
              have h23 : M * (2 * (ε / (2 * M + 1))) = (2 * M / (2 * M + 1)) * ε := by
                field_simp
                all_goals nlinarith
              nlinarith [h22, show ε > 0 by linarith]
            all_goals nlinarith
          have h16 : |g x - g y| < ε := by
            nlinarith
          exact h16
        · -- Case y ≤ x
          by_cases h' : y < x
          · -- Case y < x
            have h21 : y < x := by linarith
            have h22 : |g y - g x| ≤ M * (x - y) := by
              have h23 : y ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hy1
              have h24 : x ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hx1
              have h25 : y < x := h21
              have h17 : |g y - g x| ≤ M * (x - y) := by
                have h16 : |g y - g x| = |g x - g y| := by
                  rw [show g y - g x = -(g x - g y) by ring]
                  rw [abs_neg]
                have h17 : |g x - g y| ≤ M * (x - y) := by
                  have h18 : y < x := h21
                  have h19 : y ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hy1
                  have h20 : x ∈ Set.Ioo p q := hx1
                  have h21 : y < x := h18
                  have h17 : |g y - g x| ≤ M * (x - y) := by
                    have h16 : |g y - g x| = |g x - g y| := by
                      rw [show g y - g x = -(g x - g y) by ring]
                      rw [abs_neg]
                    have h17 : |g x - g y| ≤ M * (x - y) := by
                      apply h12 y x h19 h20 (by linarith)
                    nlinarith
                  nlinarith
                nlinarith
              linarith
            have h17 : x - y < 2 * (ε / (2 * M + 1)) := by
              nlinarith
            have h18 : M * (x - y) < ε := by
              have h19 : 2 * M / (2 * M + 1) < 1 := by
                have h20 : 2 * M + 1 > 0 := by
                  cases abs_cases M with
                  | inl h =>
                    nlinarith
                  | inr h =>
                    nlinarith
                have h21 : 2 * M < 2 * M + 1 := by nlinarith
                have h22 : (2 * M : ℝ) / (2 * M + 1) < 1 := by
                  apply (div_lt_iff₀ (by positivity)).mpr
                  nlinarith
                linarith
              have h20 : M * (x - y) < M * (2 * (ε / (2 * M + 1))) := by
                nlinarith [h17, show M ≥ 0 by cases abs_cases M with | inl h => linarith | inr h => linarith]
              have h21 : M * (2 * (ε / (2 * M + 1))) < ε := by
                have h22 : 2 * M / (2 * M + 1) < 1 := h19
                have h23 : M * (2 * (ε / (2 * M + 1))) = (2 * M / (2 * M + 1)) * ε := by
                  field_simp
                  all_goals nlinarith
                nlinarith [h22, show ε > 0 by linarith]
              all_goals nlinarith
            have h16 : |g x - g y| < ε := by
              have h15 : |g x - g y| = |g y - g x| := by
                rw [show g x - g y = -(g y - g x) by ring]
                rw [abs_neg]
              have h14 : |g y - g x| ≤ M * (x - y) := h22
              have h13 : M * (x - y) < ε := h18
              have h12 : |g y - g x| < ε := by
                nlinarith
              nlinarith [h15, h12, h14]
            exact h16
          · -- Case y = x
            have : x = y := by linarith
            rw [this]
            norm_num
    have h16 : Filter.Eventually (fun x : ℝ => x ∈ Set.Iio q → x > q - δ) (nhds q) := by
      have h17 : q - δ < q := by
        nlinarith
      filter_upwards [Ioo_mem_nhds (by linarith : q - δ < q) (by linarith : q < q + 1)]
      intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨h1, h2⟩
      constructor
      · -- Show x ∈ Set.Iio q
        exact lt_of_le_of_lt (by linarith) (by linarith)
      · -- Show x > q - δ
        nlinarith
    apply cauchySeq_of_controlled (h := h15)
  apply Metric.exists_tendsto_of_cauchy
  exact h14

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t), prove (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ)
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := by
      apply h
    have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ := by
      have h14 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => u x) (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h1
      have h15 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) τ := by
        apply HasDerivAt.neg
        apply hasDerivAt_id
      have h16 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ)) τ := by
        apply HasDerivAt.comp
        · exact h14
        · exact h15
      have h17 : f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ) = -f (-τ) (u (-τ)) := by ring
      rw [h17] at h16
      exact h16
    exact h4
  · -- Assume (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ), prove (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t)
    intro h
    intro t
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := by
      specialize h (-t)
      simpa using h
    have h4 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t := by
      have h18 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h2
      have h35 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t) := by
        apply HasDerivAt.neg
        apply hasDerivAt_id
      have h36 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => u x) (f t (u t)) t := by
        have h37 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h18
        have h38 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t) := h35
        -- Using the chain rule: g'(-t) = u'(t) * (-1)
        -- From h37, g'(-t) = -f t (u t)
        -- So -f t (u t) = u'(t) * (-1)
        -- Therefore, u'(t) = f t (u t)
        have h39 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => u x) (f t (u t)) t := by
          have h40 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h37
          have h41 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t) := h38
          have h42 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => u x) (f t (u t)) t := by
            have h43 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f t (u t) * (-1 : ℝ)) (-t) := by
              apply HasDerivAt.comp
              · exact h42
              · exact h41
            have eq4 : f t (u t) * (-1 : ℝ) = -f t (u t) := by ring
            rw [eq4] at h43
            exact h43
          exact h42
        exact h39
      exact h36
    exact h4

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t), prove (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ)
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h (-τ)
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (τ : ℝ) := by
      apply HasDerivAt.neg
      apply hasDerivAt_id
    have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ)) τ := by
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      · exact h1
      · exact h2
    have h4 : f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ) = -f (-τ) (u (-τ)) := by ring
    rw [h4] at h3
    exact h3
  · -- Assume (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ), prove (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t)
    intro h
    intro t
    have h44 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := by
      have ht1 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
      have h45 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t)))) (-t) := h (-t)
      have h46 : -f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) = -f (t) (u t) := by
        have ht1 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
        simp [ht1]
      rw [h46] at h45
      exact h45
    have h47 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u s) (f t (u t)) t := by
      have h53 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-(-s))) (f t (u t)) t := by
        have h51 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h44
        have h52 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (t : ℝ) := by
          apply HasDerivAt.neg
          apply hasDerivAt_id
        apply HasDerivAt.comp
        · exact h51
        · exact h52
      have h54 : (fun s : ℝ => u (-(-s))) = u := by
        funext x
        simp
      rw [h54] at h53
      exact h53
    simpa using h47

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume the left side, prove the right side
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := by
      apply h
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1)) τ := by
      have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (τ : ℝ) := by
        simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
      have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1)) τ := by
        apply HasDerivAt.comp
        · exact h1
        · exact h3
      simpa using h4
    have h5 : f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1) = -f (-τ) (u (-τ)) := by ring
    rw [h5] at h2
    exact h2
  · -- Assume the right side, prove the left side
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-t) (u (-t))) (-t) := by
      apply h
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := by
      simp [hasDerivAt_neg
      ]
    have h3 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
      have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-t) (u (-t))) (-t) := h1
      have h5 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := by
        simp [hasDerivAt_neg
        ]
      have h6 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
        -- Using the chain rule on the composition
        have h7 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-t) (u (-t))) (-t) := h1
        have h8 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := by
          simp [hasDerivAt_neg
          ]
        -- Applying the chain rule
        have h9 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
          apply HasDerivAt.comp
          all_goals try { try { tauto  }  }
        all_goals try { try { linarith  }  }
      exact h6
    exact h3

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume the left side, prove the right side
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 := h (-τ)
    have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (τ : ℝ) := by
      apply hasDerivAt_neg
    have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ)) τ := by
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      exact h1
      all_goals
      simpa using h4
    have h5 : f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ) = -f (-τ) (u (-τ)) := by ring
    rw [h5] at h3
    exact h3
  · -- Assume the right side, prove the left side
    intro h
    intro t
    have h17 := (h (-t)).tendsto_slope
    have h18 : Tendsto (fun h : ℝ => (u (t + h) - u t) / h) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (f t (u t) : ℝ)) := by
      have h26 : Tendsto (fun h : ℝ => - (u (-(-t + h)) - u (-t)) / h) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (f t (u t) : ℝ)) := by
        have h31 : Tendsto (fun h : ℝ => (u (-(-t + h)) - u (-t)) / h) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (-f t (u t) : ℝ)) := h17
        apply Tendsto.neg
        exact h31
      have h27 : ∀ h : ℝ, (u (t + h) - u t) / h = - (u (-(-t + h)) - u (-t)) / h := by
        intro h
        have h34 : -(-t + h) = t - h := by ring
        norm_num [h34]
        all_goals try { linarith [show u (t - h) = u (t - h) by rfl, show u (-t) = u (-t) by rfl] }
      apply Tendsto.congr' (by
        funext h
        specialize h27 h
        linarith
      ) h26
    apply hasDerivAt_of_tendsto_slope
    exact h18

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume the left side holds, prove the right side.
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h (-τ)
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ := by
      have h7 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ)) τ := by
        apply HasDerivAt.comp
        · -- Show that u has a derivative at (-τ).
          exact h1
        · -- Show that the negation function has a derivative at τ.
          simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
      have h8 : (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ)) = -f (-τ) (u (-τ)) := by ring
      rw [h8] at h7
      exact h7
    exact h2
  · -- Assume the right side holds, prove the left side.
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) ) (-t) := h (-t)
    have h9 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
      have eq10 : deriv (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-t : ℝ) = - (f t (u t) ) := by
        have eq13 : deriv (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-t : ℝ) = -f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) := by
          rw [h1.deriv_eq]
        have eq14 : -f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) = - (f t (u t) ) := by
          have h19 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
          rw [h19]
        rw [eq13, eq14]
      have eq17 : deriv (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-t : ℝ) = - (deriv u (t : ℝ) ) := by
        have eq21 : deriv (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-t : ℝ) = (deriv u (t : ℝ) ) * (-1 : ℝ) := by
          simp [deriv_comp, deriv_neg'', mul_comm]
        have eq22 : (deriv u (t : ℝ) ) * (-1 : ℝ) = - (deriv u (t : ℝ) ) := by ring
        rw [eq21, eq22]
      have eq23 : - (deriv u (t : ℝ) ) = - (f t (u t) ) := by
        linarith [eq10, eq17]
      have eq24 : deriv u (t : ℝ) = f t (u t) := by
        linarith
      apply HasDerivAt.deriv_eq_iff.mpr
      all_goals try linarith
    exact h9

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume h : ∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t; prove ∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h (-τ)
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-(f (-τ) (u (-τ)))) τ := by
      have h8 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => -x) (-1 : ℝ) (τ : ℝ) := by
        simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
      have h9 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h1
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      · -- Show that `HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => -x) (-1 : ℝ) (τ : ℝ)`
        exact h8
      · -- Show that `HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ)`
        exact h9
    simpa using h2
  · -- Assume h : ∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ; prove ∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t
    intro h t
    have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t)))) (-t) := h (-t)
    have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := by
      simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
    have h17 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => u x) (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
      have h18 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := by
        have h18' : -f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) = -f t (u t) := by
          have h3' : -(-t) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
          simp [h3']
        rw [h18'] at h3
        exact h3
      have eq1 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h18
      have eq2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := h4
      have eq3 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => u x) (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
        have h22 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := eq1
        have h23 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := eq2
        -- We need to show `HasDerivAt (fun x => u x) (f t (u t)) t`
        -- We know `h22 : HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t)`
        -- We know `h23 : HasDerivAt (fun s => -s) (-1) (-t)`
        -- The composition rule tells us that `h22` implies `h24 : HasDerivAt (fun x => u x) (f t (u t)) t`
        -- because `s ↦ u (-s)` is `u` composed with `s ↦ -s`.
        -- The derivative of this composition at `-t` is `u'(-t) * (-1)`.
        -- `h22` tells us that this derivative is equal to `-f t (u t)`.
        -- So `u'(-t) * (-1) = -f t (u t)`, hence `u'(-t) = f t (u t)`.
        -- Since `t` is arbitrary, this holds for all `t`.
        have h24 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => u x) (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
          have h25 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h18
          have h26 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := h4
          -- Now, `h25` tells us that the derivative of `s ↦ u (-s)` at `-t` is `-f t (u t)`.
          -- `s ↦ u (-s)` is a composition of `u` and `s ↦ -s`. The derivative of this composition at `-t` is `u'(-t) * (-1)`.
          -- So `u'(-t) * (-1) = -f t (u t)`, hence `u'(-t) = f t (u t)`.
          -- We need `u'(t) = f t (u t)`.
          -- Let's try to use the definition of `HasDerivAt`.
          have eq4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h18
          -- Let's try to relate `h18` to our goal.
          apply HasDerivAt.neg_left
          -- Hmm, this is not working either.
          -- Let's try a different approach.
          have h27 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h18
          -- `s ↦ u (-s)` is equal to `fun s => u (-s)`. The derivative at `-t` is given.
          -- Let's try:
          have h28 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h18
          -- Now, `s ↦ u (-s)` is a composition of `u` and `s ↦ -s`. The derivative of this composition at `-t` is `u'(-t) * (-1)`.
          -- So `h28` tells us that `u'(-t) * (-1) = -f t (u t)`.
          -- This implies `u'(-t) = f t (u t)`.
          -- We need `u'(t) = f t (u t)`.
          -- Let's try:
          have h29 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := h4
          -- Now, let's try:
          have h30 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => u x) (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
            have h31 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h18
            have h32 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := h4
            -- Try to use the chain rule explicitly
            have h33 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => u x) (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
              apply HasDerivAt.comp_of_hasDerivAt_of_hasDerivAt (g := fun s : ℝ => -s)
              · exact h31
              · exact h32
            exact h33
          exact h30
        exact h24
      exact eq3
    exact h17

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t), prove (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ)
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h (-τ)
    have h13 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-(f (-τ) (u (-τ))) ) τ := by
      have h14 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h1
      have h20 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (u (-τ + k) - u (-τ)) / k) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) ) ) := by
        apply hasDerivAt_iff_tendsto_slope.mp at h14
        simpa using h14
      have h41 : Tendsto (fun s : ℝ => (u (-s) - u (-τ)) / (s - τ) ) (𝓝 τ) (𝓝 (-(f (-τ) (u (-τ)) ) ) ) := by
        have h42 : (fun s : ℝ => (u (-s) - u (-τ)) / (s - τ) ) = (fun k : ℝ => - ( (u (-τ + k) - u (-τ)) / k ) ) ∘ (fun s : ℝ => - (s - τ) ) := by
          funext s
          have h43 : - (s - τ) = - (s - τ) := rfl
          simp [h43]
          all_goals ring_nf
        rw [h42]
        have h44 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => - ( (u (-τ + k) - u (-τ)) / k ) ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 ( - (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) ) ) ) := by
          have h45 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (u (-τ + k) - u (-τ)) / k) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) ) ) := h20
          apply Tendsto.neg
          exact h45
        have h46 : Tendsto (fun s : ℝ => - (s - τ) ) (𝓝 τ) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
          have h47 : Tendsto (fun s : ℝ => s - τ) (𝓝 τ) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
            apply Tendsto.sub
            · exact tendsto_id
            · exact tendsto_const_nhds
          have h48 : Tendsto (fun s : ℝ => - (s - τ) ) (𝓝 τ) (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
            apply Tendsto.neg
            exact h47
          exact h48
        apply Tendsto.comp
        exact h44
        exact h46
      apply hasDerivAt_iff_tendsto_slope.mpr
      simpa using h41
    simpa using h13
  · -- Assume (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ), prove (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t)
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) ) (-t) := h (-t)
    have h2 : -f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) = - (f t (u t) ) := by
      have h3 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
      simp [h3]
    have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- (f t (u t) ) ) (-t) := by
      rw [show -f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) = - (f t (u t) ) by exact h2] at h1
      exact h1
    have h12 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t) ) t := by
      have h13 : Tendsto (fun s : ℝ => (u (-s) - u (-(-t)) ) / (s - (-t)) ) (𝓝 (-t) ) (𝓝 ( - (f t (u t) ) ) ) := by
        apply hasDerivAt_iff_tendsto_slope.mp at h3
        simpa using h3
      have h14 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (u (t + k) - u (t) ) / k ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (f t (u t) ) ) := by
        have h21 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (u (-(- (k + t) ) ) - u (-(-t)) ) / ( - (k + t) - (-t) ) ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 ( - (f t (u t) )  ) ) := by
          have h23 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => - (k + t) ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (-t) ) := by
            have h24 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k + t ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (t : ℝ) ) := by
              apply Tendsto.add
              · exact tendsto_id
              · exact tendsto_const_nhds
            have h25 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => - (k + t) ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (- (t : ℝ) ) ) := by
              apply Tendsto.neg
              exact h24
            have h26 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => - (k + t) ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (-t : ℝ) ) := by
              ring_nf at *
              exact h25
            exact h26
          apply Tendsto.comp
          exact h13
          exact h23
        have h25 : (fun k : ℝ => (u (-(- (k + t) ) ) - u (-(-t)) ) / ( - (k + t) - (-t) ) ) = (fun k : ℝ => - ( (u (t + k) - u (t) ) / k ) ) := by
          funext k
          have h26 : k ≠ 0 → k ≠ 0 := by intro h; exact h
          have h27 : - (k + t) - -t = -k := by ring
          have h28 : - - (k + t) = (k + t : ℝ) := by ring
          have h29 : - -t = (t : ℝ) := by ring
          simp [h27, h28, h29]
          all_goals ring_nf
        rw [h25] at h21
        have h26 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (u (t + k) - u (t) ) / k ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (f t (u t) ) ) := by
          have h27 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => - ( (u (t + k) - u (t) ) / k ) ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 ( - (f t (u t) )  ) ) := h21
          have h28 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => (u (t + k) - u (t) ) / k ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 (f t (u t) ) ) := by
            have h29 : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => - ( - ( (u (t + k) - u (t) ) / k ) ) ) (𝓝 0) (𝓝 ( - ( - (f t (u t) )  ) ) ) := by
              apply Tendsto.neg
              exact h27
            have h30 : - ( - ( (u (t + k) - u (t) ) / k  )  ) = (u (t + k) - u (t) ) / k := by ring
            have h31 : - ( - (f t (u t) )  ) = (f t (u t) : ℝ) := by ring
            simp only [h30, h31] at h29
            exact h29
          exact h28
        exact h26
      apply hasDerivAt_iff_tendsto_slope.mpr
      simpa using h14
    exact h12

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t), prove (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ)
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h (-τ)
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ := by
      have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) τ := by
        simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
      have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ)) τ := by
        apply HasDerivAt.comp
        exact h1
        exact h3
      have h5 : f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ) = -f (-τ) (u (-τ)) := by ring
      rw [h5] at h4
      exact h4
    exact h2
  · -- Assume (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ), prove (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t)
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) ) (-t) := h (-t)
    have h2 : -f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) = -f t (u t) := by
      have h3 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
      rw [h3]
    have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := by
      rw [show -f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) = -f t (u t) by
        have h3 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
        rw [h3]
      ] at h1
      exact h1
    have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t) := by
      simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
    have h12 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
      have h13 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h3
      have h14 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t) := h4
      have h15 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
        have h16 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h3
        have h17 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t) := h4
        -- Use the chain rule for composition
        have h18 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
          apply HasDerivAt.of_hasDerivAt_of_hasDerivAt_of_eq
          all_goals
            try { linarith }
            try { apply h17 }
            try { apply h16 }
        exact h18
      exact h15
    exact h12

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t), prove (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ)
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 := h (-τ)
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ := by
      have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) τ := by
        simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
      have h5 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h1
      have h7 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ)) τ := by
        apply HasDerivAt.comp
        · -- Show that `fun s => -s` has a derivative at `τ` which is `-1`.
          exact h4
        · -- Show that `u` has a derivative at `-τ` which is `f (-τ) (u (-τ))`
          simpa using h5
      have h8 : f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ) = - f (-τ) (u (-τ)) := by ring
      rw [h8] at h7
      exact h7
    exact h2
  · -- Assume (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ), prove (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t)
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 := h (-t)
    have h7 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- f t (u t)) (-t) := by
      have h4 : - f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) = - f t (u t) := by
        have h5 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
        rw [h5]
        all_goals simp
      have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) ) (-t) := by
        simpa using h1
      rw [h4] at h3
      exact h3
    have h19 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u s) (f t (u t)) t := by
      have h41 : deriv (fun s : ℝ =>  u (-s)) (-t) = -1 * (f t (u t)) := by
        have h35 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-1 * (f t (u t))) (-t) := by
          simpa using h7
        rw [h35.deriv_eq]
      have h42 : deriv (fun s : ℝ =>  u (-s)) (-t) = deriv (fun s : ℝ =>  u s) (t) * (-1 : ℝ) := by
        simp [deriv.comp, deriv_neg'']
      have h43 : deriv (fun s : ℝ =>  u s) (t) = f t (u t) := by
        nlinarith
      have h44 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ =>  u s) (f t (u t)) t := by
        apply HasDerivAt.deriv_eq
        all_goals try simp [h43]
      exact h44
    exact h19

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Forward direction
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 := h (-τ)
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1)) τ := by
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      · -- Show that `fun s => -s` has a derivative at `τ`
        simp
      · -- Show that `u` has a derivative at `-τ`

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :

      have h17 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t := by

        have h19 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t) := h16

        have h8 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ  => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h5
        have h9 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ  => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t) := h6
        have h10 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ  => u (-s) ∘ (fun s : ℝ  => -s)) (f t (u t) ) t := by
          apply HasDerivAt.comp
          · -- Show that `HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ  => -s) (-1) t`
            have h14 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ  => -s) (-1 : ℝ) t := by
              simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
            exact h14
          · -- Show that `HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ  => u (-s)) (f t (u t)) (-t)`
            have h15 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ  => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h5
            -- We need to flip the sign
            have h16 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ  => u (-s)) (f t (u t)) (-t) := by
              have h17 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ  => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h5
              have h18 : (fun s : ℝ  => u (-s)) = (fun s : ℝ  => u (-s)) := by rfl

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t), prove (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ)
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 := h (-τ)
    have h3 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h1
    have h5 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (τ : ℝ) := by
      apply HasDerivAt.neg
      all_goals
      apply hasDerivAt_id
    have h6 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ := by
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      · exact h3
      · exact h5
    exact h6
  · -- Assume (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ), prove (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t)
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 := h (-t)
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- f t (u t)) (-t) := by
      have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t)))) (-t) := h1
      have h4 : - f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t))) = - f t (u t) := by
        have h5 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
        simp [h5]
      rw [h4] at h3
      exact h3
    have h10 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := by
      apply HasDerivAt.neg
      all_goals
      apply hasDerivAt_id
    have h14 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
      have h17' : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- f t (u t)) (-t) := h2
      have h17'' : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := h10
      have h18 : IsLittleO (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u (-(-t)) - (- f t (u t)) * (x + t))) (fun x : ℝ => x + t) (𝓝 (-t)) := by
        have h19 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- f t (u t)) (-t) := h17'
        exact h19.isLittleO
      have h19 : IsLittleO (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u t + (f t (u t)) * (x + t))) (fun x : ℝ => x + t) (𝓝 (-t)) := by
        have h20 : IsLittleO (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u (-(-t)) - (- f t (u t)) * (x + t))) (fun x : ℝ => x + t) (𝓝 (-t)) := h18
        have h21 : (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u (-(-t)) - (- f t (u t)) * (x + t))) = (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u t + (f t (u t)) * (x + t))) := by
          funext x
          have h22 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
          simp [h22]
          all_goals ring_nf
        rw [h21] at h20
        exact h20
      have h20 : IsLittleO (fun y : ℝ => (u y - u t - (f t (u t)) * (y - t))) (fun y : ℝ => y - t) (𝓝 (t : ℝ)) := by
        have h31 : IsLittleO (fun y : ℝ => (u (-y) - u t + (f t (u t)) * (-y + t))) (fun y : ℝ => -y + t) (𝓝 (t : ℝ)) := by
          have h37 : IsLittleO (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u t + (f t (u t)) * (x + t))) (fun x : ℝ => x + t) (𝓝 (-t)) := h19
          have h29 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => -y) (𝓝 (t : ℝ)) (𝓝 (-t : ℝ)) := by
            apply Tendsto.neg
            all_goals
            apply tendsto_id
          have h31 : IsLittleO (fun y : ℝ => (u (-y) - u t + (f t (u t)) * (-y + t))) (fun y : ℝ => -y + t) (𝓝 (t : ℝ)) := by
            have h38 : (fun y : ℝ => (u (-y) - u t + (f t (u t)) * (-y + t))) = (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u t + (f t (u t)) * (x + t))) ∘ (fun y : ℝ => -y) := by
              funext y
              simp
            rw [h38]
            apply IsLittleO.comp
            exact h37
            all_goals
            try { exact h29 }
          exact h31
        have h32 : IsLittleO (fun y : ℝ => (u y - u t - (f t (u t)) * (y - t))) (fun y : ℝ => y - t) (𝓝 (t : ℝ)) := by
          have h31 : IsLittleO (fun y : ℝ => (u (-y) - u t + (f t (u t)) * (-y + t))) (fun y : ℝ => -y + t) (𝓝 (t : ℝ)) := h31
          have h43 : (fun y : ℝ => (u (-y) - u t + (f t (u t)) * (-y + t))) = (fun z : ℝ => (u z - u t - (f t (u t)) * (z - t))) ∘ (fun y : ℝ => -y) := by
            funext y
            simp
            all_goals ring_nf
          rw [h43] at h31
          have h44 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => -y) (𝓝 (t : ℝ)) (𝓝 (-t : ℝ)) := by
            apply Tendsto.neg
            all_goals
            apply tendsto_id
          have h45 : IsLittleO (fun z : ℝ => (u z - u t - (f t (u t)) * (z - t))) (fun z : ℝ => z - t) (𝓝 (t : ℝ)) := by
            apply IsLittleO.comp_rev
            all_goals
            try { exact h31 }
            all_goals
            try { exact h44 }
          simpa using h45
        exact h32
      apply HasDerivAt.mk
      exact h20
    exact h14

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume that ∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t.
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 := h (-τ)
    have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (τ : ℝ) := by
      simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
    have h4 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) ) (-τ : ℝ) := h1
    have h5 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ)) τ := by
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      · exact h3
      · exact h4
    have h6 : f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1 : ℝ) = -f (-τ) (u (-τ)) := by ring
    rw [h6] at h5
    exact h5
  · -- Assume that ∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ.
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 := h (-t)
    have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (t) (u t)) (-t : ℝ) := by
      have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t)) )) (-t : ℝ) := h1
      have h5 : -f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t)) ) = -f (t) (u t) := by
        have h6 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
        rw [h6]
      rw [h5] at h4
      exact h4
    have h7 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := by
      simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
    have h18 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
      have h19 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (t) (u t)) (-t : ℝ) := h3
      have h20 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := h7
      have h21 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) (t : ℝ) := by
        have h22 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (t) (u t)) (-t : ℝ) := h3
        have h23 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t : ℝ) := h7
        -- Use the chain rule in reverse
        -- If the composition has a derivative and the inner function has a derivative,
        -- then the outer function must have a derivative.
        apply HasDerivAt.comp_left
        all_goals try { try { apply h22 }, try { apply h23 } }
      exact h21
    exact h18

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume h : ∀ t, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t, prove h' : ∀ τ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 := h (-τ)
    -- We need to show that `fun s => u (-s)` has a derivative at `τ` equal to `-f (-τ) (u (-τ))`.
    -- Applying the chain rule: if `g(s) = u(-s)`, then `g'(s) = u'(-s) * (-1)`.
    -- From `h1`, we know `u` has a derivative `f (-τ) (u (-τ))` at `-τ`.
    -- Therefore, `g' = f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1)`.
    have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (τ : ℝ) := by
      apply HasDerivAt.neg
      exact hasDerivAt_id τ
    have h5 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) : ℝ) (-τ : ℝ) := h1
    have h6 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) ( (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) : ℝ) * (-1) ) τ := by
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      · exact h5
      · exact h4
    have h7 : (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) : ℝ) * (-1 : ℝ) = - (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) : ℝ) := by ring
    rw [h7] at h6
    exact h6
  · -- Assume h' : ∀ τ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ, prove h : ∀ t, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 := h (-t)
    -- Simplify the expression: `h1` tells us that `fun s => u (-s)` has a derivative at `-t` equal to `-f (-(-t)) (u (-(-t)))`.
    -- Since `-(-t) = t`, this means `fun s => u (-s)` has a derivative at `-t` equal to `-f t (u t)`.
    have h2 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- (f t (u t) : ℝ)) (-t : ℝ) := by
      have h3 : - f (-(-t) : ℝ) (u (-(-t) : ℝ)) = - (f t (u t) : ℝ) := by
        have h4 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
        rw [h4]
      rw [h3] at h1
      exact h1
    -- Now, we need to convert this information into a statement about `u` at `t`.
    -- If `g(s) = u(-s)`, then `g'(-t) = u'(t) * (-1)`.
    -- From `h2`, we know `g'(-t) = - (f t (u t))`.
    -- Therefore, `u'(t) * (-1) = - (f t (u t))` => `u'(t) = f t (u t)`.
    have h11 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (t : ℝ) := by
      apply HasDerivAt.neg
      exact hasDerivAt_id t
    -- We need to show `HasDerivAt u (f t (u t) : ℝ) (t : ℝ)`.
    -- Let's try to compute the derivative of `fun s => u (-s) ∘ (fun s => -s)` at `t`.
    -- `fun s => u (-s) ∘ (fun s => -s)` is equal to `u`.
    -- The derivative should be `f t (u t)`.
    have h12 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s) ∘ (fun s : ℝ => -s)) ( (f t (u t) : ℝ) ) (t : ℝ) := by
      have h73 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- (f t (u t) : ℝ)) (-t : ℝ) := h2
      have h74 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (t : ℝ) := h11
      -- Applying the chain rule.
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      · -- Show that `fun s => u (-s)` has a derivative at `-t` with value `- (f t (u t) : ℝ)`.
        exact h73
      · -- Show that `fun s => -s` has a derivative at `t` with value `-1`.
        exact h74
    -- Finally, we need to show that `fun s => u (-s) ∘ (fun s => -s)` is equal to `u`.
    have h13 : (fun s : ℝ => u (-s) ∘ (fun s : ℝ => -s)) = u := by
      funext x
      simp [Function.comp_apply]
      all_goals ring_nf
    rw [h13] at h12
    exact h12

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume ∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t, prove ∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 := h (-τ)
    have h3 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h1
    have h11 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1)) τ := by
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      · -- Show that g(s) = -s has a derivative -1 at τ
        simp [hasDerivAt_neg]
      all_goals
      · -- Show that u has a derivative f (-τ) (u (-τ)) at -τ
        simpa using h3
    have h12 : f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1) = - f (-τ) (u (-τ)) := by ring
    rw [h12] at h11
    exact h11
  · -- Assume ∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ, prove ∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 := h (-t)
    have h7 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (- f t (u t)) (-t) := by
      simpa using h1
    have h17 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u t) / (x + t)) (𝓝 (-t)) (𝓝 (-f t (u t))) := by
      have h16 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u (-(-t))) / (x - (-t))) (𝓝 (-t)) (𝓝 (-f t (u t))) := by
        apply h7.tendsto_slope
      have h19 : (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u (-(-t))) / (x - (-t))) = (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u t) / (x + t)) := by
        funext x
        have h20 : -(-t : ℝ) = t := by ring
        simp [h20]
        all_goals ring_nf
      rw [h19] at h16
      exact h16
    have h18 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => (u y - u t) / (y - t)) (𝓝 t) (𝓝 (f t (u t))) := by
      have h27 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => (u y - u t) / (t - y)) (𝓝 t) (𝓝 (-f t (u t))) := by
        have h28 : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => (u (-x) - u t) / (x + t)) (𝓝 (-t)) (𝓝 (-f t (u t))) := h17
        have h29 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => -y) (𝓝 t) (𝓝 (-t)) := by
          apply tendsto_neg
        have h30 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => (u (-(-y)) - u t) / (-y + t)) (𝓝 t) (𝓝 (-f t (u t))) := by
          apply Tendsto.comp h28 h29
        have h31 : (fun y : ℝ => (u (-(-y)) - u t) / (-y + t)) = (fun y : ℝ => (u y - u t) / (t - y)) := by
          funext y
          ring_nf
        rw [h31] at h30
        exact h30
      have h37 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ => (u y - u t) / (y - t)) (𝓝 t) (𝓝 (f t (u t))) := by
        have h34 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ  => - ((u y - u t) / (y - t))) (𝓝 t) (𝓝 (-f t (u t))) := by
          have h36 : (fun y : ℝ  => - ((u y - u t) / (y - t))) = (fun y : ℝ => (u y - u t) / (t - y)) := by
            funext y
            by_cases h : (y - t : ℝ) = 0
            · -- When y - t = 0, both sides are 0/0 which is handled by the limit
              rw [h]
              norm_num
            · -- When y - t ≠ 0, then t - y = -(y - t)
              have h2 : (t - y : ℝ) = - (y - t) := by ring
              rw [h2]
              have h3 : (y - t : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by
                exact h
              field_simp [h3]
              all_goals ring
          rw [h36]
          exact h27
        have h38 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ  => - (- ((u y - u t) / (y - t)))) (𝓝 t) (𝓝 (-(-f t (u t))) ) := by
          apply Tendsto.neg
          exact h34
        have h41 : -(-f t (u t)) = f t (u t) := by ring
        have h39 : Tendsto (fun y : ℝ  => (u y - u t) / (y - t)) (𝓝 t) (𝓝 (f t (u t))) := by
          have h42 : (fun y : ℝ  => - (- ((u y - u t) / (y - t)))) = (fun y : ℝ  => (u y - u t) / (y - t)) := by
            funext y
            simp
          rw [h42] at h38
          rw [h41] at h38
          exact h38
        exact h39
      exact h37
    apply HasDerivAt.mono_of_tendsto_slope
    exact h18

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t), prove (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ)
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h (-τ)
    have h3 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1) τ := by
      simp [hasDerivAt_id']
    have h4 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ := by
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      · exact h3
      · exact h1
    exact h4
  · -- Assume (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ), prove (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t)
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := by
      specialize h (-t)
      have h2 : -(-t : ℝ) = (t : ℝ) := by ring
      simp [h2] at h ⊢
      all_goals try exact h
    have h17 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1) (-t) := by
      simp [hasDerivAt_id']
    have h15 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t := by
      have h16 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h1
      have h18 : HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t := by
        have h19 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := h16
        have h20 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1) (-t) := h17
        -- Apply the chain rule in reverse.
        apply HasDerivAt.comp_of_eq (f := fun x : ℝ => u x) (g := fun s : ℝ => -s) (x := -t) (y := t) (h19) (h20) (by ring)
      exact h18
    exact h15

theorem subq_III_5_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :
    (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t) ↔
      (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s))
        (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t), prove (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ)
    intro h
    intro τ
    have h1 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h (-τ)
    have h7 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1)) τ := by
      have h5 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) τ := by
        apply HasDerivAt.neg
        apply hasDerivAt_id
      have h6 : HasDerivAt u (f (-τ) (u (-τ))) (-τ) := h1
      apply HasDerivAt.comp
      · exact h5
      · exact h6
    have h8 : (f (-τ) (u (-τ)) * (-1) : ℝ) = (-f (-τ) (u (-τ)) : ℝ) := by ring
    rw [h8] at h7
    exact h7
  · -- Assume (∀ τ : ℝ, HasDerivAt (fun s => u (-s)) (-f (-τ) (u (-τ))) τ), prove (∀ t : ℝ, HasDerivAt u (f t (u t)) t)
    intro h
    intro t
    have h1 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (-f t (u t)) (-t) := by
      specialize h (-t)
      simpa using h
    have h6 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => u (-s)) (u' (-t) * (-1)) (-t) := by
      have h70 : HasDerivAt (fun s : ℝ => -s) (-1 : ℝ) (-t) := by

    (f : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ) (u : ℝ → ℝ) :

      · -- Show that u has derivative f (-τ) (u (-τ)) at -τ

theorem subq_II_3_a
    (lam : ℝ) (t : ℝ) (ht : t < lam) :
    let α : ℝ → ℝ := fun s => 1 / (lam - s)

    · -- The function `fun s => lam - s` has a derivative `-1` at t.

      · -- The function `fun s => s` has a derivative `1` at t.

    have h4 : (1 / (lam - t) ^ 2 : ℝ) ≤ (1 / (lam - t)) ^ 2 + Real.sin (t * (1 / (lam - t))) ^ 2 := by
