theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  by_cases h : n = 1

      norm_num [f_def]

      intro u ⟨hu0, hu1, h_eq⟩

      rw [f_def] at h_eq'
      simp at h_eq'
      all_goals linarith
  · -- n > 1
    have h4 : n > 1 := by

      push_neg at h
      have : n = 1 := by linarith

          apply Finset.sum_congr
          · rfl
          · intro k hk
            specialize h8 k
            linarith

        simp
      linarith

      have h3 : f n 1 = (n : ℝ) - 1 := by
        have h2 : f n 1 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        rw [h2]
        have h4 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (n : ℝ) := by
          simp
        rw [h4]
      have hn' : (n : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast (show (n : ℕ) > 1 by omega)

    have h7 : ∃ c : ℝ, 0 < c ∧ c < 1 ∧ f n c = 0 := by

        · -- f n 1 ≥ 0
          have h101 : f n 1 ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith [h6]
          all_goals try linarith
      rcases h18 with ⟨c, hc, h_eq⟩
      have hc0 : 0 ≤ c := by
        have h1 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc
        exact h1.1
      have hc1 : c ≤ 1 := by
        have h1 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc
        exact h1.2

      all_goals try linarith
    rcases h7 with ⟨c, hc0, hc1, h_eq⟩
    use c
    constructor
    · -- Show that c is a solution in [0, 1]

      · linarith
      constructor

      · linarith

                linarith

                }

          have h15'' : f n c = 0 := by linarith [h_eq]
          linarith
        by_cases h15 : u > c
        · -- Assume u > c
          have h16 : f n u > f n c := by
            have h17 : c < u := by linarith
            have h18 : c ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h19 : u ≤ 1 := by linarith
            have h20 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
              apply f_def
            have h21 : f n c = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
              apply f_def
            rw [h20, h21]
            have h22 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < ∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
              apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
              · -- Show that for all k, c ^ (k + 1) ≤ u ^ (k + 1)

                have h24 : (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                  have h25 : c ≤ u := by linarith
                  have h26 : (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                    apply pow_le_pow_left
                    all_goals nlinarith
                  linarith
                linarith
              · -- Show that there exists a k such that c ^ (k + 1) < u ^ (k + 1)
                use 0
                have h27 : (c : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) < (u : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) := by
                  have h28 : c < u := by linarith
                  norm_num at *
                  all_goals nlinarith
                all_goals try { linarith
                }
            linarith
          have h16' : f n u = 0 := h10
          have h16'' : f n c = 0 := by linarith [h_eq]
          linarith
        · -- u ≤ c and not u < c, so u = c
          have h17 : u ≥ c := by linarith
          have h18 : u ≤ c := by linarith
          have h19 : u = c := by linarith
          linarith
      linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)

        norm_num

          intro n

          | zero =>
            simp
          | succ n ih =>
            rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]
            all_goals

              all_goals
                linarith
        apply h6 n

      have hn1 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show (n : ℕ) ≥ (1 : ℕ) by linarith
      have h7 : (n : ℝ) - 1 ≥ 0 := by nlinarith

    have h13 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
      have h14 : f n = fun x : ℝ => (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
        funext x
        exact f_def n x
      rw [h14]
      fun_prop
    have h9 : ∃ c : ℝ, c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n c = 0 := by
      apply h13.exists_zero_of_lt_of_le
      · -- f n 0 < 0
        exact h3
      · -- f n 1 ≥ 0
        exact h4

    exact h9

    have h1 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hc_in
    exact h1.1
  have hc1 : c ≤ 1 := by
    have h1 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hc_in
    exact h1.2
  use c

  · -- Show that c is a solution

          have h20 : u < c := h16

          have h24 : c ≤ 1 := by linarith

            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, (u)^(k+1) ≤ (c)^(k+1)
              intro k hk
              have h26 : (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by

            · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n where (u)^(k+1) < (c)^(k+1)

                have h27 : (u : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) < (c : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) := by

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :

    have h4 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by

        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero => norm_num
        | succ k ih =>
          simp [pow_succ] at ih ⊢
          all_goals linarith
      rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => h5 k)]
      simp
    linarith
  have h4 : f n 0 = -1 := h2
  have h5 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    rw [h3]
    have h6 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n ≥ 1 by omega
    linarith
  have h10 : ∃ u, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    have h14 : Continuous (f n : ℝ → ℝ) := by
      fun_prop
    have h15 : f n 0 ≤ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h16 : f n 1 ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h17 : ∃ u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1, f n u = (0 : ℝ) := by
      apply h14.exists_of_le_of_lt
      · -- Show f n 0 ≤ 0
        linarith
      · -- Show 0 < f n 1
        have h18 : f n 1 > (0 : ℝ) := by
          rw [h3]
          have h6 : (n : ℝ) > (1 : ℝ) := by

    rcases h17 with ⟨u, hu, h_eq⟩

          have h30 : u ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
            exact h28.2
          linarith
        linarith
      constructor
      · linarith
      constructor
      · linarith
      · by
          simpa using h_eq
    ⟩
  rcases h10 with ⟨u, hu1, hu2, h_eq⟩
  use u
  constructor
  · -- Show that u is valid
    tauto
  · -- Show that u is unique
    intro v ⟨hv1, hv2, h_eq2⟩
    by_cases h : v < u
    · -- Assume v < u
      have h20 : f n v < f n u := by
        have h21 : v < u := by linarith
        have h22 : v ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h23 : u ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h24 : f n v < f n u := by
          rw [f_def, f_def]
          have h27 : v < u := h21
          have h28 : v ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
          have h29 : u ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
          have h30 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) := by
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              intro k hk
              have h31 : k ≥ 0 := by omega
              have h32 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by omega
              have h33 : (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by

                have h39 : u ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith

                linarith

          have h31 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by linarith

        linarith
      linarith [h_eq2, h_eq, h20]
    · -- v = u

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h2 : f n 0 = -1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h3 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
      have h6 : ∀ (k : ℕ), (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
        intro k
        simp
      have h7 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) := by
        apply Finset.sum_congr
        · rfl
        · intro k hk
          specialize h6 k
          linarith
      rw [h7]
      simp
    linarith
  have h3 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h4 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (n : ℝ) := by
      have h5 : ∀ (k : ℕ), (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
        intro k
        simp
      have h6 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) := by
        apply Finset.sum_congr
        · rfl
        · intro k hk
          specialize h5 k
          linarith
      rw [h6]
      simp
    linarith
  have h4 : f n 0 < 0 := by
    linarith [h2]
  have h5 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := h3
  have h7 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
    funext x
    rw [f_def]
    apply continuous_finset_sum
    intro i hi
    apply continuous_pow
  have h15 : ∃ u : ℝ, u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    apply exists_zero_of_continuous_of_neg_of_nonneg
    · -- Show that f n is continuous
      exact h7
    · -- Show that Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) is connected
      apply isPreconnected_Icc
    · -- Show that 0 ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ)
      exact ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩
    · -- Show that f n 0 < 0
      linarith [h4]
    · -- Show that 1 ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ)
      exact ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩
    · -- Show that 0 ≤ f n 1
      linarith [h3]

      have h11 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hx
      exact h11.1
    have h11 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h12 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hx
      exact h12.2
    have h12 : 0 ≤ y := by
      have h13 : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hy
      exact h13.1
    have h13 : y ≤ 1 := by
      have h14 : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hy
      exact h14.2
    have h14 : x < y := by linarith
    have h15 : f n y - f n x > 0 := by
      have h16 : f n y - f n x = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 - ((∑ k in Finset.range n, (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1) := by
        rw [f_def, f_def]
      rw [h16]
      have h17 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 - ((∑ k in Finset.range n, (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1) = (∑ k in Finset.range n, ((y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) - (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1))) := by
        ring_nf
      rw [h17]
      have h18 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, ((y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) - (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) > 0 := by
        have h19 : ∀ (k : ℕ), k ∈ Finset.range n → (y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) - (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≥ 0 := by
          intro k hk
          have h20 : x ≤ y := by linarith
          have h21 : (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
            apply pow_le_pow_left
            all_goals nlinarith
          nlinarith
        have h22 : ∃ k ∈ Finset.range n, (y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) - (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) > 0 := by

            nlinarith

        · -- Show at least one term is positive

  constructor
  · -- Show that u is a solution
    tauto
  · -- Show that u is unique
    intro v h
    rcases h with ⟨hv0, hv1, h_eq⟩
    have h13 : f n v = 0 := h_eq
    have h14 : f n u = 0 := hu2
    by_cases h15 : v < u
    · -- Assume v < u
      have h16 : f n v < f n u := by
        apply h7
        · -- Show that v ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ)

        · -- Show that u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ)
          have h17 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := by
            simpa using hu1
          tauto
        all_goals nlinarith
      nlinarith
    by_cases h16 : v > u
    · -- Assume v > u
      have h17 : f n u < f n v := by
        apply h7
        · -- Show that u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ)
          have h17 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := by
            simpa using hu1
          tauto
        · -- Show that v ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ)
          exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
        all_goals nlinarith
      nlinarith
    linarith

theorem subq_I_1

          simp

            have h10 : n > 1 := by omega
            exact_mod_cast h10
          nlinarith
      have h7 : ∃ u : ℝ, 0 < u ∧ u < 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
        apply exists_between_of_lt _ (show f n 0 < 0 by linarith [h4]) (show 0 < f n 1 by linarith [h6])

    · -- n = 1

      constructor

  rcases h2 with ⟨u, h10, h11, h12⟩

                · -- Show that there exists at least one k in the range where u^(k+1) < v^(k+1)

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by

        all_goals

        have h13 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu

          have hy2 : y ≤ 1 := by

          have h7 : f n x = (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by

              have h16 : x < y := hxy
              have h17 : x ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h18 : y ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h19 : x ^ (k + 1) < y ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_lt_pow_left
                all_goals nlinarith
              assumption
            have h17 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1) < ∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1) := by
              apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
              · -- Show that for all k in range n, x^(k+1) ≤ y^(k+1)
                intro k hk
                have h18 : x ^ (k + 1) ≤ y ^ (k + 1) := by
                  have h19 : x ≤ y := by linarith
                  have h20 : x ≥ 0 := by linarith
                  have h21 : y ≥ 0 := by linarith
                  have h22 : x ^ (k + 1) ≤ y ^ (k + 1) := by
                    apply pow_le_pow_left
                    all_goals nlinarith
                  assumption
                assumption
              · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n such that x^(k+1) < y^(k+1)
                use 0
                constructor
                · -- Show 0 in range n
                  simp
                  all_goals omega
                · -- Show x^1 < y^1
                  specialize h15 0
                  simpa using h15
            assumption
          have h9 : f n x < f n y := by
            linarith
          assumption
        have h7 : f n v = 0 := h2
        have h8 : f n u = 0 := h1
        by_cases h11 : v < u
        · -- Assume v < u
          have h12 : f n v < f n u := by
            apply h4
            · -- Show v in Icc 0 1
              exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
            · -- Show u in Icc 0 1
              exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
            all_goals linarith
          have h13 : 0 < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith [h7, h8, h12]
          linarith
        by_cases h12 : v > u
        · -- Assume v > u
          have h13 : f n v > f n u := by
            apply h4
            · -- Show u in Icc 0 1
              exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
            · -- Show v in Icc 0 1
              exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
            all_goals linarith
          have h14 : (0 : ℝ) > (0 : ℝ) := by linarith [h7, h8, h13]
          linarith
        · -- v = u
          have h14 : v ≤ u := by linarith
          have h15 : v ≥ u := by linarith
          have h16 : v = u := by linarith
          assumption
      tauto
  · -- Case n = 1
    have h23 : n = 1 := by omega
    rw [h23] at *
    use 1
    constructor
    · -- Show that 1 is a solution
      constructor
      · norm_num
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · -- Show that f 1 1 = 0
        have h24 : f 1 1 = 0 := by
          rw [f_def]
          norm_num
        linarith
    · -- Show that 1 is unique
      intro v h2
      rcases h2 with ⟨hv1, hv2, h2⟩
      have h6 : v = (1 : ℝ) := by
        have h7 : f 1 v = 0 := h2
        have h8 : f 1 1 = 0 := by
          rw [f_def]
          norm_num
        have h9 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h10 : v ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have h11 : v = 1 := by
          have h12 : f 1 v = v - 1 := by
            rw [f_def]
            all_goals norm_num
          rw [h12] at h7
          have h13 : v = 1 := by linarith
          assumption
        assumption
      linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h10 : f n 0 = -1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    simp
  have h11 : f n 1 = (n : ℝ) - 1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    simp
  have h12 : f n 0 ≤ 0 := by
    rw [h10]
    all_goals norm_num
  have h13 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    rw [h11]
    have hn1 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n ≥ 1 by linarith
    nlinarith
  have h14 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
    funext x
    rw [f_def]
    apply Continuous.sub
    · apply continuous_finsetSum
      intro k hk
      apply Continuous.pow
      all_goals apply continuous_id
    · apply continuous_const
  have h15 : ∃ c : ℝ, c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) ∧ f n c = 0 := by
    by_cases h : f n 1 > 0
    · -- If f n 1 > 0, then by IVT, there exists a root in (0, 1)
      apply Continuous.exists_mem_set_of_le_of_lt_of_lt _ h14
      all_goals
        try norm_num
        try linarith
    · -- If f n 1 ≤ 0, then since f n 1 ≥ 0, we have f n 1 = 0
      have h16 : f n 1 = 0 := by linarith [h13, h]
      use 1
      constructor
      · -- Show 1 ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ)
        exact ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩
      · -- Show f n 1 = 0
        linarith [h16]
  rcases h15 with ⟨c, hc, hc0⟩
  use c
  constructor
  · -- Show that c satisfies the required conditions
    refine' ⟨hc.1, hc.2, hc0⟩
  · -- Show that c is unique
    intro u hu
    rcases hu with ⟨hu0, hu1, hu2⟩
    by_cases h6 : c < u
    · -- Assume c < u
      have h7 : f n c < f n u := by
        rw [f_def, f_def]
        have h8 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < ∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
          apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
          · -- Show that for all k in range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
            intro k hk
            have h9 : (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
              have h10 : 0 ≤ c := by linarith [hc.1]
              have h11 : c ≤ 1 := by linarith [hc.2]
              have h12 : 0 ≤ u := by linarith [hu0]
              have h13 : u ≤ 1 := by linarith [hu1]
              have h14 : c ≤ u := by linarith
              have h15 : (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_left
                all_goals nlinarith
              linarith
            linarith
          · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
            use 0
            have h9 : (c : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) < (u : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) := by
              have h10 : c < u := h6
              norm_num
              all_goals nlinarith
            simpa using h9
        linarith
      have h8 : f n c = 0 := hc0
      have h9 : f n u = 0 := hu2
      linarith [h7, h8, h9]
    · -- Assume c ≥ u
      by_cases h7 : u < c
      · -- Assume u < c
        have h8 : f n u < f n c := by
          rw [f_def, f_def]
          have h8 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < ∑ k in Finset.range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              intro k hk
              have h9 : (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                have h10 : 0 ≤ u := by linarith [hu0]
                have h11 : u ≤ 1 := by linarith [hu1]
                have h12 : 0 ≤ c := by linarith [hc.1]
                have h13 : c ≤ 1 := by linarith [hc.2]
                have h14 : u ≤ c := by linarith
                have h15 : (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                linarith
              linarith
            · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              use 0
              have h9 : (u : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) < (c : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) := by
                have h10 : u < c := h7
                norm_num
                all_goals nlinarith
              simpa using h9
          linarith
        have h8 : f n u = 0 := hu2
        have h9 : f n c = 0 := hc0
        linarith [h8, h9, h8]
      · -- c = u
        have h10 : c = u := by linarith
        linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h3 : f n 0 < 0 := by
    have h4 : f n 0 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
      apply f_def
    rw [h4]
    have h5 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = 0 := by
      have h6 : ∀ k : ℕ, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero =>
          norm_num
        | succ k ih =>
          simp [pow_succ, mul_zero] at ih ⊢
      rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => h6 k)]
      simp
    linarith
  have h4 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    have h5 : f n 1 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
      apply f_def
    rw [h5]
    have h6 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
      have h7 : ∀ k : ℕ, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero =>
          norm_num
        | succ k ih =>
          simp [pow_succ] at ih ⊢
      rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => h7 k)]
      simp
    rw [h6]
    have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n ≥ (1 : ℕ) by omega
    nlinarith
  have h7 : ∃ u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    have h10 : ∃ u : ℝ, u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
      have h11 : f n 0 < 0 := h3
      have h12 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := h4
      have h13 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
        have h14 : ∀ k : ℕ, Continuous (fun x : ℝ => x ^ (k + 1 : ℕ)) := by
          intro k
          apply continuous_pow
        have h15 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => ∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1 : ℕ)) := by
          apply continuous_finset_sum
          intro k hk
          exact h14 k
        have h16 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
          have h17 : f n = fun x : ℝ => (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1 : ℕ)) - 1 := by
            funext x
            simp [f_def]
          rw [h17]
          apply Continuous.sub
          · exact h15
          · exact continuous_const
        exact h16
      apply intermediate_value_theorem_of_continuous_of_le_of_lt
      · -- Show that f n x is continuous
        exact h13
      · -- Show that 0 ≤ (0 : ℝ)
        norm_num
      · -- Show that (0 : ℝ) ≤ 1
        norm_num
      · -- Show that f n 0 < 0
        linarith
      · -- Show that 0 ≤ f n 1
        linarith
    rcases h10 with ⟨u, hu, h_eq⟩
    have h11 : 0 ≤ u := by
      have h12 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu
      exact h12.1
    have h12 : u ≤ 1 := by
      have h13 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu
      exact h13.2
    exact ⟨h11, h12, h_eq⟩
  have h4 : ∀ u v : ℝ, 0 ≤ u → u ≤ 1 → f n u = 0 → 0 ≤ v → v ≤ 1 → f n v = 0 → u = v := by
    intros u v hu1 hu2 h_eq1 hv1 hv2 h_eq2
    by_cases h : u < v
    · -- Assume u < v
      have h13 : f n u < f n v := by
        have h14 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        have h15 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        rw [h14, h15]
        have h16 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) := by
          apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
          · -- Show that for all k in range n, u^(k+1) ≤ v^(k+1)
            intro k hk
            have h17 : 0 ≤ u := by linarith
            have h18 : u ≤ v := by linarith
            have h19 : (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
              apply pow_le_pow_left
              all_goals nlinarith
            linarith
          · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n such that u^(k+1) < v^(k+1)
            use 0
            constructor
            · -- Show that 0 ∈ range n
              simp at *
              all_goals omega
            · -- Show that u^1 < v^1
              have h19 : (u : ℝ) < (v : ℝ) := by linarith
              have h20 : (u : ℝ) ^ 1 < (v : ℝ) ^ 1 := by nlinarith
              linarith
        linarith
      have h14 : f n u = 0 := h_eq1
      have h15 : f n v = 0 := h_eq2
      nlinarith
    · -- Assume u ≥ v
      by_cases h' : v < u
      · -- Assume v < u
        have h13 : f n v < f n u := by
          have h14 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          have h15 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          rw [h14, h15]
          have h16 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) := by
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, v^(k+1) ≤ u^(k+1)
              intro k hk
              have h17 : 0 ≤ v := by linarith
              have h18 : v ≤ u := by linarith
              have h19 : (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_left
                all_goals nlinarith
              linarith
            · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n such that v^(k+1) < u^(k+1)
              use 0
              constructor
              · -- Show that 0 ∈ range n
                simp at *
                all_goals omega
              · -- Show that v^1 < u^1
                have h19 : (v : ℝ) < (u : ℝ) := by linarith
                have h20 : (v : ℝ) ^ 1 < (u : ℝ) ^ 1 := by nlinarith
                linarith
          linarith
        have h14 : f n u = 0 := h_eq1
        have h15 : f n v = 0 := h_eq2
        nlinarith
      · -- u = v
        have h14 : u ≥ v := by linarith
        have h15 : v ≥ u := by linarith
        have h16 : u = v := by linarith
        tauto
  rcases h7 with ⟨u, hu1, hu2, h_eq⟩
  refine' ⟨u, ?_, ?_⟩
  · -- Show that u is a solution
    tauto
  · -- Show that u is unique
    intro v h
    rcases h with ⟨hv1, hv2, h_eq2⟩
    have h12 : u = v := by
      apply h4 u v
      all_goals
        try linarith
        all_goals
          try exact h_eq
          all_goals
            try exact h_eq2
    nlinarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h2 : ∃ u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    by_cases h : n = 1
    · -- If n = 1, then f 1 x = x - 1, so the root is 1
      rw [h]
      use 1
      constructor
      · norm_num
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · -- Show that f 1 1 = 0
        rw [f_def 1 1]
        norm_num [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    · -- If n > 1
      have hn1 : n > 1 := by 
        by_contra h'
        push_neg at h'
        have : n = 1 := by omega
        tauto
      have h3 : f n 0 = -1 := by
        rw [f_def n 0]
        have h4 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = 0 := by
          have h10 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n → (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
            intro k hk
            have hk1 : k < n := by
              simp at hk ⊢
              omega
            have hk2 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by
              omega
            have hk3 : (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
              have h7 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := hk2
              have h8 : (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
                apply zero_pow
                omega
              linarith
            assumption
          apply Finset.sum_congr
          · rfl
          · intro k hk
            specialize h10 k hk
            all_goals linarith
        rw [h4]
        all_goals norm_num
      have h4 : f n 1 = (n : ℝ) - 1 := by
        rw [f_def n 1]
        have h10 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
          have h11 : ∀ k : ℕ, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (1 : ℝ) := by
            intro k
            induction k with
            | zero => norm_num
            | succ k ih =>
              simp [pow_succ] at ih ⊢
              all_goals linarith
          have h12 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) := by
            apply Finset.sum_congr
            · rfl
            · intro k hk
              specialize h11 k
              linarith
          rw [h12]
          simp
        rw [h10]
        all_goals
          simp at *
      have h5 : f n 0 < (0 : ℝ) := by
        linarith [h3]
      have h6 : f n 1 > (0 : ℝ) := by
        rw [h4]
        have hn2 : (n : ℝ) > (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (show n > 1 by omega)
        nlinarith
      have h7 : ∃ u : ℝ, u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
        have h8 : Continuous (f n : ℝ → ℝ) := by
          have h9 : f n = fun x : ℝ => (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            funext x
            exact f_def n x
          rw [h9]
          apply Continuous.sub
          · apply continuous_finset_sum
            intro k hk
            apply continuous_pow
          · apply continuous_const
        have h10 : (f n : ℝ → ℝ) (0 : ℝ) < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith [h3]
        have h11 : (f n : ℝ → ℝ) 1 > (0 : ℝ) := by linarith [h6]
        apply Continuous.exists_mem_set_of_le_of_lt_of_lt h8
        · -- Show that $0 \in \text{Set.Icc } 0 1$
          exact ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩
        · -- Show that $1 \in \text{Set.Icc } 0 1$
          exact ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num⟩
        all_goals
          all_goals linarith
      rcases h7 with ⟨u, hu1, hu2⟩
      have hu3 : 0 ≤ u := by
        have h13 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu1
        exact h13.1
      have hu4 : u ≤ 1 := by
        have h13 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu1
        exact h13.2
      refine ⟨u, by linarith, by linarith, by linarith⟩
  rcases h2 with ⟨u, hu⟩
  use u
  constructor
  · -- Show that $0 \leq u \land u \leq 1 \land f_n u = 0$
    tauto
  · -- Show that if $v$ satisfies the conditions, then $v = u$
    intro v hv
    rcases hv with ⟨hv0, hv1, h_eq⟩
    have h8 : f n v = 0 := by linarith
    have h9 : v ≤ 1 := by linarith
    have h10 : 0 ≤ v := by linarith
    have h11 : f n u = 0 := by
      tauto
    have h12 : u ≤ 1 := by linarith
    have h13 : 0 ≤ u := by linarith
    have h14 : v = u := by
      by_cases h : v < u
      · -- Assume v < u
        have h15 : f n v < f n u := by
          have h10 : v < u := by linarith
          have h14 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            rw [f_def n v]
          have h15 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            rw [f_def n u]
          rw [h14, h15]
          have h16 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) := by
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, v^(k+1) ≤ u^(k+1)
              intro k hk
              have hk1 : k < n := by
                simp at hk ⊢
                omega
              have hk2 : v ≤ u := by linarith
              have hk3 : v ^ (k + 1) ≤ u ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_left
                all_goals nlinarith
              linarith
            · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n such that v^(k+1) < u^(k+1)
              have h19 : v < u := by linarith
              have h20 : v ^ (1 : ℕ) < u ^ (1 : ℕ) := by nlinarith
              have h21 : (0 : ℕ) ∈ Finset.range n := by
                simp at *
                all_goals omega
              refine ⟨0, h21, by nlinarith⟩
          all_goals
            try linarith
        have h17 : f n v = 0 := by linarith
        have h18 : f n u = 0 := by linarith
        linarith
      · -- Assume v ≥ u
        by_cases h' : v > u
        · -- Assume v > u
          have h15 : f n v > f n u := by
            have h10 : u < v := by linarith
            have h14 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
              rw [f_def n u]
            have h15 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
              rw [f_def n v]
            rw [h14, h15]
            have h16 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) := by
              apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
              · -- Show that for all k in range n, u^(k+1) ≤ v^(k+1)
                intro k hk
                have hk1 : k < n := by
                  simp at hk ⊢
                  omega

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h2 : f n 0 < 0 := by
    rw [f_def]
    norm_num
  have h3 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h4 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
      have h5 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (n : ℝ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ n ih =>
          rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]
          all_goals norm_num
      apply h5 n
    rw [h4]
    have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n ≥ 1 by linarith
    nlinarith

    have h9 : f n 0 < 0 := h2
    have h10 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := h3

        funext x
        specialize f_def n x
        simpa using f_def

      fun_prop

      · -- Show that f n 0 < 0
        exact h9
      · -- Show that f n 1 ≥ 0
        exact h10
      · -- Show that the function is continuous
        exact h11
      · -- Show that 0 is between f n 0 and f n 1

    constructor
    · -- Show $0 \leq c$
      have h14 : 0 ≤ c := by
        have h15 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc

      linarith
    constructor
    · -- Show $c \leq 1$
      have h14 : c ≤ 1 := by
        have h15 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc
        exact h15.2
      linarith
    · -- Show $f n c = 0$
      linarith
  rcases h8 with ⟨u, hu1, hu2, h_eq⟩
  use u
  constructor
  · -- Show that $u$ satisfies the conditions
    tauto
  · -- Show that $u$ is unique
    intro v ⟨hv1, hv2, h_eq2⟩
    have h6 : ∀ x y : ℝ, 0 ≤ x → x < y → y ≤ 1 → f n x < f n y := by
      intros x y hx hxy hy
      rw [f_def, f_def]
      have h7 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) := by
        apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
        · -- Show that for all k in range n, x^(k+1) ≤ y^(k+1)
          intro k hk
          have h8 : x ^ (k + 1) ≤ y ^ (k + 1) := by
            have h9 : x ≤ y := by linarith
            have h10 : x ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h11 : y ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h12 : x ^ (k + 1) ≤ y ^ (k + 1) := by
              apply pow_le_pow_left
              all_goals nlinarith
            linarith
          linarith
        · -- Show there exists at least one k in range n where x^(k+1) < y^(k+1)
          use 0
          have h8 : x ^ (0 + 1) < y ^ (0 + 1) := by
            have h9 : x < y := by linarith
            have h10 : x ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h11 : y ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h12 : x ^ 1 < y ^ 1 := by nlinarith
            linarith
          simpa using h8
      have h8 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
        linarith
      linarith
    by_cases h : v < u
    · -- Assume v < u
      have h12 : f n v < f n u := by
        apply h6 v u
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h13 : f n v = 0 := by linarith [h_eq2]

    · -- Assume v ≥ u

        have h14 : f n v = 0 := by linarith [h_eq2]
        linarith
      · -- v = u
        nlinarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :

        intro k hk

        apply Finset.sum_eq_zero
        intro k hk

          have h10 : k ∈ Finset.range n := by simpa using hk
          apply h7 k h10
        have h4 : (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
          have h5 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by linarith
          have h6 : (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
            apply pow_eq_zero 
            all_goals linarith
          assumption
        simpa using h4
      assumption
    rw [h3]
    all_goals norm_num
  have h5 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    have h3 : f n 1 = (n : ℝ) - 1 := by
      rw [f_def]
      have h4 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (n : ℝ) := by
        have h5 : ∀ k : ℕ, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
          intro k
          induction k with
          | zero => norm_num
          | succ k ih =>
            simp [pow_succ] at ih ⊢
            all_goals linarith
        have h6 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (n : ℝ) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => h5 k)]
          simp
        assumption
      rw [h4]
      all_goals ring_nf
    rw [h3]
    have hn1 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n ≥ 1 by linarith
    nlinarith

    have h12 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h13 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h13.2
    have h13 : 0 ≤ y := by
      have h14 : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hy
      exact h14.1
    have h14 : y ≤ 1 := by
      have h15 : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hy

    have h15 : x < y := by linarith
    have h16 : f n x < f n y := by
      rw [f_def, f_def]
      have h17 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1) < ∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1) := by
        have h18 : ∀ k : ℕ, x ^ (k + 1) < y ^ (k + 1) := by

          have h19 : x < y := h15
          have h20 : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
          have h21 : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
          have h22 : x ^ (k + 1) < y ^ (k + 1) := by
            apply pow_lt_pow_left
            all_goals nlinarith
          assumption
        have h19 : 0 ∈ Finset.range n := by
          simp at *
          all_goals omega
        have h20 : x ^ (0 + 1) < y ^ (0 + 1) := by
          specialize h18 0
          simpa using h18
        apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
        · -- Show that for all k in range n, x^(k+1) ≤ y^(k+1)
          intro k hk

          linarith
        · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n where x^(k+1) < y^(k+1)
          refine' ⟨by simpa using h19, by simpa using h20⟩
      have h18 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by linarith
      all_goals linarith
    assumption
  have h9 : ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    have h6 : ∃ c : ℝ, c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n c = 0 := by

            · -- Show u in Icc 0 1

        all_goals linarith
      linarith
  exact h9

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith

      intro k hk

        have h5 : k ≥ 0 := by omega

      have h5 : ∀ k : ℕ, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero => norm_num
        | succ k ih =>
          simp [pow_succ] at ih ⊢
      rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => h5 k)]
      simp
    rw [h4]
  have h4 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    rw [h3]
    have h5 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n ≥ 1 by linarith
    nlinarith
  have h6 : ∃ c : ℝ, 0 ≤ c ∧ c ≤ 1 ∧ f n c = 0 := by
    by_cases h7 : f n 1 = 0
    · -- Case $f_n(1) = 0$
      use 1
      constructor
      · norm_num
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · -- Show $f_n 1 = 0$
        simpa using h7
    · -- Case $f_n(1) \neq 0$
      have h7 : f n 0 < 0 := by
        rw [h2]
        all_goals norm_num
      have h8 : f n 1 > 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have h9 : f n 1 ≤ 0 := by linarith
        have h10 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := h4
        have h11 : f n 1 = 0 := by linarith [h9, h10]

        · -- Show $f_n 0 ≤ 0$

        · -- Show $0 < 1$

      have hc4 : c ≤ 1 := by
        have h1 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hc
        exact h1.2
      refine' ⟨c, by linarith, by linarith, by linarith⟩
  rcases h6 with ⟨c, hc1, hc2, hc3⟩
  use c
  constructor
  · -- Show that c is a solution
    tauto
  · -- Show that it's unique
    intro u ⟨hu1, hu2, hu3⟩
    have h9 : StrictMonoOn (f n) (Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := by
      intro x hx y hy hxy
      have h10 : 0 ≤ x := by
        have h11 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        exact h11.1
      have h11 : x ≤ 1 := by
        have h12 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        exact h12.2
      have h12 : 0 ≤ y := by
        have h13 : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hy
        exact h13.1
      have h13 : y ≤ 1 := by
        have h14 : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hy

      have h14 : x < y := by linarith
      have h15 : f n x < f n y := by

        have h17 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          have h17 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) := by

                linarith

                specialize h18 0 (by simp at *; omega)

    have h11 : f n c = 0 := by linarith
    have h13 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
    have hc5 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩

        · exact h13
        · exact hc5
        all_goals nlinarith
      nlinarith [h10, h11, h15]
    · -- Case u ≥ c
      by_cases h15 : c < u
      · -- 287
        have h16 : f n c < f n u := by
          apply h9
          · exact hc5
          · exact h13
          all_goals nlinarith
        nlinarith [h10, h11, h16]
      · -- Case c = u
        have h17 : u = c := by linarith
        linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :

    have h7 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
