        have h19 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        have h20 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        rw [h19, h20]
        have h21 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) := by
          apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
          · -- Show that for all k in range n, v^(k+1) ≤ u^(k+1)
            intro k hk
            have h23 : v ^ (k + 1) ≤ u ^ (k + 1) := by
              have h24 : v ≤ u := by linarith
              have h25 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h26 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h27 : v ^ (k + 1) ≤ u ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_left
                all_goals nlinarith
              linarith
            linarith
          · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n where v^(k+1) < u^(k+1)
            use 0
            have h28 : 0 ∈ Finset.range n := by
              simp at *
              all_goals omega
            have h29 : v ^ (0 + 1) < u ^ (0 + 1) := by
              have h30 : v < u := h
              have h31 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h32 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h33 : v ^ (0 + 1) < u ^ (0 + 1) := by
                have h34 : v < u := h
                have h35 : v ^ 1 < u ^ 1 := by nlinarith
                simpa using h35
              linarith
            all_goals try { linarith }
        linarith
      have h19 : f n v < 0 := by
        nlinarith [heq, h_eq]
      nlinarith [h_eq, h19]
    · -- Assume v ≥ u
      by_cases h' : v > u
      · -- Assume v > u
        have h14 : f n v > f n u := by
          have h19 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          have h20 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          rw [h19, h20]
          have h21 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) := by
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, u^(k+1) ≤ v^(k+1)
              intro k hk
              have h23 : u ^ (k + 1) ≤ v ^ (k + 1) := by
                have h24 : u ≤ v := by linarith
                have h25 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h26 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h27 : u ^ (k + 1) ≤ v ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                linarith
              linarith
            · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n where u^(k+1) < v^(k+1)
              use 0
              have h28 : 0 ∈ Finset.range n := by
                simp at *
                all_goals omega
              have h29 : u ^ (0 + 1) < v ^ (0 + 1) := by
                have h30 : u < v := by linarith
                have h31 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h32 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h33 : u ^ (0 + 1) < v ^ (0 + 1) := by
                  have h34 : u < v := by linarith
                  have h35 : u ^ 1 < v ^ 1 := by nlinarith
                  simpa using h35
                linarith
              all_goals try { linarith
                }
          linarith
        have h19 : 0 < f n v := by
          nlinarith [heq, h_eq]
        nlinarith [h_eq, h19
          ]
      · -- Assume v = u
        have h14 : v = u := by linarith
        linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h3 : f n 0 < 0 := by
    rw [f_def]
    norm_num [Finset.sum_range_succ]
  have h4 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h5 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
      have h6 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ n ih =>
          rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]
          all_goals norm_num
      apply h6 n
    rw [h5]
    have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n ≥ 1 by linarith
    nlinarith
  have h5 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
    fun_prop
  have h6 : ∃ c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ), f n c = 0 := by
    have h7 : f n 0 < 0 := h3
    have h8 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := h4
    have h9 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := h5
    apply h9.exists_eq_of_le_of_le
    all_goals
      norm_num
    all_goals
      linarith
  rcases h6 with ⟨c, hc, hc_eq⟩
  use c
  constructor
  · -- Show that c is a solution
    exact ⟨hc, hc_eq⟩
  · -- Show that it's unique
    intro u h
    rcases h with ⟨hu0, hu1, h_eq⟩
    by_cases h9 : u < c
    · -- Assume u < c
      have h10 : f n u < f n c := by
        rw [f_def, f_def]
        have h11 : u < c := by linarith
        have h12 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h13 : c ≥ 0 := by
          have h14 : c ≥ 0 := by
            have h14 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc
            exact h14.1
          linarith
        have h14 : u ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have h15 : c ≤ 1 := by
          have h14 : c ≤ 1 := by
            have h14 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc
            exact h14.2
          linarith
        have h16 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          have h17 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) := by
            have h18 : u < c := h11
            have h19 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h20 : c ≥ 0 := by linarith
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, u^(k+1) ≤ c^(k+1)
              intro k hk
              have h23 : u ^ (k + 1) ≤ c ^ (k + 1) := by
                have h24 : u ≤ c := by linarith
                have h25 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h26 : c ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h27 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by
                  have h11 : k ≥ 0 := by
                    have : k ∈ Finset.range n := by
                      exact hk
                    simp at this ⊢
                    all_goals omega
                  omega
                have h28 : u ^ (k + 1) ≤ c ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                linarith
              linarith
            · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n such that u^(k+1) < c^(k+1)
              use 0
              have h11 : 0 ∈ Finset.range n := by
                simp at *
                all_goals omega
              constructor
              · exact h11
              · -- Show that u ^ (0 + 1) < c ^ (0 + 1)
                have h12 : u ^ (0 + 1 : ℕ) < c ^ (0 + 1 : ℕ) := by
                  have h13 : u < c := h11
                  all_goals
                    nlinarith
                linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h18 : f n u = 0 := h_eq
      have h19 : f n c = 0 := hc_eq
      linarith
    by_cases h9 : c < u
    · -- Assume c < u
      have h10 : f n c < f n u := by
        rw [f_def, f_def]
        have h11 : c < u := by linarith
        have h12 : c ≥ 0 := by
          have h14 : c ≥ 0 := by
            have h14 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc
            exact h14.1
          linarith
        have h13 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h14 : c ≤ 1 := by
          have h14 : c ≤ 1 := by
            have h14 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc
            exact h14.2
          linarith
        have h15 : u ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have h16 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          have h17 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) := by
            have h18 : c < u := h11
            have h19 : c ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h20 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, c^(k+1) ≤ u^(k+1)
              intro k hk
              have h23 : c ^ (k + 1) ≤ u ^ (k + 1) := by
                have h24 : c ≤ u := by linarith
                have h25 : c ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h26 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h27 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by
                  have h11 : k ≥ 0 := by
                    have : k ∈ Finset.range n := by
                      exact hk
                    simp at this ⊢
                    all_goals omega
                  omega
                have h28 : c ^ (k + 1) ≤ u ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                linarith
              linarith
            · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n such that c^(k+1) < u^(k+1)
              use 0
              have h11 : 0 ∈ Finset.range n := by
                simp at *
                all_goals omega
              constructor
              · exact h11
              · -- Show that c ^ (0 + 1) < u ^ (0 + 1)
                have h12 : c ^ (0 + 1 : ℕ) < u ^ (0 + 1 : ℕ) := by
                  have h13 : c < u := h11
                  all_goals
                    nlinarith
                linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h18 : f n c = 0 := hc_eq
      have h19 : f n u = 0 := h_eq
      linarith
    · -- c = u
      have h14 : u = c := by linarith
      linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h2 : ∃ u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    have h3 : f n 0 = -1 := by
      rw [f_def]
      simp
    have h4 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
      rw [f_def]
      have h5 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = n := by
        have h6 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = n := by
          intro n
          induction n with
          | zero =>
            simp
          | succ n ih =>
            rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]
            all_goals norm_num
        apply h6 n
      have h7 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 ≥ 0 := by
        rw [h5]
        all_goals omega
      linarith
    have h9 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
      have h10 : f n = fun x : ℝ => (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
        funext x
        exact f_def n x
      rw [h10]
      continuity
    have h12 : ∃ c : ℝ, c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) ∧ f n c = 0 := by
      apply Continuous.exists_eq_of_le_of_le h9
      all_goals
        norm_num [Set.mem_Icc, h3, h4]
    rcases h12 with ⟨c, hc, hc_eq⟩
    have hc1 : 0 ≤ c := by
      have h13 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc
      exact h13.1
    have hc2 : c ≤ 1 := by
      have h13 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc
      exact h13.2
    refine ⟨c, hc1, hc2, hc_eq⟩
  rcases h2 with ⟨u, hu1, hu2, hu3⟩
  use u
  constructor
  · -- Show that u is indeed in the interval and satisfies f_n u = 0
    tauto
  · -- Show that if v is another value in the interval satisfying f_n v = 0, then v = u
    intro v h
    rcases h with ⟨hv1, hv2, hv3⟩
    by_cases h15 : v < u
    · -- Assume v < u
      have h16 : f n v < f n u := by
        have h17 : v < u := h15
        have h18 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h19 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h20 : v ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have h21 : u ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have h22 : f n u - f n v > 0 := by
          rw [f_def, f_def]
          have h23 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - 1 - ((∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - 1) > 0 := by
            have h24 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) > (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) := by
              have h33 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n → u ^ (k + 1) ≥ v ^ (k + 1) := by
                intro k hk
                have h26 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by
                  omega
                have h27 : v ≤ u := by linarith
                have h28 : v ^ (k + 1) ≤ u ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                linarith
              have h34 : ∃ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n ∧ u ^ (k + 1) > v ^ (k + 1) := by
                use 0
                constructor
                · -- Show that 0 ∈ range n
                  have h36 : 0 ∈ Finset.range n := by
                    simp at *
                    all_goals omega
                  tauto
                · -- Show that u ^ 1 > v ^ 1
                  have h37 : u ^ 1 > v ^ 1 := by
                    apply pow_lt_pow_left
                    all_goals nlinarith
                  nlinarith
              have h35 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) > (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) := by
                apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
                · -- Show that for all k in range n, v^(k+1) ≤ u^(k+1)
                  intro k hk
                  have h33k : v ^ (k + 1) ≤ u ^ (k + 1) := by
                    apply h33 k
                    simpa using hk
                  linarith
                · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that v^(k+1) < u^(k+1)
                  rcases h34 with ⟨k, hk1, hk2⟩
                  refine ⟨k, by simpa using hk1, by linarith⟩
              linarith
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h14 : f n v = 0 := hv3
      have h13 : f n u = 0 := hu3
      linarith
    by_cases h16 : v > u
    · -- Assume v > u
      have h17 : f n v > f n u := by
        have h18 : u < v := by linarith
        have h19 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h20 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h21 : u ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have h22 : v ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have h23 : f n v - f n u > 0 := by
          rw [f_def, f_def]
          have h24 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - 1 - ((∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - 1) > 0 := by
            have h25 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) > (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) := by
              have h33 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n → v ^ (k + 1) ≥ u ^ (k + 1) := by
                intro k hk
                have h26 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by
                  omega
                have h27 : u ≤ v := by linarith
                have h28 : u ^ (k + 1) ≤ v ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                linarith
              have h34 : ∃ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n ∧ v ^ (k + 1) > u ^ (k + 1) := by
                use 0
                constructor
                · -- Show that 0 ∈ range n
                  have h36 : 0 ∈ Finset.range n := by
                    simp at *
                    all_goals omega
                  tauto
                · -- Show that v ^ 1 > u ^ 1
                  have h37 : v ^ 1 > u ^ 1 := by
                    apply pow_lt_pow_left
                    all_goals nlinarith
                  nlinarith
              have h35 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) > (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) := by
                apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
                · -- Show that for all k in range n, u^(k+1) ≤ v^(k+1)
                  intro k hk
                  have h33k : u ^ (k + 1) ≤ v ^ (k + 1) := by
                    apply h33 k
                    simpa using hk
                  linarith
                · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that u^(k+1) < v^(k+1)
                  rcases h34 with ⟨k, hk1, hk2⟩
                  refine ⟨k, by simpa using hk1, by linarith⟩
              linarith
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h14 : f n v = 0 := hv3
      have h13 : f n u = 0 := hu3
      linarith
    · -- v ≤ u and not v < u, so v = u
      have h17 : v ≥ u := by linarith
      have h18 : v ≤ u := by linarith
      have h19 : v = u := by linarith
      linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h2 : f n 0 = -1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h3 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = 0 := by
      have h4 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ≥ 1 → (0 : ℝ) ^ k = 0 := by
        intro k hk
        have h5 : k > 0 := by omega
        simp [pow_eq_zero_iff, h5]
      have h6 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n → (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
        intro k hk
        have h7 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by omega
        apply h4 (k + 1) 
        omega
      apply Finset.sum_eq_zero 
      intro k hk
      specialize h6 k hk
      all_goals try { linarith }
    linarith
  have h3 : f n 1 = (n : ℝ) - 1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h4 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
      have h5 : ∀ k : ℕ, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero => norm_num
        | succ k ih =>
          simp [pow_succ] at ih ⊢
      have h6 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) := by
        apply Finset.sum_congr
        · rfl
        · intro k hk
          specialize h5 k
          all_goals try { linarith }
      rw [h6]
      simp
    linarith
  have h6 : ∃ c : ℝ, c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n c = 0 := by
    by_cases h : n = 1
    · -- n = 1
      rw [h] at *
      use 1
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · -- Show $f 1 1 = 0$
        rw [f_def]
        norm_num
    · -- n > 1
      have h7 : n > 1 := by omega
      have h8 : f n 0 < (0 : ℝ) := by
        linarith [h2]
      have h9 : f n 1 > (0 : ℝ) := by
        rw [h3]
        have h10 : (n : ℝ) > (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (show n > 1 by omega)
        nlinarith
      have h11 : Continuous (f n) := by
        fun_prop
      have h14 : ∃ c : ℝ, c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n c = (0 : ℝ) := by
        have h17 : 0 ∈ Set.Icc (f n 0) (f n 1) := by
          constructor
          · linarith
          · linarith
        have h18 : ∃ c : ℝ, c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n c = (0 : ℝ) := by
          apply h11.intermediate_value_Icc (by norm_num) h17
        exact h18
      exact h14
  rcases h6 with ⟨c, hc1, hc2⟩
  use c
  constructor
  · -- Show that $c$ satisfies the conditions
    have h10 : c ≥ 0 := by
      have h11 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hc1
      exact h11.1
    have h11 : c ≤ 1 := by
      have h12 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hc1
      exact h12.2
    tauto
  · -- Show that if $d$ satisfies the conditions, then $d = c$
    intro d ⟨hd0, hd1, hdn⟩
    have h10 : f n d = 0 := hdn
    have h11 : f n c = 0 := hc2
    by_cases h16 : d < c
    · -- Assume d < c
      have h17 : f n d < f n c := by
        have h19 : d < c := by linarith
        have h20 : d ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h21 : c ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h22 : d ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have h23 : c ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have h24 : f n d < f n c := by
          rw [f_def, f_def]
          have h25 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) := by
            have h26 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n → (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
              intro k hk
              have h27 : d < c := by linarith
              have h28 : (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_lt_pow_left
                all_goals nlinarith
              assumption
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              intro k hk
              have h27 : (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                have h28 : d ≤ c := by linarith
                have h29 : (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                assumption
              assumption
            · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              use 0
              constructor
              · -- Show that 0 ∈ range n
                simp at *
                all_goals omega
              · -- Show that (d : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) < (c : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1)
                have h27 : d < c := by linarith
                norm_num at *
                all_goals nlinarith
          nlinarith
        assumption
      linarith [h10, h11, h17]
    by_cases h17 : d > c
    · -- Assume d > c
      have  h18 : f n c < f n d := by
        have  h19 : c < d := by linarith
        have  h20 : c ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have  h21 : d ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have  h22 : c ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have  h23 : d ≤ 1 := by linarith
        have  h24 : f n c < f n d := by
          rw [f_def, f_def]
          have  h25 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) := by
            have  h26 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n → (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
              intro k hk
              have  h27 : c < d := by linarith
              have  h28 : (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_lt_pow_left
                all_goals nlinarith
              assumption
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              intro k hk
              have  h27 : (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                have  h28 : c ≤ d := by linarith
                have  h29 : (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                assumption
              assumption
            · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that (c : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (d : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              use 0
              constructor
              · -- Show that 0 ∈ range n
                simp at *
                all_goals omega
              · -- Show that (c : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) < (d : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1)
                have  h27 : c < d := by linarith
                norm_num at *
                all_goals nlinarith
          nlinarith
        assumption
      linarith [h10, h11, h18]
    · -- d ≤ c and not d < c, so d = c
      have h18 : d = c := by linarith
      linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h3 : f n 0 = -1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    simp
  have h4 : f n 1 = (n : ℝ) - 1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h5 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (n : ℝ) := by
      have h6 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (n : ℝ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ n ih =>
          rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]
          all_goals norm_num
      apply h6 n
    simp [h5]
  have h7 : f n 1 ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
    rw [h4]
    have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (show n ≥ 1 by linarith)
    nlinarith
  have h13 : StrictMonoOn (f n) (Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := by
    intro x hx y hy hxy
    have h14 : x ≥ 0 := by
      have h15 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
        simpa using hx
      have h16 : x ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
        have h17 : x ≥ (0 : ℝ) := h15.1
        linarith
      linarith
    have h15 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h16 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
        simpa using hx
      have h17 : x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
        have h18 : x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := h16.2
        linarith
      linarith
    have h16 : y ≥ 0 := by
      have h17 : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
        simpa using hy
      have h18 : y ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
        have h19 : y ≥ (0 : ℝ) := h17.1
        linarith
      linarith
    have h17 : y ≤ 1 := by
      have h18 : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
        simpa using hy
      have h19 : y ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
        have h20 : y ≤ (1 : ℝ) := h18.2
        linarith
      linarith
    have h18 : x < y := by linarith
    have h19 : f n x < f n y := by
      rw [f_def, f_def]
      have h21 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
        have h21 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) := by
          apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
          · -- Show that for all k in range n, x^(k+1) ≤ y^(k+1)
            intro k hk
            have h22 : k < n := by
              simp at hk ⊢
              omega
            have h24 : x ^ (k + 1) ≤ y ^ (k + 1) := by
              have h25 : x ≤ y := by linarith
              have h26 : x ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h27 : y ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h28 : x ^ (k + 1) ≤ y ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_left
                all_goals nlinarith
              linarith
            simpa using h24
          · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n such that x^(k+1) < y^(k+1)
            use 0
            constructor
            · -- Show that 0 is in range n
              simp
              all_goals omega
            · -- Show that x^1 < y^1
              have h27 : x < y := by linarith
              have h28 : x ^ (0 + 1) < y ^ (0 + 1) := by
                nlinarith
              simpa using h28
        linarith
      linarith
    linarith
  have h14 : ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    have h13' : ∃ u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
      have h14 : f n 0 ≤ (0 : ℝ) := by
        rw [h3]
        all_goals norm_num
      have h15 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ f n 1 := by linarith
      have h11 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
        fun_prop
      have h16 : ∃ u : ℝ, u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n u = (0 : ℝ) := by
        apply h11.exists_mem_set_of_le_of_le
        all_goals
          try linarith
      rcases h16 with ⟨u, hu⟩
      rcases hu with ⟨hu1, hu2⟩
      refine ⟨u, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · -- Show 0 ≤ u
        have h17 : u ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
          have h18 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
            tauto
          simpa using h18.1
        linarith
      · -- Show u ≤ 1
        have h18 : u ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
          have h19 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
            tauto
          simpa using h19.2
        linarith
      · -- Show f n u = 0
        tauto
    rcases h13' with ⟨u, hu⟩
    use u
    constructor
    · -- Show that u satisfies the property
      tauto
    · -- Show that it's unique
      intro v h
      have h17 : 0 ≤ v ∧ v ≤ 1 ∧ f n v = 0 := by
        tauto
      have h18 : v = u := by
        have h19 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ v := by
          tauto
        have h20 : v ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
          tauto
        have h21 : f n v = (0 : ℝ) := by
          tauto
        have h22 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ u := by
          tauto
        have h23 : u ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
          tauto
        have h24 : f n u = (0 : ℝ) := by
          tauto
        by_cases h : v < u
        · -- Assume v < u
          have h19 : f n v < f n u := by
            have h13' : StrictMonoOn (f n) (Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := h13
            have h14 : v ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
              constructor
              · linarith
              · linarith
            have h15 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
              constructor
              · linarith
              · linarith
            have h16 : v < u := by linarith
            apply h13' h14 h15 h16
          nlinarith
        · -- Assume v ≥ u
          by_cases h' : u < v
          · -- Assume u < v
            have h19 : f n u < f n v := by
              have h13' : StrictMonoOn (f n) (Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := h13
              have h14 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
                constructor
                · linarith
                · linarith
              have h15 : v ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
                constructor
                · linarith
                · linarith
              have h16 : u < v := by linarith
              apply h13' h14 h15 h16
            nlinarith
          · -- Assume u = v
            have h22 : u = v := by linarith
            nlinarith
      linarith
  exact h14

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h2 : f n = fun x => (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
    funext x
    specialize f_def n x
    simpa using f_def
  have h3 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    have h4 : f n 1 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
      apply f_def
    rw [h4]
    have h7 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
      have h8 : ∀ (k : ℕ), (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
        intro k
        simp
      calc
        (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1))
            = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) := by
              apply Finset.sum_congr
              · rfl
              · intro k hk
                specialize h8 k
                all_goals try linarith
        _ = (n : ℝ) := by simp
    rw [h7]
    have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n ≥ 1 by linarith
    nlinarith
  have h6 : f n 0 = -1 := by
    have h7 : f n 0 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
      apply f_def
    rw [h7]
    have h8 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = 0 := by
      have h9 : ∀ k : ℕ, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero => norm_num
        | succ k ih =>
          simp [pow_succ] at ih ⊢
      calc
        (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1))
            = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) := by
              apply Finset.sum_congr
              · rfl
              · intro k hk
                specialize h9 k
                all_goals try linarith
        _ = (0 : ℝ) := by simp
    rw [h8]
    all_goals norm_num
  have h7 : ∃ u, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    have h8 : f n 0 < 0 := by
      rw [h6]
      all_goals norm_num
    have h9 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := h3
    have h11 : Continuous (f n) := by
      have h11 : f n = fun x => (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := h2
      rw [h11]
      apply Continuous.sub
      · -- Show that the sum is continuous
        apply continuous_sum
        intro k hk
        apply continuous_pow
      · -- Show that the constant 1 is continuous
        apply continuous_const
    have h10 : ∃ u, u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
      apply ivt
      · exact h11
      · -- Show that f n 0 ≤ (0 : ℝ)
        have h14 : f n 0 ≤ (0 : ℝ) := by linarith [h8]
        all_goals try linarith
      · -- Show that (0 : ℝ) ≤ f n 1
        all_goals try linarith [h9]
    rcases h10 with ⟨u, hu, h_eq⟩
    have h11 : 0 ≤ u := by
      have h12 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu
      exact h12.1
    have h12 : u ≤ 1 := by
      have h13 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu
      exact h13.2
    exact ⟨u, h11, h12, h_eq⟩
  rcases h7 with ⟨u, hu0, hu1, h_eq⟩
  use u
  constructor
  · -- Show that u is a solution
    tauto
  · -- Show that u is unique
    intro v h
    rcases h with ⟨hv0, hv1, h_eq2⟩
    by_cases h16 : v < u
    · -- Assume v < u
      have h17 : f n v < f n u := by
        have h23 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        have h24 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        rw [h23, h24]
        have h25 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) := by
          apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
          · -- Show that for all k in range n, v^(k+1) ≤ u^(k+1)
            intro k hk
            have h26 : v ^ (k + 1) ≤ u ^ (k + 1) := by
              have h27 : v ≤ u := by linarith
              have h28 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h29 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h30 : v ^ (k + 1) ≤ u ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_left
                all_goals nlinarith
              linarith
            linarith
          · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that v^(k+1) < u^(k+1)
            use 0
            have h31 : 0 ∈ Finset.range n := by
              simp at *
              all_goals omega
            have h32 : v ^ (0 + 1) < u ^ (0 + 1) := by
              have h33 : v < u := h16
              have h34 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h35 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h36 : v ^ 1 < u ^ 1 := by
                nlinarith
              simpa using h36
            exact ⟨h31, h32⟩
        all_goals try linarith
      linarith [h_eq, h_eq2, h17]
    · -- Assume v ≥ u
      by_cases h17 : v > u
      · -- Assume v > u
        have h18 : f n u < f n v := by
          have h23 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          have h24 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          rw [h23, h24]
          have h25 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) := by
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, u^(k+1) ≤ v^(k+1)
              intro k hk
              have h26 : u ^ (k + 1) ≤ v ^ (k + 1) := by
                have h27 : u ≤ v := by linarith
                have h28 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h29 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h30 : u ^ (k + 1) ≤ v ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                linarith
              linarith
            · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that u^(k+1) < v^(k+1)
              use 0
              have h31 : 0 ∈ Finset.range n := by
                simp at *
                all_goals omega
              have h32 : u ^ (0 + 1) < v ^ (0 + 1) := by
                have h33 : u < v := by linarith
                have h34 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h35 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h36 : u ^ 1 < v ^ 1 := by
                  nlinarith
                simpa using h36
              exact ⟨h31, h32⟩
          all_goals try linarith
        linarith [h_eq, h_eq2, h18]
      · -- Assume v = u
        have h18 : v = u := by linarith
        linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h2 : f n 0 = -1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h3 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = 0 := by
      have h4 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ≥ 1 → (0 : ℝ) ^ k = 0 := by
        intro k hk
        have h5 : k > 0 := by omega
        simp [pow_eq_zero_iff, h5]
      have h6 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = 0 := by
        apply Finset.sum_eq_zero
        intro k hk
        have h7 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by
          have h8 : k ≥ 0 := by
            have h9 : k ∈ Finset.range n := by
              simpa using hk
            simp at h9 ⊢
            all_goals omega
          omega
        have h10 : (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
          apply h4 (k + 1) 
          omega
        simpa using h10
      linarith
    rw [h3]
    all_goals norm_num
  have h3 : f n 1 = (n : ℝ) - 1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h4 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
      have h5 : ∀ k : ℕ, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero => norm_num
        | succ k ih =>
          simp [pow_succ] at ih ⊢
          all_goals linarith
      have h6 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => h5 k)]
        simp
      linarith
    rw [h4]
    all_goals ring
  have h4 : f n 0 < 0 := by
    rw [h2]
    all_goals norm_num
  have h5 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    rw [h3]
    have hn1 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (show n ≥ 1 by linarith)
    nlinarith
  have h6 : ∃ u, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    by_cases h : n = 1
    · -- n = 1
      rw [h]
      use 1
      constructor
      · norm_num
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · -- Show that f 1 1 = 0
        rw [f_def]
        norm_num [Finset.sum_range_succ]
    · -- n > 1
      have hn2 : n > 1 := by
        by_contra h'
        push_neg at h'
        have : n = 1 := by omega
        tauto
      have h7 : f n 1 > 0 := by
        rw [h3]
        have hn1 : (n : ℝ) > (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (show n > 1 by omega)
        nlinarith
      have h12 : ∃ u, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
        have h13 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
          fun_prop
        rcases (ivt h13 (show f n 0 < 0 by linarith) (by norm_num) (show f n 1 > 0 by linarith)) with ⟨u, hu1, hu2⟩
        refine' ⟨u, by linarith [hu1.1], by linarith [hu1.2], by linarith [hu2]⟩
      exact h12
  rcases h6 with ⟨u, hu0, hu1, h_eq⟩
  use u
  constructor
  · -- Show that u is a solution
    tauto
  · -- Show that u is unique
    intro v h
    rcases h with ⟨hv0, hv1, h_eq2⟩
    by_cases h13 : u < v
    · -- Assume u < v
      have h14 : f n u < f n v := by
        have h16 : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≥ 0 → x < y → y ≤ 1 → f n x < f n y := by
          intro x y hx hxy hy
          rw [f_def, f_def]
          have h17 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            have h18 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) := by
              have h19 : x < y := by linarith
              have h20 : x ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h21 : y ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
              have h27 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n → (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                intro k hk
                have h24 : x ≤ y := by linarith
                have h25 : (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                linarith
              have h28 : ∃ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n ∧ (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                use 0
                have h29 : (0 : ℕ) ∈ Finset.range n := by
                  simp at *
                  all_goals omega
                constructor
                · exact h29
                · -- Show that x ^ 1 < y ^ 1
                  have h30 : x < y := by linarith
                  have h31 : (x : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) < (y : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) := by
                    simp at *
                    all_goals nlinarith
                  linarith
              have h29 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) := by
                apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
                · -- Show that for all k in range n, x^(k+1) ≤ y^(k+1)
                  intro k hk
                  specialize h27 k hk
                  linarith
                · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that x^(k+1) < y^(k+1)
                  exact h28
              linarith
            linarith
          linarith
        apply h16 u v (by linarith) (by linarith) (by linarith)
      nlinarith [h_eq, h_eq2, h14]
    by_cases h14 : v < u
    · -- Assume v < u
      have h15 : f n v < f n u := by
        have h16 : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≥ 0 → x < y → y ≤ 1 → f n x < f n y := by
          intro x y hx hxy hy
          rw [f_def, f_def]
          have h17 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            have h18 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) := by
              have h19 : x < y := by linarith
              have h20 : x ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h21 : y ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
              have h27 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n → (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                intro k hk
                have h24 : x ≤ y := by linarith
                have h25 : (x : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (y : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left

                simp at *
                all_goals omega
              · -- Show x^1 < y^1
                have hx2 : x < y := by linarith
                have h33 : x ^ (0 + 1 : ℕ) < y ^ (0 + 1 : ℕ) := by
                  simpa using hx2
                simpa using h33
          have h22 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            linarith
          nlinarith
        have h23 : c < u := h18
        have h24 : 0 ≤ c := by
          have h11 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ) := hc1
          exact h11.1
        have h25 : c < u := h18
        have h26 : u ≤ 1 := by linarith
        apply h20 c u
        all_goals nlinarith
      linarith [hc2, h19, h15]
    have h18 : u = c := by linarith
    linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  by_cases h : n = 1
  · -- If n = 1, then f 1 x = x - 1, so the root is at 1.
    rw [h]
    use 1
    constructor
    · -- Show that 1 is indeed a solution.
      constructor
      · norm_num
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · -- Show that f 1 1 = 0
        have h11 : f 1 1 = (1 : ℝ) - 1 := by
          rw [f_def]
          norm_num
        rw [h11]
        all_goals norm_num
    · -- Show that it's unique
      intro u ⟨hu0, hu1, h14⟩
      have h11 : f 1 u = (u : ℝ) - 1 := by
        rw [f_def]
        norm_num
      rw [h11] at h14
      have h12 : u = (1 : ℝ) := by linarith
      linarith
  · -- If n > 1
    have h6 : n > 1 := by
      by_contra h7
      push_neg at h7
      have : n = 1 := by omega
      tauto
    have h7 : f n 0 = -1 := by
      have h10 : f n 0 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
        apply f_def
      rw [h10]
      have h11 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = 0 := by
        have h12 : ∀ k : ℕ, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
          intro k
          simp
        have h13 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) := by
          apply Finset.sum_congr
          · rfl
          · intro k hk
            specialize h12 k
            linarith
        rw [h13]
        simp
      rw [h11]
      all_goals norm_num
    have h8 : f n 1 > (0 : ℝ) := by
      have h11 : f n 1 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
        apply f_def
      rw [h11]
      have h12 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
        have h13 : ∀ k : ℕ, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
          intro k
          simp
        have h14 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) := by
          apply Finset.sum_congr
          · rfl
          · intro k hk
            specialize h13 k
            linarith
        rw [h14]
        simp
      rw [h12]
      have hn' : (n : ℝ) > (1 : ℝ) := by
        have hn1 : n > 1 := h6
        have hn2 : (n : ℝ) > (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn1
        linarith
      nlinarith
    have h9 : ∃ u, 0 < u ∧ u < 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
      have h10 : f n 0 < 0 := by linarith
      have h11 : f n 1 > 0 := by linarith
      have h12 : Continuous (f n : ℝ → ℝ) := by
        funext x
        have h13 : f n x = (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        rw [h13]
        continuity
      have h17 : ∃ u ∈ Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1, f n u = 0 := by
        apply exists_mem_image_of_le_of_lt h12
        all_goals
          try norm_num
        all_goals
          try linarith
      rcases h17 with ⟨u, hu, h18⟩
      refine ⟨u, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · -- Show 0 < u
        have h19 : 0 < u := by
          have h19 : u ∈ Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
            exact hu
          exact h19.1
        linarith
      · -- Show u < 1
        have h20 : u < 1 := by
          have h20 : u ∈ Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
            exact hu
          exact h20.2
        linarith
      · -- Show f n u = 0
        linarith
    rcases h9 with ⟨u, hu1, hu2, h18⟩
    use u
    constructor
    · -- Show that u is indeed a solution.
      constructor
      · -- Show 0 ≤ u
        linarith
      constructor
      · -- Show u ≤ 1
        linarith
      · -- Show f n u = 0
        linarith
    · -- Show that it's unique
      intro v ⟨hv0, hv1, h14⟩
      by_cases h15 : v < u
      · -- Assume v < u
        have h16 : f n v < f n u := by
          have h22 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          have h23 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          rw [h22, h23]
          have h24 : v < u := h15
          have h25 : ∀ k : ℕ, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
            intro k
            have h26 : v < u := h15
            have h27 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h28 : u > 0 := by linarith
            have h29 : (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
              have h30 : k + 1 > 0 := by omega
              apply pow_lt_pow_left
              all_goals nlinarith
            assumption
          have h26 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) := by
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              intro k hk
              have h27 : (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                have h28 : v ≤ u := by linarith
                have h29 : (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                assumption
              assumption
            · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              use 0
              constructor
              · -- Show 0 ∈ range n
                simp
                all_goals omega
              · -- Show (v : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) < (u : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1)
                specialize h25 0
                simpa using h25
          have h27 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by linarith
          linarith
        nlinarith
      by_cases h16 : v > u
      · -- Assume v > u
        have h17 : f n v > f n u := by
          have h17 : u < v := by linarith
          have h22 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          have h23 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          rw [h22, h23]
          have h24 : u < v := by linarith
          have h25 : ∀ k : ℕ, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
            intro k
            have h26 : u < v := h24
            have h27 : u ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
            have h28 : v > 0 := by nlinarith
            have h29 : (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
              have h30 : k + 1 > 0 := by omega
              apply pow_lt_pow_left
              all_goals nlinarith
            assumption
          have h26 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) := by
            apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
            · -- Show that for all k in range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              intro k hk
              have h27 : (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                have h28 : u ≤ v := by linarith
                have h29 : (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) ≤ (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) := by
                  apply pow_le_pow_left
                  all_goals nlinarith
                assumption
              assumption
            · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) < (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)
              use 0
              constructor
              · -- Show 0 ∈ range n
                simp
                all_goals omega
              · -- Show (u : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1) < (v : ℝ) ^ (0 + 1)
                specialize h25 0
                simpa using h25
          have h27 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by linarith
          linarith
        nlinarith
      · -- v = u
        have h17 : v ≥ u := by linarith
        have h18 : v ≤ u := by linarith
        have h19 : v = u := by linarith
        linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h5 : f n 0 = -1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    simp
  have h3 : f n 1 = (n : ℝ) - 1 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h4 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (n : ℝ) := by
      simp
    linarith
  have h6 : f n 0 < 0 := by
    rw [h5]
    all_goals norm_num
  have h7 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    rw [h3]
    have hn1 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n ≥ 1 by linarith
    nlinarith
  have h9 : Continuous (f n : ℝ → ℝ) := by
    have h10 : f n = fun x : ℝ => (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
      funext x
      exact f_def n x
    rw [h10]
    apply Continuous.sub
    · apply continuous_finset_sum
      intro k hk
      apply continuous_pow
    · apply continuous_const
  have h10 : StrictMonoOn (f n : ℝ → ℝ) (Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := by
    intro x hx y hy hxy
    have h11 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h12 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h12.1
    have h12 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h13 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h13.2
    have h13 : 0 ≤ y := by
      have h14 : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hy
      exact h14.1
    have h14 : y ≤ 1 := by
      have h15 : y ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hy
      exact h15.2
    have h15 : x < y := by linarith
    have h16 : f n x < f n y := by
      rw [f_def, f_def]
      have h17 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
        have h18 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) := by
          apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
          · -- Show that for all k in range n, x^(k+1) ≤ y^(k+1)
            intro k hk
            have h19 : x ^ (k + 1) ≤ y ^ (k + 1) := by
              have h20 : x ≤ y := by linarith
              have h21 : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
              have h22 : k + 1 ≥ 1 := by
                have h23 : k ≥ 0 := by
                  omega
                omega
              have h23 : x ^ (k + 1) ≤ y ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_le_pow_left
                all_goals try linarith
              linarith
            linarith
          · -- Show that there exists k in range n such that x^(k+1) < y^(k+1)
            use 0
            constructor
            · -- Show 0 in range n
              simp at *
              all_goals try omega
            · -- Show x^1 < y^1
              have h19 : x < y := by linarith
              have h20 : x ^ 1 < y ^ 1 := by
                simpa using h19
              linarith
        linarith
      linarith
    linarith
  have h12 : ∃ u, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    have h13 : f n 0 ≤ 0 := by linarith
    have h14 : 0 ≤ f n 1 := by linarith
    have h15 : Continuous (f n : ℝ → ℝ) := h9
    -- Use the intermediate value theorem
    have h16 : ∃ u, u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
      apply h15.exists_eq_zero_of_le_of_le
      all_goals try norm_num
      all_goals try linarith
    rcases h16 with ⟨u, hu1, hu2⟩
    have h17 : 0 ≤ u := by
      have h18 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu1
      exact h18.1
    have h18 : u ≤ 1 := by
      have h19 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu1
      exact h19.2
    exact ⟨u, h17, h18, hu2⟩
  rcases h12 with ⟨u, hu1, hu2, h13⟩
  use u
  constructor
  · -- Show that u is indeed a solution
    exact ⟨hu1, hu2, h13⟩
  · -- Show uniqueness
    intro v h
    rcases h with ⟨hv1, hv2, h17⟩
    by_cases h20 : u < v
    · -- Assume u < v
      have h21 : f n u < f n v := by
        apply h10
        · -- Show u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1
          exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
        · -- Show v ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1
          exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
      have h22 : f n u = 0 := h13
      have h23 : f n v = 0 := h17
      linarith
    · -- Assume ¬(u < v)
      by_cases h21 : v < u
      · -- Assume v < u
        have h22 : f n v < f n u := by
          apply h10
          · -- Show v ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1
            exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
          · -- Show u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1
            exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
        have h23 : f n v = 0 := h17
        have h24 : f n u = 0 := h13
        linarith
      · -- Assume v ≥ u and u ≥ v
        have h22 : u = v := by linarith
        linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h3 : f n 0 < 0 := by
    rw [f_def]
    simp
    all_goals norm_num
  have h4 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    rw [f_def]
    have h5 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
      have h6 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ n ih =>
          rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]
          all_goals norm_num
      apply h6 n
    rw [h5]
    have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n ≥ 1 by linarith
    nlinarith
  have h10 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
    have h11 : f n = fun x : ℝ => (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
      funext x
      specialize f_def n x
      simpa using f_def
    rw [h11]
    apply Continuous.sub
    · apply continuous_finset_sum
      intro k hk
      apply Continuous.pow
      exact continuous_id
    · exact continuous_const
  have h16 : ∃ u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1, f n u = 0 := by
    apply exists_zero_of_le_of_lt_of_continuous
    · -- Check that f n 0 < 0
      exact h3
    · -- Check that f n 1 ≥ 0
      linarith
    · -- Check that f n is continuous
      exact h10
    all_goals norm_num
  rcases h16 with ⟨u, hu, h_eq⟩
  use u
  constructor
  · -- Show that u satisfies the required properties
    have h8 : u ≥ 0 := by
      have h9 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu
      exact h9.1
    have h9 : u ≤ 1 := by
      have h10 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu
      exact h10.2
    refine ⟨by linarith, by linarith, h_eq⟩
  · -- Show that if v satisfies the required properties, then v = u
    intro v h
    rcases h with ⟨hv0, hv1, h_eq2⟩
    have h3 : ∀ u v : ℝ, (0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0) → (0 ≤ v ∧ v ≤ 1 ∧ f n v = 0) → u = v := by
      intro u v ⟨hu0, hu1, h_eq1⟩ ⟨hv0, hv1, h_eq2⟩

            have h18 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n → u ^ (k + 1) < v ^ (k + 1) := by
              intro k hk
              have h19 : k < n := by
                simp at hk ⊢
                omega
              have h20 : u < v := by linarith
              have h21 : 0 ≤ u := by linarith
              have h22 : 0 ≤ v := by linarith
              have h23 : u ^ (k + 1) < v ^ (k + 1) := by
                apply pow_lt_pow_left
                all_goals nlinarith
              exact h23
            have h19 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) < (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) := by
              apply Finset.sum_lt_sum
              · -- Show that for all k in range n, u^(k+1) ≤ v^(k+1)
                intro k hk

                  have h22 : u ^ (k + 1) ≤ v ^ (k + 1) := by

                  exact h22
                exact h18
              · -- Show that there exists at least one k in range n such that u^(k+1) < v^(k+1)
                use 0

                  have h18 : u < v := by linarith

      · -- Assume u ≥ v

                    have h18 : v < u := by linarith
                    have h19 : v ^ (0 + 1) < u ^ (0 + 1) := by
                      simpa using h18
                    exact h19
              linarith
            nlinarith
          linarith
        · -- Assume v = u
          have h14 : u = v := by linarith
          linarith
    have h13 : u = v := by
      apply h3 u v
      all_goals
        try { tauto }
    linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h3 : f n 0 ≤ 0 := by
    have h4 : f n 0 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
      rw [f_def]
    rw [h4]
    have h5 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
      have h6 : ∀ (k : ℕ), (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
        intro k
        simp

        apply Finset.sum_eq_zero
        intro k hk
        specialize h6 k
