    all_goals norm_num
  have h4 : f n 1 ≥ 0 := by
    have h5 : f n 1 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
      rw [f_def]
    rw [h5]
    have h6 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (n : ℝ) := by
      have h7 : ∀ (k : ℕ), (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
        intro k
        simp
      have h8 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) := by
        apply Finset.sum_congr
        · rfl
        · intro k hk
          specialize h7 k
          simpa using h7
      rw [h8]
      simp
    rw [h6]
    have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show (n : ℕ) ≥ (1 : ℕ) by omega
    nlinarith
  have h7 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
    funext x
    rw [f_def]
    continuity
  have h8 : ∀ x y : ℝ, 0 ≤ x → x ≤ 1 → 0 ≤ y → y ≤ 1 → x < y → f n x < f n y := by
    intro x y hx1 hx2 hy1 hy2 hxy
    have h9 : f n y - f n x > 0 := by
      have h10 : f n y = (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
        rw [f_def]
      have h11 : f n x = (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
        rw [f_def]
      rw [h10, h11]
      have h12 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) - (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) > 0 := by
        have h13 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, y ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) - (∑ k in Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (y ^ (k + 1) - x ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) := by
          simp [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        rw [h13]
        have h14 : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.range n → (y ^ (k + 1) - x ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) > 0 := by
          intro k hk
          have h16 : (y : ℝ) > (x : ℝ) := by linarith
          have h17 : (x : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h18 : (y : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h19 : (y ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) > (x ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) := by
            have h19 : (k + 1 : ℕ) > 0 := by
              have hk1 : k < n := by
                simp at hk ⊢
                all_goals omega
              omega
            have h20 : (y : ℝ) > (x : ℝ) := by linarith
            have h21 : (x : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h22 : (y : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h23 : (y ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) > (x ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) := by
              apply pow_lt_pow_left
              all_goals nlinarith
            linarith
          have h20 : (y ^ (k + 1) - x ^ (k + 1) : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
          exact h20
        have hn' : n > 0 := by omega
        apply Finset.sum_pos
        · intro k hk
          specialize h14 k hk
          all_goals linarith
        · use 0
          have hn' : 0 ∈ Finset.range n := by
            simp at *
            all_goals omega
          all_goals tauto
      linarith
    linarith
  have h9 : ∃ u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    by_cases h : n = 1
    · -- n = 1
      rw [h]
      use 1
      constructor
      · norm_num
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · -- f 1 1 = 0
        rw [f_def]
        norm_num
    · -- n > 1
      have hn2 : n > 1 := by
        by_contra h'
        push_neg at h'
        have : n = 1 := by omega
        tauto
      have h14 : f n 0 ≤ 0 := h3
      have h15 : f n 1 > 0 := by
        have h17 : f n 1 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          rw [f_def]
        have h6 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = (n : ℝ) := by
          have h7 : ∀ (k : ℕ), (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
            intro k
            simp
          have h8 : ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) := by
            apply Finset.sum_congr
            · rfl
            · intro k hk
              specialize h7 k
              simpa using h7
          rw [h8]
          simp
        rw [h17, h6]
        have hn' : (n : ℝ) > (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast show n > 1 by omega
        nlinarith
      have h17 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := h7
      have h18 : ∃ u : ℝ, u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
        apply Continuous.exists_root_of_le_of_lt
        · exact h17
        · norm_num
        all_goals try { linarith }
      rcases h18 with ⟨u, hu, h19⟩
      have h19' : 0 ≤ u := by
        have h20 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu
        exact h20.1
      have h19'' : u ≤ 1 := by
        have h20 : u ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hu
        exact h20.2
      refine ⟨u, h19', h19'', h19⟩
  rcases h9 with ⟨u, h14, h15, h16⟩
  use u
  constructor
  · -- Show that u is indeed a solution
    tauto
  · -- Show that u is unique
    intro v h2
    rcases h2 with ⟨hv1, hv2, h17⟩
    have h18 : f n v = 0 := h17
    have h19 : f n u = 0 := h16
    by_cases h20 : v < u
    · -- Assume v < u
      have h21 : f n v < f n u := by
        apply h8
        all_goals try { linarith }
      linarith
    · -- Assume v ≥ u
      by_cases h21 : v > u
      · -- Assume v > u
        have h22 : f n u < f n v := by
          apply h8
          all_goals try { linarith
          }
        linarith
      · -- v = u
        have h22 : v = u := by linarith
        linarith

theorem subq_I_1
    (f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ)
    (f_def : ∀ n x, f n x = (∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, x ^ (k + 1)) - 1)
    (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    ∃! u : ℝ, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
  have h1 : n ≥ 1 := by linarith
  have h2 : ∃ u, 0 ≤ u ∧ u ≤ 1 ∧ f n u = 0 := by
    by_cases h : n = 1
    · -- If n = 1, then f 1 x = x - 1, so the root is 1
      rw [h]
      use 1
      constructor
      · norm_num
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · -- Show that f 1 1 = 0
        have h10 : f 1 1 = 0 := by
          rw [f_def 1 1]
          norm_num
        linarith
    · -- If n > 1
      have h6 : n > 1 := by
        by_contra h7
        push_neg at h7
        have h8 : n = 1 := by omega
        tauto
      have h7 : f n 0 < (0 : ℝ) := by
        have h4 : f n 0 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        rw [h4]
        have h5 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = 0 := by
          have h6 : ∀ k : ℕ, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 0 := by
            intro k
            simp
          have h7 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (0 : ℝ) := by
            apply Finset.sum_congr
            · rfl
            · intro k hk
              specialize h6 k
              linarith
          rw [h7]
          simp
        linarith
      have h8 : f n 1 > (0 : ℝ) := by
        have h5 : f n 1 = (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        rw [h5]
        have h6 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = (n : ℝ) := by
          have h7 : ∀ k : ℕ, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1) = 1 := by
            intro k
            simp
          have h8 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) ^ (k + 1)) = ∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ) := by
            apply Finset.sum_congr
            · rfl
            · intro k hk
              specialize h7 k
              linarith
          rw [h8]
          simp
        rw [h6]
        have h9 : (n : ℝ) > (1 : ℝ) := by
          have h10 : n > 1 := h6
          exact_mod_cast h10
        nlinarith
      have h11 : Continuous (fun x : ℝ => f n x) := by
        fun_prop
      have h15 : ∃ c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1, f n c = 0 := by
        apply Continuous.exists_mem_set_of_le_of_le h11
        all_goals
          try { norm_num }
        all_goals
          try { linarith }
      rcases h15 with ⟨c, hc1, hc2⟩
      have hc3 : 0 ≤ c := by
        have h16 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hc1
        exact h16.1
      have hc4 : c ≤ 1 := by
        have h16 : c ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hc1
        exact h16.2
      refine ⟨c, hc3, hc4, hc2⟩
  rcases h2 with ⟨u, hu0, hu1, h_eq⟩
  use u
  constructor
  · -- Show that u is a solution
    tauto
  · -- Show that if v is a solution, then v = u
    intro v h
    rcases h with ⟨hv0, hv1, h_eq2⟩
    have h5 : f n v = 0 := h_eq2
    have h3 : f n u = 0 := h_eq
    have h6 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith [hv0]
    have h7 : v ≤ 1 := by linarith [hv1]
    have h8 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith [hu0]
    have h9 : u ≤ 1 := by linarith [hu1]
    by_cases h10 : v < u
    · -- Assume v < u
      have h11 : f n u - f n v > 0 := by
        have eq1 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        have eq2 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
          apply f_def
        rw [eq1, eq2]
        have h14 : ∀ k : ℕ, v ^ (k + 1) < u ^ (k + 1) := by
          intro k
          have h15 : v < u := h10
          have h16 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h17 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h18 : v ^ (k + 1) < u ^ (k + 1) := by
            apply pow_lt_pow_left
            all_goals nlinarith
          assumption
        have h15 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u ^ (k + 1) - v ^ (k + 1))) > 0 := by
          apply Finset.sum_pos
          · -- Show that each term is positive
            intro k hk
            have h16 : u ^ (k + 1) - v ^ (k + 1) > 0 := by
              have h17 : v ^ (k + 1) < u ^ (k + 1) := h14 k
              linarith
            linarith
          · -- Show that the sum is non-empty
            use 0
            simp at *
            all_goals
              try { omega }
        have h17 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (u ^ (k + 1) - v ^ (k + 1))) = (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) := by
          simp [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
        have h13 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) > 0 := by
          linarith
        linarith
      have h14 : f n u - f n v = 0 - 0 := by
        linarith [h3, h5]
      nlinarith
    · -- Assume v ≥ u
      by_cases h11 : v > u
      · -- Assume v > u
        have h12 : f n v - f n u > 0 := by
          have eq1 : f n v = (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          have eq2 : f n u = (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) - 1 := by
            apply f_def
          rw [eq1, eq2]
          have h14 : ∀ k : ℕ, u ^ (k + 1) < v ^ (k + 1) := by
            intro k
            have h15 : u < v := by linarith
            have h16 : u ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h17 : v ≥ 0 := by linarith
            have h18 : u ^ (k + 1) < v ^ (k + 1) := by
              apply pow_lt_pow_left
              all_goals nlinarith
            assumption
          have h15 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v ^ (k + 1) - u ^ (k + 1))) > 0 := by
            apply Finset.sum_pos
            · -- Show that each term is positive
              intro k hk
              have h17 : v ^ (k + 1) - u ^ (k + 1) > 0 := by
                have h18 : u ^ (k + 1) < v ^ (k + 1) := h14 k
                linarith
              linarith
            · -- Show that the sum is non-empty
              use 0
              simp at *
              all_goals
                try { omega }
          have h17 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (v ^ (k + 1) - u ^ (k + 1))) = (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) := by
            simp [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
          have h13 : (∑ k in Finset.range n, v ^ (k + 1)) - (∑ k in Finset.range n, u ^ (k + 1)) > 0 := by
            linarith
          linarith
        have h14 : f n v - f n u = 0 - 0 := by
          linarith [h3, h5]
        nlinarith
      · -- Assume v = u
        have h13 : v = u := by linarith
        linarith

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := by simpa using h
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using eq1
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq9 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have h10 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := by omega
        have h11 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
          have h13 : P ≠ 0 := by
            by_contra h
            rw [h] at h10
            simp at h10
          have eq13 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
            apply Polynomial.coeff_natDegree_ne_zero
            exact h13
          tauto
        have eq14 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
          have eq13 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) = 0 := by
            simpa using eq1
          rw [eq13]
          simp
        have eq24 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 
          P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) := by
          have eq25 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 
            (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) - P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
            simp
          rw [eq25]
          have eq26 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 
            P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) + P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) := by
            have h19 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := h10
            have eq27 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 
              P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) + P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) := by
              have eq21 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (n) = 
                ∑ x ∈ Finset.antidiagonal n, P.coeff x.1 * ((Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff x.2) := by
                intro n
                simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp]
              specialize eq21 (P.natDegree - 1)
              rw [eq21]
              have h22 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = 1 := by
                compute_degree!
              have h23 : ∀ (k : ℕ), k > 1 → (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff k = 0 := by
                intro k hk
                have h24 : k > 1 := hk
                have h25 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = 1 := h22
                have h26 : k > (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree := by
                  linarith
                have h27 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff k = 0 := by
                  apply Polynomial.coeff_eq_zero_of_natDegree_lt
                  linarith
                assumption
              have h28 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = 1 := by
                simp
              have h29 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 1 = 1 := by
                simp
              simp [Finset.sum_antidiagonal, h23, h28, h29]
              all_goals
                try { 
                  cases P.natDegree with
                  | zero => contradiction
                  | succ d => 
                    simp [Nat.mul_add, add_mul, mul_add, add_assoc]
                    all_goals
                      try { linarith }
                }
            assumption
          rw [eq26]
          all_goals
            try { simp }
        rw [eq24] at eq14
        have h32 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) = 0 := by
          simpa using eq14
        have h33 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h34 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := h10
          have h35 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) ≥ (1 : ℂ) := by
            exact_mod_cast (show (P.natDegree : ℕ) ≥ (1 : ℕ) by omega)
          have h36 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            nlinarith
          assumption
        have h37 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) = 0 := by
          cases (mul_eq_zero.mp h32) with
          | inl h => 
            tauto
          | inr h => 
            exfalso
            tauto
        exfalso
        tauto
      have eq11 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
          apply Polynomial.funext
          intro x
          have h12 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq9
          have h13 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
            exact h12
          simp [h13]
        ⟩
      tauto
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hp⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hp]
      simp
  · -- Now prove the second part: ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      all_goals
        simp
        all_goals
          ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h8 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
      have h7 : Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X := by
        exact_mod_cast h2
      have h10 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
        calc
          (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 - Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
            ring_nf
          _ = (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
            rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X by
              exact_mod_cast h7
            ]
          _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
            simp
      exact_mod_cast h10
    have h11 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h12 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        exact_mod_cast h8
      have h13 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
        rw [h12]
      simp at h13
      all_goals
        try { tauto }
    exfalso
    norm_num at h11

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ΔP = 0 ↔ P is constant
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := eq1
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq3 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have eq7 : P.natDegree > 0 := by
          omega
        have h2 : P.leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := by
          have h1 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq7
          have h3 : P ≠ 0 := by
            by_contra h0
            rw [h0] at h1
            simp at h1
          have h4 : P.leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := by
            intro h0
            have : P = 0 := by
              apply leadingCoeff_eq_zero.1
              simpa using h0
            tauto
          tauto
        have eq14 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
          have eq13 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
          rw [eq13]
        have eq17 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P.coeff (P.natDegree)) * (↑(Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1) : ℂ) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
          simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp, Finset.sum_range_succ, mul_add, add_mul, Nat.choose_one_right]
          all_goals ring_nf
        have eq18 : (P.coeff (P.natDegree)) * (↑(Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          have eq19 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := eq14
          rw [eq17] at eq19
          have eq20 : (P.coeff (P.natDegree)) * (↑(Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1) : ℂ) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
            simpa using eq19
          have eq21 : (P.coeff (P.natDegree)) * (↑(Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            calc
              (P.coeff (P.natDegree)) * (↑(Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1) : ℂ) = ((P.coeff (P.natDegree)) * (↑(Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1) : ℂ) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1)) - P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by ring
              _ = (P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1)) - P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by rw [eq20]
              _ = 0 := by ring
          assumption
        have eq22 : (P.coeff (P.natDegree)) = 0 := by
          have h23 : (↑(Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have h24 : Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1 > 0 := by
              have h25 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq7
              have : Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1 = P.natDegree := by
                simp [Nat.choose_one_right]
              rw [this]
              omega
            exact_mod_cast show (Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1 : ℕ) > 0 by omega
          apply (mul_left_inj' (show (↑(Nat.choose (P.natDegree) 1) : ℂ) ≠ 0 by
            exact h23
          )).mp
          linarith
        have h27 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) = P.leadingCoeff := by
          rw [Polynomial.leadingCoeff]
        rw [h27] at eq22
        contradiction
      have eq4 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
          have h5 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq3
          have h6 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
            exact h5
          tauto
        ⟩
      tauto
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      rw [hΔ]
      simp
  · -- Show that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      all_goals
        simp [pow_two, Polynomial.comp_add, Polynomial.comp_C, add_mul, mul_add]
        all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X ^ 2 = Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      have h3 : Δ (Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := h1
      have h4 : Polynomial.X ^ 2 = Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
        apply h
        exact h3
      tauto
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) - Polynomial.X ^ 2 := by ring
        _ = (Polynomial.X ^ 2) - Polynomial.X ^ 2 := by rw [h2]
        _ = 0 := by ring
    simp at h3

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- Proof of the first part: ΔP = 0 ↔ ∃c, P = C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h_eq
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have eq2 : Δ P = 0 := h_eq
        rw [hΔ P] at eq2
        have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          exact_mod_cast eq2
        have eq4 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [eq3]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast eq4
      -- Now, we need to show that P is a constant polynomial
      have eq4 : ∀ (z : ℂ), Polynomial.eval (z + 1) P = Polynomial.eval z P := by
        intro z
        have eq5 : Polynomial.eval (z) (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)) = Polynomial.eval z P := by
          have eq6 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq1
          rw [eq6]
        have eq7 : Polynomial.eval z (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)) = Polynomial.eval (z + 1) P := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
          all_goals ring_nf
        rw [eq7] at eq5
        simpa using eq5
      -- Now, we need to show that all coefficients of P except the constant term are zero
      have eq8 : ∀ (k : ℤ), Polynomial.eval (k : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
        intro k
        induction' k using Int.induction_on with m h2 n h3
        · -- Case k = 0
          simp
        · -- Case k = m + 1
          have eq10 : Polynomial.eval ((m + 1 : ℤ) : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (m : ℂ) P := by
            specialize eq4 (m : ℂ)
            norm_num at eq4 ⊢
            all_goals try { simpa using eq4 }
          rw [eq10, h2]
        · -- Case k = -n - 1
          have eq13 : Polynomial.eval (- (n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (- (n : ℕ) : ℂ) P := by
            specialize eq4 ( - (n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ )
            norm_num at eq4 ⊢
            all_goals try { simpa using eq4 }
          rw [eq13, h3]
      -- Now, we need to show that all coefficients of powers >= 1 are zero
      have eq9 : P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) = 0 := by
        have eq8' : ∀ (k : ℤ), Polynomial.eval (k : ℂ) (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P)) = 0 := by
          intro k
          have eq10 : Polynomial.eval (k : ℂ) (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P)) = Polynomial.eval (k : ℂ) P - Polynomial.eval (k : ℂ) (Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P)) := by
            simp
          rw [eq10]
          have eq11 : Polynomial.eval (k : ℂ) (Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P)) = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
            simp
          have eq12 : Polynomial.eval (k : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := eq8 k
          rw [eq12, eq11]
          all_goals try { ring }
        -- The polynomial Q = P - C(P(0)) has infinitely many roots, hence must be the zero polynomial
        have h24 : Set.Infinite {z : ℂ | (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = 0} := by
          have h25 : Set.range (fun (k : ℤ) => (k : ℂ)) ⊆ {z : ℂ | (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = 0} := by
            intro z hz
            rcases hz with ⟨k, hk⟩
            rw [show z = (k : ℂ) by linarith]
            specialize eq8' k
            simpa using eq8'
          have h26 : Set.Infinite (Set.range (fun (k : ℤ) => (k : ℂ))) := by
            apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := fun (n : ℕ) => (n : ℤ))
            · -- Show f is injective
              intro n m h
              norm_cast at h
            · -- Show range(f) ⊆ Set.range (fun (k : ℤ) => (k : ℂ))
              intro n
              use n
              all_goals try { simp }
          exact Set.infinite_of_infinite_subset h26 h25
        -- Now, if a polynomial has infinitely many roots, it must be the zero polynomial
        by_cases h24' : (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0
        · exact h24'
        · -- If Q ≠ 0, then it has finitely many roots
          have h25 : (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) : Polynomial ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            tauto
          have h26 : Set.Finite {z : ℂ | (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = 0} := by
            have h27 : (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) : Polynomial ℂ) ≠ 0 := h25
            have h28 : Set.Finite {z : ℂ | (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = 0} := by
              have h29 : {z : ℂ | (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = 0} = (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) : Polynomial ℂ).roots
                := by
                ext z
                simp [Polynomial.mem_roots, h27]
              rw [h29]
              apply Polynomial.finite_roots
            exact h28
          exfalso
          exact Set.not_infinite h26 h24
      -- Therefore, P = C(P(0))
      have eq10 : P = Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) := by
        calc
          P = (P - Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P)) + Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) := by ring
          _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) := by rw [eq9]
          _ = Polynomial.C (Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P) := by ring
      refine ⟨Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P, by rw [eq10]⟩
    · -- Assume ∃c, P = C c, prove ΔP = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      simp [hΔ, Polynomial.comp_C]
  · -- Proof of the second part: ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h_inj
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
      simp [hΔ, Polynomial.comp_C]
    have h2 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      apply h_inj
      all_goals try { exact h1 }
    have h3 : (0 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
      have h4 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := h2
      have h5 : (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
        rw [h4]
      simp at h5
      all_goals try { tauto }
    norm_num at h3

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :

          have eq52 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree ≥ 1 := eq45

            · -- If deg(P) > 1, then deg(ΔP) =188 deg(P) - 1
              have eq57 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = P.natDegree - 1 := by
                have eq17 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = P.natDegree := by
                  have h14 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = 1 := by
                    compute_degree188
                  have h15 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := by
                    apply Polynomial.natDegree188

                  have h14 : ((P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).188 = (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := by
                    have h15 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = 1 := by

                  have eq32 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) :188 : Polynomial ℂ) = (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) := by

                  have h16 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := h3
                  have h17 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) -188 P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 -188 (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := by
                    have h19 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 =188 (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := h16
                    have h18 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) -188 P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 -188 (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := by

              have eq58 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = 0 := by

              have h19 : (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = 0 := by

                      apply188

                  have eq32 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) :188 : Polynomial ℂ) = (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) := by
                    ring
                  rw [eq32]

                have h22 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) -188 P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = 0 := by
                  rw [h20]
                  simp
                have h23 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) -188188 P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := by
                  have h16 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := h21
                  have h17 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) -188 P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 -188 (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := by
                    have h19 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 =188 (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := h16
                    have h18 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) -188 P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 -188 (P :188 : Polynomial ℂ).188 := by
                      apply Polynomial188

                  rw [h17, h16]

                omega
              tauto

        have eq46 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
          refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by188⟩
        tauto
      · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0

        rw [hc]

          apply hΔ

    · -- Show that $\Delta$ is not injective
      intro h
      have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
          apply hΔ
        have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = ( (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X ) : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - ( (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by

        apply h188

        have h4 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := h2
        have h5 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- Proof of the first part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using eq1
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq3 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ k ihk =>
          have eq4 : P.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ + 1) := by
            have h_eq : (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (↑k : ℂ) + 1 := by
              simp at *
            rw [h_eq]
          have eq6 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
            rw [eq2]
          have eq7 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval ((Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1).eval (↑k : ℂ)) := by
            simp
          have eq8 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑k : ℂ) = (↑k : ℂ) + 1 := by
            simp
          rw [eq7] at eq6
          rw [eq8] at eq6
          have eq12 : P.eval (↑k : ℂ + 1) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
            simpa using eq6
          calc
            P.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ + 1) := by rw [eq4]
            _ = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by rw [eq12]
            _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by rw [ihk]
      have eq4 : ∀ (z : ℂ), P.eval z = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro z
        have eq6 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := by
          intro n
          have eq7 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq3 n
          simp [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_C, eq7]
        have eq10 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) = 0 := by
          apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
          have h_infinite : Set.Infinite { x : ℂ | (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval x = 0 } := by
            apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))
            · -- Show f is injective
              intro n m h
              simp at h
              all_goals omega
            · -- Show that ∀ n : ℕ, f n ∈ {x | Q.eval x = 0}
              intro n
              have h_eq : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := eq6 n
              simpa using h_eq
          exact h_infinite
        have eq11 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
          calc
            P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
            _ = (0) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by rw [eq10]
            _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
        have eq12 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
          refine ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), by rw [eq11]⟩
        simpa using eq12
      exfalso
      have eq5 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), by
          have eq11 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
            calc
              P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
              _ = (0) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
                have eq10 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) = 0 := eq10
                rw [eq10]
              _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
          exact_mod_cast eq11
        ⟩
      tauto
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hp⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hp]
      simp
  · -- Proof of the second part: ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.ext_iff]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h6 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by ring
        _ = 0 := by
          rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X by
            exact_mod_cast h2
          ]
          all_goals simp
    have h7 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h8 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) := by
        rw [h6]
        all_goals simp
      have h10 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 1 := by
        simp
      have h11 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = 0 := by
        simp
      rw [h10, h11] at h8
      have h12 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
        simpa using h8
      exact h12
    norm_num at h7

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have eq2 : Δ P = 0 := h
        rw [hΔ] at eq2
        have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using eq2
        have eq4 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [eq3]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast eq4
      have eq5 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_cases h8 : P = 0
        · -- P = 0
          rw [h8]
          simp
        · -- P ≠ 0
          have h9 : P.natDegree > 0 → False := by
            intro h10
            have eq7 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) = 0 := by
              have eq10 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq1
              rw [eq10]
              all_goals simp
            have eq8 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).natDegree = P.natDegree - 1 := by
              have h11 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := by
                simp [Polynomial.natDegree_comp]
              have h12 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).natDegree = P.natDegree - 1 := by
                apply Polynomial.natDegree_sub_eq_left_of_natDegree_lt
                · -- Show that degree of P.comp (X + 1) is greater than degree of P
                  have h_eq : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := h11
                  have h13 : P.natDegree > 0 := h10
                  have h14 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree > (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree := by
                    exfalso
                    have h_eq2 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := h11
                    omega

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- Proof of the first part
    intro P
    have eq1 : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ
    have eq2 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h_eq
      have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq' : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h_eq
        have h_eq'' : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq']
            _ = P := by ring
        exact h_eq''
      have eq14 : ∀ (n : ℕ), n > 0 → (P.coeff n = 0) := by
        intro n hn
        have eq19 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff n = P.coeff n := by
          rw [eq3]
        have eq20 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff n = P.coeff n + P.coeff (n + 1) := by
          simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp, Finset.sum]
          all_goals
            try { 
              simp [Finset.sum_antidiagonal, add_mul, mul_add]
              all_goals
                try { 
                  ring_nf
                  <;> simp [Nat.mul_comm]
                  <;> try { linarith }
                }
            }
        have h_eq2 : P.coeff (n + 1) = 0 := by
          have h_eq : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff n = P.coeff n := eq19
          rw [eq20] at h_eq
          simp at h_eq ⊢
          all_goals try tauto
        simpa using h_eq2
      have eq4 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
        have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), n > 0 → P.coeff n = 0 := eq14
        apply Polynomial.funext
        intro x
        have eq6 : P.eval x = P.coeff 0 := by
          have eq11 : P.eval x = ∑ n in P.support, (P.coeff n) * (x) ^ n := by
            simp [Polynomial.eval_eq_sum]
          rw [eq11]
          have h12 : P.support ⊆ ({0} : Finset ℕ) := by
            intro n hn
            have h10 : n ∈ P.support := hn
            have h11 : n > 0 → P.coeff n = 0 := by
              intro hn
              apply h1 n
              omega
            have h12 : P.coeff n ≠ 0 := by
              have h13 : n ∈ P.support := h10
              simp at h13 ⊢
              all_goals tauto
            by_contra h
            push_neg at h
            have h13 : n > 0 := by omega
            have h14 : P.coeff n = 0 := h11 h13
            have h15 : P.coeff n ≠ 0 := h12
            contradiction
          have h13 : P.support = (∅ : Finset ℕ) ∨ P.support = ({0} : Finset ℕ) := by
            have h14 : P.support ⊆ ({0} : Finset ℕ) := h12
            have h15 : P.support = (∅ : Finset ℕ) ∨ P.support = ({0} : Finset ℕ) := by
              apply Finset.eq_empty_or_eq_singleton_of_subset_singleton
              exact h14
            tauto
          rcases h13 with h14 | h15
          · -- P.support = ∅
            have eq12 : P = 0 := by
              have h13 : P.support = (∅ : Finset ℕ) := by
                exact_mod_cast h14
              simp at h13 ⊢
              all_goals tauto
            rw [eq12]
            all_goals
              simp
          · -- P.support = {0}
            have h16 : 0 ∈ P.support := by
              rw [h15]
              simp
            have h17 : P.coeff 0 ≠ 0 := by
              have h18 : 0 ∈ P.support := h16
              simp at h18 ⊢
              all_goals tauto
            have eq13 : ∑ n in P.support, (P.coeff n) * (x) ^ n = P.coeff 0 * x ^ 0 := by
              rw [show P.support = ({0} : Finset ℕ) by exact_mod_cast h15]
              simp
            rw [eq13]
            all_goals
              simp
        simp [eq6]
      refine ⟨P.coeff 0, by simp [eq4]⟩
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [eq1]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Proof of the second part
    intro h
    have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 2 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 2 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 2 : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 2 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [eq1, eq2]
      ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 2 := by
      have h3 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 2 : Polynomial ℂ) := eq1
      have h4 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 2 := by
        apply h
        exact h3
      exact h4
    have h3 : Polynomial.C 2 = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C 2 = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 2) - Polynomial.X := by ring
        _ = 0 := by
          rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 2 = Polynomial.X by
            exact_mod_cast h2
          ]
          all_goals
            simp
    simp at h3

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- Proof of the first part: ΔP = 0 ↔ P is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume ΔP = 0, prove ∃c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1] at h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast this
      have eq17 : P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
        apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
        have h1 : Set.Infinite (Set.range (fun (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))) := by
          apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
          intro n m h
          simp at h
          all_goals omega
        have h2 : ∀ x ∈ Set.range (fun (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ)), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval x = 0 := by
          intro x hx
          rcases hx with ⟨n, hn⟩
          rw [hn]
          have eq3 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            intro n
            have eq2' : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
            have eq10 : P.eval (z + 1 : ℂ) = P.eval z := by
              have eq11 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval z := by
                rw [eq2']
              have eq12 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval (z + 1 : ℂ) := by
                simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
              rw [eq12] at eq11
              exact_mod_cast eq11
            have eq11 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (z + ↑n : ℂ) = P.eval z := by
              intro n
              induction n with
              | zero =>
                simp
              | succ n ih =>
                calc
                  P.eval (z + ↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (z + (↑n + 1 : ℂ)) := by simp
                  _ = P.eval (z + ↑n + 1 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
                  _ = P.eval (z + ↑n : ℂ) := by
                    have eq12 : P.eval (z + ↑n + 1 : ℂ) = P.eval (z + ↑n : ℂ) := by
                      specialize eq10 (z + ↑n : ℂ)
                      simpa using eq10
                    exact_mod_cast eq12
                  _ = P.eval z := by
                    exact_mod_cast ih
            specialize eq11 n
            specialize eq11 (0 : ℂ)
            simpa using eq11
          specialize eq3 n
          simp [eq3]
        apply h1 h2
      have eq18 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
        exact_mod_cast eq17
      refine' ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), by
        exact_mod_cast eq18
      ⟩
    · -- Assume ∃c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove ΔP = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C c) = (Polynomial.C c).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C c := hΔ (Polynomial.C c)
      rw [eq1]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
  · -- Proof of the second part: Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.ext_iff, add_assoc]
      all_goals norm_num
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      have h_eq : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := h1
      have h_inj : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
        apply h h_eq
      exact h_inj
    have h3 : Polynomial.X ≠ Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      intro h_eq
      have eq1 := congr_arg (fun f => f.eval (0 : ℂ)) h_eq
      simp at eq1
      all_goals
      norm_num at eq1
    exfalso
    tauto

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- Proof of the first part
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have h_eq : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at h_eq
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h_eq
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq1]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq13 : ∀ (x : ℂ), (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x + 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval x := by
        intro x
        have eq16 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval x = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x + 1) := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_add, Polynomial.eval_C, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_comp]
        have eq17 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval x = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval x := by
          have eq18 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ) = (P : Polynomial ℂ) := by
            exact_mod_cast eq1
          rw [eq18]
        have eq18 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x + 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval x := by
          calc
            (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x + 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval x := by
              rw [eq16]
            _ = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval x := by
              rw [eq17]
          all_goals try tauto
        tauto
      have eq10 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        have eq53 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
          apply Polynomial.funext
          intro x
          have eq50 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x : ℂ) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            have eq51 : ∀ (k : ℕ), (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x - (k : ℂ) : ℂ) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
              intro k
              induction k with
              | zero =>
                simp
              | succ k ihk =>
                have eq52 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x - ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x - ((k : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
                  have eq53 : (x - ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) = (x - ((k : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) - 1 := by
                    simp at *
                    all_goals ring_nf
                  rw [eq53]
                  have eq54 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval ((x - ((k : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) - 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x - ((k : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
                    have eq15' : ∀ (z : ℂ), (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (z - 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval z := by
                      intro z
                      have eq53 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (z - 1 + 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (z - 1) := by
                        have eq16 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (z - 1 + 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (z - 1) := by
                          have eq17 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (z - 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval ((z - 1 : ℂ) + 1) := by
                            simp [Polynomial.eval_add, Polynomial.eval_C, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_comp]
                          have eq18 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (z - 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (z - 1) := by
                            have eq19 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ) = (P : Polynomial ℂ) := by
                              exact_mod_cast eq1
                            rw [eq19]
                          rw [eq17, eq18]
                        tauto
                      have eq54 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (z - 1 + 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval z := by
                        have h55 : (z - 1 + 1 : ℂ) = (z : ℂ) := by
                          ring_nf
                        rw [h55]
                      tauto
                    apply eq15' (x - ((k : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ)
                  tauto
                have eq50 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x - (0 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
                  apply eq51 0
                have eq52 : (x - (0 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (x : ℂ) := by
                  simp
                rw [eq52] at eq50
                tauto
          simpa using eq50
        refine' ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), by
          exact_mod_cast eq53
        ⟩
      tauto
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Proof of the second part
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact_mod_cast h1
    have h4 : Polynomial.C 1 = 0 := by
      have h5 : Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X := by
        exact_mod_cast h2
      have h6 : Polynomial.C 1 = 0 := by
        calc
          Polynomial.C 1 = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by
            ring_nf
          _ = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) - Polynomial.X := by
            rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X by exact_mod_cast h5]
          _ = 0 := by
            simp
      exact_mod_cast h6
    have h7 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h8 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        exact_mod_cast h4
      have h9 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        rw [h8]
      simp at h9
      all_goals try tauto
    all_goals try { exfalso; all_goals try { tauto } }

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- Proof of the first part
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, we need to show ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := by simpa using h
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using eq1
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq5 : ∀ (k : ℤ), P.eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro k
        cases k with
        | ofNat k =>
          have eq4 : ∀ (k : ℕ), P.eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            intro k
            induction k with
            | zero =>
              simp
            | succ k ihk =>
              have eq7 : P.eval (↑k : ℂ + 1 : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                have eq8 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
                have eq9 : ∀ (z : ℂ), (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval z := by
                  intro z
                  apply congr_arg (fun f : Polynomial ℂ => f.eval z) eq8
                specialize eq9 (↑k : ℂ)
                have eq10 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ + 1 : ℂ) := by
                  simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
                calc
                  P.eval (↑k : ℂ + 1 : ℂ) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                    rw [eq10]
                  _ = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                    rw [eq9]
              have eq8 : P.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                have h1 : (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (↑k : ℂ) + 1 := by
                  simp at *
                rw [h1]
                exact_mod_cast eq7
              have eq9 : P.eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := ihk
              calc
                P.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := eq8
                _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq9
          specialize eq4 k
          simpa using eq4
        | negSucc s =>
          have eq7 : P.eval (↑(- (s + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑(- (s : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ) := by
            have eq8 : P.eval (↑(- (s + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ + 1 : ℂ) = P.eval (↑(- (s + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ) := by
              have eq8 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
              have eq9 : ∀ (z : ℂ), (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval z := by
                intro z
                apply congr_arg (fun f : Polynomial ℂ => f.eval z) eq8
              specialize eq9 (↑(- (s + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ)
              have eq10 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑(- (s + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑(- (s + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ + 1 : ℂ) := by
                simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
              calc
                P.eval (↑(- (s + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ + 1 : ℂ) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑(- (s + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ) := by
                  rw [eq10]
                _ = P.eval (↑(- (s + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ) := by
                  rw [eq9]
            have h1 : (↑(- (s + 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ) + 1 = (↑(- (s : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ) := by
              simp at *
              all_goals
                ring_nf
            rw [h1] at eq8
            linarith
          have eq8 : P.eval (↑(- (s : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            have eq12 : P.eval (↑(s : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
              apply eq4
            have h1 : (↑(- (s : ℕ) : ℤ) : ℂ) = (↑(s : ℕ) : ℂ) * (-1 : ℂ) := by
              simp at *
            norm_num [h1] at *
            all_goals try { 
              have eq12 : P.eval (↑(s : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq12
              try { 
                nlinarith [eq7, eq12]
              }
            }
            all_goals try { 
              nlinarith [eq7, eq12]
            }
          nlinarith [eq7, eq8]
      have eq6 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
        apply Polynomial.funext
        intro z
        have eq7 : P.eval z = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
          have h1 : Set.Infinite { z : ℂ | (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval z = 0 } := by
            apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => (↑(n : ℤ) : ℂ))
            · -- Show f is injective
              intro n m h
              have h2 : (n : ℤ) = (m : ℤ) := by
                exact_mod_cast h
              have : n = m := by
                exact_mod_cast h2
              tauto
            · -- Show that for all n, f(n) is in the set
              intro n
              have eq12 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑(n : ℤ) : ℂ) = 0 := by
                have eq11 : P.eval (↑(n : ℤ) : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq5 (n : ℤ)
                simp [eq11]
              simp [eq12]
          have eq11 : P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_isRoot h1
          have eq12 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
            calc
              P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
              _ = (0) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by rw [eq11]
              _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
          have eq13 : P.eval z = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              P.eval z = (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval z := by
                rw [show P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) by exact_mod_cast eq12]
              _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
                simp
          assumption
        simpa using eq7
      refine ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), by exact_mod_cast eq6⟩
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, we need to show Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hc]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
  · -- Proof of the second part
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_X_add_C]
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h6 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by ring
        _ = Polynomial.X - Polynomial.X := by rw [h2]
        _ = 0 := by ring
    have h7 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h8 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) := by
        rw [h6]
        all_goals simp
      have h9 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
        have h10 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
          exact_mod_cast h8
        have h11 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
          have h12 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (0 : ℂ) := by
            have h13 : (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (0 : ℂ) := by
              simp
            have h14 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
              have h15 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := h10
              rw [h15]
            rw [h14, h13]
          have h13 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (1 : ℂ) := by
            simp
          rw [h13] at h12
          all_goals try { tauto }
        exact_mod_cast h11
      exact_mod_cast h9
    all_goals
      norm_num at h7

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: prove that ΔP = 0 ↔ P is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume ΔP = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1] at h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have h_eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = 0 + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact h_eq2
      by_cases h1 : P = 0
      · -- Assume P = 0
        use 0
        simp [h1]
      · -- Assume P ≠ 0
        have eq3 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
          have eq17 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
            by_contra h
            push_neg at h
            have h2 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := by
              omega
            have eq18 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := by
              rw [eq2]
            have eq19 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
              have eq14 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := eq18
              have eq15 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
                have eq16 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
                  have eq17 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
                  rw [eq17]
                exact_mod_cast eq16
              exact_mod_cast eq15
            have eq20 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P).coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) + (P).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
              cases h22 : P.natDegree with
              | zero => 
                exfalso
                omega
              | succ d => 
                simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul]
                all_goals
                  try { 
                    ring_nf
                  }
            have eq21 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) = 0 := by
              have eq22 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := eq19
              rw [eq20] at eq22
              have eq23 : (P).coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) = 0 := by
                calc
                  (P).coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) = (P).coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) + (P).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) - (P).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by ring
                  _ = 0 := by 
                    linarith
              exact_mod_cast eq23
            have eq22 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
              have h23 : P ≠ 0 := by
                tauto
              have h24 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
                apply Polynomial.coeff_natDegree_ne_zero.mpr
                exact h23
              tauto
            have eq23 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) = 0 := by
              have eq24 : (P.coeff (P.natDegree) : ℂ) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) = 0 := by
                simpa using eq21
              cases (mul_eq_zero.mp eq24) with
              | inl h => 
                exact h
              | inr h => 
                have h25 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) = 0 := by
                  simpa using h
                have h26 : (P.natDegree : ℕ) = 0 := by
                  exact_mod_cast h25
                omega
            contradiction
          apply Polynomialfunext
          intro z
          simp [Polynomial.eval_eq_sum_range, eq17, Finset.sum_range_succ]
        refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by exact_mod_cast eq3⟩
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove ΔP = 0
      rintro ⟨c, rfl⟩
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C c).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C c := hΔ (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ)
      rw [eq1]
      all_goals
        simp
  · -- Prove that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have eq3 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [eq1, eq2]
      all_goals
        simp
    have h2 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      have h3 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := eq3
      have h4 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
        exact h h3
      exact h4
    have h3 : (0 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
      have h4 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := h2
      have h5 : (0 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
        have h6 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := h4
        simpa using congr_arg (fun f : Polynomial ℂ => f.coeff 0) h6
      exact h5
    norm_num at h3

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First, we prove that ΔP = 0 ↔ P is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume ΔP = 0, we need to show ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by 
        have eq2 : Δ P = 0 := h
        rw [hΔ] at eq2
        exact eq2
      by_cases hp : P = 0
      · -- If P = 0, then P is a constant polynomial
        use 0
        simp [hp]
      · -- Assume P ≠ 0
        have eq10 : P ≠ 0 := by
          exact hp
        have eq7 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have eq8 : P.natDegree > 0 := by omega
          have eq15 : ∀ (k : ℕ), P.eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            intro k
            induction k with
            | zero =>
              simp
            | succ k ihk =>
              have eq16 : P.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                have eq17 : (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (↑k : ℂ) + 1 := by
                  simp at *
                rw [eq17]
                have eq18 : P.eval (↑k : ℂ + 1) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                  have eq19 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq1
                  have eq20 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                    rw [eq19]
                  have eq21 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ + 1) := by
                    simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
                  rw [eq21] at eq20
                  rw [eq20]
                exact_mod_cast eq18
              have eq17 : P.eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
                induction k with
                | zero =>
                  simp
                | succ k ihk =>
                  have eq19 : P.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := eq16
                  have eq20 : P.eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := ihk
                  calc
                    P.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := eq19
                    _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq20
              exact_mod_cast eq17
          have eq16 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
            have eq17 : P.sub (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) = 0 := by
              have eq18 : ∀ (k : ℕ), (P.sub (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)))).eval (↑k : ℂ) = 0 := by
                intro k
                have eq19 : P.eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq15 k
                have eq20 : (P.sub (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)))).eval (↑k : ℂ) = (P.eval (↑k : ℂ)) - (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                  simp
                rw [eq20]
                have eq21 : (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
                  simp
                rw [eq21]
                rw [eq19]
                all_goals norm_num
              have eq22 : P.sub (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) = 0 := by
                apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
                have eq23 : Set.Infinite (Set.range (fun (k : ℕ) => (↑k : ℂ))) := by
                  apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
                  intro k l h
                  simp at h
                  all_goals omega
                have eq24 : ∀ x ∈ Set.range (fun (k : ℕ) => (↑k : ℂ)), (P.sub (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)))).eval x = 0 := by
                  intro x hx
                  rcases hx with ⟨k, hk⟩
                  have eq19 : (P.sub (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)))).eval (↑k : ℂ) = 0 := eq18 k
                  rw [show x = (↑k : ℂ) by simp at hk ⊢; exact_mod_cast hk]
  -- exact_mod_cast eq19
                  simpa using eq19
                apply eq22
              exact eq22
            have eq18 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
              calc
                P = (P.sub (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)))) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
                  ring
                _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
                  rw [eq17]
                _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
                  ring
            exact_mod_cast eq18
          have eq19 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
            rw [eq16]
            simp
          omega
        have eq20 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
          refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, ?_⟩
          have eq21 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq7
          have eq22 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
            have h23 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq21
            have h24 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
              apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
              exact h23
            exact h24
          exact_mod_cast eq22
        tauto
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, we need to show ΔP = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Now, we prove that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
      have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
        rw [hΔ]
        simp
      have h2 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
        rw [hΔ]
        simp
      rw [h1, h2]
    have eq2 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      apply h
      all_goals try exact eq1
    have eq3 : (0 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
      have h14 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := eq2
      have eq15 : (0 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
        have h16 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := h14
        simp at h16 ⊢
        all_goals try tauto
      exact_mod_cast eq15
    norm_num at eq3

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: $\Delta P = 0 \iff P$ is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume $\Delta P = 0$, prove $\exists c : \mathbb{C}, P = \text{Polynomial.C } c$
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [eq1] at h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        calc
          P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
          _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [h]
          _ = P := by ring
      have eq3 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have eq16 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := by omega
        have eq17 : (P.derivative).natDegree ≥ 0 := by
          have h18 : (P.derivative).natDegree = P.natDegree - 1 := by
            rw [Polynomial.natDegree_derivative]
          omega
        have eq18 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).derivative = P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) := by
          simp [Polynomial.derivative_comp, Polynomial.derivative_add, Polynomial.derivative_C, Polynomial.derivative_X]
        have eq19 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).derivative = P.derivative := by
          have eq19 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
          rw [eq19]
        have eq20 : P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.derivative := by
          have eq21 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).derivative = P.derivative := by
            rw [show P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P by exact eq2]
          have eq23 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).derivative = P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) := by
            simp [Polynomial.derivative_comp, Polynomial.derivative_add, Polynomial.derivative_C, Polynomial.derivative_X]
          rw [eq23] at eq21
          exact_mod_cast eq21
        have eq25 : (P.derivative).natDegree ≥ 0 := eq17
        have eq26 : (P.derivative).natDegree = 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have eq27 : (P.derivative).natDegree ≥ 1 := by omega
          have eq37 : (P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P.derivative).coeff ((P.derivative).natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
            have eq37 : (P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P.derivative) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
              have eq38 : P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.derivative := eq20
              have eq39 : (P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P.derivative) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
                rw [eq38]
                all_goals simp
              exact_mod_cast eq39
            rw [eq37]
            simp
          have eq38 : (P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P.derivative).coeff ((P.derivative).natDegree - 1) ≠ 0 := by
            have eq41 : (P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P.derivative).coeff ((P.derivative).natDegree - 1) = (P.derivative).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree) * (P.derivative.natDegree : ℕ) := by
              have h43 : (P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P.derivative).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree - 1) = (P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree - 1) - (P.derivative).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree - 1) := by
                simp
              rw [h43]
              have h44 : (P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree - 1) = (P.derivative).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree) * (P.derivative.natDegree : ℕ) := by
                have h45 : (P.derivative.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree - 1) = (P.derivative).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree) * (P.derivative.natDegree : ℕ) := by
                  simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp, add_mul, mul_add, pow_two, pow_succ, Polynomial.coeff_eq_zero_of_natDegree_lt, mul_assoc]
                  all_goals
                    try { 
                      nlinarith [show (P.derivative).natDegree ≥ 1 by omega, show (P.derivative).natDegree - 1 < (P.derivative).natDegree by omega]
                    }
                exact_mod_cast h45
              have h45 : (P.derivative).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
                have h46 : (P.derivative).natDegree ≥ 1 := eq27
