                have h47 : (P.derivative).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
                  have h48 : (P.derivative).natDegree ≥ 1 := eq27
                  have h49 : (P.derivative).coeff (P.derivative.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
                    have h50 : (P.derivative).natDegree < (P.derivative).natDegree + 1 := by omega
                    -- This approach is incorrect.

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: $\Delta P = 0 \iff P$ is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume $\Delta P = 0$, prove $\exists c, P = C_c$
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using eq1
        have h_eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact h_eq2
      have eq8 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ n ih =>
          have eq10 : P.eval ((↑n : ℂ) + 1) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
            have eq13 := congr_arg (fun f => f.eval (↑n : ℂ + 1 : ℂ)) eq2
            simp [Polynomial.eval_comp] at eq13 ⊢
            all_goals try tauto
          have eq11 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := ih
          calc
            P.eval (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval ((↑n : ℂ) + 1 : ℂ) := by simp at *
            _ = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := eq10
            _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq11
      have h14 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
        have h16 : Set.Infinite (Set.image (fun (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ)) (Set.univ : Set ℕ)) := by
          apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := fun (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))
          · -- Show that the function is injective
            intro n m h
            simp at h
            all_goals omega
          · -- Show that all elements produced by f are in the image
            intro n
            simp
        have h20 : ∀ z ∈ Set.image (fun (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ)) (Set.univ : Set ℕ), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = 0 := by
          intro z hz
          rcases hz with ⟨n, hn⟩
          rw [show z = (↑n : ℂ) by simp at hn ⊢; exact_mod_cast hn]
          have eq13 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq8 n
          simp [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_C, eq13]
        apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
        · exact h16
        · exact h20
      have eq13 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
        calc
          P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
          _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by rw [h14]
          _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
      refine ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), by rw [eq13]⟩
    · -- Assume $\exists c, P = C_c$, prove $\Delta P = 0$
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      rw [hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
  · -- Now we prove that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.ext_iff, add_mul, mul_add, pow_two]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h3 : Polynomial.C 1 = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C 1 = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by ring
        _ = 0 := by rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X by exact_mod_cast h2]; simp
    simp at h3

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    have h1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
    rw [h1]
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h_eq
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq' : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h_eq
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = 0 + P := by rw [h_eq']
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq12 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
        apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_comp_X_add_C_eq_self
        exact eq1
      refine ⟨P.coeff 0, by simp [eq12]⟩
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_C, hΔ]
  · -- Now prove ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
      have h2 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X) := by
        apply hΔ
      have h3 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [h2, h3]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_add, Polynomial.add_comp, Polynomial.comp_mul, Polynomial.mul_comp]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      have h3 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := h1
      have h4 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
        apply h h3
      assumption
    have h6 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
      have h5 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X := by
        linarith [h2]
      have h7 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
        calc
          Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) - (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X) := by ring
          _ = 0 := by
            rw [show Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X by exact h5]
            all_goals simp
      assumption
    have h7 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      simpa using congr_arg (fun f => f.coeff 0) h6
    norm_num at h7

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1] at h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq4 : ∀ z : ℂ, P.eval (z + 1) = P.eval z := by
        intro z
        have eq5 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval z := by
          have h_eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
          rw [h_eq2]
        have eq6 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval (z + 1) := by
          simp [Polynomial.comp_eval, Polynomial.eval_add, Polynomial.eval_C, Polynomial.eval_X]
        rw [eq6] at eq5
        simpa using eq5
      have eq8 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          all_goals simp
        | succ n ih =>
          have eq9 : P.eval (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
            specialize eq4 (↑n : ℂ)
            norm_num at eq4 ⊢
            try simpa using eq4
          have eq10 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            simpa using ih
          calc
            P.eval (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := eq9
            _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq10
      have eq12 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by
        apply Polynomial.funext
        intro x
        have eq15 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0)).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := by
          intro n
          have eq16 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = Polynomial.eval (↑n : ℂ) (Polynomial.C (P.eval 0)) := by
            apply eq8 n
          simp [eq16]
        have h2 : ((P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0)) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
          apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
          have h1 : Set.Infinite { x : ℂ | (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0)).eval x = 0 } := by
            apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))
            · -- Show f is injective
              intro n m h
              simp at h
              all_goals omega
            · -- Show that for all n, P - C(P(0)) evaluated at n is zero
              intro n
              have h10 : ((P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := eq15 n
              simpa using h10
          exact h1
        have h3 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := h2
        have h4 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by
          calc
            P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0)) + Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by rw [h3]
            _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by ring
        exact_mod_cast h4
      have eq14 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine ⟨P.eval 0, ?_⟩
        exact_mod_cast eq12
      tauto
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Second part: ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_add, add_mul, mul_add, Polynomial.add_comp]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 := by
      linarith [h2]
    have h7 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h8 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        exact_mod_cast h3
      rw [h8]
    have h8 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) = 1 := by
      simp
    have h9 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) = 0 := by
      simp
    rw [h8, h9] at h7
    all_goals norm_num at h7

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1] at h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq4 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [eq3]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast eq4
      have eq3 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h1
        push_neg at h1
        have eq4 : P.natDegree > 0 := by
          omega
        have eq15 : P ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h0
          have : P = 0 := by exact_mod_cast h0
          rw [this] at eq4
          simp at eq4
        -- Show contradiction using the previous logic
        have eq32 : ∀ (k : ℕ), P.eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
          intro k
          induction k with
          | zero =>
            simp
          | succ k ihk =>
            have eq33 : (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (↑k : ℂ) + 1 := by
              simp at *
            have eq34 : P.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
              rw [eq33]
              have eq35 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
              have eq36 : P.eval ((↑k : ℂ) + 1) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                have eq37 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
                have eq38 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                  rw [eq37]
                have eq39 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval ((↑k : ℂ) + 1) := by
                  simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
                calc
                  P.eval ((↑k : ℂ) + 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                    rw [eq39]
                  _ = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := by
                    rw [eq38]
              exact_mod_cast eq36
            have eq37 : P.eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := ihk
            calc
              P.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑k : ℂ) := eq34
              _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq37
        -- Now, we have shown that P(k) = P(0) for all k ∈ ℕ.
        -- But if P is a polynomial of degree n > 0, then P is not a constant polynomial.
        have eq36 : P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
          apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
          have eq37 : Set.Infinite (Set.range (fun (k : ℕ) => (↑k : ℂ))) := by
            apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
            intro k l h
            simp at h
            all_goals omega
          have eq38 : ∀ x ∈ Set.range (fun (k : ℕ) => (↑k : ℂ)), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval x = 0 := by
            intro x hx
            rcases hx with ⟨k, hk⟩
            have eq39 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (x : ℂ) = 0 := by
              have eq40 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑k : ℂ) = 0 := by
                have eq35 : P.eval (↑k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq32 k
                simp [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_C, eq35]
              rw [show x = (↑k : ℂ) by
                simp at hk ⊢
                all_goals try tauto
              ]
              all_goals try exact_mod_cast eq40
            exact_mod_cast eq39
          apply eq36
        -- This contradicts with P having positive degree.
        have eq37 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
          have eq38 : P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) = 0 := eq36
          have eq39 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
            calc
              P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
              _ = (0) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by rw [eq38]
              _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
          exact_mod_cast eq39
        have eq38 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
          rw [eq37]
          simp
        omega
      have eq4 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
          apply Polynomial.funext
          intro x
          have eq6 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq3
          have eq7 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
            exact_mod_cast eq6
          simp [eq7]
        ⟩
      exact_mod_cast eq4
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Now we need to prove ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)) = (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [eq1, eq2]
      all_goals
        simp
    have h2 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) ≠ Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      intro h0
      have eq1 : (0 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
        have h3 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
          exact_mod_cast h0
        have eq3 : (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (0 : ℂ) := by
          simp
        have eq4 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (1 : ℂ) := by
          simp
        have eq5 : (0 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
          have eq6 : (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
            rw [show Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) by exact_mod_cast h3]
          rw [eq3, eq4] at eq6
          all_goals try tauto
        exact_mod_cast eq5
      norm_num at eq1
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      apply h
      all_goals try exact_mod_cast h1
    contradiction

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: $\forall P \in \mathbb{C}[X], \Delta P = 0 \iff \exists c \in \mathbb{C}, P = c$
    intro P
    have h1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
    rw [h1]
    constructor
    · -- Assume $\Delta P = 0$, prove $\exists c \in \mathbb{C}, P = c$
      intro h_eq
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by 
          simpa using h_eq
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [h_eq2]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq9 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have eq3 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := by omega
        have eq7 : P.leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := by
          have h26 : P ≠ 0 := by
            by_contra h
            rw [h] at eq3
            simp at eq3
          have h10 : P.leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := by
            apply Polynomial.leadingCoeff_ne_zero.mpr
            exact h26
          tauto
        have eq11 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P.natDegree : ℂ) * P.leadingCoeff := by
          have eq12 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P : Polynomial ℂ) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ) - (P : Polynomial ℂ) := by ring
          rw [eq12]
          have eq13 : ((P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ) - (P : Polynomial ℂ)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) - (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
            simp
          rw [eq13]
          have eq14 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P.natDegree : ℂ) * P.leadingCoeff := by
            have eq19 : P.leadingCoeff = P.coeff P.natDegree := by
              rw [Polynomial.leadingCoeff]
            rw [eq19]
            have eq20 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P.natDegree : ℂ) * (P.coeff P.natDegree : ℂ) := by
              have eq21 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ) = P.sum (fun n a => (Polynomial.C a) * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) ^ n) := by
                rw [Polynomial.comp]
              rw [eq21]
              have eq22 : (P.sum (fun n a => (Polynomial.C a) * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) ^ n) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P.natDegree : ℂ) * (P.coeff P.natDegree : ℂ) := by
                have eq23 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (Polynomial.C (P.coeff n) * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) ^ n : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = if n = P.natDegree then (P.coeff n : ℂ) * (n : ℂ) else 0 := by
                  intro n
                  split_ifs with hn
                  · -- Case where n = P.natDegree
                    rw [hn]
                    have eq17 : (Polynomial.C (P.coeff (P.natDegree)) * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) ^ (P.natDegree) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P.coeff (P.natDegree) : ℂ) * (P.natDegree : ℂ) := by
                      simp [Polynomial.coeff_mul, Polynomial.coeff_C, Polynomial.coeff_X_add_C, Polynomial.coeff_pow, mul_add, add_mul]
                      all_goals try { 
                        ring_nf
                        <;> simp [Nat.mul_comm]
                        all_goals try omega
                      }
                    simpa using eq17
                  · --  n ≠ P.natDegree
                    have eq18 : (Polynomial.C (P.coeff n) * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) ^ n : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
                      simp [Polynomial.coeff_mul, Polynomial.coeff_C, Polynomial.coeff_X_add_C, Polynomial.coeff_pow, mul_add, add_mul]
                      all_goals try { 
                        ring_nf
                        <;> simp [Nat.mul_comm]
                        all_goals try omega
                      }
                    simpa using eq18
                have eq24 : (P.sum (fun n a => (Polynomial.C a) * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) ^ n) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (P.natDegree : ℂ) * (P.coeff P.natDegree : ℂ) := by
                  calc
                    (P.sum (fun n a => (Polynomial.C a) * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) ^ n) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1)
                        = ∑ n in P.support, ((Polynomial.C (P.coeff n) * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) ^ n) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
                      rw [Polynomial.coeff_sum]
                    _ = ∑ n in P.support, (if n = P.natDegree then (P.coeff n : ℂ) * (n : ℂ) else 0) := by
                      apply Finset.sum_congr
                      · rfl
                      · intro n hn
                        have h17 : (Polynomial.C (P.coeff n) * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) ^ n : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = (if n = P.natDegree then (P.coeff n : ℂ) * (n : ℂ) else 0 : ℂ) := by
                          apply eq23 n
                        simpa using h17
                    _ = (P.natDegree : ℂ) * (P.coeff P.natDegree : ℂ) := by
                      have h25 : P.natDegree ∈ P.support := by
                        have h26 : P ≠ 0 := by
                          by_contra h
                          rw [h] at eq3
                          simp at eq3
                        have h27 : P.natDegree ∈ P.support := by
                          simp [Polynomial.mem_support_iff, h26]
                          all_goals try { 
                            have h28 : P.leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := eq7
                            have eq19 : P.coeff P.natDegree = P.leadingCoeff := by
                              rw [Polynomial.leadingCoeff]
                            rw [eq19] at h28
                            all_goals try tauto
                          }
                        tauto
                      have h26 : ∀ (n : ℕ), n ∈ P.support → (if n = P.natDegree then (P.coeff n : ℂ) * (n : ℂ) else 0) = 0 := by
                        intro n hn
                        split_ifs with hn1
                        · -- Case where n = P.natDegree
                          rw [hn1]
                          all_goals try { 
                            simp [h25]
                          }
                        · --  n ≠ P.natDegree
                          simp [hn1]
                      -- This is messy, need to fix
                      simp [Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton h25, h26]
                      all_goals try { 
                        have h27 : P.coeff P.natDegree ≠ 0 := by
                          have h28 : P.leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := eq7
                          have eq19 : P.coeff P.natDegree = P.leadingCoeff := by
                            rw [Polynomial.leadingCoeff]
                          rw [eq19] at h28
                          tauto
                        field_simp [h27]
                        all_goals try ring_nf
                      }
                assumption
              assumption
            assumption
          have eq15 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
            have h16 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = P.natDegree := by rfl
            -- The coefficient of X^{d-1} in P is 0 if d-1 > deg(P)
            have h17 : P.natDegree - 1 < P.natDegree := by
              have h18 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := eq3
              have : P.natDegree > 0 := by omega
              omega
            have h18 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
              have h19 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree < (P.natDegree : ℕ) := by
                omega
              have h20 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
                have h21 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree < (P.natDegree : ℕ) := h19
                have h22 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
                  apply Polynomial.coeff_eq_zero_of_natDegree_lt
                  omega
                tauto
              tauto
            tauto
          have eq16 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
            have eq11 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
              calc
                (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P : Polynomial ℂ) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)) - P := by ring
                _ = (P) - P := by rw [eq1]
                _ = 0 := by simp
            rw [eq11]
            simp
          rw [eq11] at eq16
          all_goals try { 
            exfalso
            have eq17 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) * P.leadingCoeff = 0 := by
              simpa using eq16
            have eq18 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
              have h19 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := eq3
              have h20 : (P.natDegree : ℕ) > 0 := by omega
              have h21 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
                norm_cast at h20 ⊢
              tauto
            have eq19 : P.leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := eq7
            have eq20 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) * P.leadingCoeff = 0 := eq17
            have eq21 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) = 0 ∨ P.leadingCoeff = 0 := by
              simpa using eq17
            cases eq21 with
            | inl h22 =>
              exfalso
              have h23 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) ≠ 0 := eq18
              tauto
            | inr h24 =>
              exfalso
              have h25 : P.leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := eq7
              tauto
          }
        have eq10 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq9
        have eq11 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
          refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
            apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
            exact eq10
          ⟩
        tauto
      · -- Assume $\exists c \in \mathbb{C}, P = c$, prove $\Delta P = 0$
        rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
        rw [hc]
        simp [hΔ]
  · -- Now prove that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      apply h h1
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X := by
      linarith [h2]
    have h4 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
      have h6 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X := by
        linarith [h3]
      have eq3 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) - (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
        rw [h6]
        all_goals simp
      have eq4 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) - (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        ring
      rw [eq4] at eq3
      have eq5 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        exact_mod_cast eq3
      have eq6 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
        have eq7 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := eq5
        have eq8 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
          rw [eq7]
        simp at eq8
        all_goals try { 
          norm_num at eq8 ⊢
        }
      exfalso
      norm_num at eq6

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have h1 : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at h1
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h1
        have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact eq2
      have h15 : ∀ x : ℂ, (P.eval (x + 1 : ℂ)) = P.eval x := by
        intro x
        have eq17 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval x = P.eval (x + 1 : ℂ) := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_add, Polynomial.eval_C, Polynomial.eval_X, add_assoc]
        have eq18 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval x = P.eval x := by
          rw [eq1]
        have eq19 : P.eval (x + 1 : ℂ) = P.eval x := by
          calc
            P.eval (x + 1 : ℂ) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval x := by
              rw [eq17]
            _ = P.eval x := by
              rw [eq18]
        exact eq19
      have h17 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero => 
          simp
        | succ n ih => 
          have eq18 : (P.eval (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
            have eq19 : (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (↑n : ℂ) + 1 := by
              simp at *
            rw [eq19]
            have eq20 : P.eval ((↑n : ℂ) + 1) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
              specialize h15 (↑n : ℂ)
              simpa using h15
            exact eq20
          have eq19 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            simpa using ih
          have eq20 : P.eval (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              P.eval (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := eq18
              _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq19
          exact eq20
      have h18 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
        have eq33 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := by
          intro n
          have eq34 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = (P.eval (↑n : ℂ) - (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ)) := by
            simp
          rw [eq34]
          have eq35 : (P.eval (↑n : ℂ) ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            apply h17
          have eq36 : (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            simp
          rw [eq35, eq36]
          all_goals ring_nf
        have h18 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) = 0 := by
          apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
          have eq37 : (Set.range (fun (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ)) : Set ℂ) ⊆ {x | (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval x = 0} := by
            intro x hx
            rcases hx with ⟨n, hn⟩
            have eq38 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := eq33 n
            rw [show x = (↑n : ℂ) by rw [hn]]
            all_goals simpa using eq38
          have eq38 : Set.Infinite (Set.range (fun (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ)) : Set ℂ) := by
            apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := fun (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))
            · -- Show f is injective
              intro n m h
              simp at h
              all_goals omega
            · -- Show that all elements of the range are in the set
              intro n
              simp
          exact eq37
        have eq39 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
          calc
            P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
            _ = (0) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by rw [h18]
            _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
        exact eq39
      have eq13 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), by rw [h18]⟩
      exact eq13
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      rw [hΔ]
      simp
  · -- Now prove ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X ^ 2 = Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      have h3 : Δ (Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := h1
      have h4 : Polynomial.X ^ 2 = Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
        apply h h3
      exact h4
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) - Polynomial.X ^ 2 := by ring
        _ = (Polynomial.X ^ 2) - Polynomial.X ^ 2 := by rw [h2]
        _ = 0 := by ring
    have h4 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h5 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := h3
      have h7 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
        have h8 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) := by
          rw [h5]
          all_goals simp
        simpa using h8
      exact h7
    exfalso
    norm_num at h4

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: $\Delta P = 0 \iff P$ is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume $\Delta P = 0$, prove $\exists c : \mathbb{C}, P = \text{Polynomial.C } c$
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by 
        have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using eq1
        have eq4 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by 
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [eq3]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast eq4
      have eq7 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
        apply Polynomial.funext
        intro z
        have eq8 : ∀ (w : ℂ), P.eval (w + (1 : ℂ)) = P.eval w := by
          intro w
          have eq9 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval w = P.eval w := by
            rw [eq2]
          have eq10 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval w = P.eval (w + (1 : ℂ)) := by
            simp
          calc
            P.eval (w + (1 : ℂ)) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval w := by
              rw [eq10]
            _ = P.eval w := by
              rw [eq9]
        have eq9 : P.eval z = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
          have eq10 : P.eval z = P.eval (z - (z : ℂ)) := by
            have eq11 : P.eval (z - (z : ℂ) + (1 : ℂ)) = P.eval (z - (z : ℂ)) := by
              apply eq8
            have eq12 : z - (z : ℂ) + (1 : ℂ) = z := by
              ring_nf
            rw [eq12] at eq11
            tauto
          have eq13 : z - (z : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
            ring_nf
          rw [eq13] at eq10
          tauto
        simpa using eq9
      refine' ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), by rw [eq7]⟩
    · -- Assume $\exists c : \mathbb{C}, P = \text{Polynomial.C } c$, prove $\Delta P = 0$
      rintro ⟨c, hp⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hp]
      simp
  · -- Show that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.ext_iff]
      all_goals
        ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have eq2 : Polynomial.C 1 = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C 1 = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by
          ring_nf
        _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
          rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X by exact_mod_cast h2]
          all_goals
            simp
    have eq3 : (1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      simpa using eq2
    have h5 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      simpa using congr_arg (fun f : Polynomial ℂ => f.eval (0 : ℂ)) eq3
    norm_num at h5

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- Proof of the first part
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      rw [hΔ] at h
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P + P := by ring
            _ = 0 + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq2 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h'
        push_neg at h'
        have h1 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := by omega
        have eq34 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)) = P := eq1
        have eq35 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree) = P.coeff (P.natDegree) := by
          rw [eq34]
        have eq36 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree) = ∑ i in Finset.Icc (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree), (P.coeff i) * (Nat.choose i (P.natDegree) : ℂ) := by
          rw [Polynomial.coeff_comp]
          simp [Polynomial.coeff_C, Polynomial.coeff_X_add_C, add_mul, mul_add, pow_two, pow_succ, pow_zero, one_mul]
          all_goals try { aesop }
        rw [eq36] at eq35
        have eq37 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) = 0 := by
          have eq38 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree) = P.coeff (P.natDegree) := eq35
          simp [Finset.sum_singleton] at eq38 ⊢
          all_goals try { tauto }
        have eq38 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
          have h11 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
            apply Polynomial.coeff_natDegree_ne_zero
            all_goals try { tauto }
          tauto
        exfalso
        tauto
      have eq3 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
          apply Polynomial.funext
          intro z
          have h1 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq2
          have h2 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
            exact h1
          rw [h2]
          all_goals simp
        ⟩
      exact_mod_cast eq3
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hΔ, hc]
      simp
  · -- Proof of the second part
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      have eq1 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        simp [Polynomial.ext_iff, add_mul, mul_add, pow_two, pow_succ, pow_zero, one_mul]
        all_goals try { ring_nf }
      exact_mod_cast eq1
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h3 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X := h2
    have h4 : (1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      calc
        (1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by simp
        _ = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X - Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by ring
        _ = (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by 
          have h5 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X := by
            have h6 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
              have h7 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
                exact_mod_cast h3
              rw [h7]
            exact_mod_cast h6

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: prove that ΔP = 0 iff P is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume ΔP = 0, prove ∃c, P = C c
      intro h
      rw [hΔ] at h
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := h
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = 0 + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ n ih =>
          have eq4 : P.eval ((↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P.eval (↑(n : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
            have eq5 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑(n : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑(n : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
              rw [eq1]
            have eq6 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑(n : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval ((↑(n : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)) := by
              simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
            have eq7 : P.eval ((↑(n : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ)) = P.eval (↑(n : ℕ) : ℂ) := by
              rw [eq6] at eq5
              simpa using eq5
            have eq9 : (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (↑(n : ℕ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
              simp at *
            rw [eq9]
            all_goals
              simpa using eq7
          have eq8 : P.eval (↑(n : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            exact ih
          calc
            P.eval (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑(n : ℕ) : ℂ) := eq4
            _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq8
      have eq5 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (-(↑n : ℂ)) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          norm_num
        | succ n ih2 =>
          have eq11 : P.eval (-(↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P.eval (-(↑n : ℂ)) := by
            have eq7 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (-(↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P.eval (-(↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) := by
              rw [eq1]
            have eq8 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (-(↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P.eval (-(↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1) := by
              simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
            have eq9 : (-(↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1 : ℂ) = (-(↑n : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
              simp at *
              all_goals
                ring_nf
            rw [eq8] at eq7
            rw [eq9] at eq7
            have eq10 : P.eval (-(↑n : ℂ) : ℂ) = P.eval (-(↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) := by
              linarith
            linarith
          have eq12 : P.eval (-(↑n : ℂ)) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            exact ih2
          calc
            P.eval (-(↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P.eval (-(↑n : ℂ)) := eq11
            _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq12
      have eq7 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
        apply Polynomial.funext
        intro z
        have eq8 : P.eval z = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
          have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq2
          have h3 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (-(↑n : ℂ)) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq5
          have h4 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = 0 := by
            have h5 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
              apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
              apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))
              · -- Show f is injective
                intro n m h
                simp at h
                all_goals omega
              · -- Show that for all n, P - C(P(0)) evaluated at n is zero
                intro n
                have eq13 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := h2 n
                simp [eq13]
            rw [h5]
            all_goals simp
          have h6 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z := by
            have h7 : (P : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
              have h8 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
                apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
                apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))
                · -- Show f is injective
                  intro n m h
                  simp at h
                  all_goals omega
                · -- Show that for all n, P - C(P(0)) evaluated at n is zero
                  intro n
                  have eq13 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := h2 n
                  simp [eq13]
              have : (P : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
                calc
                  (P : Polynomial ℂ) = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) := by ring
                  _ = (0 + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) := by rw [h8]
                  _ = (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) := by ring
              assumption
            rw [h7]
          simpa using h6
        simpa using eq8
      refine ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), ?_⟩
      all_goals
        rw [eq7]
    · -- Assume ∃c, P = C c, prove ΔP = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hp⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hp]
      simp
  · -- Second part: prove that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.ext_iff]
      all_goals
        ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ ≠ Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      intro h_eq
      have eq1 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        rw [h_eq]
      norm_num at eq1
    have h3 : Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    contradiction

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1] at h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq4 : ∀ z : ℂ, P.eval (z + 1) = P.eval z := by
        intro z
        have eq5 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = P.eval (z + 1) := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
        have eq7 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = P.eval z := by
          have eq8 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
          rw [eq8]
        have eq8 : P.eval (z + 1) = P.eval z := by
          calc
            P.eval (z + 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z := by
              rw [eq5]
            _ = P.eval z := by
              rw [eq7]
        assumption
      have eq9 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have eq12 : P.natDegree > 0 := by
          omega
        have eq14 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
        have eq15 : ∀ k : ℕ, (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff k = P.coeff k := by
          intro k
          have eq16 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
          rw [eq16]
        have eq17 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq12
        have eq18 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
          apply eq15
        have eq21 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) =
            (P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1)) : ℂ)) + (P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) * (↑(Nat.choose (P.natDegree - 1) (P.natDegree - 1)) : ℂ)) := by
          simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp, add_mul, mul_add, mul_assoc]
          all_goals
            try { 
              simp [Nat.choose_zero_right, Nat.choose_pos, Nat.succ_sub_succ_eq_sub]
              all_goals
                try linarith
            }
        have eq22 : (Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1) : ℂ) = (P.natDegree : ℂ) := by
          cases h : P.natDegree with
          | zero => 
            exfalso
            omega
          | succ d => 
            simp [Nat.choose_succ_pred, Nat.succ_sub_one]
            all_goals
              try norm_num
        have eq23 : (Nat.choose (P.natDegree - 1) (P.natDegree - 1) : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
          simp
        rw [eq21] at eq18
        rw [eq22, eq23] at eq18
        have eq24 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          have eq25 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := eq18
          simp [eq21, eq22, eq23] at eq25
          all_goals
            try {
              have eq26 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) = 0 := by
                ring_nf at eq25 ⊢
                try nlinarith
              assumption
            }
        have eq25 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
          apply Polynomial.coeff_natDegree_ne_zero
          all_goals
            try omega
        have eq26 : (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h1 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq12
          have h2 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) > (0 : ℂ) := by exact_mod_cast (show (P.natDegree : ℕ) > 0 by omega)
          positivity
        have eq27 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          apply mul_ne_zero
          exact eq25
          exact eq26
        contradiction
      have eq3 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq9
      have eq4 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
          apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
          exact eq3
        ⟩
      assumption
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Now we need to prove ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
        have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)) = (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) := by
          apply hΔ
        rw [eq1]
        simp
      have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
        have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
          apply hΔ
        rw [eq2]
        simp
      rw [eq1, eq2]
    have h2 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      apply h
      all_goals
        try exact h1
    have h3 : (0 : ℂ) = (1 : ℂ) := by
      have h4 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := h2
      have h5 : (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
        rw [h4]
      simp at h5
      all_goals
        try tauto
    norm_num at h3

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Forward direction: if Δ P = 0, then exists c such that P = C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1] at h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast eq3
      have eq6 : ∀ (z : ℂ), (P.eval (z + 1) ) = P.eval z := by
        intro z
        have eq7 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
        have eq8 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval z := by
          rw [eq7]
        have eq9 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval ((Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1).eval z) := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
        have eq10 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = z + 1 := by
          simp
        calc
          P.eval (z + 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z := by
            rw [eq9, eq10]
          _ = P.eval z := by
            rw [eq8]
      have eq10 : P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) = 0 := by
        have eq11 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := by
          intro n
          have eq14 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            have eq8 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
              intro n
              induction n with
              | zero =>
                simp
              | succ n ih =>
                calc
                  P.eval (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval ( (↑n : ℂ) + 1 ) := by
                    simp at *
                    all_goals ring_nf
                  _ = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
                    specialize eq6 (↑n : ℂ)
                    simpa using eq6
                  _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
                    exact ih
            exact eq8 n
          have eq12 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := by
            have eq13 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) - (Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
              simp
            rw [eq13]
            have eq13 : (Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval 0 := by
              simp
            rw [eq13, eq14]
            all_goals
              simp
          exact eq12
        have h3 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) : Polynomial ℂ).InfiniteRoots := by
          apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))
          · -- Show f is injective
            intro n m h
            simp at h
            all_goals omega
          · -- Show all elements in the range are roots
            intro n
            have eq14 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := eq11 n
            simp [Polynomial.IsRoot, eq14]
        have h4 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
          apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_roots
          exact h3
        exact h4
      have eq13 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by
        calc
          P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval 0)) + Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by ring
          _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by rw [eq10]
          _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by ring
      have eq14 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine ⟨P.eval 0, by rw [eq13]⟩
      exact eq14
    · -- Backward direction: if exists c such that P = C c, then Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C c) = (Polynomial.C c).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C c := hΔ (Polynomial.C c)
      rw [eq1]
      simp
  · -- Second part: ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := hΔ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ))
      rw [eq1]
      simp
    have h2 : Δ (0 : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
      have eq1 : Δ (0 : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := hΔ (0 : Polynomial ℂ)
      rw [eq1]
      all_goals
      simp
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      apply h
      rw [h1, h2]
    have h4 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) ≠ (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      simp
    exfalso
    exact h4 h3

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: $\Delta P = 0$ if and only if $P$ is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume $\Delta P = 0$, prove $\exists c \in \mathbb{C}, P = C_c$
      intro h
      rw [hΔ] at h
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by 
          simpa using h
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P + P := by ring
            _ = 0 + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq2 : ∀ k : ℕ, P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ k ihk =>
          have eq3 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) + (Polynomial.C 1) := by
            simp at *
            all_goals
              ring_nf
          rw [eq3]
          have eq4 : ∀ (Q : Polynomial ℂ), P.comp (Q + Polynomial.C 1) = P.comp Q := by
            intro Q
            have eq6 : P.comp (Q + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).comp Q := by
              rw [← Polynomial.comp_assoc]
              all_goals
                simp
            rw [eq6]
            rw [eq1]
            all_goals
              simp
          specialize eq4 (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C ((k : ℕ) : ℂ))
          rw [eq4] at *
          all_goals
            try exact ihk
      have eq3 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        have eq5 : ∀ (k : ℕ), P.eval (k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
          intro k
          have eq6 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P := eq2 k
          have eq7 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) = P.eval (k : ℂ) := by
            simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
          have eq8 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by rfl
          have eq9 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            rw [eq6]
          have eq10 : P.eval (k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              P.eval (k : ℂ) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
                rw [eq7]
              _ = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
                rw [eq9]
              _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
                rfl
          exact_mod_cast eq10
        have eq6 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
          refine' ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), ?_⟩
          have eq7 : ∀ (k : ℕ), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (k : ℂ) = 0 := by
            intro k
            have eq8 : P.eval (k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq5 k
            have eq9 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (k : ℂ) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).eval (k : ℂ) - (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (k : ℂ) := by
              simp
            rw [eq9]
            have eq10 : (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (k : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
              simp
            rw [eq10]
            rw [eq8]
            all_goals
              simp
          have h8 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
            have h9 : Set.Infinite (Set.range (fun (k : ℕ) => (k : ℂ))) := by
              apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := fun (k : ℕ) => (k : ℂ))
              · -- Show that the function is injective
                intro n m h
                have : (n : ℂ) = (m : ℂ) := by
                  simpa using h
                have : n = m := by
                  exact_mod_cast this
                assumption
              · -- Show that all elements produced by the function are in the range
                intro x hx
                simp at hx ⊢
            have h10 : Set.Infinite {z : ℂ | (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval z = 0} := by
              apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := fun (k : ℕ) => (k : ℂ))
              · -- Show that the function is injective
                intro n m h
                have : (n : ℂ) = (m : ℂ) := by
                  simpa using h
                have : n = m := by
                  exact_mod_cast this
                assumption
              · -- Show that all elements produced by the function are in the set
                intro k
                have h12 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (k : ℂ) = 0 := eq7 k
                simp at *
                all_goals
                  try tauto
            apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := fun (k : ℕ) => (k : ℂ))
            · -- Show that the function is injective
              intro n m h
              have : (n : ℂ) = (m : ℂ) := by
                simpa using h
              have : n = m := by
                exact_mod_cast this
              assumption
            · -- Show that all elements produced by the function are in the set
              intro k
              have h12 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (k : ℂ) = 0 := eq7 k
              simp at *
              all_goals
                try tauto
          have h9 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
            calc
              P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
                ring_nf
              _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
                rw [h8]
              _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
                ring_nf
          exact_mod_cast h9
        exact eq3
      tauto
    · -- Assume $\exists c \in \mathbb{C}, P = C_c$, prove $\Delta P = 0$
      rintro ⟨c, hp⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hp]
      simp
  · -- Second part: $\Delta$ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.ext_iff]
      all_goals
        norm_num
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h6 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by
          ring_nf
        _ = 0 := by
          rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X by
            exact_mod_cast h2
          ]
          all_goals
            simp
    have h7 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h10 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) := by
        rw [h6]
        all_goals
          simp
      have h11 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
        apply Polynomial.C_injective (R := ℂ) h10
      exact h11
    norm_num at h7

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- Proof of the first part
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using eq1
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P + P := by ring
            _ = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq3 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have eq4 : P.natDegree > 0 := by
          omega
        have eq10 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
        have eq11 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
          have eq10 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
          rw [eq10]
        have eq12 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
          cases h : P.natDegree with
          | zero => 
            exfalso
            omega
          | succ n => 
            simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp, add_mul, mul_add, pow_two, pow_succ, Polynomial.coeff_X_add_C]
            all_goals
              try { 
                ring_nf
                <;> simp [Nat.succ_sub_one]
              }
        rw [eq12] at eq11
        have eq13 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          have eq14 : P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by rfl
          have eq15 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
            simpa using eq11
          have eq16 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            calc
              P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) = (P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1)) - P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by ring
              _ = (P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1)) - P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by rw [eq15]
              _ = 0 := by ring
          assumption
        have eq17 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
          have h17 : P.leadingCoeff = P.coeff (P.natDegree) := by
            rw [Polynomial.leadingCoeff]
          have h18 : P.leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := by
            have h19 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq4
            have h20 : P ≠ 0 := by
              by_contra h
              rw [h] at h19
              simp at h19
            have h21 : P.leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := by
              apply Polynomial.leadingCoeff_ne_zero.mpr
              exact h20
            tauto
          rw [h17] at h18
          tauto
        have eq18 : (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          have h19 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := eq17
          have h20 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) = 0 := eq13
          have : (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            by_cases h : (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) = 0
            · tauto
            · 
              have h22 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
                have h23 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := h19
                have h24 : (↑(P.natDegree) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
                  tauto
                exact mul_ne_zero h23 h24
              tauto
          assumption
        have eq19 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) = 0 := by
          simpa using eq18
        have eq20 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq4
        have eq21 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have h22 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq4
          have h23 : (P.natDegree : ℕ) > 0 := h22
          have h24 : (P.natDegree : ℂ) = (P.natDegree : ℕ) := by simp
          rw [h24]
          norm_cast
        contradiction
      have eq4 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, ?_⟩
        have eq5 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq3
        have eq6 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
          have h7 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq5
          have h8 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
            exact h7
          exact h8
        simpa using eq6
      tauto
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      rw [hΔ]
      simp
  · -- Proof of the second part
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
      have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
        rw [hΔ]
      rw [h1]
      simp
    have h2 : Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = 0 := by
      have h3 : Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) := by
        rw [hΔ]
      rw [h3]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_add, Polynomial.add_comp, Polynomial.comp_C, Polynomial.C_comp]
      all_goals
        ring
    have h4 : Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      have h5 : Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
        rw [h2, h1]
      have h6 : Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
        apply h
        exact h5
      assumption
    have h7 : Polynomial.X = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.X = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C 1 := by ring
        _ = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) - Polynomial.C 1 := by rw [h4]
        _ = 0 := by simp
    have h8 : Polynomial.X ≠ 0 := by
      apply ne_of_beq_false
      simp
    contradiction

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have eq2 : Δ P = 0 := h
        rw [hΔ] at eq2
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using eq2
        have h_eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact h_eq2
      by_cases h12 : P = 0
      · -- If P = 0, then it's a constant polynomial
        use 0
        simp [h12]
      · -- If P ≠ 0
        have eq19 : P ≠ 0 := by
          exact h12
        have eq3 : P.natDegree > 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have eq20 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
            omega
          have eq21 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
            refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
              have eq12 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq20
              have eq13 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
                have eq14 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq12
                apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
                exact_mod_cast eq14
              exact_mod_cast eq13
            ⟩
          tauto
        -- Suppose P has a root r. Then P(r) = 0. But from eq1: P.comp (X + 1) = P. So evaluating at r - 1:
        -- P(r - 1 + 1) = P(r - 1). So P(r) = 0 = P(r - 1). So r - 1 is also a root.
        have eq20 : ∃ r : ℂ, P.eval r = 0 := by
          have h21 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq3
          have h22 : P ≠ 0 := eq19
          apply Polynomial.exists_root
          all_goals
            try tauto
        rcases eq20 with ⟨r, hr⟩
        have eq22 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (r - (n : ℕ) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          intro n
          induction n with
          | zero =>
            simpa using hr
          | succ n ih =>
            have eq23 : P.eval (r - ((n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
              have eq24 : (r - ((n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) = (r - ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) := by
                simp at *
                all_goals
                  ring_nf
              rw [eq24]
              have eq25 : P.eval (r - ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
                have eq26 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (r - ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) = P.eval (r - ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
                  simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
                have eq27 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (r - ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) = P.eval (r - ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) := by
                  rw [eq1]
                have eq28 : P.eval (r - ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) = 0 := by
                  simpa using ih
                calc
                  P.eval (r - ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (r - ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) := by
                    rw [eq1]
                  _ = P.eval (r - ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) : ℂ) := by
                    simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
                  _ = 0 := by
                    simpa using ih
              exact_mod_cast eq25
            exact_mod_cast eq23
        have eq27 : Set.Infinite (Set.range (fun (n : ℕ) => r - (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℂ)) := by
          apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := fun (n : ℕ) => r - (n : ℕ))
          · -- Show f is injective
            intro n m h
            have h1 : r - (n : ℕ) = r - (m : ℕ) := by
              simpa using h
            have h2 : (n : ℕ) = (m : ℕ) := by
              have h3 : r - (n : ℕ) = r - (m : ℕ) := h1
              simp [Complex.ext_iff] at h3 ⊢
              all_goals
                omega
            omega
          · -- Show all elements of the image are in the range
            intro n
            simp
        have eq30 : Set.Infinite { z : ℂ | P.eval z = 0 } := by
          have eq31 : Set.range (fun (n : ℕ) => r - (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℂ) ⊆ { z : ℂ | P.eval z = 0 } := by
            intro z hz
            have h1 : z ∈ Set.range (fun (n : ℕ) => r - (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℂ) := hz
            rcases h1 with ⟨n, hn⟩
            have h2 : P.eval z = 0 := by
              rw [show z = r - (n : ℕ) by
                simpa using hn
              ]
              have h3 : P.eval (r - (n : ℕ) : ℂ) = 0 := eq22 n
              simpa using h3
            simpa using h2
          have eq32 : Set.Infinite (Set.range (fun (n : ℕ) => r - (n : ℕ) : ℕ → ℂ)) := eq27
          apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := fun (n : ℕ) => r - (n : ℕ))
          · -- Show f is injective
            intro n m h
            have h1 : r - (n : ℕ) = r - (m : ℕ) := by
              simpa using h
            have h2 : (n : ℕ) = (m : ℕ) := by
              have h3 : r - (n : ℕ) = r - (m : ℕ) := h1
              simp [Complex.ext_iff] at h3 ⊢
              all_goals
                omega
            omega
          · -- Show all elements of the image are in the set
            intro n
            have h1 : P.eval (r - (n : ℕ) : ℂ) = 0 := eq22 n
            simp at *
            all_goals
              try tauto
        have eq34 : P = 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have eq37 : Set.Finite { z : ℂ | P.eval z = 0 } := by
            have h38 : P ≠ 0 := by
              tauto
            have h39 : { z : ℂ | P.eval z = 0 } = P.roots := by
              ext z
              simp
            rw [h39]
            apply Polynomial.finite_roots
          have eq38 : Set.Infinite { z : ℂ | P.eval z = 0  } := eq30
          exfalso
          exact Set.not_infinite_of_finite eq37 eq38
        contradiction
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hp⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hp]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
  · -- Now we need to prove ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_add, Polynomial.comp_C, Polynomial.comp_X]
      all_goals
        ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      all_goals
        try exact_mod_cast h1
    have h4 : Polynomial.X ≠ Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      by_contra h
      have eq1 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
        exact_mod_cast h
      have eq3 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
        rw [eq1]
      norm_num at eq3
    exfalso
