    tauto

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := eq1
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P + P := by ring
            _ = 0 + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast this
      have eq17 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
        have h14 : P.degree ≤ 0 := by
          by_contra h15
          push_neg at h15
          have h15 : P.degree > 0 := by
            omega
          have h16 : P ≠ 0 := by
            by_contra h17
            rw [h17] at h15
            simp at h15
          have h17 : Set.Infinite {w : ℂ | P.eval w = 0} := by
            have h18 : ∃ z : ℂ, P.eval z = 0 := by
              have h19 : P.degree > 0 := h15
              have h20 : P ≠ 0 := h16
              apply Polynomial.exists_root
              all_goals
                try tauto
            rcases h18 with ⟨z, hz⟩
            have h19 : ∀ (k : ℕ), P.eval (z + k) = 0 := by
              intro k
              induction k with
              | zero =>
                simpa using hz
              | succ k ihk =>
                have eq19 : P.eval (z + (k + 1 : ℕ)) = P.eval (z + k : ℕ) := by
                  have eq20 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
                  have eq21 : P.eval (z + k + 1 : ℂ) = P.eval (z + k : ℂ) := by
                    have eq22 : (z + k + 1 : ℂ) = (z + k : ℂ) + 1 := by ring_nf
                    rw [eq22]
                    have eq23 : P.eval ((z + k : ℂ) + 1) = P.eval (z + k : ℂ) := by
                      have eq24 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq20
                      have eq25 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (z + k : ℂ) = P.eval ((z + k : ℂ) + 1) := by
                        simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
                      have eq26 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (z + k : ℂ) = P.eval (z + k : ℂ) := by
                        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq24
                        rw [h_eq]
                      have eq27 : P.eval ((z + k : ℂ) + 1) = P.eval (z + k : ℂ) := by
                        linarith [eq25, eq26]
                      exact_mod_cast eq27
                    exact_mod_cast eq21
                have eq20 : P.eval (z + (k + 1 : ℕ)) = 0 := by
                  rw [eq19]
                  exact_mod_cast ihk
                exact eq20
            have h20 : Set.Infinite {w : ℂ | P.eval w = 0} := by
              apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (k : ℕ) => z + k)
              · -- Show f is injective
                intro k l h
                have : z + k = z + l := by
                  simpa using h
                have : (k : ℕ) = (l : ℕ) := by
                  have h12 : z + k = z + l := by
                    simpa using h
                  simp [Complex.ext_iff] at h12 ⊢
                  all_goals omega
                omega
              · -- Show that all elements produced by f are in the set
                intro k
                specialize h19 k
                simpa using h19
            exact h20
          have h18 : P = 0 := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_zero
            all_goals
              try { tauto
                }
          tauto
        have h16 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
          have h17 : P.degree ≤ 0 := h14
          have h18 : P.degree ≥ 0 := by
            by_contra h19
            push_neg at h19
            have h19 : P = 0 := by
              apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_degree_lt_zero
              linarith
            tauto
          have h17 : P.degree = 0 := by
            omega
          have h18 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
            rw [Polynomial.natDegree_eq_of_degree_eq_some]
            all_goals
              try tauto
          exact_mod_cast h18
        have h17 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
          apply Polynomialfunext
          intro z
          simp [h16]
        exact_mod_cast h17
      refine ⟨P.coeff 0, eq17⟩
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Second part: ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      have eq1 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        simp [Polynomial.ext_iff, add_mul, mul_add, pow_two]
        all_goals ring_nf
      exact_mod_cast eq1
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X := by
      apply h h1
    have h3 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h4 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
        have h5 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X := by
          calc
            Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
              nlinarith [h2]
            _ = Polynomial.X := by ring
        have h6 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
          calc
            Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X) - Polynomial.X := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
              rw [show Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) + Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X by nlinarith [h2]]
              all_goals
                simp
        exact_mod_cast h6
      have h7 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
        have h8 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
          exact_mod_cast h4
        simp [Polynomial.C_eq_zero] at h8 ⊢
        all_goals try tauto
      exact_mod_cast h7
    norm_num at h3

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: $\forall P, \Delta P = 0 \iff \exists c, P = C c$
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume $\Delta P = 0$, need to show $\exists c, P = C c$
      intro h_eq
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := h_eq
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using eq1
        have h_eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq2]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact h_eq3
      have eq3 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ n ih =>
          have eq4 : P.eval (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
            have eq5 : (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (↑n : ℂ) + 1 := by
              simp at *
            rw [eq5]
            have eq7 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
              rw [eq2]
            have eq8 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval ( (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1).eval (↑n : ℂ) ) := by
              simp [Polynomial.comp_eval]
            have eq9 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1).eval (↑n : ℂ) = (↑n : ℂ) + 1 := by
              simp
            rw [eq8, eq9] at eq7
            simpa using eq7
          have eq10 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := ih
          have eq11 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ + 1) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            calc
              P.eval (↑n : ℂ + 1) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := by rw [eq4]
              _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by rw [eq10]
          simpa using eq11
      have eq4 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
        have eq6 : P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
          have h_eq : ∀ (n : ℕ), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := by
            intro n
            have eq7 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq3 n
            have eq8 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)).eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
              simp
            rw [eq8]
            have eq9 : Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
              simp
            rw [eq9]
            rw [eq7]
            all_goals
              ring_nf
          have h_eq2 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
            have h_eq5 : Set.Infinite (Set.range (fun (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))) := by
              apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
              intro n m h
              simp at h
              all_goals omega
            have h_eq6 : ∀ x ∈ Set.range (fun (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ)), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval x = 0 := by
              intro x hx
              rcases hx with ⟨n, hn⟩
              have h_eq7 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (x : ℂ) = 0 := by
                have h_eq8 : x = (↑n : ℂ) := by
                  simp at hn ⊢
                  try tauto
                rw [h_eq8]
                apply h_eq n
              simpa using h_eq7
            exact ⟨h_eq5, h_eq6⟩
          exact h_eq2
        have eq7 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := eq6
        have eq8 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
          calc
            P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by rw [eq7]
            _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
        exact eq8
      refine ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), ?_⟩
      rw [eq4]
    · -- Assume $\exists c, P = C c$, need to show $\Delta P = 0$
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := by
        rw [hΔ]
        rw [hc]
        simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
      exact eq1
  · -- Now prove the second part: $\Delta$ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_add, Polynomial.comp_C, add_assoc]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) - Polynomial.X := by ring
        _ = 0 := by
          have h4 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := h2
          have h5 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) - Polynomial.X = 0 := by
            rw [show (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = Polynomial.X by rw [h4]]
            all_goals simp
          exact h5
    have h6 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h7 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) := by
        rw [h3]
        all_goals simp
      have h8 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
        apply Polynomial.coeff_inj (n := 0) at h7
        simpa using h7
      exact h8
    exfalso
    norm_num at h6

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: $\Delta P = 0 \iff P$ is constant
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume $\Delta P = 0$, prove $P$ is constant
      intro h
      have h_eq : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at h_eq
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by 
        have h_eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h_eq
        have h_eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by 
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq1]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact h_eq2
      have eq7 : P.derivative = 0 := by
        have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq1
        have eq4 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).derivative = P.derivative := by
          rw [eq3]
        have eq5 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).derivative = (P.derivative).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) := by 
          simp [Polynomial.derivative_comp]
        rw [eq5] at eq4
        have eq6 : (P.derivative).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.derivative := by
          exact_mod_cast eq4
        by_cases h : P.derivative = 0
        · exact h
        · -- Assume P.derivative ≠ 0
          have eq14 : (P.derivative).natDegree > 0 := by
            by_contra h14
            push_neg at h14
            have h12 : (P.derivative).natDegree = 0 := by
              omega
            have h13 : (P.derivative) = Polynomial.C ( (P.derivative).coeff 0 ) := by
              apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero 
              exact h12
            have eq17 : (P.derivative).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.derivative := by
              exact_mod_cast eq6
            rw [h13] at eq17
            simp at eq17
            all_goals try { tauto }
          have eq16 : (P.derivative).leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := by
            apply Polynomial.leadingCoeff_ne_zero.mpr
            by_contra h17
            have h18 : (P.derivative) = 0 := by
              exact_mod_cast h17
            tauto
          have eq17 : (P.derivative).natDegree > 0 := eq14
          have eq18 : (P.derivative).natDegree ≥ 1 := by omega
          have eq19 : ((P.derivative).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff ((P.derivative).natDegree - 1) = (P.derivative).coeff ((P.derivative).natDegree - 1) := by
            have h18 : (P.derivative).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.derivative := by
              exact_mod_cast eq6
            rw [h18]
          have eq21 : ((P.derivative).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff ((P.derivative).natDegree - 1) = 
            (P.derivative).coeff ((P.derivative).natDegree - 1) + (P.derivative).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree ) * ( (P.derivative).natDegree : ℕ ) := by
            have eq24 : (P.derivative).leadingCoeff = (P.derivative).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree ) := by
              rw [Polynomial.coeff_natDegree]
            have eq25 : ((P.derivative).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree - 1 ) = 
              (P.derivative).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree - 1 ) + (P.derivative).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree ) * ( (P.derivative).natDegree : ℕ ) := by
              have eq26 : (P.derivative).natDegree ≥ 1 := by omega
              have h1 : (P.derivative).natDegree - 1 + 1 = (P.derivative).natDegree := by 
                omega
              simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp, add_mul, mul_add, pow_succ, pow_zero, one_mul, add_left_inj, add_right_inj]
              all_goals try { 
                nlinarith [eq24, h1]
              }
            exact_mod_cast eq25
          have eq44 : (P.derivative).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree ) * ( (P.derivative).natDegree : ℕ ) = 0 := by
            nlinarith
          have eq45 : (P.derivative).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree ) ≠ 0 := by
            have h16 : (P.derivative).leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := eq16
            have h17 : (P.derivative).leadingCoeff = (P.derivative).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree ) := by
              rw [Polynomial.coeff_natDegree]
            rw [h17] at h16
            exact h16
          have eq46 : (P.derivative).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree ) * ( (P.derivative).natDegree : ℕ ) ≠ 0 := by
            have h18 : (P.derivative).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree ) ≠ 0 := eq45
            have h19 : ( (P.derivative).natDegree : ℕ ) > 0 := by
              omega
            have h20 : ( (P.derivative).natDegree : ℕ ) ≠ 0 := by
              omega
            have h21 : (P.derivative).coeff ( (P.derivative).natDegree ) * ( (P.derivative).natDegree : ℕ ) ≠ 0 := by
              apply mul_ne_zero
              exact h18
              omega
            exact h21
          contradiction
      have h17 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by
        apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_derivative_eq_zero 
        exact_mod_cast eq7
      refine ⟨P.eval 0, by simp [h17]⟩
    · -- Assume P is a constant polynomial, prove ΔP = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      simp [hΔ, Polynomial.comp_C, Polynomial.C_add]
  · -- Show that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_add, Polynomial.add_comp, Polynomial.comp_X, Polynomial.comp_C]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact_mod_cast h1
    have h3 : Polynomial.C 1 = 0 := by
      have h4 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := h2
      have h5 : Polynomial.C 1 = 0 := by
        calc
          Polynomial.C 1 = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by ring
          _ = 0 := by 
            rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X by linarith [h4]]
            all_goals simp
      exact h5
    exfalso
    have h6 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      simpa using congr_arg (fun f : Polynomial ℂ => f.eval 0) h3
    norm_num at h6

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: $\Delta P = 0$ iff $P$ is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume $\Delta P = 0$, need to show $∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c$
      intro h
      rw [hΔ] at h
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        calc
          P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
          _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [show P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 by simpa using h]
          _ = P := by ring
      have eq4 : ∀ z : ℂ, Polynomial.eval z P = Polynomial.eval (z + 1) P := by
        intro z
        have h_eq3 : Polynomial.eval z (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)) = Polynomial.eval (z + 1) P := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
        have h_eq4 : Polynomial.eval z (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)) = Polynomial.eval z P := by
          rw [show P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P by exact_mod_cast eq1]
        have h_eq2 : Polynomial.eval z P = Polynomial.eval (z + 1) P := by
          linarith
        exact h_eq2
      have eq5 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have eq7 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := by
          omega
        have eq8 : ∃ m : ℕ, m ≥ 1 ∧ (P.coeff m) ≠ 0 := by
          have h3 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := eq7
          have h4 : P ≠ 0 := by
            by_contra h_eq
            rw [h_eq] at eq7
            simp at eq7
          have h10 : ∃ m : ℕ, m ≥ 1 ∧ (P.coeff m) ≠ 0 := by
            by_contra h
            push_neg at h
            have h5 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
              have h6 : ∀ (m : ℕ), m > 0 → P.coeff m = 0 := by
                intro m hm
                have h7 : m ≥ 1 := by omega
                have h8 : P.coeff m = 0 := by
                  have h9 : m ≥ 1 := h7
                  have h10 : P.coeff m = 0 := h m (by omega)
                  tauto
                tauto
              have h7 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
                apply Polynomial.funext
                intro x
                simp [Polynomial.eval_eq_sum_range, h6, Finset.sum_eq_zero]
              have h8 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
                rw [h7]
                compute_degree!
              tauto
            omega
          tauto
        rcases eq8 with ⟨m, hm1, hm2⟩
        have eq9 : ∀ (k : ℕ), Polynomial.eval (↑k : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
          intro k
          induction k with
          | zero =>
            simp
          | succ k ihk =>
            have eq12 : Polynomial.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (↑k : ℂ) P := by
              calc
                Polynomial.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval ((↑k : ℂ) + 1 : ℂ) P := by
                  simp at *
                _ = Polynomial.eval (↑k : ℂ) P := by
                  specialize eq4 (↑k : ℂ)
                  norm_num at eq4 ⊢
                  all_goals try tauto
            have eq13 : Polynomial.eval (↑k : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
              simpa using ihk
            calc
              Polynomial.eval (↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (↑k : ℂ) P := by
                exact_mod_cast eq12
              _ = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
                exact_mod_cast eq13
        have eq10 : ∀ (k : ℤ), Polynomial.eval (↑k : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
          intro k
          cases k with
          | ofNat n =>
            specialize eq9 n
            norm_num at eq9 ⊢
            all_goals try tauto
          | negSucc n =>
            have eq11 : ∀ (k : ℕ), Polynomial.eval (- (k : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
              intro k
              induction k with
              | zero =>
                have eq12 : Polynomial.eval (-1 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
                  have eq14 : Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (-1 : ℂ) P := by
                    have eq13 : Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (-1 + 1 : ℂ) P := by
                      norm_num
                    have eq14 : Polynomial.eval (-1 + 1 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (-1 : ℂ) P := by
                      specialize eq4 (-1 : ℂ)
                      norm_num at eq4 ⊢
                      all_goals try tauto
                    rw [eq13, eq14]
                  tauto
                simpa using eq12
              | succ k ihk =>
                have eq12 : Polynomial.eval (-((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (- (k : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) P := by
                  have eq15 : (-((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) = (- (k : ℂ) - 1 - 1 : ℂ) := by
                    simp at *
                    all_goals ring_nf
                  rw [eq15]
                  have eq16 : Polynomial.eval (- (k : ℂ) - 1 - 1 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (- (k : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) P := by
                    have eq17 : Polynomial.eval (- (k : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (- (k : ℂ) - 1 - 1 : ℂ) P := by
                      have eq18 : Polynomial.eval (- (k : ℂ) - 1 - 1 + 1 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (- (k : ℂ) - 1 - 1 : ℂ) P := by
                        specialize eq4 (- (k : ℂ) - 1 - 1 : ℂ)
                        norm_num at eq4 ⊢
                        all_goals try tauto
                      have eq18' : (- (k : ℂ) - 1 - 1 + 1 : ℂ) = (- (k : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) := by
                        ring_nf
                      rw [eq18'] at eq18
                      tauto
                    tauto
                  tauto
                have eq13 : Polynomial.eval (- (k : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
                  simpa using ihk
                calc
                  Polynomial.eval (-((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (- (k : ℂ) - 1 : ℂ) P := by
                    exact_mod_cast eq12
                  _ = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
                    exact_mod_cast eq13
            have eq14 : Polynomial.eval (↑(Int.negSucc n) : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
              have eq15 : (↑(Int.negSucc n) : ℂ) = (- (n + 1 : ℕ) - 1 : ℂ) := by
                simp at *
                all_goals ring_nf
              rw [eq15]
              specialize eq11 (n + 1)
              simpa using eq11
            simpa using eq14
        have eq11 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
          have eq14 : ∀ (k : ℤ), Polynomial.eval (↑k : ℂ) (P - Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0)) = 0 := by
            intro k
            have eq15 : Polynomial.eval (↑k : ℂ) P = Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P := by
              exact_mod_cast eq10 k
            have eq16 : Polynomial.eval (0 : ℂ) P = P.coeff 0 := by
              simp [Polynomial.eval]
            simp [eq15, eq16]
          have eq15 : P - Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) = 0 := by
            by_cases h18 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) : Polynomial ℂ) = 0
            · -- Case $P - C(P(0)) = 0$, so $P = C(P(0))$
              tauto
            · -- Case $P - C(P(0)) \neq 0$
              have eq20 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0)).roots.Infinite := by
                apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => (↑(n : ℤ) : ℂ))
                · -- Show f is injective
                  intro n m h
                  simp at h
                  all_goals omega
                · -- Show that all f(n) are in the set
                  intro n
                  have eq22 : (↑(n : ℤ) : ℂ) ∈ (P - Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0)).roots := by
                    have eq18 : Polynomial.eval (↑(n : ℤ) : ℂ) (P - Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0)) = 0 := by
                      exact_mod_cast eq14 (n : ℤ)
                    simp at eq18 ⊢
                    all_goals try tauto
                  exact_mod_cast eq22
              have eq21 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0)).roots.Finite := by
                apply Polynomial.finite_roots
              exfalso
              exact Set.infinite_iff_finite.mpr (by tauto)
          have eq16 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
            calc
              P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0)) + Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by ring
              _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
                rw [show P - Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) = 0 by exact_mod_cast eq15]
              _ = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by ring
          exact_mod_cast eq16
        have eq17 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
          refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
            exact_mod_cast eq11
          ⟩
        tauto
      · -- Assume $∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c$, need to show $Δ P = 0$
        rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
        rw [hΔ, hc]
        simp
  · -- Now, we need to prove that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : ∀ P Q : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = Δ Q → P = Q := by
      intro P Q h_eq
      exact h h_eq
    have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp
      all_goals ring_nf
    have eq2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h1 (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ)
      exact_mod_cast eq1
    have eq3 : Polynomial.C 1 = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C 1 = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by ring
        _ = 0 := by
          rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X by
            exact_mod_cast eq2
          ]
          all_goals simp
    have eq4 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h14 : Polynomial.C 1 = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        exact_mod_cast eq3
      have h15 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
        rw [h14]
      simp at h15 ⊢
      all_goals try tauto
    norm_num at eq4

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by 
        exact_mod_cast eq1
      have eq3 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        use P.eval (↑(0 : ℕ) : ℂ)
        apply Polynomial.funext
        intro z
        have eq6 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (↑0 : ℂ) := by
          intro n
          induction n with
          | zero =>
            simp
          | succ n ih =>
            have eq7 : P.eval (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
              have eq7 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
                rw [eq2]
              have eq8 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval ((Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1).eval (↑n : ℂ)) := by
                simp [Polynomial.comp_eval]
              have eq9 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).eval (↑n : ℂ) = (↑n : ℂ) + 1 := by
                simp
              rw [eq8] at eq7
              rw [eq9] at eq7
              have eq10 : (↑(n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (↑n : ℂ) + 1 := by
                simp at *
              rw [eq10]
              exact eq7
            have eq8 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (↑0 : ℂ) := ih
            rw [eq7, eq8]
        have eq7 : P.eval z = P.eval (↑0 : ℂ) := by
          have eq9 : P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
            have eq10 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := by
              intro n
              have eq11 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (↑n : ℂ) - (Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
                simp
              rw [eq11]
              have eq12 : P.eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (↑0 : ℂ) := eq6 n
              have eq13 : (Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (↑0 : ℂ) := by
                simp
              rw [eq13, eq12]
              all_goals norm_num
            apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_isRoot
            apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))
            · -- Show f is injective
              intro n m h
              simp at h
              all_goals omega
            · -- Show that all n, f n is a root
              intro n
              have h15 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := eq10 n
              simpa using h15
          have eq10 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ)) := by
            calc
              P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ))) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ)) := by ring
              _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ)) := by rw [eq9]
              _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (↑0 : ℂ)) := by ring
          have eq11 : P.eval z = P.eval (↑0 : ℂ) := by
            rw [eq10]
            simp
          exact eq11
        simpa using eq7
      exact eq3
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := by
        rw [hΔ]
        rw [hc]
        simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
      exact eq1
  · -- Second part: ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_X]
      all_goals ring
    have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
      rw [hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_add, Polynomial.comp_C, Polynomial.comp_X]
      all_goals ring
    have h2 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      apply h
    rw [eq1, eq2] at h2
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      exact_mod_cast h2
    have h6 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) ≠ (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      simp
    tauto

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := by simpa using h
      have eq2 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq2] at eq1
      have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by 
        calc
          P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
          _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [eq1]
          _ = P := by ring
      have eq4 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h'
        push_neg at h'
        have eq6 : P.natDegree > 0 := h'
        have h2 : P ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h0
          rw [h0] at eq3
          simp at eq3
        have h3 : ∃ r : ℂ, P.eval r = 0 := by
          have h4 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq6
          have h5 : P ≠ 0 := h2
          apply Polynomial.exists_root
          all_goals
            tauto
        rcases h3 with ⟨r, hr⟩
        have h6 : ∀ (k : ℕ), P.eval (r + (k : ℂ)) = 0 := by
          intro k
          induction k with
          | zero =>
            simp [hr]
          | succ k ihk =>
            have eq7 : P.eval (r + ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
              have eq8 : r + ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ) = (r + ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) + (1 : ℂ) := by
                simp at *
                all_goals
                  ring_nf
              rw [eq8]
              have eq9 : P.eval ((r + ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) + (1 : ℂ)) = P.eval (r + ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) := by
                have eq10 : ∀ z : ℂ, P.eval (z + 1) = P.eval z := by
                  intro z
                  have eq11 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq3
                  have eq12 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval (z + 1) := by
                    simp [Polynomial.comp_eval]
                  have eq13 : P.eval (z + 1) = P.eval z := by
                    calc
                      P.eval (z + 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z := by
                        rw [eq12]
                      _ = P.eval z := by
                        rw [eq11]
                  exact eq13
                apply eq10
              rw [eq9]
              exact ihk
            exact eq7
        have h7 : P.infiniteRoots := by
          apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => r + (n : ℂ))
          · -- Show f is injective
            intro n m h
            simp at h
            all_goals
              try omega
          · -- Show all elements in the image are roots
            intro n
            have hn : P.eval (r + (n : ℂ)) = 0 := by
              specialize h6 n
              simpa using h6
            simp_all [Polynomial.IsRoot]
        have h10 : ¬ P.infiniteRoots := by
          apply Polynomial.not_infiniteRoots
        contradiction
      have eq8 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        have eq7 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq4
        have h12 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
          apply Polynomial.funext
          intro x
          have eq13 : P.eval x = P.coeff 0 := by
            have h13 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq7
            have h14 : ∀ (n : ℕ), n > 0 → P.coeff n = 0 := by
              intro n hn
              have h11 : P.natDegree < (n : ℕ) := by
                omega
              apply Polynomial.coeff_eq_zero_of_natDegree_lt
              exact h11
            simp [Polynomial.eval_eq_sum_range, h13, h14, Finset.sum_range_succ, mul_one]
          simpa using eq13
        refine ⟨P.coeff 0, by
          exact_mod_cast h12
        ⟩
      exact eq8
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, rfl⟩
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ) := hΔ (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ)
      rw [eq1]
      simp
  · -- Now prove ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := hΔ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ)
      have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := hΔ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ)
      rw [eq1, eq2]
      all_goals
        simp [Polynomial.comp_add, Polynomial.add_comp]
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      all_goals
        try exact h1
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      have eq2 : Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X := by
        exact_mod_cast h2
      have eq3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        calc
          Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by
            simp
          _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
            rw [eq2]
            all_goals simp
      exact_mod_cast eq3
    have h4 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h5 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := h3
      have h8 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        rw [h5]
      simp at h8
      all_goals try tauto
    all_goals try exfalso
    all_goals try norm_num at h4

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: Prove the equivalence Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have eq2 : Δ P = 0 := h
        rw [hΔ] at eq2
        have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := eq2
        have eq4 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by 
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [eq3]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast eq4
      have eq4 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have eq6 : P.natDegree > 0 := by
          omega
        have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq1
        have eq60 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) = 0 := by
          have eq50 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
            have eq22 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) = 0 := by
              rw [show P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P by exact_mod_cast eq3]
              all_goals
                simp
            rw [eq22]
            simp
          have eq51 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 
              (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) - P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
            simp
          rw [eq51] at eq50
          have eq52 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℕ) := by
            have h1 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq6
            have eq53 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 
                (P.coeff (P.natDegree) ) * (P.natDegree : ℕ) := by
              simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp, add_mul, mul_add, pow_two, pow_succ, Polynomial.coeff_C, Polynomial.coeff_X, mul_assoc]
              all_goals
                try { 
                  ring_nf
                  <;> simp [Nat.mul_comm]
                }
            exact_mod_cast eq53
          have eq57 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
            have h17 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
              have h18 : P.natDegree = P.natDegree := rfl
              have h19 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
                apply Polynomial.coeff_natDegree_ne_zero
                all_goals
                  try tauto
              tauto
            tauto
          have eq58 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℕ) = 0 := by
            have eq59 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = 0 := by
              linarith [eq50, eq51, eq52]
            have eq60 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℕ) := eq52
            rw [eq60] at eq59
            tauto
          have h1 : (P.natDegree : ℕ) > 0 := by omega
          have h4 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) = 0 := by
            have h5 : (P.natDegree : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by omega
            have h6 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (P.natDegree : ℕ) = 0 := eq58
            cases (mul_eq_zero.mp h6) with
            | inl h7 => tauto
            | inr h8 => 
              exfalso
              have h9 : (P.natDegree : ℕ) = 0 := by
                simpa using h8
              omega
          tauto
        have h11 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
          have h12 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq4
          have h13 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
            exact_mod_cast h12
          exact_mod_cast h13
        refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by exact_mod_cast h11⟩
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Show that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.ext_iff, add_mul, mul_add, pow_two]
      all_goals
        try { ring_nf }
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      have h3 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := h1
      have h4 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
        apply h (h3)
      exact_mod_cast h4
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by
          ring_nf
        _ = (Polynomial.X) - Polynomial.X := by 
          rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X by exact_mod_cast h2]
        _ = 0 := by 
          simp
    have h4 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h5 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        exact_mod_cast h3
      have h6 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
        have h7 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := h5
        simpa using congr_arg (fun f : Polynomial ℂ => f.coeff 0) h7
      exact_mod_cast h6
    norm_num at h4

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1] at h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by 
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := h
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast this
      have eq24 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra hne
        push_neg at hne
        have eq25 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := by omega
        have eq26 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := by
          have h1 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = 1 := by
            compute_degree!
          have h2 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = P.natDegree * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree := by
            apply Polynomial.natDegree_comp
          rw [h1] at h2
          have h3 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = P.natDegree := by
            nlinarith
          exact_mod_cast h3
        have eq27 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
          have eq15 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
          rw [eq15]
        have eq28 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
          have h1 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = ∑ x ∈ Finset.antidiagonal (P.natDegree - 1), (P.coeff x.1) * ((Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff x.2) := by
            simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp]
          rw [h1]
          have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n = if n = 1 then (1 : ℂ) else if n = 0 then (1 : ℂ) else (0 : ℂ) := by
            intro n
            induction n with
            | zero =>
              simp
            | succ n ih =>
              cases n with
              | zero =>
                simp [Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_C, Polynomial.coeff_X]
              | succ n =>
                cases n with
                | zero =>
                  simp [Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_C, Polynomial.coeff_X_pow]
                | succ n =>
                  simp [Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_C, Polynomial.coeff_X_pow]
          simp [Finset.sum_antidiagonal, h2]
          cases P.natDegree with
          | zero => 
            exfalso
            omega
          | succ d => 
            cases d with
            | zero => 
              simp
            | succ d => 
              simp [Nat.mul_add, add_mul]
              all_goals
                ring_nf
        have eq29 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
          apply Polynomial.coeff_natDegree_ne_zero
        have eq30 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) = 0 := by
          have eq31 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := eq28
          have eq32 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := eq27
          rw [eq31] at eq32
          have eq33 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            have h43 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
              exact_mod_cast eq32
            have h44 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) = 0 := by
              calc
                P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) = (P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1)) - P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by ring_nf
                _ = (P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) ) - P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by rw [h43]
                _ = (0 : ℂ) := by ring_nf
            exact_mod_cast h44
          exact_mod_cast eq33
        have eq34 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := eq29
        have eq35 : (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) ≥ (1 : ℂ) := by
          have eq36 : (P.natDegree : ℕ) ≥ 1 := by omega
          have eq37 : (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) ≥ (1 : ℂ) := by
            exact_mod_cast eq36
          exact_mod_cast eq37
        have eq38 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have eq39 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := eq29
          have eq40 : (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have eq41 : (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) ≥ (1 : ℂ) := eq35
            have eq42 : (↑(P.natDegree : ℕ) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
              linarith
            exact_mod_cast eq42
          exact mul_ne_zero eq39 eq40
        contradiction
      have eq28 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq24
      have eq29 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
        apply Polynomial.natDegree_eq_zero.mp
        exact_mod_cast eq28
      refine ⟨P.coeff 0, by simpa using eq29⟩
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hΔ P]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Second part: ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.C (2 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ), hΔ (Polynomial.C (2 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ)]
      all_goals
        simp
    have eq2 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (2 : ℂ) := by
      apply h
      exact eq1
    have eq3 : (1 : ℂ) = (2 : ℂ) := by
      have h4 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (2 : ℂ) := eq2
      have h5 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (Polynomial.C (2 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
        rw [h4]
      simp at h5 ⊢
      all_goals
        try { tauto }
    norm_num at eq3

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h1 : Δ P = 0 := h
        rw [hΔ P] at h1
        have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h1
        have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by 
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [eq2]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast eq3
      have eq12 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have eq13 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := by
          omega
        have eq8 : P.eval (0 : ℂ) = P.eval (1 : ℂ) := by
          calc
            P.eval (1 : ℂ) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
              simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
            _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
              have eq12 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ) = P := by
                exact_mod_cast eq1
              rw [eq12]
        have eq14 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := eq13
        have eq31 : (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = P.natDegree := by
          have h4 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree ≥ 1 := eq14
          have h5 : (P - (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree := by
            apply Polynomial.natDegree_sub_eq_left_of_natDegree_lt
            have h6 : (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = 0 := by
              simp
            have h7 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree > (0 : WithBot ℕ) := by
              have h8 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree ≥ 1 := by
                exact_mod_cast h4
              have h14 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree > (0 : WithBot ℕ) := by
                have h15 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree ≥ (1 : ℕ) := by
                  exact_mod_cast h8
                have h16 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree > (0 : ℕ) := by
                  omega
                exact_mod_cast h16
              exact_mod_cast h14
            all_goals try { simp_all }
          have h3 : (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (P - (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) : Polynomial ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
            simp
          rw [h3]
          exact_mod_cast h5
        have eq30 : (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree ≥ 2 := by
          have eq17 : P.eval (0 : ℂ) = P.eval (1 : ℂ) := eq8
          have eq23 : (X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ) ∣ P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            apply Polynomial.dvd_sub_of_eval_eq
            all_goals simp [eq17]
          have eq24 : (X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ) ∣ P - P.eval (1 : ℂ) := by
            apply Polynomial.dvd_sub_of_eval_eq
            all_goals simp [eq17]
          have eq25 : (X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ) ∣ P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq23
          have eq26 : (X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ) ∣ P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            have eq27 : P.eval (1 : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
              tauto
            rw [show P.eval (1 : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) by tauto] at eq24
            all_goals try exact_mod_cast eq24
          have eq28 : ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ)) * ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ)) ∣ P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            apply Polynomial.mul_dvd.2
            constructor
            · exact eq25
            · exact eq26
          have h6 : ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ)) * ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ)) ∣ (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := eq28
          have h7 : (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree ≥ 2 := by
            have h8 : ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ)) * ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ)) ∣ (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := h6
            have h9 : ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ)) * ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ)) ≠ 0 := by
              have h10 : (X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
                intro h
                have : (X : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
                  exact_mod_cast h
                simp at this
              have h11 : (X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
                intro h
                have : (X : Polynomial ℂ) = (1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
                  exact_mod_cast h
                simp at this
              exact mul_ne_zero h10 h11
            have h10 : ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ)) * ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ)) = (Polynomial.X ^ 2 - Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
              ring
            have h12 : ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ)) * ((X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ)) ∣ (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := h6
            have h13 : (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree ≥ (( (X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ) ) * ( (X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ) ) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree := by
              apply Polynomial.natDegree_le_of_dvd
              all_goals try exact h12
              all_goals try exact h9
            have h14 : (( (X : Polynomial ℂ) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ) ) * ( (X : Polynomial ℂ) - (1 : Polynomial ℂ) ) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = 2 := by
              compute_degree!
            omega
          exact_mod_cast h7
        have eq34 : P.natDegree ≥ 2 := by
          have eq35 : (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = P.natDegree := eq31
          have eq36 : (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree ≥ 2 := eq30
          omega
        have eq35 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := eq14
        by_cases h15 : P.natDegree = 1
        · -- Case P.natDegree = 1
          have eq36 : P.natDegree = 1 := h15
          have eq37 : (P - P.eval (0 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).natDegree = 1 := by
            rw [eq31]
            exact_mod_cast eq36
          omega
        · -- Case P.natDegree ≠ 1
          have eq39 : P.natDegree ≥ 2 := by
            by_contra h
            push_neg at h
            have eq40 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
              omega
            omega
          omega
      have eq14 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        have eq15 : P.natDegree = 0 := eq12
        have eq16 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
          apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
          exact_mod_cast eq15
        refine' ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), ?_⟩
        exact_mod_cast eq16
      tauto
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hΔ P]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Now we need to show ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
      have eq11 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2) := by
        apply hΔ
      have eq12 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = ( (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - ( (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) ) := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [eq11, eq12]
      ring_nf
    have eq2 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 ≠ Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      intro h
      have eq5 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) - (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        ring
      have eq6 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        have eq7 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
          exact_mod_cast h
        have eq8 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) - (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
          rw [eq7]
          all_goals simp
        rw [eq5] at eq8
        exact_mod_cast eq8
      have eq7 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
        have eq8 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := eq6
        have eq9 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
          rw [eq8]
        simp at eq9
      all_goals try tauto
    have eq3 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := eq1
    have eq4 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) * Polynomial.X ^ 2 + Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      apply h
      exact_mod_cast eq3
    contradiction

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
    rw [eq1]
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h_eq
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h_eq
        have eq4 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq2]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact_mod_cast eq4
      have h1 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have h2 : P.natDegree > 0 := by
          omega
        have h5 : P ≠ 0 := by
          by_contra h
          have h6 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
            simp [h] at *
          omega
        have h7 : ∃ α : ℂ, P.eval α = 0 := by
          apply Polynomial.exists_root
          all_goals try tauto
        rcases h7 with ⟨α, h8⟩
        have h9 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval (α + (n : ℂ)) = 0 := by
          intro n
          induction n with
          | zero =>
            simp [h8]
          | succ n ih =>
            have eq10 : P.eval (α + ((n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
              have eq11 : (α + ((n + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ)) + 1 := by
                simp at *
                all_goals ring_nf
              rw [eq11]
              have eq12 : P.eval ((α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ)) + 1) = P.eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ)) := by
                have eq13 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
                have eq14 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P.eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1) := by
                  simp
                have eq16 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P.eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ)) := by
                  rw [eq13]
                have eq17 : P.eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1) = P.eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ)) := by
                  calc
                    P.eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ) + 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ)) := by
                      simp
                    _ = P.eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ)) := by
                      rw [eq13]
                exact_mod_cast eq17
              have eq13 : P.eval (α + ((n : ℕ) : ℂ)) = 0 := by
                simpa using ih
              rw [eq12]
              all_goals try tauto
            exact_mod_cast eq10
        have h15 : Set.Infinite { z : ℂ | P.eval z = 0  } := by
          apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => α + (n : ℂ))
          · -- Show f is injective
            intro n m h
            have : (n : ℂ) = (m : ℂ) := by
              have h18 : α + (n : ℂ) = α + (m : ℂ) := by
                simpa using h
              have : (n : ℂ) = (m : ℂ) := by
                calc
                  (n : ℂ) = (α + (n : ℂ)) - α := by ring_nf
                  _ = (α + (m : ℂ)) - α := by rw [h18]
                  _ = (m : ℂ) := by ring_nf
              exact_mod_cast this
            have : n = m := by
              exact_mod_cast this
            tauto
          · -- Show that all elements of f(n) are in the set
            intro n
            have h17 : P.eval (α + (n : ℂ)) = 0 := h9 n
            simp [h17]
        have h16 : Set.Finite { z : ℂ | P.eval z = 0  } := by
          have h17 : P ≠ 0 := h5
          apply Polynomial.finite_setOf_eval_eq_zero
        exfalso
        have h19 : Set.Infinite { z : ℂ | P.eval z = 0  } := h15
        have h20 : Set.Finite  { z : ℂ | P.eval z = 0  } := h16
        exact Set.infinite_iff_finite.mp h19 h20
      have h2 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
          apply Polynomial.funext
          intro x
          have h3 : P.natDegree = 0 := h1
          have h4 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_natDegree_eq_zero
            exact_mod_cast h3
          simp [h4]
        ⟩
      tauto
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      simp [hΔ]
  · -- Now prove ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      all_goals
        simp
        all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h4 : Polynomial.C 1 = 0 := by
      calc
        Polynomial.C 1 = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by ring_nf
        _ = 0 := by
          rw [show Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X by
            exact_mod_cast h2
          ]
          all_goals simp
    simp at h4

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ΔP = 0 ↔ P is constant
    intro P
    have eq1 : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ
    have eq2 : Δ P = 0 ↔ P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
      have h1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := eq1 P
      rw [h1]
      simp [sub_eq_zero]
    rw [eq2]
    constructor
    · -- Assume P.comp (X + 1) = P, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = C c
      intro h_eq
      have eq3 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := h_eq
      have eq4 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
        by_cases h : P.natDegree > 0
        · -- Assume P has degree > 0
          have h12 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := by omega
          have eq13 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := by
            have h14 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := by
              apply Polynomial.natDegree_comp
            exact h14
          have h19 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).leadingCoeff = P.leadingCoeff := by
            have h20 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).leadingCoeff = P.leadingCoeff * (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1).leadingCoeff ^ P.natDegree := by
              rw [Polynomial.leadingCoeff_comp]
            have h21 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).leadingCoeff = 1 := by
              simp
            rw [h21] at h20
            simp at h20 ⊢
            all_goals
            try tauto
          -- Now, we know that P comp (X + 1) = P.
          -- So P comp (X + 1) - P = 0.
          have eq14 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).natDegree = P.natDegree - 1 := by
            have h23 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := eq13
            have h24 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).leadingCoeff = P.leadingCoeff := h19
            have h26 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).natDegree < P.natDegree := by
              have h27 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).natDegree < P.natDegree := by
                apply Polynomial.natDegree_sub_lt
                all_goals
                try {
                  have h37 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := h23
                  have h38 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).leadingCoeff = P.leadingCoeff := h24
                  have h39 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).natDegree = P.natDegree := h23
                  have h40 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).leadingCoeff = P.leadingCoeff := h24
                  try tauto
                }
              all_goals
              try omega
            have h27 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).natDegree = P.natDegree - 1 := by
              have h28 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).natDegree + 1 = P.natDegree := by
                omega
              omega
            exact h27
          -- Contradicts because P comp (X + 1) - P = 0
          have h26 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) = 0 := by
            have h27 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
              exact_mod_cast eq3
            have h28 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) = 0 := by
              rw [show P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P by exact_mod_cast h27]
              all_goals
                simp
            exact_mod_cast h28
          -- Now, we know that P comp (X + 1) - P has degree P.natDegree - 1
          -- But it's equal to 0, so its degree is ⊤
          -- Thus, P.natDegree - 1 = ⊤, so P.natDegree = 0
          have h27 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P).natDegree = ⊤ := by
            rw [h26]
            simp
          rw [h27] at eq14
          cases P
        · -- P has degree 0
          have h1 : P.natDegree = 0 := by omega
          exact h1
      have eq5 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
        refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
          apply Polynomial.funext
          intro x
          simp [Polynomial.coeff_eq_zero_of_natDegree_lt, eq4]
        ⟩
      tauto
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = C c, prove P.comp (X + 1) = P
      rintro ⟨c, hp⟩
      rw [hp]
      all_goals
        simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
  · -- Show that Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have eq1 : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = 1 := by
      have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := eq1 (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ)
      rw [eq2]
      all_goals
        simp [Polynomial.comp_X_add_C]
    have h2 : Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = 1 := by
      have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := eq1 (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ)
      rw [eq2]
      all_goals
        simp [Polynomial.comp_X_add_C]
    have h3 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      have h4 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        rw [h1, h2]
      have h5 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
        apply h (h4)
      exact h5
    -- Derive a contradiction from h3
    have h10 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      have h11 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        linarith [h3]
      have h12 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
        have eq3 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := h11
        have eq4 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
          have eq3' : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) - (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
            rw [eq3]
            all_goals
              simp
          have eq4' : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) - (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
            ring_nf
          rw [eq4'] at eq3'
          exact_mod_cast eq3'
        exact_mod_cast eq4
      exact_mod_cast h12
    -- Contradicts because 1 ≠ 0 in ℂ
    have h13 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h14 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := h10
      have h15 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
        rw [h14]
      simp at h15 ⊢
      all_goals
        try tauto
    norm_num at h13

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := by
        simpa using h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have eq3 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := by
          apply hΔ
        rw [eq3] at eq1
        have eq4 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using eq1
        have eq5 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + P := by rw [eq4]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact eq5
      have eq8 : ∀ (z : ℂ), P.eval (z + 1) = P.eval z := by
        intro z
        have heval1 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval (z + 1) := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
        have heval2 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = P.eval z := by
          have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq2
          rw [h_eq]
        calc
          P.eval (z + 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z := by
            rw [heval1]
          _ = P.eval z := by
            rw [heval2]
      have eq10 : ∀ (n : ℕ), P.eval ((↑n : ℂ)) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp
        | succ k ih =>
          have eq11 : P.eval ((↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P.eval ((↑k : ℂ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
            simp at *
          have eq12 : P.eval ((↑k : ℂ) + 1 : ℂ) = P.eval ((↑k : ℂ)) := by
            specialize eq8 ((↑k : ℂ))
            simpa using eq8
          have eq13 : P.eval ((↑k : ℂ)) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            exact_mod_cast ih
          calc
            P.eval ((↑(k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = P.eval ((↑k : ℂ) + 1 : ℂ) := by
              rw [eq11]
            _ = P.eval ((↑k : ℂ)) := by
              rw [eq12]
            _ = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
              exact_mod_cast eq13
      have eq11 : ∀ (z : ℂ), P.eval z = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        intro z
        have eq13 : ∀ (n : ℕ), (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := by
          intro n
          have eq14 : P.eval ((↑n : ℂ)) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            apply eq10 n
          have eq15 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = (P.eval (↑n : ℂ)) - (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
            simp
          rw [eq15]
          have eq16 : (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
            simp
          rw [eq16]
          rw [eq14]
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        have eq14 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) = 0 := by
          apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
          apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))
          · -- Show f is injective
            intro n m h
            simp at h
            all_goals omega
          · -- Show that for all n, P - P(0) evaluated at n is zero
            intro n
            specialize eq13 n
            simpa using eq13
        have eq15 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
          calc
            P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
            _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
              rw [eq14]
            _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
        have eq16 : P.eval z = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
          rw [eq15]
          simp
        exact eq16
      refine ⟨P.eval (0 : ℂ), by
        have eq13 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
          have eq11' : ∀ (z : ℂ), P.eval z = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := eq11
          have eq14 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) = 0 := by
            apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_eval_eq_zero
            apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => (↑n : ℂ))
            · -- Show f is injective
              intro n m h
              simp at h
              all_goals omega
            · -- Show that for all n, P - P(0) evaluated at n is zero
              intro n
              have eq14 : P.eval ((↑n : ℂ)) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
                apply eq10 n
              have eq15 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = 0 := by
                have eq16 : (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = (P.eval (↑n : ℂ)) - (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) := by
                  simp
                rw [eq16]
                have eq17 : (Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))).eval (↑n : ℂ) = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
                  simp
                rw [eq17]
                rw [eq14]
                all_goals
                  ring_nf
              simpa using eq15
          have eq15 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
            calc
              P = (P - Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ))) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
              _ = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) + Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by
                rw [eq14]
              _ = Polynomial.C (P.eval (0 : ℂ)) := by ring
            exact eq15
          exact_mod_cast eq13
        all_goals try { tauto }
      ⟩
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hp⟩
      rw [hp]
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C c) = 0 := by
        rw [hΔ]
        simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
      exact eq1
  · -- Second part: ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [eq1]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
    have h2 : Δ (0 : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
      have eq1 : Δ (0 : Polynomial ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [eq1]
      all_goals simp
    have h3 : Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      apply h
      rw [h1, h2]
    have h4 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h6 : (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)).eval (0 : ℂ) = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).eval (0 : ℂ) := by
        rw [h3]
      simp at h6
      all_goals
        try { norm_num at h6 ⊢ }
        all_goals try { tauto }
    norm_num at h4

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- Proof of the first part: ΔP = 0 ↔ P is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume ΔP = 0, prove ∃c, P = C c
      intro h
      rw [hΔ] at h
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq17 : P.derivative = 0 := by
        have eq18 : Polynomial.comp P (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          simpa using eq1
        have eq19 : (Polynomial.comp P (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).derivative = P.derivative := by
          rw [eq18]
        have eq20 : (Polynomial.comp P (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).derivative = Polynomial.comp (P.derivative) (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) := by
          simp [Polynomial.derivative_comp]
        rw [eq20] at eq19
        have eq21 : Polynomial.comp (P.derivative) (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.derivative := by
          linarith
        by_cases h : P.derivative = 0
        · exact h
        · -- Assume P.derivative ≠ 0
          have eq28 : ∀ (z : ℂ), (P.derivative).eval (z + 1) = (P.derivative).eval z := by
            intro z
            have eq29 : (P.derivative).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P.derivative := by
              simpa using eq21
            have eq30 : ((P.derivative).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = (P.derivative).eval z := by
              rw [eq29]
            have eq31 : ((P.derivative).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).eval z = (P.derivative).eval (z + 1) := by
              simp [Polynomial.eval_comp]
            rw [eq31] at eq30
            have eq32 : (P.derivative).eval (z + 1) = (P.derivative).eval z := by
              linarith
            assumption
          have h3 : (P.derivative).natDegree > 0 := by
            have h3 : (P.derivative) ≠ 0 := by
              exact h
            have h4 : (P.derivative).natDegree > 0 := by
              by_contra h
