              push_neg at h
              have h5 : (P.derivative).natDegree = 0 := by
                omega
              have h6 : (P.derivative) = (Polynomial.C (Polynomial.coeff (P.derivative) 0) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
                apply Polynomial.natDegree_eq_zero.mp at h5
                simpa using h5
              rw [h6] at eq21
              have eq22 : Polynomial.comp (Polynomial.C (Polynomial.coeff (P.derivative) 0) : Polynomial ℂ) (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (Polynomial.C (Polynomial.coeff (P.derivative) 0) : Polynomial ℂ) := by
                simpa using eq21
              have eq23 : Polynomial.comp (Polynomial.C (Polynomial.coeff (P.derivative) 0) : Polynomial ℂ) (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = Polynomial.C (Polynomial.coeff (P.derivative) 0) := by
                simp
              rw [eq23] at eq22
              all_goals
                try tauto
            linarith
          have h4 : ∃ (z : ℂ), (P.derivative).eval z = 0 := by
            have h5 : (P.derivative) ≠ 0 := by
              exact h
            have h6 : (P.derivative).natDegree > 0 := h3
            have h7 : ∃ (z : ℂ), (P.derivative).eval z = 0 := by
              apply Polynomial.exists_root
              all_goals
                try tauto
            assumption
          rcases h4 with ⟨z, h7⟩
          have h10 : ∀ (k : ℕ), (P.derivative).eval (z + (k : ℂ)) = 0 := by
            intro k
            induction k with
            | zero =>
              simpa using h7
            | succ k ihk =>
              have eq35 : (z + ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℂ)) = (z + ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) + 1 := by
                simp at *
                all_goals
                  ring_nf
              rw [eq35]
              have eq36 : (P.derivative).eval ((z + ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) + 1) = (P.derivative).eval (z + ((k : ℕ) : ℂ)) := by
                specialize eq28 (z + ((k : ℕ) : ℂ))
                simpa using eq28
              rw [eq36]
              all_goals
                try { simpa using ihk }
          have h11 : (P.derivative) = 0 := by
            have h12 : Set.Infinite {w : ℂ | (P.derivative).eval w = 0} := by
              apply Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := λ (n : ℕ) => z + (n : ℂ))
              · -- Show f is injective
                intro n m h
                simp at h
                all_goals
                  try { omega }
              · -- Show all f(n) are in the set
                intro n
                have h17 : (P.derivative).eval (z + (n : ℂ)) = 0 := h10 n
                simpa using h17
            have h14 : (P.derivative) = 0 := by
              apply Polynomial.eq_zero_of_infinite_isRoot
              all_goals
                try { tauto }
            assumption
          tauto
      have eq14 : ∀ (k : ℕ), k ≥ 1 → Polynomial.coeff P k = 0 := by
        intro k hk
        have eq17 : k * (Polynomial.coeff P k) = 0 := by
          have eq16 : Polynomial.coeff (P.derivative) (k - 1) = 0 := by
            rw [eq17]
            simp
          have eq22 : Polynomial.coeff (P.derivative) (k - 1) = (k : ℂ) * (Polynomial.coeff P k) := by
            cases k with
            | zero =>
              exfalso
              omega
            | succ k =>
              simp [Polynomial.coeff_derivative, add_mul, mul_add, pow_succ, pow_zero, one_mul]
              all_goals
                try { ring_nf }
          rw [eq22] at eq16
          simpa using eq16
        have hk1 : (k : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
          have hk2 : k ≥ 1 := hk
          have hk3 : k > 0 := by omega
          have hk4 : (k : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            norm_cast at *
          assumption
        have eq24 : Polynomial.coeff P k = 0 := by
          have h17 : (k : ℂ) * (Polynomial.coeff P k) = 0 := by
            simpa using eq17
          have hk1 : (k : ℂ) ≠ 0 := hk1
          have : Polynomial.coeff P k = 0 := by
            apply (mul_left_inj' (show (k : ℂ) ≠ 0 by assumption)).mp
            simpa using h17
          assumption
        assumption
      have eq18 : P = Polynomial.C (P.eval 0) := by
        apply Polynomial.funext
        intro z
        have eq20 : P.eval z = P.eval (0 : ℂ) := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_eq_sum_range, Finset.sum_congr, eq14]
          all_goals
            try { nlinarith }
        assumption
      refine ⟨P.eval 0, by rw [eq18]⟩
    · -- Assume ∃c, P = C c, prove ΔP = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hΔ]
      rw [hc]
      simp
  · -- Proof of the second part: Δ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Function.Injective Δ := h
    have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      rw [hΔ, hΔ]
      simp [Polynomial.ext_iff, add_mul, mul_add, pow_two]
      all_goals
        try { norm_num }
    have eq2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h1
      exact eq1
    have eq3 : Polynomial.X ≠ Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      intro h
      have eq4 : Polynomial.coeff (Polynomial.X) 0 = Polynomial.coeff (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) 0 := by
        rw [h]
      have eq5 : Polynomial.coeff (Polynomial.X) 0 = 0 := by
        simp
      have eq6 : Polynomial.coeff (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) 0 = 1 := by
        simp
      rw [eq5, eq6] at eq4
      all_goals
        try { norm_num at eq4 }
    exfalso
    tauto

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume Δ P = 0, prove ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at eq1
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := eq1
        have h_eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact h_eq2
      have eq6 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
        apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_comp_add_eq_self
        exact eq2
      refine ⟨P.coeff 0, by exact_mod_cast eq6⟩
    · -- Assume ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, prove Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hc⟩
      rw [hc]
      simp [hΔ, Polynomial.comp_C]
  · -- Now prove ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      simp [hΔ]
      all_goals
        ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h4 : Polynomial.C 1 = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      have eq1 : Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 = Polynomial.X := by
        linarith [h2]
      have eq2 : Polynomial.C 1 = 0 := by
        have eq3 : Polynomial.C 1 = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 - Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
          ring_nf
        have eq4 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
          exact_mod_cast eq1
        rw [eq4] at eq3
        simp at eq3 ⊢
        all_goals try exact_mod_cast eq3
      exact_mod_cast eq2
    have h5 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
      have h6 : Polynomial.C 1 = (0 : Polynomial ℂ) := h4
      have h7 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (0 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
        rw [h6]
      simp at h7
      all_goals
        simpa using h7
    norm_num at h5

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: $\Delta P = 0 \iff P$ is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume $\Delta P = 0$, need to show $\exists c \in \mathbb{C}, P = c$
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1] at h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h
        have h_eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = 0 + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        exact h_eq2
      have h1 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
        apply Polynomial.eq_C_of_comp_add_eq_self
        exact eq2
      refine ⟨P.coeff 0, by simp [h1]⟩
    · -- Assume $\exists c \in \mathbb{C}, P = c$, need to show $\Delta P = 0$
      rintro ⟨c, rfl⟩
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.C c := hΔ (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ)
      rw [eq1]
      simp
  · -- Show that $\Delta$ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - Polynomial.X := by
        apply hΔ
      have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [eq1, eq2]
      all_goals
        simp [Polynomial.ext_iff]
        all_goals
          ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h
      exact h1
    have h3 : Polynomial.X ≠ Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      intro heq
      have eq1 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        exact heq
      have eq2 : (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = 0 := by
        calc
          (Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) - Polynomial.X := by ring
          _ = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) - Polynomial.X := by rw [eq1]
          _ = 0 := by ring
      have eq3 : (1 : ℂ) = (0 : ℂ) := by
        simpa using congr_arg (fun f : Polynomial ℂ => f.coeff 0) eq2
      norm_num at eq3
    exfalso
    tauto

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- Proof of the first part: ΔP = 0 ↔ P is constant
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Assume ΔP = 0, prove ∃c, P = C c
      intro h
      have h_eq : Δ P = 0 := h
      rw [hΔ] at h_eq
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq' : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h_eq
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq']
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq4 : ∀ j : ℕ, j > 0 → Polynomial.coeff P j = 0 := by
        intro j h_j
        have eq5 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq1
        have eq6 : ∀ (k : ℕ), Polynomial.coeff (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)) k = Polynomial.coeff P k := by
          intro k
          have eq7 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq1
          rw [eq7]
        have eq7 : Polynomial.coeff (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)) j = Polynomial.coeff P j := by
          apply eq6
        have eq11 : Polynomial.coeff (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)) j = ∑ k in Finset.Icc j (P.natDegree), (Polynomial.coeff P k) * (k.choose j : ℂ) := by
          rw [Polynomial.coeff_comp]
          all_goals simp
        rw [eq11] at eq7
        have eq12 : Polynomial.coeff P j = ∑ k in Finset.Icc j (P.natDegree), (Polynomial.coeff P k) * (k.choose j : ℂ) := by
          linarith [eq7]
        have eq13 : j > 0 := h_j
        have eq14 : Polynomial.coeff P j = 0 := by
          have h1 : ∀ (k : ℕ), k > 0 → Polynomial.coeff P k = 0 := by
            intro k h_k
            induction' k using Nat.strong_induction_on with k ih
            cases k with
            | zero => linarith
            | succ k =>
              cases k with
              | zero => 
                have eq12' : Polynomial.coeff P 1 = 0 := by
                  have eq12_1 : Polynomial.coeff P 1 = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 1 (P.natDegree), (Polynomial.coeff P k) * (k.choose 1 : ℂ) := by
                    specialize eq12 1 (by norm_num)
                    simpa using eq12

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: $\Delta P = 0$ iff $P$ is a constant polynomial
    intro P
    constructor
    · -- Forward direction: if $\Delta P = 0$, then $P$ is a constant polynomial
      intro h
      have eq1 : Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P := hΔ P
      rw [eq1] at h
      have eq2 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := h
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = (0) + P := by rw [h_eq]
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      have eq18 : P = Polynomial.C (P.coeff 0) := by
        have eq19 : ∀ (n : ℕ), n > 0 → P.coeff n = 0 := by
          intro n hn
          have eq21 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n = (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n := by
            have h_eq : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ) = (P : Polynomial ℂ) := by
              exact_mod_cast eq2
            rw [h_eq]
          have eq22 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n = (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n + (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (n - 1) := by
            have eq27 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n = ∑ x ∈ Finset.antidiagonal (n : ℕ), (P.coeff (x.1) * ((Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (x.2))) := by
              rw [Polynomial.coeff_comp]
            rw [eq27]
            cases n with
            | zero => 
              exfalso
              omega
            | succ n => 
              simp [Finset.sum_antidiagonal, add_assoc, mul_add, add_mul]
              all_goals simp [Polynomial.coeff_add, Polynomial.coeff_C, Polynomial.coeff_X]
              all_goals try { 
                ring_nf
                <;> simp
              }
          have eq33 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (n - 1) = 0 := by
            have eq34 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n + (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (n - 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n := by
              linarith [eq21, eq22]
            have eq35 : (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (n - 1) = 0 := by
              calc
                (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (n - 1) = (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n + (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff (n - 1) - (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n := by ring
                _ = (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n - (P : Polynomial ℂ).coeff n := by rw [eq34]
                _ = 0 := by ring
            assumption
          cases n with
          | zero => 
            exfalso
            omega
          | succ n => 
            simp at eq33 ⊢
            all_goals try tauto
        apply Polynomial.funext
        intro z
        have eq19 : ∀ (n : ℕ), n > 0 → P.coeff n = 0 := eq19
        have eq22 : P.eval z = P.coeff 0 := by
          simp [Polynomial.eval_eq_sum_range, eq19, Finset.sum_eq_zero]
        assumption
      refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by exact_mod_cast eq18⟩
    · -- Backward direction: if $P$ is a constant polynomial, then $\Delta P = 0$
      rintro ⟨c, h_eq⟩
      rw [h_eq]
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.C c : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [eq1]
      simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
  · -- Now we need to show that $\Delta$ is not injective
    intro h
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
      have eq1 : Δ (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      have eq2 : Δ (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
        apply hΔ
      rw [eq1, eq2]
      all_goals simp [Polynomial.comp_add, Polynomial.add_comp, Polynomial.comp_C, Polynomial.C_comp]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h2 : Polynomial.X = Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      apply h h1
    have h3 : Polynomial.X ≠ Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 := by
      intro h
      have eq4 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = 0 := by
        simp
      have eq5 : (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = 1 := by
        simp
      have eq6 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ).coeff 0 := by
        have h7 : (Polynomial.X : Polynomial ℂ) = (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1 : Polynomial ℂ) := by
          exact_mod_cast h
        rw [h7]
      rw [eq4, eq5] at eq6
      all_goals try { norm_num at eq6 }
    tauto

theorem subq_I_2
    (Δ : Polynomial ℂ → Polynomial ℂ)
    (hΔ : ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) :
    (∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c)
      ∧ ¬ Function.Injective Δ := by
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ P : Polynomial ℂ, Δ P = 0 ↔ ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
    intro P
    rw [hΔ]
    constructor
    · -- Forward direction: if Δ P = 0, then ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c
      intro h_eq
      have eq1 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
        have h_eq' : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P = 0 := by
          simpa using h_eq
        have : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := by
          calc
            P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) - P) + P := by ring
            _ = 0 + P := by rw [h_eq']
            _ = P := by ring
        assumption
      by_cases h : P.natDegree > 0
      · -- Assume P has degree > 0
        have eq14 : P.natDegree > 0 := by omega
        have eq17 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq1
        have eq18 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := by
          apply Polynomial.coeff_natDegree_ne_zero
        have eq19 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
          have eq27 : P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1) = P := eq17
          rw [eq27]
        have eq20 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) =
            (P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1) : ℂ)) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
          cases h2 : P.natDegree with
          | zero => 
            exfalso
            omega
          | succ n => 
            simp [Polynomial.coeff_comp, add_mul, mul_add, pow_two, Nat.succ_sub_one, Nat.choose_succ_succ]
            all_goals
              try { 
                ring_nf
                <;> simp [Nat.choose_succ_succ, add_mul, mul_add]
                all_goals
                  try { linarith }
              }
        have eq45 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) = 0 := by
          have eq46 : (P.comp (Polynomial.X + Polynomial.C 1)).coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := eq19
          rw [eq20] at eq46
          have eq47 : P.natDegree > 0 := eq14
          have eq48 : P.natDegree ≥ 1 := by omega
          have eq49 : (P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1) : ℂ)) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) = P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by
            simpa using eq46
          have eq50 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1) : ℂ) = 0 := by
            calc
              P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1) : ℂ) = (P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1) : ℂ)) + P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) - P.coeff (P.natDegree - 1) := by ring
              _ = 0 := by 
                rw [eq49]
                all_goals
                  try { 
                    ring_nf
                  }
          have eq51 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) ≠ 0 := eq18
          have eq52 : (Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            have eq53 : Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1) > 0 := by
              apply Nat.choose_pos
              all_goals
                try { 
                  omega
                }
            have eq54 : (Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1) : ℂ) > (0 : ℂ) := by
              exact_mod_cast eq53
            positivity
          have eq55 : P.coeff (P.natDegree) * (Nat.choose (P.natDegree) (P.natDegree - 1) : ℂ) ≠ 0 := by
            apply mul_ne_zero
            exact eq51
            exact eq52
          contradiction
        exfalso
        tauto
      · -- Assume P has degree 0
        have eq56 : P.natDegree = 0 := by
          omega
        have eq58 : ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c := by
          refine' ⟨P.coeff 0, by
            apply Polynomial.funext
            intro x
            simp [Polynomial.natDegree_eq_zero] at eq56 ⊢
            all_goals
              try { 
                simp [eq56]
              }
          ⟩
        tauto
    · -- Backward direction: if ∃ c : ℂ, P = Polynomial.C c, then Δ P = 0
      rintro ⟨c, hp⟩
      rw [hp]
      simp [hΔ, Polynomial.comp_C]
  · -- Second part: ¬ Function.Injective Δ
    intro h_inj
    have h1 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)) = Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) := by
      have h2 : Δ (Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
        rw [hΔ]
        simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
      have h3 : Δ (Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ)) = 0 := by
        rw [hΔ]
        simp [Polynomial.comp_C]
      rw [h2, h3]
    have h2 : Polynomial.C (0 : ℂ) = Polynomial.C (1 : ℂ) := by
      apply h_inj
      exact h1
    norm_num at h2

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h4 := hH x y hxy
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h4.1
    have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h4.2
    have h7 : (y - x) > 0 ∨ (y - x) < 0 := by
      by_contra h8
      push_neg at h8
      have h9 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      have h10 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    rcases h7 with h7 | h7
    · -- Case where y - x > 0
      have h8 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h5]
        have h10 : y - x > 0 := h7
        have h11 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h13 : y - x > 0 := h7
          have h14 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h14]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h9 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h6]
        have h11 : y - x > 0 := h7
        have h12 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h14 : y - x > 0 := h7
          have h15 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h15]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : F y - F x ≥ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h11 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h11]
        have h12 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := h8
        have h13 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := h9
        have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h12 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h12]
        have h13 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := h8
        have h14 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := h9
        have h15 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h12 : |y - x| = y - x := by
        rw [abs_of_pos h7]
      have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        have h17 : |y - x| = y - x := h12
        rw [h17] at *
        all_goals linarith
      exact h15
    · -- Case where y - x < 0
      have h8 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h6]
        have h11 : y - x < 0 := by linarith
        have h12 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h14 : y - x < 0 := by linarith
          have h15 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h15]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h9 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h5]
        have h11 : y - x < 0 := by linarith
        have h12 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h14 : y - x < 0 := by linarith
          have h15 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h15]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : F y - F x ≥ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h11 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h11]
        have h12 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := h8
        have h13 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := h9
        have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h12 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h12]
        have h13 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := h8
        have h14 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := h9
        have h15 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h12 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
        rw [abs_of_neg h7]

        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)

  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    specialize hF y

  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    specialize hF x

    ring

    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h

    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y

    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h5.2
    by_cases h8 : y - x > 0
    · -- y - x > 0
      have h9 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h11 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h13 : y - x > 0 := h8

          rw [h14]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
        have h12 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h14 : y - x > 0 := h8
          have h15 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by

        have h13 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := h9
        have h14 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := h10
        have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
        rw [hk2]
        nlinarith

        have h13 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h13]
        have h14 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := h9
        have h15 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := h10

        rw [hk2]

        have h16 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h12

        have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- if y = x, then |F y - F x| = 0
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- if y ≠ x
    have h4 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h'
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      intro h'
      apply h4
      linarith
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h5.1
    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h5.2
    by_cases h8 : y - x > 0
    · -- case y - x > 0
      have h9 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h11 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h13 : y - x > 0 := h8
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h12
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
        have h12 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h14 : y - x > 0 := h8
          have h15 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
            apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h13
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : y - x > 0 := h8
        have h17 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h16
        rw [h17]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      linarith
    · -- case y - x ≤ 0
      have h8' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith [h4, h]
        tauto
      have h9 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h7]
        have h11 : y - x < 0 := h8'
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h10
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h6]
        have h12 : y - x < 0 := h8'
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h13 : F y - F x ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : y - x < 0 := h8'
        have h17 : |y - x| = (x - y : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h16]
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        rw [h17]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      linarith

          have h18 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by linarith
          have h19 : ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by linarith
          have h20 : |((f y - f x) - k * (y - x))| ≤ - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
            apply abs_le.mpr
            constructor
            · nlinarith
            · nlinarith
          have h21 : - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) = ((M - m) / 2) * (- (y - x)) := by ring
          linarith [h20, h21]
        rw [h16]
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h13

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- If x = y, both sides are zero
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y, so y - x ≠ 0
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h4 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y hxy
    rcases h5 with ⟨h6, h7⟩
    have h8 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) ∨ (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
      by_cases h9 : y - x > 0
      · -- Case y - x > 0
        have h10 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h13 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h13]
          nlinarith
        left
        linarith
      · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
        push_neg at h9
        by_cases h10 : y - x < 0
        · -- Case y - x < 0
          have h11 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
            have h14 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
              field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
            rw [h14]
            nlinarith
          right
          linarith
        · -- Case y - x = 0
          have h11 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
          exfalso
          apply h4
          linarith
    have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) ∨ (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
      by_cases h10 : y - x > 0
      · -- Case y - x > 0
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h7
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h14 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h14]
          nlinarith
        left
        linarith
      · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
        push_neg at h10
        by_cases h11 : y - x < 0
        · -- Case y - x < 0
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h7
          have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
            have h15 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
              field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
            rw [h15]
            nlinarith
          right
          linarith
        · -- Case y - x = 0
          have h11 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
          exfalso
          apply h4
          linarith
    cases h8 with
    | inl h10 =>
      cases h9 with
      | inl h11 =>
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := h11
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := h10
        have h14 : (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [h3]
          have hk3 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
          nlinarith
        have h15 : (F y - F x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [h3]
          have hk3 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
          nlinarith
        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            cases' abs_cases (y - x) with h2 h2 <;> 
              all_goals
                nlinarith
        exact h16
      | inr h11 =>
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h14 : (F y - F x) ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [h3]
          have hk3 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
          nlinarith
        have h15 : (F y - F x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [h3]
          have hk3 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
          nlinarith
        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            cases' abs_cases (y - x) with h2 h2 <;> 
              all_goals
                nlinarith
        exact h16
    | inr h10 =>
      cases h9 with
      | inl h11 =>
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := h11
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h14 : (F y - F x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [h3]
          have hk3 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
          nlinarith
        have h15 : (F y - F x) ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [h3]
          have hk3 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
          nlinarith
        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            cases' abs_cases (y - x) with h2 h2 <;> 
              all_goals
                nlinarith
        exact h16
      | inr h11 =>
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h14 : (F y - F x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [h3]
          have hk3 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
          nlinarith
        have h15 : (F y - F x) ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [h3]
          have hk3 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
          nlinarith
        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            cases' abs_cases (y - x) with h2 h2 <;> 
              all_goals
                nlinarith
        exact h16

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      exact h
    have h5 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h4
      linarith
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y h4
    have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6.1
    have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h6.2
    have h9 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
      have eq1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
      have eq2 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = ((f y - f x) - k * (y - x)) / (y - x) := by
        rw [eq1]
      rw [eq2]
      have hx : y - x ≠ 0 := h5
      field_simp [hx]
      all_goals ring
    have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h12 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ - (M - m) / 2 := by
      have eq1 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := h9
      rw [eq1]
      have eq2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk'
      rw [eq2]
      linarith
    have h13 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have eq1 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := h9
      rw [eq1]
      have eq2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk'
      rw [eq2]
      linarith
    have h14 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (F y - F x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h12]
    have h15 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by linarith [h13]
    have h16 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h14]
      · linarith [h15]
    have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
      have h18 : |F y - F x| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := by
        have h19 : y - x ≠ 0 := h5
        have h20 : (F y - F x) = (F y - F x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
          field_simp [h19]
        rw [h20]
        rw [abs_mul]
      rw [h18]
      have h17 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h16
      have h18 : |y - x| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (y - x)
      nlinarith [abs_nonneg ((F y - F x) / (y - x)), abs_nonneg (y - x)]
    exact h17

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by 
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- Case y = x
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case y ≠ x
    have h4 : y - x ≠ 0 := by 
      intro h5
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      exact h4
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h5.1
    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h5.2
    by_cases h11 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h10 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
          field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption)]
        nlinarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
        have h12 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
          field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption)]
        nlinarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h13 : F y - F x ≥ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith [h3, h9]
      have h14 : F y - F x ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith [h3, h10]
      have h15 : (M - m) / 2 ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
      have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h17 : - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
          nlinarith [h13, hk1]
        have h18 : F y - F x ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
          nlinarith [h14, hk1]
        have h19 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h11]
        have h20 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            nlinarith [h17, h18, h19]
        linarith
      linarith
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h12 : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have h13 : y = x := by linarith
        tauto
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h10 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
          field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption)]
        nlinarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
        have h12 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
          field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption)]
        nlinarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h13 : F y - F x ≤ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith [h3, h9]
      have h14 : F y - F x ≥ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith [h3, h10]
      have h15 : (M - m) / 2 ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
      have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h17 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
          nlinarith [h14, hk1]
        have h18 : F y - F x ≤ - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
          nlinarith [h13, hk1]
        have h19 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h12]
        have h20 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            nlinarith [h17, h18, h19]
        linarith
      linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [show y = x by linarith]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h'
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y h4
    rcases h5 with ⟨h6, h7⟩
    have h8 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h9
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    by_cases h9 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h10 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h12 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h11 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
        have h13 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h12
          linarith
        linarith
      have h12 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [h3]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h13 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h13 : F y - F x ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [h3]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h15 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h9]
        have h16 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x ∧ F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          constructor
          · linarith [h13]
          · linarith [h12]
        have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            nlinarith
        rw [h15] at *
        all_goals linarith
      exact h14
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h10 : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        contradiction
      have h11 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h13 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h12
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h12 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
        have h14 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h13
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h13 : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [h3]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h14 : F y - F x ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [h3]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h15 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h10]
        have h17 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x ∧ F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          constructor
          · linarith [h14]
          · linarith [h13]
        have h18 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y - x)]
        rw [h16] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h15

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by apply hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by apply hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      all_goals linarith
    have h4 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y hxy
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h4.1
    have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h4.2
    have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h13 : |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - (m + M) / 2| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h11 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) - (m + M) / 2 := by
        nlinarith
      have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - (m + M) / 2 ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
        nlinarith
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith
      · linarith
    have h14 : F y - F x = (y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - (m + M) / 2) := by
      have hx : y - x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h_eq
        apply hxy
        linarith
      have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
      rw [h15]
      rw [hk']
      field_simp [show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption]
      <;> ring
    have h15 : |F y - F x| = |y - x| * |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - (m + M) / 2| := by
      rw [h14]
      have h17 : |(y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - (m + M) / 2)| = |y - x| * |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - (m + M) / 2| := by
        rw [abs_mul]
      simpa using h17
    rw [h15]
    nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y - x), abs_nonneg ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - (m + M) / 2), h13]

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  rw [h3]
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- Case y = x
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case y ≠ x
    have h4 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h5
      have : y = x := by linarith
      tauto
    have h6 : x ≠ y := by
      by_contra h7
      have : y = x := by
        linarith
      tauto
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      exact h6
    by_cases h9 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h5.left]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
          field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
        nlinarith
      have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h5.right]
        have h13 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
          field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
        nlinarith
      have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h8 : - ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos (show y - x > 0 by linarith)
        rw [h13]
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      have h9 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h13 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos (show y - x > 0 by linarith)
        rw [h13]
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith
      · linarith
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h10 : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h11
        push_neg at h11
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        contradiction
      have h10' : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h5.right]
        have h13 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
          field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by
            by_contra h0
            have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
            contradiction
          )]
        nlinarith
      have h11' : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h5.left]
        have h13 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
          field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by
            by_contra h0
            have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
            contradiction
          )]
        nlinarith
      have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h8 : - ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg (show y - x < 0 by linarith)]
        rw [h13]
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      have h9 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h13 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg (show y - x < 0 by linarith)]
        rw [h13]
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith
      · linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [hF, hF]
    ring
  rw [h1]
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h2 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h3 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have h4 := (hH x y h2).left
    have h5 := (hH x y h2).right
    by_cases h6 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h4]
      have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h5]
      have h9 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h7]
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h10
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h8]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h13 : - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h15 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        have h16 : (m * (y - x) - k * (y - x)) = (m - k) * (y - x) := by ring
        have h17 : (m - k) * (y - x) = - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h16 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        have h17 : (M * (y - x) - k * (y - x)) = (M - k) * (y - x) := by ring
        have h18 : (M - k) * (y - x) = (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : (y - x) > 0 := by linarith
        have h17 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h16
        have h18 : - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by linarith [h13]
        have h19 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by linarith [h14]
        have h20 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h17]
        all_goals nlinarith
      linarith
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h6' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith [h, h6]
        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h4]
      have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h5]
      have h9 : m * (y - x) ≥ f y - f x := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h7]
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h10
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h8]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h13 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h15 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        have h16 : (m * (y - x) - k * (y - x)) = (m - k) * (y - x) := by ring
        have h17 : (m - k) * (y - x) = - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h16 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        have h17 : (M * (y - x) - k * (y - x)) = (M - k) * (y - x) := by ring
        have h18 : (M - k) * (y - x) = (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : y - x < 0 := by linarith
        have h17 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg h16
        have h18 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by linarith [h13]
        have h19 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by linarith [h14
        ]
        have h20 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
          have h21 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by linarith
          have h22 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by linarith
          have h23 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
            apply abs_le.mpr
            constructor
            · nlinarith
            · nlinarith
          linarith
        rw [h17]
        all_goals nlinarith
      linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- if x = y
    rw [show y = x by linarith]
    simp
  · -- if x ≠ y
    have h4 : x - y ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have h5 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have hH1 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by
      have h6 : x ≠ y := by
        intro h_eq
        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h8 := (hH x y h6).left
      linarith
    have hH2 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      have h6 : x ≠ y := by
        intro h_eq
        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h9 := (hH x y h6).right
      linarith
    by_cases h_pos : y - x > 0
    · -- Case where y - x > 0
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [hH1]
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : y - x > 0 := h_pos
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h10
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [hH2]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : y - x > 0 := h_pos
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h8 : (F y - F x) ≥ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        nlinarith [h9]
      have h9 : (F y - F x) ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        nlinarith [h10]
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have hm1 : m - k = (m - M) / 2 := by
        linarith [hk1]
      have hm2 : M - k = (M - m) / 2 := by
        linarith [hk1]
      have h10 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (F y - F x) := by
        nlinarith [h8, hm1, hm2, h_pos]
      have h11 : (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith [h9, hm1, hm2, h_pos]
      have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h13 : y - x > 0 := h_pos
        have h14 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h13
        have h15 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (F y - F x) ∧ (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := ⟨h10, h11⟩
        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            nlinarith
        rw [h14] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h12
    · -- Case where y - x ≤ 0
      have h_neg : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have h9 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        exfalso
        have h11 : y - x = 0 := h9
        have h12 : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [hH1]
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : y - x < 0 := h_neg
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h10
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [hH2]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : y - x < 0 := h_neg
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h11
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h8 : (F y - F x) ≥ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        nlinarith [h10]
      have h9 : (F y - F x) ≤ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        nlinarith [h9]
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have hm1 : M - k = (M - m) / 2 := by
        linarith [hk1]
      have hm2 : m - k = (m - M) / 2 := by
        linarith [hk1]
      have h10 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (F y - F x) := by
        nlinarith [h8, hm1, hm2, h_neg]
      have h11 : (F y - F x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith [h9, hm1, hm2, h_neg]
      have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h13 : y - x < 0 := h_neg
        have h14 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg h13
        have h15 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (F y - F x) ∧ (F y - F x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := ⟨h10, h11⟩
        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (-(y - x)) := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            nlinarith
        rw [h14] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h12

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by apply hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by apply hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  rw [h3]
  rw [hk]
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- Case y = x
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case y ≠ x
    have h4 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h5
      have : y = x := by linarith
      tauto
    by_cases h7 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
        apply hH x y
        intro h6
        apply h4
        all_goals
        linarith
      rcases h5 with ⟨hm_le, h_le_M⟩
      have h8 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := hm_le
        have h10 : (y - x) > 0 := h7
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h13 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h13]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h_le_M
        have h11 : (y - x) > 0 := h7
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h14 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h14]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≥ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith
      have h11 : (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith
      have h12 : | (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h13 : ( (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ) ≥ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := h10
        have h14 : ( (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h11
        have h15 : (y - x) > 0 := h7
        have h16 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h15
        have h17 : ( (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          nlinarith
        have h18 : ( (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          linarith
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · -- Show that - ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| ≤ (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x)
          have h19 : |y - x| = y - x := h16
          have h20 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| = - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            rw [h19]
          nlinarith
        · -- Show that (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x|
          have h19 : |y - x| = y - x := h16
          have h20 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            rw [h19]
          nlinarith
      simpa using h12
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h7' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have h8 : y = x := by linarith
        tauto
      have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
        apply hH x y
        intro h6
        apply h4
        all_goals
        linarith
      rcases h5 with ⟨hm_le, h_le_M⟩
      have h8 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := hm_le
        have h10 : (y - x) < 0 := by linarith
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h13 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h13]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h_le_M
        have h11 : (y - x) < 0 := by linarith
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h14 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h14]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≥ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith
      have h11 : (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith
      have h12 : | (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h13 : ( (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ) ≥ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h10
        have h14 : ( (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ) ≤ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := h11
        have h15 : (y - x) < 0 := h7'
        have h16 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg h15
        have h17 : ( (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          nlinarith
        have h18 : ( (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          nlinarith
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · -- Show that - ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| ≤ (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x)
          have h19 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := h16
          have h20 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            rw [h19]
            all_goals
            ring_nf
          nlinarith
        · -- Show that (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x|
          have h19 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := h16
          have h20 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| = - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            rw [h19]
            all_goals
            ring_nf
          nlinarith
      simpa using h12

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · -- If x = y, both sides are zero
    rw [show y = x by linarith]
    simp
  · -- Assume x ≠ y
    have hne : x ≠ y := by
      intro h
      apply hxy
      linarith
    have h1 := (hH x y hne).left
    have h2 := (hH x y hne).right
    have h3 : F y = f y - k * y := by
      specialize hF y
      simpa using hF
    have h4 : F x = f x - k * x := by
      specialize hF x
      simpa using hF
    have h5 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      rw [h3, h4]
      ring
    have h6 : |F y - F x| = |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| := by
      rw [h5]
    have h7 : (f y - f x) = ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) ) * (y - x) := by
      have h8 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        apply hne
        linarith
      field_simp [h8]
    have h8 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) = ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) * (y - x) := by
      calc
        (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) = ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) ) * (y - x) - k * (y - x) := by
          rw [h7]
        _ = ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) * (y - x) := by
          ring
    rw [h6, h8]
    have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h9 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) ≤ ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) := by
      have hk1' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
      have h10 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h1]
      rw [hk1']
      nlinarith
    have h10 : ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) := by
      have hk1' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
      have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h2]
      rw [hk1']
      nlinarith
    have h12 : | ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) := by
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h9]
      · linarith [h10]
    have h13 : | ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * | y - x | := by
      have h14 : | ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) * (y - x) | = | ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) | * | (y - x) | := by
        rw [abs_mul]
      rw [h14]
      have h15 : | ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) := h12
      have h16 : | (y - x) | ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (y - x)
      nlinarith
    simpa using h13

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    have h2 : F y = f y - k * y := by
      specialize hF y
      simpa using hF
    have h3 : F x = f x - k * x := by
      specialize hF x
      simpa using hF
    calc
      F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [h2, h3]
      _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
  rw [h1]
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- Case y = x
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case y ≠ x
    have h2 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h3
      apply h
      linarith
    have h3 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      exact h2
    have h4 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
      have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h3.1
      by_cases h7 : y - x > 0
      · -- Case y - x > 0
        have h8 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
          have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h10 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
            have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h9
            have h12 : y - x > 0 := h7
            have h13 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
              field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
            rw [h13]
            nlinarith
          linarith
        linarith
      · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
        have h7' : y - x < 0 := by
          by_contra h8
          push_neg at h8
          have : y - x = 0 := by
            linarith [h8, show y - x ≤ 0 by linarith, show y - x ≥ 0 by linarith [h8]]
          tauto
        have h8 : m * (y - x) ≥ f y - f x := by
          have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h10 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h9
            have h12 : y - x < 0 := h7'
            have h13 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
              field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
            rw [h13]
            nlinarith
          linarith
        nlinarith
    have h5 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
      have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h3.2
      by_cases h7' : y - x > 0
      · -- Case y - x > 0
        have h8 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
            have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h9
            have h12 : y - x > 0 := h7'
            have h13 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
              field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
            rw [h13]
            nlinarith
          linarith
        linarith
      · --  y - x ≤ 0
        have h7' : y - x < 0 := by
          by_contra h8
          push_neg at h8
          have : y - x = 0 := by
            linarith [h8, show y - x ≤ 0 by linarith, show y - x ≥ 0 by linarith [h8]]
          tauto
        have h8 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h10 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h9
            have h12 : y - x < 0 := h7'
            have h13 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
              field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
            rw [h13]
            nlinarith
          linarith
        nlinarith
    by_cases h7 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h8 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h7
      have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h11 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith [hk2, h4, h5, h7]
      have h12 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith [hk2, h4, h5, h7]
      have h13 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      rw [h8] at *
      nlinarith
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h7' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h8
        push_neg at h8
        have : y - x = 0 := by
          linarith [h8, show y - x ≤ 0 by linarith, show y - x ≥ 0 by linarith [h8]]
        tauto
      have h8 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := abs_of_neg h7'
      have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h11 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
        nlinarith [hk2, h4, h5, h7']
      have h12 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
        nlinarith [hk2, h4, h5, h7']
      have h13 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      rw [h8] at *
      nlinarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have h1 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h2
      apply h
      linarith
    have h2 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h3
      have h4 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have h3 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      exact h1
    have h4 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      have h5 : F y = f y - k * y := by
        specialize hF y
        simpa using hF
      have h6 : F x = f x - k * x := by
        specialize hF x
        simpa using hF
      calc
        F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [h5, h6]
        _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
    have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h3.1
