    have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h3.2
    by_cases h9 : y - x > 0
    · -- y - x > 0
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h7]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h8]
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h12
          linarith
        linarith
      have h12 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        have h13 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h4
        rw [h13, hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h13 : F y - F x ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h4
        rw [h14, hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h15 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h9]
        have h16 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x ∧ F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          constructor
          · linarith [h13]
          · linarith [h12]
        have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> nlinarith
        rw [show |y - x| = y - x by linarith [h15]]
        all_goals linarith
      exact h14
    · -- y - x ≤ 0
      have h10 : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have h11 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        tauto
      have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h7]
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h12
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h8]
        have h14 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h13
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h13 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h14 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h10]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h4
        rw [h14]
        rw [h15, hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : F y - F x ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h15 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h10]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk
        ]
        have h16 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h4
        rw [h15]
        rw [h16, hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> nlinarith
      exact h15

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [hxy]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h1 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h
      apply hxy
      linarith
    have h2 := hH x y h1
    have h3 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h2.1
    have h4 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h2.2
    by_cases h5 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h6 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h3
        have h8 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h7
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h4
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have hFy : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
      have hFx : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
      have h8 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        rw [hFy, hFx]
        ring
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h9 : - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (F y - F x) := by
        rw [h8]
        have h10 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := h6
        have h11 : k * (y - x) = (m + M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h10 : (F y - F x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        rw [h8]
        have h11 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := h7
        have h12 : k * (y - x) = (m + M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h13 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h5
      have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        rw [h13]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor <;> linarith
      exact h16
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      by_cases h5' : y - x = 0
      · -- Case y - x = 0
        have h7 : y = x := by linarith
        have h8 : F y - F x = 0 := by
          have h9 : y = x := h7
          have h10 : F y = F x := by
            rw [show y = x by linarith]
          linarith
        rw [h8]
        simp [h5']
      · -- Case y - x < 0
        have h6 : y - x < 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have h7 : y - x = 0 := by linarith [h5', h]
          tauto
        have h7 : M * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
          have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h4
          have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h8
            linarith
          linarith
        have h8 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h3]
          have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h7
            linarith
          linarith
        have hFy : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
        have hFx : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
        have h8' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
          rw [hFy, hFx]
          ring
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h13 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h6]
        have h9 : (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          rw [h8']
          have h10 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := h8
          have h11 : M * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := h7
          have h12 : k * (y - x) = (m + M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
            rw [hk1]
          have h13' : |y - x| = -(y - x) := h13
          nlinarith
        have h10 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| ≤ (F y - F x) := by
          rw [h8']
          have h11 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := h7
          have h12 : k * (y - x) = (m + M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
            rw [hk1]
          have h13' : |y - x| = -(y - x) := h13
          nlinarith
        have h11 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| ≤ (F y - F x) ∧ (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := ⟨h10, h9⟩
        have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor <;> linarith
        exact h12

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h_ne : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 := (hH x y h_ne).1
    have h2 := (hH x y h_ne).2
    have h3 : y - x > 0 ∨ y - x < 0 := by
      by_contra h4
      push_neg at h4
      have h41 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      have h42 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    rcases h3 with h4 | h5
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h6 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h1]
        have h8 : y - x > 0 := h4
        have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h10 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h9
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h2]
        have h9 : y - x > 0 := h4
        have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have hF1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
        have h12 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
        calc
          F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [h11, h12]
          _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
      rw [hF1]
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h13 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |((f y - f x) - k * (y - x))| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : y - x > 0 := h4
        have h17 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h16
        have h18 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h13
        have h19 : (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h14
        have h23 : |((f y - f x) - k * (y - x))| ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        have h24 : (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| = (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [h17]
        nlinarith
      linarith
    · -- Case y - x < 0
      have h6 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h1]
        have h8 : y - x < 0 := h5
        have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h10 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h9
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h7 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h2]
        have h9 : y - x < 0 := h5
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
        have h11 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h10
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hF1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
        have h12 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
        calc
          F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [h11, h12]
          _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
      rw [hF1]
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h13 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |((f y - f x) - k * (y - x))| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : y - x < 0 := h5
        have h17 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg h16
        have h18 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := h14
        have h19 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h13
        have h23 : |((f y - f x) - k * (y - x))| ≤ (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · -- Show that $-(M - m)/2 \cdot |y - x| \leq (f y - f x) - k \cdot (y - x)$
            have h21 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h13
            have h20 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≥ - ((M - m) / 2 * |y - x|) := by
              rw [h17]
              have h21 : (M - m) / 2 ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
              have h22 : y - x < 0 := h16
              nlinarith
            nlinarith
          · -- Show that $(f y - f x) - k \cdot (y - x) \leq (M - m)/2 \cdot |y - x|$
            have h141 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := h14
            have h171 : (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| := by
              rw [h17]
              have h21 : (M - m) / 2 ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
              have h22 : y - x < 0 := h16
              nlinarith
            nlinarith
        linarith
      linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    specialize hF y
    simpa using hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    specialize hF x
    simpa using hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h4 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      exact hxy
    have h5 : (y - x) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    by_cases h6 : (y - x) > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h7 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h4.left]
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h10 : (y - x) > 0 := h6
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h4.right]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (y - x) > 0 := h6
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h14 : F y - F x ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h15]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h16 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h16]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · linarith [h14]
        · linarith [h15]
      have h18 : |y - x| = y - x := by
        rw [abs_of_pos h6]
      rw [h18] at *
      all_goals nlinarith
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h6' : (y - x) < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : (y - x) = 0 := by linarith [h, show (y - x) ≤ 0 by linarith]
        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h7 : m * (y - x) ≥ f y - f x := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h4.left]
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h10 : (y - x) < 0 := h6'
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h8
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h4.right]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (y - x) < 0 := h6'
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h11
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h14 : F y - F x ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h15]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h16 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h16]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h18 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h6']
        have h17' : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| ≤ F y - F x ∧ F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          constructor
          · -- Show - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| ≤ F y - F x
            have h19 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith [h14]
            have h20 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
              rw [h18]
              all_goals nlinarith
            nlinarith
          · -- Show F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x|
            have h19 : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by linarith [h15]
            have h20 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| = - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
              rw [h18]
              all_goals nlinarith
            nlinarith
        apply abs_le.mpr
        exact h17'
      all_goals linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    specialize hF y
    simpa using hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    specialize hF x
    simpa using hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  rw [h3]
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h'
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 := hH x y h4
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h5.1
    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h5.2
    by_cases h8 : y - x > 0
    · -- y - x > 0
      have h9 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h6]
        have h11 : y - x > 0 := h8
        have h12 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h10
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h7]
        have h12 : y - x > 0 := h8
        have h13 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h11 : - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith [h9]
      have h12 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith [h10]
      have h13 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h14 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h8]
        have h17 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h14]
        all_goals nlinarith
      linarith
    · -- y - x ≤ 0
      by_cases h9 : y - x = 0
      · -- y - x = 0
        have h11 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) = 0 := by
          have h12 : y - x = 0 := h9
          have h13 : y = x := by linarith
          simp [h13]
        rw [h11]
        have h14 : |(0 : ℝ)| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          have h15 : y - x = 0 := h9
          simp [h15]
        linarith
      · -- y - x < 0
        have h11 : y - x < 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have : y - x = 0 := by linarith [h9, h]
          tauto
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
          have h5' := hH x y h4
          linarith [h5'.2]
        have h13 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by
          have h5' := hH x y h4
          linarith [h5'.1]
        have h14 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h15 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h13]
          have h16 : y - x < 0 := h11
          have h17 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h15
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have h15 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h16 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h12]
          have h17 : y - x < 0 := h11
          have h18 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h16
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have h16 : - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≥ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
          have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith [h14]
        have h17 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
          have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith [h15]
        have h13 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          have h14 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h11]
          have h17 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
            apply abs_le.mpr
            constructor
            · nlinarith
            · nlinarith
          rw [h14]
          all_goals nlinarith
        linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h_ne : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      exfalso
      tauto
    have h1 := hH x y h_ne
    have h3 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (h1.1)
    have h4 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h1.2)
    have h2 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      have h3 : F y = f y - k * y := by
        specialize hF y
        simpa using hF
      have h4 : F x = f x - k * x := by
        specialize hF x
        simpa using hF
      calc
        F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [h3, h4]
        _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
    have h5 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ (m - M) / 2 := by
      have h6 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
        have h7 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h2
        have h8 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
          intro h9
          apply h_ne
          linarith
        field_simp [h8] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      rw [h6]
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h3]
      have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≥ (m - M) / 2 := by
        rw [hk1]
        linarith
      linarith
    have h6 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h6 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
        have h7 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h2
        have h8 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
          intro h9
          apply h_ne
          linarith
        field_simp [h8] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      rw [h6]
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h4]
      have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
        rw [hk1]
        linarith
      linarith
    by_cases h8 : y - x ≥ 0
    · -- Case y - x ≥ 0
      have h9 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_nonneg h8
      have h10 : -(M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h11 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ (m - M) / 2 := h5
        have h12 : y - x > 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have h13 : y - x = 0 := by
            linarith [show y - x ≥ 0 by linarith, h]
          have h14 : x = y := by
            linarith
          tauto
        have h13 : (F y - F x) ≥ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ (m - M) / 2 := h11
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h14
          linarith
        nlinarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h6
        have h13 : y - x > 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have h14 : y - x = 0 := by
            linarith [show y - x ≥ 0 by linarith, h]
          have h15 : x = y := by
            linarith
          tauto
        have h14 : (F y - F x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          have h15 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h12
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h15
          linarith
        linarith
      have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h18 : -( (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| ) ≤ F y - F x := by
          have h19 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_nonneg h8
          have h20 : -( (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| ) = - ( (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ) := by
            rw [show |y - x| = y - x by linarith [h19]]
          nlinarith [h10]
        have h19 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| ) := by
          have h19 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_nonneg h8
          have h20 : ( (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| ) = ( (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ) := by
            rw [show |y - x| = y - x by linarith [h19]]
          nlinarith [h11]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · linarith
        · linarith
      exact h12
    · -- Case y - x < 0
      have h8' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x ≥ 0 := by linarith
        linarith
      have h9 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg h8'
      have h10 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h11 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h6
        have h12 : y - x < 0 := h8'
        have h13 : (F y - F x) ≥ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h11
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h14
          linarith
        linarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ) := by
        have h12 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ (m - M) / 2 := h5
        have h13 : y - x < 0 := h8'
        have h14 : (F y - F x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ) := by
          have h15 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ (m - M) / 2 := h12
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h15
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h18 : -( (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| ) ≤ F y - F x := by
          have h19 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by linarith [h9]
          have h20 : -( (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| ) = ( (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ) := by
            rw [show |y - x| = - (y - x) by linarith [h19]]
            all_goals nlinarith
          nlinarith [h10]
        have h19 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| ) := by
          have h19 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by linarith [h9]
          have h20 : ( (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| ) = - ( (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ) := by
            rw [show |y - x| = - (y - x) by linarith [h19]]
            all_goals nlinarith
          nlinarith [h11]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · linarith
        · linarith
      exact h12

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h_ne : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 := hH x y h_ne
    have h2 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h1.1
    have h3 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h1.2
    have h4 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
    have h5 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
    have h6 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      rw [h4, h5]
      ring
    by_cases h_pos : y - x > 0
    · -- If y - x > 0, then multiplying by (y - x) preserves the inequality
      have h7 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h2
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h3
        have h16 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h15
          linarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h12 : (F y - F x) ≥ ( (m - M) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h6
        rw [h8]
        have h10 : (m - k : ℝ) = (m - M) / 2 := by
          rw [hk1]
          linarith
        nlinarith
      have h13 : (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h6
        rw [h9]
        have h11 : (M - k : ℝ) = (M - m) / 2 := by
          rw [hk1]
          linarith
        nlinarith
      have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h18 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos (show y - x > 0 by linarith)]
        rw [h18]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      linarith
    · -- If y - x ≤ 0
      have h_neg : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h7 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h2
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h8
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h14 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h3
        have h16 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h15
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h10 : (F y - F x) ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h6
        rw [h9]
        have h10' : (M - k : ℝ) = (M - m) / 2 := by
          rw [hk1]
          linarith
        nlinarith
      have h11 : (F y - F x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h6
        rw [h9]
        have h11' : (m - k : ℝ) = (m - M) / 2 := by
          rw [hk1]
          linarith
        nlinarith
      have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h18 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg (show y - x < 0 by linarith)]
        rw [h18]
        cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
          all_goals nlinarith
      linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h'
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 := hH x y h4
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (h5.1)
    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h5.2)
    have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h8 : y - x > 0 ∨ y - x < 0 := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have h9 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      have h10 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    cases h8 with
    | inl h8_pos =>
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6
        have h11 : y - x > 0 := h8_pos
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h14 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h14]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h7
        have h12 : y - x > 0 := h8_pos
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h15 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h15]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h12 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h12]
        have h13 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
        have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := h10
        have h15 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := h9
        have h16 : y - x > 0 := h8_pos
        have h17 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos (show y - x > 0 by linarith)
        rw [h17]
        have h18 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
          rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk2]]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h12 : F y - F x ≥ - ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h12 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h12]
        have h13 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
        have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := h10
        have h15 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := h9
        have h16 : y - x > 0 := h8_pos
        have h17 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos (show y - x > 0 by linarith)
        rw [h17]
        have h19 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
          rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk2]]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h12]
      · linarith [h11]
    | inr h8_neg =>
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h7
        have h12 : y - x < 0 := h8_neg
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h15 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h15]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6
        have h12 : y - x < 0 := h8_neg
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h15 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h15]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h12 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h12]
        have h13 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
        have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := h10
        have h15 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := h9
        have h16 : y - x < 0 := h8_neg
        have h17 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg (show y - x < 0 by linarith)
        rw [h17]
        have h18 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (-(y - x)) := by
          rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk2]]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h12 : F y - F x ≥ - ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h12 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h12]
        have h13 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk2
        have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := h10
        have h15 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := h9
        have h16 : y - x < 0 := h8_neg
        have h17 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg (show y - x < 0 by linarith)
        rw [h17]
        have h19 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ((M - m) / 2) * (-(y - x)) := by
          rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk2]]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h12]
      · linarith [h11]

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h'
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 := (hH x y hxy).left
    have h2 := (hH x y hxy).right
    have h3 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h4
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    by_cases h4 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h5 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h1]
        have h7 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h8 : (y - x) > 0 := h4
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h6
          linarith
        linarith
      have h8 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h2]
        have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (y - x) > 0 := h4
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h9
          linarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h9 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h11 : | (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * | y - x | := by
        have h12 : | (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        have h13 : | y - x | = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h4]
        rw [h13] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        have hF1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
        have hF2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
        calc
          F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [hF1, hF2]
          _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
      rw [h14]
      linarith [h11]
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h4' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h5 : M * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h2]
        have h7 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h8 : (y - x) < 0 := h4'
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h6
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h6 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h1]
        have h8 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h9 : (y - x) < 0 := h4'
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h7
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h9 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h11 : | (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * | y - x | := by
        have h13 : | y - x | = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h4']
        have h14 : | (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) | ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        have h15 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * | y - x | := by
          rw [h13]
          all_goals nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        have hF1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
        have hF2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
        calc
          F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [hF1, hF2]
          _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
      rw [h14]
      linarith [h11]

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    specialize hF y
    simpa using hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    specialize hF x
    simpa using hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by 
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [show y = x by linarith]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      exfalso
      tauto
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y h4
    have h6 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h7
      have h8 : y = x := by linarith
      have h9 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have h7 : (y - x) > 0 ∨ (y - x) < 0 := by
      by_contra h8
      push_neg at h8
      have h8' : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      tauto
    rcases h7 with h7 | h7
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h8 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (h5.1)
        have h10 : (y - x) > 0 := h7
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h13 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h13]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h5.2)
        have h11 : (y - x) > 0 := h7
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h14 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h14]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : F y - F x ≥ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h11]
        nlinarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h12]
        nlinarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h12 : - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h13 : F y - F x ≥ (m - k) * (y - x) := h10
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]] at h13
        nlinarith
      have h13 : F y - F x ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : F y - F x ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := h11
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]] at h14
        nlinarith
      have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h15 : - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h12
        have h16 : F y - F x ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := h13
        have h17 : (y - x) > 0 := h7
        have h18 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h17
        rw [h18]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      exact h14
    · -- Case y - x < 0
      have h8 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (h5.1)
        have h10 : (y - x) < 0 := h7
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h13 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h13]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h5.2)
        have h11 : (y - x) < 0 := h7
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h14 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h14]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : F y - F x ≤ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h11]
        nlinarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≥ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h12]
        nlinarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h12 : ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h13 : F y - F x ≥ (M - k) * (y - x) := h11
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]] at h13
        nlinarith
      have h13 : F y - F x ≤ - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : F y - F x ≤ (m - k) * (y - x) := h10
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]] at h14
        nlinarith
      have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h15 : ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h12
        have h16 : F y - F x ≤ - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := h13
        have h17 : (y - x) < 0 := h7
        have h18 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg h17
        rw [h18]
        cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
          nlinarith
      exact h14

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    apply hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    apply hF
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- If y = x, both sides are zero
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Assume y ≠ x
    have h4 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h5
      have : y = x := by linarith
      tauto
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      have h6 : x ≠ y := by
        by_contra h7
        have : y - x = 0 := by
          linarith [h7]
        tauto
      apply hH x y
      exact h6
    have h7 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      rw [h1, h2]
      ring
    have h8 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h9 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
        have h7' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h7
        field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption)]
        all_goals linarith
      rw [h9]
      have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
        linarith [h5.right]
      have h11 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
        nlinarith [h10, h11]
      linarith
    have h13 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (F y - F x) / (y - x) := by
      have h14 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
        have h7' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h7
        field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption)]
        all_goals linarith
      rw [h14]
      have h15 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by
        linarith [h5.left]
      have h11 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h16 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≥ - (M - m) / 2 := by
        nlinarith [h15, h11]
      linarith
    have h14 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (F y - F x) / (y - x) ∧ (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      constructor
      · linarith [h13]
      · linarith [h8]
    have h15 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h16 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (F y - F x) / (y - x) ∧ (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h14
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h16.left]
      · linarith [h16.right]
    have h17 : |F y - F x| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := by
      have h18 : y - x ≠ 0 := h4
      have h19 : (F y - F x) = (F y - F x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
        field_simp [h18]
      rw [h19]
      have h20 : |((F y - F x) / (y - x) * (y - x))| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := by
        rw [abs_mul]
      rw [h20]
    calc
      |F y - F x| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := h17
      _ ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h18 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h15
        nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y - x), abs_nonneg ( (F y - F x) / (y - x) ) ]

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h'
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 := (hH x y hxy).1
    have h2 := (hH x y hxy).2
    have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      have eq1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
      have eq2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
      calc
        F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [eq1, eq2]
        _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
    have h4 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h5
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    by_cases h7 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h7' : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7'' : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7''' : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have eq1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [eq1]
        rw [hk]
        nlinarith
      have h7'''' : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have eq1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [eq1]
        rw [hk]
        nlinarith
      have h7''''' : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        have h13 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h7]
        rw [h13] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h7'''''
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h7' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have h10 : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h7'' : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7''' : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7'''' : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have eq1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [eq1]
        rw [hk]
        nlinarith
      have h7''''' : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have eq1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [eq1]
        rw [hk]
        nlinarith
      have h7'''''' : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
          have h10 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h7'''''
          have h11 : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h7''''
          have h13 : - ( ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) ) ≤ F y - F x := by
            nlinarith
          have h14 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
            nlinarith
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        have h13 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h7']
        rw [h13] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h7''''''

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)

    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →

    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y

    apply hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    apply hF

    rw [h1, h2]
    ring

    rw [show y = x by linarith]

      intro h'

    have h5 := hH x y h4

    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h5.2
    by_cases h8 : y - x > 0
    · -- y - x > 0
      have h9 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h6]
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (y - x) > 0 := h8
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h10
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h7]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (y - x) > 0 := h8
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h13 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h14]
        have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk2]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (F y - F x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h15]
        have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk2]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith [h14]
        have h17 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by linarith [h13]
        have h18 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h8]
        rw [h18]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      linarith
    · -- y - x ≤ 0
      have h8' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h9 : m * (y - x) ≥ f y - f x := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h6]
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (y - x) < 0 := h8'
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h10
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h7]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (y - x) < 0 := h8'
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h11
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h13 : F y - F x ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h14]
        have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk2]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (F y - F x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h15]

      have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by

        have h17 : (F y - F x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by linarith [h14]
        have h18 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := by

        have h19 : (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (-(y - x)) := by

        have h20 : - (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (-(y - x)) := by
          nlinarith
        apply abs_le.mpr

        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    apply hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    apply hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- If x = y, both sides are zero
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Assume x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h4 := hH x y hxy
    rcases h4 with ⟨h4l, h4r⟩
    have h6 : y - x > 0 ∨ y - x < 0 := by
      by_contra h7
      push_neg at h7
      have h8 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      have h9 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    rcases h6 with h6 | h6
    · -- Case where y - x > 0
      have h7 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h4l]
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h10 : y - x > 0 := h6
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h4r]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : y - x > 0 := h6
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h14 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h15]
        have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk2]
        nlinarith
      have h16 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h15]
        have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk2]
        nlinarith
      have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h20 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h6]
        rw [h20]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      exact h17
    · -- Case where y - x < 0
      have h7 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h4l]
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h10 : y - x < 0 := by linarith
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h8
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h4r]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : y - x < 0 := by linarith
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h11
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h14 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h15]
        have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk2]
        nlinarith
      have h16 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h15]
        have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk2]
        nlinarith
      have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h20 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h6]
        rw [h20]
        cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
          all_goals nlinarith
      exact h17

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro heq
      apply h
      all_goals linarith
    have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
      apply hF
    have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
      apply hF
    have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      rw [h1, h2]
      ring
    have h4 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      exact hxy
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h4.1
    have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h4.2
    have h8 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro heq
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have h9 : (F y - F x) = (y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) := by
      rw [h3]
      field_simp [h8]
      all_goals ring
    have h15 : |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
        nlinarith [hk, h6]
      have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≥ -( (M - m) / 2 ) := by
        nlinarith [hk, h5]
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · -- Show that - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k
        nlinarith
      · -- Show that (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≤ (M - m) / 2
        nlinarith
    have h16 : |F y - F x| = |y - x| * |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| := by
      have h17 : (F y - F x) = (y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) := h9
      calc
        |F y - F x| = |(y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k)| := by rw [show F y - F x = (y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) by linarith [h17]]
        _ = |y - x| * |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| := by
          rw [abs_mul]
    rw [h16]
    have h17 : |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h15
    have h18 : |y - x| ≥ 0 := by positivity
    have h19 : |y - x| * |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| ≤ |y - x| * ((M - m) / 2) := by
      apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
      linarith [h17]
      all_goals positivity
    have h20 : |y - x| * ((M - m) / 2) = ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by ring
    nlinarith [h19, h20]

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hne : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 := hH x y hne
    have h2 : y - x > 0 ∨ y - x < 0 := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have h_eq : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      have h_eq2 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    rcases h2 with h2 | h2
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h3 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h4 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h1.1
        have h5 : y - x > 0 := h2
        have h6 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h8 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h8]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h7 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h1.2
        have h9 : y - x > 0 := h2
        have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h12 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h12]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hFy : F y = f y - k * y := by
        specialize hF y
        linarith
      have hFx : F x = f x - k * x := by
        specialize hF x
        linarith
      have h8 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        calc
          F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [hFy, hFx]
          _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
      rw [h8]
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h14 : | (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h9 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          have hm1 : m ≤ M := hmM
          have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
          have h10 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := h3
          have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := h7
          have h12 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk1]]
            nlinarith [h10, h11, show m ≤ M by linarith, show (y - x) > 0 by linarith]
          linarith
        have h10 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          have hm1 : m ≤ M := hmM
          have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
          have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := h3
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := h7
          have h13 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk1]]
            nlinarith [h11, h12, show m ≤ M by linarith, show (y - x) > 0 by linarith]
          linarith
        have h15 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h2]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith [h9, h15]
        · nlinarith [h10, h15]
      linarith
    · -- Case y - x < 0
      have h3 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h4 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h1.1
        have h5 : y - x < 0 := h2
        have h6 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h8 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h8]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h7 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h1.2
        have h9 : y - x < 0 := h2
        have h10 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h12 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h12]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hFy : F y = f y - k * y := by
        specialize hF y
        linarith
      have hFx : F x = f x - k * x := by
        specialize hF x
        linarith
      have h8 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        calc
          F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [hFy, hFx]
          _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
      rw [h8]
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h14 : | (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h9 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          have hm1 : m ≤ M := hmM
          have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
          have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := h3
          have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := h7
          have h12 : (y - x) < 0 := h2
          have h13 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h12]
          have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
            rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk1], h13]
            nlinarith [h10, h11, show m ≤ M by linarith, show (y - x) < 0 by linarith]
          linarith
        have h10 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          have hm1 : m ≤ M := hmM
          have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
          have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := h3
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := h7
          have h13 : (y - x) < 0 := h2
          have h14 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h13]
          have h15 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
            rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk1], h14]
            nlinarith [h11, h12, show m ≤ M by linarith, show (y - x) < 0 by linarith]
          linarith
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith [h9]
        · nlinarith [h10]

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →

    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    apply hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    apply hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have h_eq2 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      exact h4
    have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6.1
    have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h6.2
    by_cases h9 : y - x > 0
    · -- case where y - x > 0
      have h10 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h7]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (y - x) > 0 := h9
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h11 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h8]
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (y - x) > 0 := h9
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h12
          linarith
        linarith
      have h14 : |y - x| = y - x := by
        rw [abs_of_pos h9]
      have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
      rw [h15]
      have h16 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk]
        nlinarith
      have h17 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk]
        nlinarith
      have h18 : | (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h19 : | (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        have h20 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          rw [h14]
        linarith
      linarith
    · -- case where y - x ≤ 0
      have h9' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have h_eq : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have h_eq2 : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h10 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h8]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (y - x) < 0 := h9'
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h11
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h11 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h7]
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (y - x) < 0 := h9'
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h12
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h14 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
        rw [abs_of_neg h9']
      have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
      rw [h15]
      have h16 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk]

      have h17 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by

        have h19 : | (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * - (y - x) := by

        have h20 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * - (y - x) = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          rw [h14]
        linarith
