theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  rw [h3]
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- Case y = x
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case y ≠ x
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y (by
      tauto
    )
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h5.1
    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h5.2
    have h8 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h14 : |( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k )| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h12 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h6]
        have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≥ (m - M) / 2 := by
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        have h15 : (m - M : ℝ) / 2 = - (M - m) / 2 := by ring
        linarith [h14, h15]
      have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h7]
        have h15 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        linarith [h15]
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h12]
      · linarith [h13]
    have h15 : |((f y - f x) - k * (y - x))| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
      have h17 : ( (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ) = ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) * (y - x) := by
        field_simp [show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption]
        all_goals ring
      rw [h17]
      have h16 : |((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) * (y - x)| = |( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k )| * |y - x| := by
        rw [abs_mul]
      rw [h16]
      have h17 : |( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k )| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h14
      have h18 : |y - x| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (y - x)
      nlinarith
    simpa using h15

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro heq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 := hH x y hxy
    have h2 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h1.1
    have h3 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h1.2
    have h4 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      have hFy : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
      have hFx : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
      calc
        F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [hFy, hFx]
        _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
    have h5 : y - x > 0 ∨ y - x < 0 := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have h6 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      have h7 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    cases h5 with
    | inl h6_pos =>
      have h7 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h2]
        have h9 : y - x > 0 := h6_pos
        have h10 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h8
          have h12 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h12]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h8 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h3]
        have h10 : y - x > 0 := h6_pos
        have h11 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h9
          have h13 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h13]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h10 : F y - F x ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : F y - F x ≥ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
          nlinarith [h4, h7]
        have hk1' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
        rw [hk1'] at h11
        nlinarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : F y - F x ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
          nlinarith [h4, h8]
        have hk1' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
        rw [hk1'] at h12
        nlinarith
      have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h13 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith [h10]
        have h14 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by linarith [h11]
        have h15 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h6_pos]
        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            apply abs_le.mpr
            constructor
            · nlinarith
            · nlinarith
          rw [h15] at *
          all_goals nlinarith
        linarith
      linarith
    | inr h6_neg2 =>
      have h6_neg2 : y - x < 0 := by linarith
      have h7 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h2]
        have h9 : y - x < 0 := h6_neg2
        have h10 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h8
          have h12 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h12]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h8 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h3]
        have h10 : y - x < 0 := h6_neg2
        have h11 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h9
          have h13 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h13]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h10 : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
          nlinarith [h4, h7]
        have hk1' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
        rw [hk1'] at h11
        nlinarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : F y - F x ≥ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
          nlinarith [h4, h8]
        have hk1' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
        rw [hk1'] at h12
        nlinarith
      have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h13 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith [h11]
        have h14 : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by linarith [h10]
        have h15 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h6_neg2]
        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          have h17 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h13
          have h18 : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h14
          have h19 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (- (y - x)) := by
            have h20 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (- (y - x)) := by ring
            have h21 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h17
            have h22 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (- (y - x)) := by
              nlinarith
            apply abs_le.mpr
            constructor
            · nlinarith
            · nlinarith
          have h20 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := h15
          rw [h20]
          all_goals nlinarith
        linarith
      linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    apply hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    apply hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      exact h4
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h5.1
    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h5.2
    have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h8 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h9 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
        have h10 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        have h11 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
          intro h_eq
          apply h4
          linarith
        field_simp [h11]
        all_goals nlinarith
      rw [h9]
      have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
      have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h7
      rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk2]]
      nlinarith
    have h15 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ - (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h9 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
        have h10 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        have h11 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
          intro h_eq
          apply h4
          linarith
        field_simp [h11]
        all_goals nlinarith
      rw [h9]
      have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
      have h16 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6
      rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk2]]
      nlinarith
    have h18 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (F y - F x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h15]
    have h19 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by linarith [h8]
    have h20 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h18]
      · linarith [h19]
    have h21 : |F y - F x| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := by
      have h22 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h_eq
        apply h4
        linarith
      have h23 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) * (y - x) = F y - F x := by
        field_simp [h22]
      have h24 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x) * (y - x)| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := by
        rw [abs_mul]
      have h25 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x) * (y - x)| = |F y - F x| := by
        rw [show (F y - F x) / (y - x) * (y - x) = F y - F x by linarith [h23]]
      nlinarith
    have h26 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
      have h27 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h20
      have h28 : |F y - F x| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := h21
      nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y - x), abs_nonneg (F y - F x), abs_nonneg ((F y - F x) / (y - x))]
    linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    specialize hF y
    simpa using hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    specialize hF x
    simpa using hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h4 : x - y ≠ 0 := by
      intro h5
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h6
      apply h
      all_goals linarith
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      exact h5
    have h7 : y - x > 0 ∨ y - x < 0 := by
      by_contra h8
      push_neg at h8
      have h9 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      have h10 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    rcases h7 with h7 | h7
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h8 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by
          linarith [h6.1]
        have h10 : (y - x) > 0 := h7
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h9
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h12
          linarith
        linarith
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
          linarith [h6.2]
        have h11 : (y - x) > 0 := h7
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h10
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h13
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h11 : (F y - F x) ≥ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := h8
          have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := h9
          have eq1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
            linarith [h3]
          nlinarith [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        have eq2 : (m - k) = - ((M - m) / 2) := by
          nlinarith [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        nlinarith [eq2]
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (F y - F x) ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := h8
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := h9
          have eq1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
            linarith [h3]
          nlinarith [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        have eq2 : (M - k) = ((M - m) / 2) := by
          nlinarith [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        nlinarith [eq2]
      have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h13 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h7]
        have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith [h10]
          · nlinarith [h11]
        rw [h13] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h12
    · -- Case y - x < 0
      have h8 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by
          linarith [h6.1]
        have h10 : (y - x) < 0 := by linarith
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h9
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h12
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by

        have h11 : (y - x) < 0 := by linarith
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h10
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h13
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h11 : (F y - F x) ≥ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := h9
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := h8
          have eq1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
            linarith [h3]
          nlinarith [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        have eq2 : (M - k) = ((M - m) / 2) := by
          nlinarith [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        nlinarith [eq2]
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (F y - F x) ≤ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := h9
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := h8
          have eq1 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
            linarith [h3]
          nlinarith [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        have eq2 : (m - k) = - ((M - m) / 2) := by
          nlinarith [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
        nlinarith [eq2]
      have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h13 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h7]
        have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          have h15 : - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
          have h16 : ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by nlinarith [h10]
          have h17 : F y - F x ≤ - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by nlinarith [h11]
          have h18 : |F y - F x| ≤ - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
            apply abs_le.mpr
            constructor
            · nlinarith
            · nlinarith
          have h19 : - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) = ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
            have h20 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := h13
            rw [h20]
            all_goals nlinarith
          nlinarith
        exact h14
      exact h12

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)

  intro x y

    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h5.1
    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h5.2
    have h8 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    by_cases h15 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by

        have h14 : (y - x) ≠ 0 := h8
        have h15 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h16 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h17 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10' : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6
        have h14 : (y - x) ≠ 0 := h8
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h15 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h16 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h17 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h17]
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      have h17 : (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h17 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h17]
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      have h18 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h19 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos (show y - x > 0 by linarith)
        have h20 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by nlinarith
        have h21 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h22 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h19] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h18
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h16 : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by
          have h17 : y - x ≤ 0 := by linarith
          have h18 : y - x ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
          tauto
        contradiction
      have h15 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11' : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h7
        have h14 : (y - x) ≠ 0 := h8
        have h15 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h16 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h17 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10' : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6
        have h14 : (y - x) ≠ 0 := h8
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h15 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h17 : F y - F x ≤ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h17 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h17]
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      have h18 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h17 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h17]
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      have h19 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h19 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          have h20 : y - x < 0 := h16
          rw [abs_of_neg h20]
        have h20 : F y - F x ≤ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := by linarith
        have h21 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith
        have h22 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          have h23 : (F y - F x) ≤ 0 := by nlinarith
          have h24 : (F y - F x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by nlinarith
          have h25 : (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by nlinarith
          have h26 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
            apply abs_le.mpr
            constructor
            · nlinarith
            · nlinarith
          have h19' : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
            have h20 : y - x < 0 := h16
            rw [abs_of_neg h20]
          rw [h19']
          all_goals nlinarith
        exact h22
      exact h19

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  rw [h1, h2]
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h3 := hH x y hxy
    have h4 := hH y x (show y ≠ x by
      intro h_eq
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    )
    have h6 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have h7 : (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      ring_nf
    rw [h7]
    have h8 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h3.1
    have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h3.2
    by_cases h10 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h11 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h12 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h8
        have h14 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h15 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h16 : y - x > 0 := h10
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h15
          linarith
        linarith
      have h12 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h9
        have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h15 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h16 : y - x > 0 := h10
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h15
          linarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h13 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
        rw [h14]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
        rw [h14]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h13
        have h17 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h14
        have h18 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · linarith
          · linarith
        have h19 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h10]
        rw [h19] at *
        all_goals linarith
      exact h15
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      by_cases h11 : y - x < 0
      · -- Case y - x < 0
        have h12 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h9
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            have h15 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
            have h16 : y - x < 0 := h11
            apply (div_le_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h15
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have h13 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h8
          have h15 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            have h16 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by linarith
            have h17 : y - x < 0 := h11
            apply (le_div_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h16
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
          rw [h14]
          nlinarith
        have h15 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
          rw [h14]
          nlinarith
        have h16 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          have h20 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h11]
          have h21 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
            nlinarith [h20]
          have h22 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
            nlinarith [h20]
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · linarith
          · linarith
        exact h16
      · -- Case y - x = 0
        exfalso
        have h12 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have h13 : x = y := by linarith
        tauto

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- Case y = x
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case y ≠ x
    have h6 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h7
      have h8 : y = x := by
        linarith
      tauto
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH
      tauto
    have h8 : y - x > 0 ∨ y - x < 0 := by
      by_contra h9
      push_neg at h9
      have h10 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      have h11 : y = x := by linarith
      tauto
    rcases h8 with h8 | h8
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h9 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by
          linarith [h5.1]
        have h11 : y - x > 0 := h8
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h10
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h13
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
          linarith [h5.2]
        have h12 : y - x > 0 := h8
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h11
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h14
          linarith
        linarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := h10
        have h13 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        nlinarith
      have h12 : (m - k) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h13 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := h9
        have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        nlinarith
      have h14 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h15 : (m - k) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith [h12]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h16 : (m - k) * (y - x) = - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : y - x > 0 := h8
        have h17 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h16
        have h18 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h14
        have h19 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := h11
          have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          have h16 : (M - k) * (y - x) = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
            nlinarith
          nlinarith
        have h20 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x ∧ F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := ⟨h18, h19⟩
        have h21 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor <;> linarith
        rw [h17] at *
        nlinarith
      exact h15
    · -- Case y - x < 0
      have h9 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by
          linarith [h5.1]
        have h11 : y - x < 0 := h8
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h10
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h13
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
          linarith [h5.2]
        have h12 : y - x < 0 := h8
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h11
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h14
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := h10
        have h13 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        nlinarith
      have h12 : (m - k) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h13 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := h9
        have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        nlinarith
      have h14 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h15 : (m - k) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith [h12]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h16 : (m - k) * (y - x) = - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : y - x < 0 := h8
        have h17 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := abs_of_neg h16
        have h18 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h14
        have h19 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := h11
          have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          have h16 : (M - k) * (y - x) = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]]
            nlinarith
          nlinarith
        have h20 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x ∧ F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := ⟨h18, h19⟩
        have h21 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            nlinarith
        rw [h17] at *
        nlinarith
      exact h15

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 := (hH x y hxy).1
    have h2 := (hH x y hxy).2
    have h3 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
    have h4 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
    have h5 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      rw [h3, h4]
      ring
    rw [h5]
    rw [hk]
    have h6 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      apply hxy
      linarith
    have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h1]
    have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h2]
    have h9 : (f y - f x) - (m + M) / 2 * (y - x) ≥ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
      by_cases h_pos : y - x > 0
      · -- Case y - x > 0
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h7]
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
            have h15 : (y - x) > 0 := h_pos
            apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h13
            linarith
          linarith
        nlinarith
      · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
        have h_neg : y - x < 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
          contradiction
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h7]
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            have h15 : (y - x) < 0 := h_neg
            apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h13
            nlinarith
          linarith
        nlinarith
    have h10 : (f y - f x) - (m + M) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
      by_cases h_pos : y - x > 0
      · -- Case y - x > 0
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h8]
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
            have h15 : (y - x) > 0 := h_pos
            apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h13
            linarith
          linarith
        nlinarith
      · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
        have h_neg : y - x < 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
          contradiction
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h8]
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            have h15 : (y - x) < 0 := h_neg
            apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h13
            nlinarith
          linarith
        nlinarith
    have h11 : - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - (m + M) / 2 * (y - x) := by linarith [h9]
    have h12 : (f y - f x) - (m + M) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by linarith [h10]
    have h13 : |(f y - f x) - (m + M) / 2 * (y - x)| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
      cases' abs_cases (y - x) with h h <;> 
        cases' abs_cases ((f y - f x) - (m + M) / 2 * (y - x)) with h1 h1 <;> 
          all_goals nlinarith
    simpa using h13

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h4 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y hxy
    by_cases h8 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h9 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h10 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h4.1
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h10
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h4.2
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h15 : - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h13 : (m - k) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
          have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
          nlinarith [h9]
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]] at h13
        nlinarith
      have h17 : F y - F x ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : F y - F x ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
          have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
          nlinarith [h10]
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]] at h14
        nlinarith
      have h18 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h19 : y - x > 0 := h8
        have h20 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h19
        have h21 : - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h15
        have h22 : F y - F x ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h17
        have h23 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h20]
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h18
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h8' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h9 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h4.1
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h10
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : M * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h4.2
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h15 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h13 : (M - k) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
          have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
          nlinarith [h10]
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk]] at h13
        nlinarith
      have h17 : F y - F x ≤ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : F y - F x ≤ (m - k) * (y - x) := by

          nlinarith [h9]

        have h21 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h15
        have h22 : F y - F x ≤ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h17
        have h23 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
          have h24 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h20]
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h18

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    specialize hF y
    simpa using hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    specialize hF x
    simpa using hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro heq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h4 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      exact hxy
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h4.1
    have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h4.2
    by_cases h7 : y - x > 0
    · -- y - x > 0
      have h7' : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h5
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h11 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h11]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h7'' : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h6
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h11 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h11]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h8 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h9 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h10 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h11 : (y - x) > 0 := h7
        have h12 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h11
        rw [h12]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      have h13 : |F y - F x| = |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| := by
        have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h14]
      linarith [h13, h10]
    · -- y - x ≤ 0
      have h7' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h7' : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h5
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h11 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h11]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h7'' : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h6
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h11 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h11]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
      have h8 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith
      have h9 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        nlinarith
      have h10 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h11 : (y - x) < 0 := h7'
        have h12 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg h11
        rw [h12]
        rw [hk1] at h8 h9
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      have h13 : |F y - F x| = |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| := by
        have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h14]
      linarith [h13, h10]

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h'
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 := (hH x y hxy).left
    have h2 := (hH x y hxy).right
    have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      have h4 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
      have h5 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
      calc
        F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [h4, h5]
        _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
    have h6 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
      have h7 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h8
        apply hxy
        linarith
      field_simp [h7]
      all_goals
        linarith [h3]
    have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h7 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h2]
      have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
      have h9 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := h6
      rw [h9]
      rw [hk2]
      linarith
    have h8 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ - (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h9 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h1]
      have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
      have h10 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := h6
      rw [h10]
      rw [hk2]
      linarith
    have h11 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h12 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (F y - F x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h8]
      have h13 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by linarith [h7]
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith
      · linarith
    have h7 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h8
      apply hxy
      linarith
    have h12 : |F y - F x| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := by
      have h7' : y - x ≠ 0 := h7
      have h13 : (F y - F x) = ( (F y - F x) / (y - x) ) * (y - x) := by
        field_simp [h7']
      rw [h13]
      rw [abs_mul]
    have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
      calc
        |F y - F x| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := h12
        _ ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y - x), abs_nonneg ((F y - F x) / (y - x)), h11]
    exact h14

theorem subq_IV_3

      by_contra h

            nlinarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h9 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h7.2]
        have h11 : y - x > 0 := h6

          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h10
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
            have h15 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by

      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h13 : | (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
          have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          rw [hk2]
          nlinarith
        have h11 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by

        have h12 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := ⟨h10, h11⟩
        apply abs_le.mpr

      have h14 : |y - x| = y - x := by

      have h16 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by

    · -- case y - x < 0

        have h12 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| ≤ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := ⟨h10, h11⟩

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h4 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y hxy
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h4.1
    have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h4.2
    have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h7 : (f y - f x) = (y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x)) := by
      have h8 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h_eq
        apply hxy
        linarith
      field_simp [h8]
    have h8 : F y - F x = (y - x) * (( (f y - f x) / (y - x) ) - k) := by
      rw [h3]
      rw [h7]
      ring_nf
    have h9 : |F y - F x| = |y - x| * |( (f y - f x) / (y - x) ) - k| := by
      rw [h8]
      have h10 : |(y - x) * (( (f y - f x) / (y - x) ) - k)| = |y - x| * |( (f y - f x) / (y - x) ) - k| := by
        rw [abs_mul]
      linarith [h10]
    have h10 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) ≤ ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) ) - k := by
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      rw [hk1]
      linarith [h5]
    have h11 : ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) ) - k ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) := by
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      rw [hk1]
      linarith [h6]
    have h12 : |( (f y - f x) / (y - x) ) - k| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) := by
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h10]
      · linarith [h11]
    calc
      |F y - F x| = |y - x| * |( (f y - f x) / (y - x) ) - k| := h9
      _ ≤ |y - x| * ( (M - m) / 2 ) := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
        linarith [h12]
        apply abs_nonneg
      _ = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        ring

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [show y = x by linarith]
    all_goals
      simp [abs_zero, hF]
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hne : x ≠ y := by
      intro heq
      exfalso
      apply h
      all_goals linarith
    have h1 := (hH x y hne).left
    have h2 := (hH x y hne).right
    have hF1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
      specialize hF y
      simpa using hF
    have hF2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
      specialize hF x
      simpa using hF
    have h10 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      calc
        F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [hF1, hF2]
        _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
    rw [h10]
    by_cases h5 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h3 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h1
        have h7 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h6
          have h9 : y - x > 0 := h5
          have h10 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h8
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h4 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h2
        have h7 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h6
          have h9 : y - x > 0 := h5
          have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
            apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h8
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h13 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk1]]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk1]]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : (y - x) > 0 := h5
        have h17 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h16
        have h18 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h13
        have h19 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h14
        have h20 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h17]
        all_goals nlinarith
      linarith
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h5' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have h6 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have h7 : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h3 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h1
        have h7 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h6
          have h9 : y - x < 0 := h5'
          have h10 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h8
            nlinarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h4 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h2
        have h7 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h6
          have h9 : y - x < 0 := h5'
          have h10 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h8
            nlinarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h13 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk1]]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk1]]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : y - x < 0 := h5'
        have h17 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := abs_of_neg h16
        have h18 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h14
        have h19 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h13
        have h20 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          rw [h17]
          have h21 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
            nlinarith
          have h22 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
            nlinarith
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        linarith
      linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    specialize hF y
    linarith
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    specialize hF x
    linarith
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by 
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [show y = x by linarith [h]]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 := hH x y h4
    rcases h5 with ⟨h6, h7⟩
    by_cases h8 : y - x > 0
    · -- y - x > 0
      have h9 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h10 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h6]
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h10
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h7]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h13 : (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [h3]
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (F y - F x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [h3]
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h16 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h8]
        have h17 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x ∧ F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          constructor
          · linarith [h14]
          · linarith [h13]
        have h18 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> nlinarith
        rw [h16]
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h15
    · -- y - x ≤ 0
      have h8' : y - x ≤ 0 := by nlinarith
      by_cases h8'' : y - x = 0
      · -- y - x = 0
        have h10 : y = x := by linarith
        have h11 : F y - F x = 0 := by
          rw [show y = x by linarith [h10]]
          all_goals
            simp
        rw [h11]
        have h12 : |(0 : ℝ)| = (0 : ℝ) := by norm_num
        rw [h12]
        all_goals nlinarith
      · -- y - x < 0
        have h8'' : y - x < 0 := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have : y - x = 0 := by linarith [h8'', h8', h]
          tauto
        have h9 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h7]
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            have neg1 : y - x < 0 := h8''
            apply (div_le_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h11
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have h10 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := by linarith [h6]
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            have neg1 : y - x < 0 := h8''
            apply (le_div_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h11
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h13 : (F y - F x) ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [h3]
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        have h14 : (F y - F x) ≥ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          rw [h3]
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        have h15 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          have h16 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h8'']
          have h17 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x ∧ F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            constructor
            · linarith [h14]
            · linarith [h13]
          have h18 : |F y - F x| ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> nlinarith
          rw [h16]
          have h19 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by ring
          nlinarith
        exact h15

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    apply hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    apply hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  rw [h3]
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- If y = x, both sides are 0
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Assume y ≠ x
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h6 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have : y = x := by linarith
      tauto
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      tauto
    have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
    by_cases h_pos : y - x > 0
    · -- Case where y - x > 0
      have h10 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h_pos
      rw [h10]
      have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h17 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h5.2)
        have h18 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h19 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption]
          rw [h19]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h12 : (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (h5.1)
          have h15 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
            have h16 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
              field_simp [show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption]
            rw [h16]
            nlinarith
          linarith
        nlinarith
      have h14 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        constructor
        · linarith [h12]
        · nlinarith
      have h15 : | (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · linarith [h14.1]
        · linarith [h14.2]
      rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk1]]
      linarith [h15]
    · -- Case where y - x ≤ 0
      have h13 : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith [h, h_pos]
        contradiction
      have h10 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := abs_of_neg h13
      rw [h10]
      have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h5.2)
        have h15 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h16 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption]
          rw [h16]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (h5.1)
        have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h15 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption]
          rw [h15]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h13 : (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
        nlinarith
      have h15 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) ≤ (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
        constructor
        · linarith [h14]
        · linarith [h13
        ]
      have h16 : | (f y - f x) - ( (m + M) / 2 ) * (y - x) | ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * ( - (y - x) ) := by
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · linarith [h15.1
        ]
        · linarith [h15.2
        ]
      rw [show k = (m + M) / 2 by linarith [hk1]]
      linarith [h16
      ]

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)

  intro x y

    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h5.2)
    by_cases h8 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h9 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h6
        have h11 : y - x > 0 := h8
        have h12 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h10
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h7
        have h12 : y - x > 0 := h8
        have h13 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
            apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h9' : F y - F x ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h3' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h3']
        have hk_eq' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk_eq
        rw [hk_eq']
        nlinarith
      have h10' : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h3' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h3']
        have hk_eq' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk_eq
        rw [hk_eq']
        nlinarith
      have h11 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · linarith [h9']
        · linarith [h10']
      have h12 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h8
      rw [h12] at *
      all_goals nlinarith
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h8' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      have h9 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h6
        have h11 : y - x < 0 := h8'
        have h12 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h10
            nlinarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h7
        have h12 : y - x < 0 := h8'
        have h13 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h11
            nlinarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h9' : F y - F x ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h3' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h3']
        have hk_eq' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk_eq
        rw [hk_eq']
        nlinarith
      have h10' : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have h3' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h3']
        have hk_eq' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk_eq
        rw [hk_eq']
        nlinarith
      have h11 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h12 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h8']
        have h13 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (-(y - x)) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h12]
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h11

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- if x = y, both side is zero
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h'
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y h4
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h5.1
    have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h5.2
    by_cases h11 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0, so |y - x| = y - x
      have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6
        have h11 : (y - x) > 0 := h11
        have h12 : m * (y - x) ≤ (f y - f x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h14 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h13
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h7
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (y - x) > 0 := h11
          apply (div_le_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h13 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h16 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor <;> nlinarith
      have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h18 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h18]
        have h19 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h16
        have h20 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h11]
        rw [h20] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h17
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h11 : y - x < 0 ∨ y - x = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x > 0 := by linarith
        linarith
      rcases h11 with h11 | h11
      · -- Case y - x < 0, so |y - x| = x - y
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h10 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6
          have h11 : (y - x) < 0 := by linarith
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
            have h14 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
              apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h13
              nlinarith
            linarith
          linarith
        have h10 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h7
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            have h13 : (y - x) < 0 := by linarith
            have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
            have h15 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
              apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h14
              nlinarith
            linarith
          linarith
        have h13 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (x - y) := by
          have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        have h14 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (x - y) := by
          have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          rw [hk1]
          nlinarith
        have h16 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (x - y) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor <;> nlinarith
        have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          have h18 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
          rw [h18]
          have h19 : |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (x - y) := h16
          have h20 : |y - x| = x - y := by
            have h21 : y - x < 0 := by linarith
            rw [abs_of_neg h21]
            all_goals nlinarith
          rw [h20] at *
          all_goals nlinarith
        exact h17
      · -- Case y - x = 0
        exfalso
        have h13 : x = y := by
          linarith
        tauto

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    apply hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    apply hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- Case y = x
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case y ≠ x
    have h4 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h5
      have : y = x := by linarith
      tauto
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (hH x y h4).1
    have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (hH x y h4).2
    by_cases h10 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h7 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h5]
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h6]
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h12
          linarith
        linarith
      have h14 : F y - F x ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h15]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        nlinarith
      have h16 : ((m - M) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h17 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h17]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        nlinarith
      have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h18 : (y - x) > 0 := h10
        have h19 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h18
        have h22 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h19]
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h17
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h11 : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have h12 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have h13 : y = x := by linarith
        tauto
      have h7 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h5]
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h8
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h6]
        have h13 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h12
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h14 : F y - F x ≤ ((m - M) / 2) * (y - x) := by
        have h15 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h15]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        nlinarith
      have h16 : ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have h17 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h17]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        nlinarith
      have h17 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h18 : y - x < 0 := h11
        have h19 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg h18
        have h22 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · -- Show that $F y - F x \geq -((M - m) / 2) * |y - x|$
            rw [h19]
            nlinarith
          · -- Show that $F y - F x \leq ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x|$
            rw [h19]
            nlinarith
        exact h22
      exact h17

theorem subq_IV_3

      have h75 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h76 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h7
        have h77 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith [h73]

        have : x = y := by linarith
        tauto

theorem subq_IV_3

    by_cases h7 : y - x > 0

      have h8 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h9 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h2

        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : (y - x) > 0 := h7

      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
