      calc
        |F y - F x| = |(f y - f x) - k * (y - x)| := by rw [h6]
        _ ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := h15

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y hxy
    have h2 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h1.1
    have h3 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h1.2
    have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h4 : F y = f y - k * y := by
      specialize hF y
      simpa using hF
    have h5 : F x = f x - k * x := by
      specialize hF x
      simpa using hF
    have h6 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      rw [h4, h5]
      ring
    have h7 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
      have h8 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h_eq
        apply hxy
        linarith
      field_simp [h8]
      linarith [h6]
    have h8 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (F y - F x) / (y - x) := by
      have h9 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := h7
      rw [h9]
      have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
      rw [hk2]
      have h10 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h2
      have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h3
      linarith
    have h9 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h9 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := h7
      rw [h9]
      have hk2 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk1
      rw [hk2]
      have h10 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h2
      have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h3
      linarith
    have h10 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (F y - F x) / (y - x) := h8
    have h11 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h9
    have h12 : (y - x) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      apply hxy
      linarith
    have h13 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h10]
      · linarith [h11]
    have h14 : |F y - F x| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := by
      have h15 : (F y - F x : ℝ) = ( (F y - F x) / (y - x) ) * (y - x) := by
        field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by assumption)]
      have h16 : |F y - F x| = |( (F y - F x) / (y - x) ) * (y - x)| := by
        rw [show (F y - F x : ℝ) = ( (F y - F x) / (y - x) ) * (y - x) by linarith [h15]]
      have h17 : |( (F y - F x) / (y - x) ) * (y - x)| = |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| * |y - x| := by
        rw [abs_mul]
      rw [h16, h17]
    have h18 : |(F y - F x) / (y - x)| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h13
    have h19 : |y - x| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (y - x)
    nlinarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    specialize hF y
    simpa using hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    specialize hF x
    simpa using hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : y = x
  · -- Case y = x
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case y ≠ x
    have h4 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h5
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      intro h6
      apply h4
      all_goals linarith
    by_cases h9 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h6 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h5.1]
        have h9 : y - x > 0 := h9
        have h10 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h11
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h5.2]
        have h9 : y - x > 0 := h9
        have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
            apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7' : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [h3]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h7'' : (F y - F x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [h3]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h8 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h10 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h9
        have h11 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x ∧ F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          constructor
          · linarith [h7'']
          · linarith [h7']
        have h12 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mp at h11
          have h13 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
              cases' abs_cases (y - x) with h1 h1 <;> 
                all_goals nlinarith
          linarith
        rw [h10] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      linarith
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h9 : y - x ≤ 0 := by nlinarith
      have h10 : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        tauto
      have h7 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h5.1]
        have h9 : y - x < 0 := h10
        have h10 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h11
            nlinarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7' : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h5.2]
        have h9 : y - x < 0 := h10
        have h10 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith
          have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
            apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h11
            nlinarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7'' : F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [h3]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h7''' : (F y - F x) ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        rw [h3]
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := by linarith [hk]
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h8 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h10 : y - x < 0 := h10
        have h11 : |y - x| = -(y - x) := abs_of_neg h10
        have h12 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          rw [show |y - x| = - (y - x) by linarith [h11]]
          all_goals nlinarith
        have h13 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x ∧ F y - F x ≤ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          constructor
          · nlinarith [h7''']
          · nlinarith [h7'']
        have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          cases' abs_cases (F y - F x) with h h <;> 
            cases' abs_cases (y - x) with h1 h1 <;> 
              all_goals nlinarith
        linarith
      linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 := hH x y hxy
    rcases h1 with ⟨h2, h3⟩
    have h4 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
    have h5 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
    have h6 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      rw [h4, h5]
      ring
    have h7 : y - x > 0 ∨ y - x < 0 := by
      by_contra h8
      push_neg at h8
      have h9 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      have h10 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    cases h7 with
    | inl h8_pos =>
      have h8_pos : y - x > 0 := h8
      have h9 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h2]
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : y - x > 0 := h8_pos
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h10
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h3]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : y - x > 0 := h8_pos
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h6' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h6
        rw [h6']
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h12 : ( (m - M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h6' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h6
        rw [h6']
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h15 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h8_pos
        have h16 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h11
        have h17 : ( (m - M) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h12
        rw [h15]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      linarith
    | inr h8_neg_pos =>
      have h8_neg_pos : y - x < 0 := h8_neg_pos
      have h9 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h2]
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h12 : y - x < 0 := h8_neg_pos
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h10
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : M * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h3]
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : y - x < 0 := h8_neg_pos
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h11
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h11 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h6' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h6
        rw [h6']
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h12 : F y - F x ≤ ( (m - M) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        have h6' : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h6
        rw [h6']
        rw [hk1]
        nlinarith
      have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h15 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h8_neg_pos]
        have h16 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h11
        have h17 : F y - F x ≤ ( (m - M) / 2 ) * (y - x) := h12
        rw [h15]
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      linarith

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y h4
    have h6 : y - x > 0 ∨ y - x < 0 := by
      by_contra h7
      push_neg at h7
      have h8 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
      have h9 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    cases h6 with
    | inl h_pos =>
      have h7 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h8 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (h5.1)
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h8
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h5.2)
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h11
          linarith
        linarith
      have h8 : F y - F x ≥ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h9]
        nlinarith [h7, hk]
      have h9 : F y - F x ≤ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h10]
        nlinarith [h10, hk]
      have h17 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| ≤ F y - F x := by
        cases abs_cases (y - x) with
        | inl h_pos1 =>
          have h13 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          have h14 : (m - k : ℝ) = ( (m - M) / 2 : ℝ ) := by
            linarith
          nlinarith [h8, h14]
        | inr h_neg1 =>
          exfalso
          nlinarith
      have h18 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        cases abs_cases (y - x) with
        | inl h_pos1 =>
          have h13 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          have h14 : (M - k : ℝ) = ( (M - m) / 2 : ℝ ) := by
            linarith
          nlinarith [h9, h14]
        | inr h_neg1 =>
          exfalso
          nlinarith
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h17]
      · linarith [h18]
    | inr h_neg =>
      have h7 : f y - f x ≥ M * (y - x) := by
        have h8 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (h5.1)
        have h9 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h8
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h5.2)
        have h12 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h11
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h8 : F y - F x ≥ (M - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h9]
        nlinarith [h7, hk]
      have h9 : F y - F x ≤ (m - k) * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        rw [h10]
        nlinarith [h10, hk]
      have h17 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| ≤ F y - F x := by
        cases abs_cases (y - x) with
        | inl h_pos1 =>
          exfalso
          nlinarith
        | inr h_neg1 =>
          have h13 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          have h14 : (M - k : ℝ) = ( (M - m) / 2 : ℝ ) := by
            linarith
          nlinarith [h8, h14]
      have h18 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        cases abs_cases (y - x) with
        | inl h_pos1 =>
          exfalso
          nlinarith
        | inr h_neg1 =>
          have h13 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          have h14 : (m - k : ℝ) = ( (m - M) / 2 : ℝ ) := by
            linarith
          nlinarith [h9, h14]
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h17]
      · linarith [h18]

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- if x = y, inequality holds trivially
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have h5 : x ≠ y := by
      tauto
    have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y h5
    have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h6.1
    have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h6.2
    have h9 : F y - F x = (y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) := by
      have h10 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
      have h11 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h_eq
        have h12 : x = y := by linarith
        tauto
      rw [h10]
      field_simp [h11]
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h10 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h17 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h15 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h8
      have h18 : k = (m + M) / 2 := h10
      linarith
    have h18 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≥ - (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h19 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h7
      have h20 : k = (m + M) / 2 := h10
      linarith
    have h21 : |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h18]
      · linarith [h17]
    have h22 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
      have h23 : F y - F x = (y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) := h9
      have h24 : |F y - F x| = |(y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k)| := by
        rw [h23]
      have h25 : |(y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k)| = |y - x| * |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| := by
        rw [abs_mul]
      have h26 : |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h21
      rw [h24, h25]
      have h27 : |y - x| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (y - x)
      have h28 : |y - x| * |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| ≤ |y - x| * ((M - m) / 2) := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h26 (by positivity)
      have h29 : |y - x| * ((M - m) / 2) = ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by ring
      nlinarith
    exact h22

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- x ≠ y
    have h4 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      tauto
    have h5 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_eq
      have h7 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have h7 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := hH x y (by
      intro h_eq
      have h7 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    )
    have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h9 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := (h7.1)
    have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h7.2)
    have h11 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h9
      have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h10
      rw [hk1]
      linarith
    have h12 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h10
      have h14 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := h9
      rw [hk1]
      linarith
    have h13 : F y - F x = (y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) := by
      have h14 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
      have h15 : y - x ≠ 0 := h5
      field_simp [h15] at *
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
      have h15 : F y - F x = (y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) := h13
      have h16 : |F y - F x| = |(y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k)| := by
        rw [h15]
      have h17 : |(y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k)| = |y - x| * |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| := by
        rw [abs_mul]
      have h18 : |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
        have h19 : - (M - m) / 2 ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := h11
        have h20 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h12
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor <;> linarith
      calc
        |F y - F x| = |(y - x) * ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k)| := by rw [h16]
        _ = |y - x| * |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| := by rw [h17]
        _ ≤ |y - x| * ((M - m) / 2) := by
          have h19 : |(f y - f x) / (y - x) - k| ≤ (M - m) / 2 := h18
          nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y - x), abs_nonneg ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k)]
        _ = ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by ring
    exact h14

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro heq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h1 := hH x y hxy
    have h2 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      have hFy : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
      have hFx : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
      calc
        F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [hFy, hFx]
        _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
    have h3 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro heq
      have : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    by_cases h4 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h5 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h6 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (h1.1)
        have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith
        have h8 : (f y - f x) ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp at h7
          linarith
        linarith
      have h9 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h10 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h1.2)
        have h11 : (f y - f x) ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h10
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : F y - F x ≥ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h2
        rw [h11]
        have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h2
        rw [h12]
        have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h15 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h4
        have h16 : - ((M - m) / 2) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
          nlinarith
        have h17 : F y - F x ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h11
        have h18 : |F y - F x| ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h15] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h14
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h4' : y - x < 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have : y - x = 0 := by linarith [h, h4]
        contradiction
      have h5 : M * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (h1.2)
        have h7 : (f y - f x) ≥ M * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h6
          linarith
        linarith
      have h8 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
        have h9 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (h1.1)
        have h10 : (f y - f x) ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff_of_neg' (by linarith)).mp at h9
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : F y - F x ≥ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have h11 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h2
        rw [h11]
        have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        have h12 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h2
        rw [h12]
        have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [hk']
        nlinarith
      have h14 : |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
        have h15 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h4']
        have h16 : (F y - F x) ≥ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h10
        have h17 : (F y - F x) ≤ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := h11
        have h18 : |F y - F x| ≤ (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| := by
          have h19 : - ((M - m) / 2 * |y - x|) ≤ F y - F x := by
            have h20 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith
            have h21 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≥ - ((M - m) / 2 * |y - x|) := by
              have h22 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := h15
              rw [h22]
              nlinarith [show 0 ≤ (M - m) / 2 by nlinarith]
            nlinarith
          have h20 : F y - F x ≤ (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| := by
            have h21 : F y - F x ≤ (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) := by linarith
            have h22 : (m - M) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 * |y - x| := by
              have h23 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := h15
              rw [h23]
              nlinarith [show 0 ≤ (M - m) / 2 by nlinarith]
            nlinarith
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        exact h18
      exact h14

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  by_cases hxy : x = y
  · -- If x = y, both sides are zero
    rw [hxy]
    simp
  · -- Assume x ≠ y
    have hxy' : x ≠ y := by
      intro h
      apply hxy
      linarith
    have h1 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := (hH x y hxy').left
    have h2 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := (hH x y hxy').right
    have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
      have hFy : F y = f y - k * y := hF y
      have hFx : F x = f x - k * x := hF x
      calc
        F y - F x = (f y - k * y) - (f x - k * x) := by rw [hFy, hFx]
        _ = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by ring
    have h4 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
      have hne : y - x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        apply hxy'
        linarith
      field_simp [hne] at *
      <;> nlinarith [h3]
    have hk' : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
    have h5 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ (m - M) / 2 := by
      have h6 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ m - k := by
        have h7 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h1]
        have h8 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
          linarith [h4]
        nlinarith
      rw [hk'] at *
      nlinarith
    have h6 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by
      have h7 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ M - k := by
        have h8 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h2]
        have h9 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k := by
          linarith [h4]
        nlinarith
      rw [hk'] at *
      nlinarith
    by_cases h : y - x > 0
    · -- Case where y - x > 0
      have h10 : |y - x| = y - x := abs_of_pos h
      have h11 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have hne : y - x > 0 := h
        have h12 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by linarith [h6]
        have h13 : (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply (div_le_iff (by linarith)).mp at h12
          linarith
        linarith
      have h12 : F y - F x ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
        have hne : y - x > 0 := h
        have h13 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ (m - M) / 2 := h5
        have h14 : (F y - F x) ≥ ( (m - M) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply (le_div_iff (by linarith)).mp at h13
          linarith
        nlinarith
      have h13 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h14 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith [h12]
        have h15 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by linarith [h11]
        have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h10] at *
        all_goals linarith
      linarith
    · -- Case where y - x ≤ 0
      by_cases h' : y - x < 0
      · -- Case where y - x < 0
        have h10 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := abs_of_neg h'
        have h11 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          have hne : y - x < 0 := h'
          have h12 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≤ (M - m) / 2 := by linarith [h6]
          have h13 : (F y - F x) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            apply (div_le_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h12
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have h12 : F y - F x ≥ - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          have hne : y - x < 0 := h'
          have h13 : (F y - F x) / (y - x) ≥ (m - M) / 2 := h5
          have h14 : (F y - F x) ≥ ( (m - M) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
            apply (le_div_iff_of_neg (by linarith)).mp at h13
            nlinarith
          nlinarith
        have h13 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          have h14 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by linarith [h12]
          have h15 : F y - F x ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by linarith [h11]
          have h16 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (- (y - x)) := by
            apply abs_le.mpr
            constructor
            · nlinarith
            · nlinarith
          have h17 : ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (- (y - x)) = ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
            rw [h10]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      · -- Case where y - x = 0
        have h18 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have h19 : x = y := by linarith
        contradiction

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by apply hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by apply hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- Case x = y
    rw [h]
    simp
  · -- Case x ≠ y
    have h6 : x ≠ y := by
      intro h7
      tauto
    have h7 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
      intro h8
      have h8' : y = x := by linarith
      have h9 : x = y := by linarith
      tauto
    have h8 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by
      apply hH x y
      intro h9
      tauto
    by_cases h18 : y - x > 0
    · -- Case y - x > 0
      have h19 : m * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
        have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h8.1]
        have h14 : f y - f x ≥ m * (y - x) := by
          have h16 : y - x > 0 := h18
          have h17 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h17]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h20 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
        have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h8.2]
        have h14 : f y - f x ≤ M * (y - x) := by
          have h16 : y - x > 0 := h18
          have h17 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
            field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
          rw [h17]
          nlinarith
        linarith
      have h21 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
      have h22 : - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
        rw [h21]
        have h23 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [h23]
        nlinarith
      have h24 : F y - F x ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
        rw [h21]
        have h23 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
        rw [h23]
        nlinarith
      have h25 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
        have h26 : |y - x| = y - x := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h18]
        have h27 : - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h22
        have h28 : F y - F x ≤ (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h24
        have h29 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (y - x) := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith
        rw [h26] at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h25
    · -- Case y - x ≤ 0
      have h19 : y - x < 0 ∨ y - x = 0 := by
        by_contra h
        push_neg at h
        have h20 : y - x ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h21 : y - x = 0 := by linarith [show y - x ≤ 0 by nlinarith, h20]
        have h22 : y - x = 0 := h21
        tauto
      cases h19 with
      | inl h19l =>
        have h20 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≥ m := by linarith [h8.1]
          have h14 : f y - f x ≤ m * (y - x) := by
            have h17 : y - x < 0 := h19l
            have h18 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
              field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
            rw [h18]
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have h21 : M * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
          have h13 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := by linarith [h8.2]
          have h14 : M * (y - x) ≤ f y - f x := by
            have h17 : y - x < 0 := h19l
            have h18 : f y - f x = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
              field_simp [(show y - x ≠ 0 by linarith)]
            rw [h18]
            nlinarith
          linarith
        have h22 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := h3
        have h23 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := by
          rw [h22]
          have h23 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          rw [h23]
          nlinarith
        have h24 : F y - F x ≤ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := by
          rw [h22]
          have h23 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
          rw [h23]
          nlinarith
        have h25 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * |y - x| := by
          have h26 : |y - x| = - (y - x) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h19l]
          have h27 : (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) ≤ F y - F x := h23
          have h28 : F y - F x ≤ - (M - m) / 2 * (y - x) := h24
          have h29 : |F y - F x| ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) * (- (y - x)) := by
            apply abs_le.mpr
            constructor
            · nlinarith
            · nlinarith
          rw [h26] at *
          all_goals nlinarith
        exact h25
      | inr h19r =>
        -- Contradicts with x ≠ y
        have h20 : y - x = 0 := by linarith
        have h21 : x = y := by linarith
        tauto

theorem subq_IV_3
    (f : ℝ → ℝ)
    (m M : ℝ) (hm : 0 < m) (hM : 0 < M) (hmM : m ≤ M)
    (hH : ∀ x y : ℝ, x ≠ y →
      m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ∧ (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M)
    (k : ℝ) (hk : k = (m + M) / 2)
    (F : ℝ → ℝ) (hF : ∀ x, F x = f x - k * x) :
    ∀ x y : ℝ, |F y - F x| ≤ ((M - m) / 2) * |y - x| := by
  intro x y
  have h1 : F y = f y - k * y := by
    specialize hF y
    simpa using hF
  have h2 : F x = f x - k * x := by
    specialize hF x
    simpa using hF
  have h3 : F y - F x = (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) := by
    rw [h1, h2]
    ring
  rw [h3]
  by_cases h : x = y
  · -- x = y
    rw [h]
    norm_num
  · -- x ≠ y
    have hxy : x ≠ y := by
      intro h_eq
      apply h
      linarith
    have h4 := hH x y hxy
    have h5 : m ≤ (f y - f x) / (y - x) := h4.1
    have h6 : (f y - f x) / (y - x) ≤ M := h4.2
    have h7 : (f y - f x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) := by
      have h8 : y - x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h9
        apply hxy
        linarith
      field_simp [h8]
    have h8 : (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) = ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) * (y - x) := by
      calc
        (f y - f x) - k * (y - x) = (f y - f x) / (y - x) * (y - x) - k * (y - x) := by
          rw [h7]
        _ = ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) * (y - x) := by
          ring
    rw [h8]
    have h10 : - ( (M - m) / 2 ) ≤ ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) := by
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      rw [hk1]
      nlinarith
    have h11 : ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) := by
      have hk1 : k = (m + M) / 2 := hk
      rw [hk1]
      nlinarith
    have h12 : abs ( ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) ) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) := by
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor
      · linarith [h10]
      · linarith [h11]
    have h13 : abs ( ((f y - f x) / (y - x) - k) * (y - x) ) = abs ( ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) ) * abs ( y - x ) := by
      rw [abs_mul]
    rw [h13]
    have h14 : abs ( ( (f y - f x) / (y - x) - k ) ) ≤ ( (M - m) / 2 ) := h12
    have h15 : abs ( y - x ) ≥ 0 := by positivity
    nlinarith

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  rcases hx with ⟨hx0, hx1⟩
  constructor
  · -- Forward direction: if x is rational, then f x is rational
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    have hfx' : f x = (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℝ) := by
      rw [hfx]
      rw [show x = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
    refine ⟨1 - |2 * q - 1|, by
      rw [hfx']
      all_goals
        norm_num
    ⟩
  · -- Backward direction: if f x is rational, then x is rational
    rintro ⟨r, h_eq⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at h_eq
    have h2 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (r : ℝ)) := by
      linarith
    by_cases h3 : (1 - (r : ℝ)) ≥ 0
    · -- Case where 1 - r ≥ 0
      have h4 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (r : ℝ)) := h2
      have h5 : 2 * x - 1 = (1 - (r : ℝ)) ∨ 2 * x - 1 = - (1 - (r : ℝ)) := by
        cases abs_cases (2 * x - 1) with
        | inl h6 =>
          left
          linarith
        | inr h6 =>
          right
          linarith
      cases h5 with
      | inl h6 =>
        have hx_eq : x = (1 - (r / 2) : ℝ) := by
          linarith
        refine ⟨1 - r / 2, by
          norm_num at hx_eq ⊢
          all_goals try linarith
        ⟩
      | inr h6 =>
        have hx_eq : x = (r / 2 : ℝ) := by
          linarith
        refine ⟨r / 2, by
          norm_num at hx_eq ⊢
          all_goals try linarith
        ⟩
    · -- Case where 1 - r < 0
      have h3' : (1 - (r : ℝ)) < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h4 : |2 * x - 1| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1)
      linarith

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q, prove there exists a rational q' such that f x = q'
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.1
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.2
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx]
    rw [h_eq] at *
    have h1 : ∃ r : ℚ, (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by
      have h2 : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) := by
        simp
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : |(2 * q - 1 : ℝ)| = (abs (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) : ℝ) := by
        norm_num
      rw [h3]
      refine ⟨1 - abs (2 * q - 1 : ℚ), by simp⟩
    rcases h1 with ⟨r, hr⟩
    refine ⟨r, by linarith⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q, prove there exists a rational q' such that x = q'
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.1
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.2
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at h_eq
    have h1 : (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
      have h4 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
        linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1 : ℝ)]
      linarith [h_eq, h4]
    have h2 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
      nlinarith [abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1 : ℝ), h_eq, h1]
    cases' abs_cases (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) with h h <;> 
      try { 
        have hx_eq : x = ((q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith
        have h2 : ∃ r : ℚ, x = (r : ℝ) := by
          refine ⟨(q : ℚ) / 2, by
            rw [hx_eq]
            all_goals norm_num
          ⟩
        tauto
      }
      try { 
        have hx_eq : x = (1 - (q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith
        have h2 : ∃ r : ℚ, x = (r : ℝ) := by
          refine ⟨1 - (q : ℚ) / 2, by
            rw [hx_eq]
            all_goals norm_num
          ⟩
        tauto
      }

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  rcases hx with ⟨hx0, hx1⟩
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q, prove there exists a rational q' such that f x = q'
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx]
    rw [show x = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
    by_cases h : (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) ≥ 0
    · -- If 2q - 1 ≥ 0, then |2q - 1| = 2q - 1
      have h5 : |(2 * q - 1 : ℚ)| = (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) := abs_of_nonneg h
      use (2 - 2 * q)
      have eq1 : (1 - |(2 * q - 1 : ℚ)| : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * q : ℝ) := by
        have h5' : ( |(2 * q - 1 : ℚ)| : ℝ ) = ( (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) : ℝ ) := by
          rw [show |(2 * q - 1 : ℚ)| = (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) by exact_mod_cast h5]
        rw [h5']
        norm_num
        all_goals
          linarith
      simp_all [eq1]
    · -- If 2q - 1 < 0, then |2q - 1| = -(2q - 1)
      have h6 : (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) < (0 : ℚ) := by
        by_contra h'
        push_neg at h'
        have : (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) ≥ (0 : ℚ) := by linarith
        tauto
      have h7 : |(2 * q - 1 : ℚ)| = - (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) := abs_of_neg h6
      use (2 * q)
      have eq1 : (1 - |(2 * q - 1 : ℚ)| : ℝ) = (2 * q : ℝ) := by
        have h8 : ( |(2 * q - 1 : ℚ)| : ℝ ) = ( - (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) : ℝ ) := by
          rw [show |(2 * q - 1 : ℚ)| = - (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) by exact_mod_cast h7]
        rw [h8]
        have h9 : ( - (2 * q - 1 : ℚ) : ℝ ) = (1 - 2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          simp
        rw [h9]
        all_goals
          nlinarith
      simp_all [eq1]
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q, prove there exists a rational q' such that x = q'
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at h_eq
    have h1 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h2 : (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
      linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1), h1]
    have h3 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) ∨ (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = ( - (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) ) := by
      cases abs_cases (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) with
      | inl h4 =>
        left
        linarith [h1, h4]
      | inr h5 =>
        right
        linarith [h1, h5]
    cases h3 with
    | inl h4 =>
      have h4' : x = (1 - (q / 2) : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      have h5 : ∃ r : ℚ, x = (r : ℝ) := by
        refine ⟨(1 - (q / 2) : ℚ), by
          simp [h4']
        ⟩
      tauto
    | inr h5 =>
      have h6 : x = (q / 2 : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      have h7 : ∃ r : ℚ, x = (r : ℝ) := by
        refine ⟨(q / 2 : ℚ), by
          simp [h6]
        ⟩
      tauto

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Forward direction: if x is rational, then f(x) is rational
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    by_cases h2 : x ≤ 1 / 2
    · -- x ≤ 1/2
      have h3 : 2 * x - 1 ≤ 0 := by linarith
      have h4 : |2 * x - 1| = 1 - 2 * x := by
        rw [abs_of_nonpos h3]
        all_goals linarith
      have h5 : f x = 2 * x := by
        rw [hfx]
        rw [h4]
        all_goals linarith
      rw [h5]
      refine' ⟨2 * q, by
        simp_all [h_eq]
      ⟩
    · -- x > 1/2
      have h3 : 2 * x - 1 > 0 := by linarith
      have h4 : |2 * x - 1| = 2 * x - 1 := by
        rw [abs_of_pos h3]
      have h5 : f x = 2 - 2 * x := by
        rw [hfx]
        rw [h4]
        all_goals linarith
      rw [h5]
      refine' ⟨2 - 2 * q, by
        simp_all [h_eq]
      ⟩
  · -- Backward direction: if f(x) is rational, then x is rational
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨r, h_eq⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    by_cases h2 : x ≤ 1 / 2
    · -- x ≤ 1/2
      have h3 : 2 * x - 1 ≤ 0 := by linarith
      have h4 : |2 * x - 1| = 1 - 2 * x := by
        rw [abs_of_nonpos h3]
        all_goals linarith
      have h5 : f x = 2 * x := by
        rw [hfx]
        rw [h4]
        all_goals linarith
      rw [h5] at h_eq
      refine' ⟨r / 2, by
        have h7 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h8 : (x : ℝ) = (r / 2 : ℝ) := by
          have h9 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := h7
          field_simp at h9 ⊢
          linarith
        norm_num at h8 ⊢
        all_goals try linarith
      ⟩
    · -- x > 1/2
      have h3 : 2 * x - 1 > 0 := by linarith
      have h4 : |2 * x - 1| = 2 * x - 1 := by
        rw [abs_of_pos h3]
      have h5 : f x = 2 - 2 * x := by
        rw [hfx]
        rw [h4]
        all_goals linarith
      rw [h5] at h_eq
      refine' ⟨1 - r / 2, by
        have h7 : (2 - 2 * x : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h8 : (x : ℝ) = (1 - r / 2 : ℝ) := by
          have h9 : (2 - 2 * x : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := h7
          field_simp at h9 ⊢
          linarith
        norm_num at h8 ⊢
        all_goals try linarith
      ⟩

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q
    rintro ⟨q, rfl⟩
    have hfx : f ((q : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| := by
      apply hf
    refine ⟨1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1|, by
      rw [hfx]
    ⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q
    rintro ⟨q, hfx⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hfx_eq : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx_eq] at hfx
    have h4 : ∃ r : ℚ, |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (r : ℝ) := by
      have h5 : (1 : ℝ) - |2 * x - 1| = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h6 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 : ℝ) - (q : ℝ) := by linarith
      refine ⟨1 - q, by
        simp [h6]
      ⟩
    rcases h4 with ⟨r, hr⟩
    have h7 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) ∨ (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = - (r : ℝ) := by
      cases abs_cases (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) with
      | inl h =>
        left
        linarith
      | inr h =>
        right
        linarith
    cases h7 with
    | inl h8 =>
      have hx_eq : x = (1 + (r : ℝ)) / 2 := by
        linarith
      have hx_eq2 : ∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ) := by
        refine ⟨(1 + r) / 2, by
          rw [hx_eq]
          all_goals norm_num
        ⟩
      exact hx_eq2
    | inr h8 =>
      have hx_eq : x = (1 - (r : ℝ)) / 2 := by
        linarith
      have hx_eq2 : ∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ) := by
        refine ⟨(1 - r) / 2, by
          rw [hx_eq]
          all_goals norm_num
        ⟩
      exact hx_eq2

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  rcases hx with ⟨hx0, hx1⟩
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    use (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℚ)
    rw [show x = (q : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]]
    all_goals
      norm_num [hf]
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at h_eq
    have h1 : 0 ≤ (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by
      linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1), h_eq]
    have h2 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by linarith
    cases eq_or_eq_neg_of_abs_eq h2 with
    | inl h3 =>
      have h4 : 2 * x - 1 = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by linarith
      have hx_eq : x = (1 - (q : ℝ) / 2) := by
        linarith
      refine ⟨(1 - (q / 2) : ℚ), by
        norm_num at hx_eq ⊢
        all_goals try linarith
      ⟩
    | inr h3 =>
      have h4 : 2 * x - 1 = - (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by linarith
      have hx_eq : x = ((q : ℝ) / 2) := by
        linarith
      refine ⟨(q / 2 : ℚ), by
        norm_num at hx_eq ⊢
        all_goals try linarith
      ⟩

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  rcases hx with ⟨hx0, hx1⟩
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hfxq : f x = 1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| := by
      rw [show x = (q : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]]
      apply hf
    refine ⟨(1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℚ), by
      simp [hfxq]
    ⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational r such that f x = r
    rintro ⟨r, h_eq⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    have h_eq2 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by
      linarith [h_eq, hfx]
    have h_eq3 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (r : ℝ)) := by
      nlinarith
    cases abs_cases (2 * x - 1) with
    | inl h1 =>
      have h_eq8 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (1 - (r : ℝ)) := by
        linarith [h_eq3, h1]
      have h_eq9 : x = (1 - (r / 2) : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith
      refine ⟨(1 - (r / 2) : ℚ), by
        simp [h_eq9]
      ⟩
    | inr h2 =>
      have h_eq8 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = - (1 - (r : ℝ)) := by
        linarith [h_eq3, h2]
      have h_eq9 : x = ((r : ℝ) / 2) := by

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)

    rintro ⟨q, hq⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ≥ 0 := by
        have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx

        have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx

    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at hq
    have h2 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by

    cases' abs_cases (2 * x - 1) with h h
    · -- Case where 2 * x - 1 ≥ 0, so |2 * x - 1| = 2 * x - 1
      have h4 : 2 * x - 1 ≥ 0 := by linarith

      have h6 : x = (q / 2 : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith
      have h7 : ∃ q0 : ℚ, x = (q0 : ℝ) := by
        use (q / 2 : ℚ)
        rw [h6]
        all_goals

theorem subq_II_2

    cases h5 with

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :

      have h5 : |(2 * (q : ℚ) - 1 : ℚ)| = (2 * (q : ℚ) - 1 : ℚ) := abs_of_nonneg h
      use (2 - 2 * q : ℚ)

        rw [h4]
        ring_nf

        push_neg at h'

        have h7 : (2 * (q : ℚ) - 1 : ℚ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast h6

      have h5 : |(2 * (q : ℚ) - 1 : ℚ)| = - (2 * (q : ℚ) - 1 : ℚ) := abs_of_neg (show (2 * (q : ℚ) - 1 : ℚ) < 0 by
        by_contra h8
        push_neg at h8
        have h9 : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by

      use (2 * q : ℚ)
      have h6 : (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℝ) = (2 * q : ℝ) := by
        rw [h4]
        ring_nf

  · -- Assume ∃ q : ℚ, f x = q, prove ∃ q : ℚ, x = q

      have h3 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h
      have eq1 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * x : ℝ) := by

        ring_nf

      have hx3 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (2 - (q : ℝ)) := by linarith
      have hx4 : x = (1 - (q / 2) : ℝ) := by

        rw [hx4]

    · -- Case where 2x - 1 < 0

      have eq1 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (2 * x : ℝ) := by
        rw [h4]
        ring_nf
      have hq2 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by linarith [hq, eq1]

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Forward direction: if x is rational, then f x is rational
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
        have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        exact h2.1
      linarith
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
        have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        exact h2.2
      linarith
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [h_eq] at *
    have h1 : ∃ r : ℚ, f ((q : ℝ)) = (r : ℝ) := by
      have h2 : f ((q : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [h2]
      refine' ⟨(1 - |2 * (q : ℚ) - 1| : ℚ), by simp⟩
    tauto
  · -- Backward direction: if f x is rational, then x is rational
    rintro ⟨r, h_eq⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
        have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        exact h2.1
      linarith
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
        have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        exact h2.2
      linarith
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at h_eq
    have h3 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - r : ℝ) := by
      nlinarith
    have h4 : (1 - r : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
      have h1 : |2 * x - 1| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1)
      linarith [h3, h1]
    have h5 : 2 * x - 1 = (1 - r : ℝ) ∨ 2 * x - 1 = - (1 - r : ℝ) := by
      cases eq_or_eq_neg_of_abs_eq h3 with
      | inl h => 
        left
        linarith
      | inr h => 
        right
        linarith
    cases h5 with
    | inl h6 =>
      have hx_eq : x = (1 - (r / 2) : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      refine ⟨(1 - r / 2 : ℚ), by
        rw [hx_eq]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩
    | inr h6 =>
      have hx_eq : x = (r / 2 : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      refine ⟨(r / 2 : ℚ), by
        rw [hx_eq]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩

    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [h_eq] at *
    by_cases h : (q : ℝ) ≤ (1 / 2 : ℝ)
    · -- Case where x ≤ 1/2
      have h4 : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ≤ (0 : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      have h5 : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - 2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        rw [abs_of_nonpos h4]
        all_goals linarith
      have h6 : f (q : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        rw [hfx]
        rw [h5]
        all_goals linarith
      refine' ⟨2 * q, by
        rw [h6]
        all_goals simp
      ⟩
    · -- Case where x > 1/2
      have h8 : (q : ℝ) > (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h9 : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) > (0 : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      have h10 : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
        rw [abs_of_pos h9]
      have h11 : f (q : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        rw [hfx]
        rw [h10]
        all_goals linarith
      refine' ⟨2 - 2 * q, by
        rw [h11]
        all_goals simp
      ⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational number r such that f x = r. We need to show there exists a rational number q such that x = q.
    rintro ⟨r, h_eq⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at h_eq
    have h1 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h2 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - (r : ℝ) : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h3 : (1 - (r : ℝ) : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
      linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1 : ℝ)]
    by_cases h4 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) ≤ 0
    · -- Case where 2x - 1 ≤ 0, so |2x - 1| = 1 - 2x
      have h5 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - 2 * x : ℝ) := by
        rw [abs_of_nonpos h4]
        all_goals linarith
      rw [h5] at h2
      have h6 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by linarith
      refine' ⟨r / 2, by
        have h8 : (x : ℝ) = (r / 2 : ℝ) := by
          linarith
        rw [h8]
        all_goals simp
      ⟩
    · -- Case where 2x - 1 > 0, so |2x - 1| = 2x - 1
      have h7 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
      have h8 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := by
        rw [abs_of_pos h7]
      rw [h8] at h2
      have h9 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (2 - (r : ℝ) : ℝ) := by linarith
      refine' ⟨1 - r / 2, by
        have h11 : (x : ℝ) = (1 - r / 2 : ℝ) := by
          linarith
        rw [h11]
        all_goals simp
      ⟩

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  rcases hx with ⟨hx0, hx1⟩
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational number q such that x = q, prove there exists a rational number r such that f x = r
    rintro ⟨q, hq⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx]
    rw [show x = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
    by_cases h : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
    · -- Case where 2 * q - 1 ≥ 0
      have h1 : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h
      rw [h1]
      have h2 : (1 - (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        ring_nf
      rw [h2]
      refine' ⟨(2 - 2 * q : ℚ), by
        norm_num
      ⟩
    · -- Case where 2 * q - 1 < 0
      have h2 : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h1 : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - 2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        rw [abs_of_neg h2]
        all_goals
          ring_nf
      rw [h1]
      have h3 : (1 - (1 - 2 * (q : ℝ)) : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        ring_nf
      rw [h3]
      refine' ⟨(2 * q : ℚ), by
        norm_num
      ⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational number r such that f x = r, prove there exists a rational number q such that x = q
    rintro ⟨r, hr⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at hr
    by_cases h : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
    · -- Case where 2 * x - 1 ≥ 0
      have h1 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h
      rw [h1] at hr
      have hx_eq : x = (1 - (r / 2) : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith
      have hx2 : ∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ) := by
        refine' ⟨(1 - (r / 2) : ℚ), by
          norm_num at hx_eq ⊢
          all_goals try { linarith }
        ⟩
      exact hx2
    · -- Case where 2 * x - 1 < 0
      have h2 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h1 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - 2 * x : ℝ) := by
        rw [abs_of_neg h2]
        all_goals
          ring_nf
      rw [h1] at hr
      have hx_eq : x = (r / 2 : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith
      have hx2 : ∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ) := by
        refine' ⟨(r / 2 : ℚ), by
          norm_num at hx_eq ⊢
          all_goals try { linarith }
        ⟩
      exact hx2

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q, prove there exists a rational q such that f x = q
    rintro ⟨q, h⟩
    have hx0 : (x : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast h
    have hx1 : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hx0] at hx1
    refine' ⟨1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1|, by
      simp_all only [Rat.cast_abs, Rat.cast_sub, Rat.cast_ofNat, Rat.cast_one, Rat.cast_mul]
    ⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q, prove there exists a rational q such that x = q
    rintro ⟨q, h⟩
    have hx0 : x ≥ 0 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at h
    have h1 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast h
    have h2 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by linarith
    by_cases h8 : 2 * x - 1 ≥ 0
    · -- Case where 2*x - 1 ≥ 0
      have h9 : |2 * x - 1| = (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h8
      rw [h9] at h2
      have h10 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (2 - (q : ℝ)) := by linarith
      have h11 : ∃ r : ℚ, x = (r : ℝ) := by
        use (2 - q) / 2
        have h12 : (x : ℝ) = ( (2 - q) / 2 : ℚ ) := by
          have h13 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (2 - (q : ℝ)) := h10
          have h14 : (x : ℝ) = ( (2 - (q : ℝ)) / 2 ) := by
            linarith
          have h15 : ( (2 - (q : ℝ)) / 2 : ℝ ) = ( (2 - q) / 2 : ℚ ) := by
            simp
          nlinarith
        exact_mod_cast h12
      tauto
    · -- Case where 2*x - 1 < 0
      have h9 : |2 * x - 1| = - (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_neg (show 2 * x - 1 < 0 by linarith)
      rw [h9] at h2
      have h10 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h11 : ∃ r : ℚ, x = (r : ℝ) := by
        use (q) / 2
        have h12 : (x : ℝ) = ( (q) / 2 : ℚ ) := by
          have h13 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := h10
          have h14 : (x : ℝ) = ( (q : ℝ) / 2 ) := by
            linarith
          have h15 : ( (q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ ) = ( (q) / 2 : ℚ ) := by
            simp
          nlinarith
        exact_mod_cast h12
      tauto

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational number q such that x = q.
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hx0 : (x : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : (x : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [h_eq] at *
    refine ⟨1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1|, by
      simp [hfx]
    ⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational number q such that f x = q.
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hx0 : (x : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : (x : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at h_eq
    have h1 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h2 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by
      nlinarith
    have h4 : (q : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
      nlinarith [abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1 : ℝ), abs_le.mp (show |2 * x - 1| ≤ 1 by
        have h4 : -1 ≤ (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith
        have h5 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
          nlinarith
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor <;> linarith
      )]
    have h5 : (q : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
      nlinarith [abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1 : ℝ), abs_le.mp (show |2 * x - 1| ≤ 1 by
        have h4 : -1 ≤ (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith
        have h5 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
          nlinarith
        apply abs_le.mpr
        constructor <;> linarith
      )]
    have h7 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by
      linarith [h2]
    have h8 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (1 - (q : ℝ)) ∨ (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = - (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by
      cases eq_or_eq_neg_of_abs_eq h7 with
      | inl h9 => 
        left
        linarith
      | inr h10 =>
        right
        linarith
    cases h8 with
    | inl h9 =>
      have hx_eq : x = (1 - (q / 2) : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith
      refine ⟨1 - (q / 2 : ℚ), by
        rw [hx_eq]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩
    | inr h10 =>
      have hx_eq : x = (q / 2 : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith
      refine ⟨(q / 2 : ℚ), by
        rw [hx_eq]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q, prove there exists a rational r such that f x = r
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hx_eq : x = (q : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hq
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx]
    have h1 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := by 
      rw [show x = (q : ℝ) by linarith [hx_eq]]
    rw [h1]
    by_cases h : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
    · -- Case where 2q - 1 ≥ 0
      have h2 : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h
      rw [h2]
      refine ⟨2 - 2 * q, by
        norm_num at *
        all_goals try { linarith }
      ⟩
    · -- Case where 2q - 1 < 0
      have h2 : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_neg (lt_of_not_ge h)
      rw [h2]
      refine ⟨2 * q, by
        norm_num at *
        all_goals try { linarith }
      ⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational r such that f x = r, prove there exists a rational q such that x = q
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨r, hr⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at hr
    have h1 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - (r : ℝ) : ℝ) := by linarith
    by_cases h : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
    · -- Case where 2x - 1 ≥ 0
      have h2 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h
      rw [h2] at h1
      have hx_eq2 : x = ((2 - r) / 2 : ℝ) := by linarith
      refine ⟨(2 - r) / 2, by
        norm_num at hx_eq2 ⊢
        all_goals try { linarith }
      ⟩
    · -- Case where 2x - 1 < 0
      have h2 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_neg (lt_of_not_ge h)
      rw [h2] at h1
      have hx_eq2 : x = ( (r : ℝ) / 2 ) := by linarith
      refine ⟨r / 2, by
        norm_num at hx_eq2 ⊢
        all_goals try { linarith }
      ⟩

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q, prove there exists a rational q' such that f x = q'
    rintro ⟨q, hq⟩
    have hx0 : x ≥ 0 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx]
    have h1 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
      rw [show x = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
    have h2 : ∃ r : ℚ, (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by
      refine ⟨2 * q - 1, by simp_all⟩
    rcases h2 with ⟨r, hr⟩
    have h6 : ∃ q' : ℚ, (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (q' : ℝ) := by
      have h7 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (|r| : ℝ) := by
        have h8 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by
          linarith [hr]
        rw [h8]
      use (1 - |r| : ℚ)
      rw [h7]
      all_goals norm_num
    rcases h6 with ⟨q', hq'⟩
    exact ⟨q', by linarith⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q, prove there exists a rational q' such that x = q'
    rintro ⟨q, hq⟩
    have hx0 : x ≥ 0 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at hq
    have h1 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by
      linarith
    have h3 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (1 - (q : ℝ)) ∨ (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = - (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by
      cases eq_or_eq_neg_of_abs_eq h1 with
      | inl h => 
        left
        linarith
      | inr h => 
        right
        linarith
    cases h3 with
    | inl h4 =>
      have hx_eq : x = (1 - (q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      have h4 : ∃ q' : ℚ, x = (q' : ℝ) := by
        refine ⟨1 - q / 2, by
          simp_all
        ⟩
      tauto
    | inr h4 =>
      have hx_eq : x = ((q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      have h4 : ∃ q' : ℚ, x = (q' : ℝ) := by
        refine ⟨q / 2, by
          simp_all
        ⟩
      tauto

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Forward direction: if x is rational, then f(x) is rational
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hfx : f (q : ℝ) = 1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| := by
      specialize hf (q : ℝ)
      simpa using hf
    refine ⟨1 - |2 * q - 1|, by
      rw [show f (q : ℝ) = 1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| by linarith [hfx]]
      all_goals norm_num at h_eq ⊢
      all_goals try { linarith }
    ⟩
  · -- Backward direction: if f(x) is rational, then x is rational
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hx0 : x ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.1
    have hx1 : x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.2
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at h_eq
    have h1 : 1 - |2 * x - 1| = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h2 : |2 * x - 1| = 1 - (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h3 : (1 : ℝ) - (q : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
      have h4 : |2 * x - 1| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1)
      nlinarith
    have h4 : q ≤ (1 : ℚ) := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have h5 : (q : ℝ) > (1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast h
      have h6 : (1 : ℝ) - (q : ℝ) < 0 := by linarith
      have h7 : |2 * x - 1| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1)
      nlinarith
    have h7 : q ≥ (0 : ℚ) := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have h8 : (q : ℝ) < (0 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast h
      have h9 : (1 : ℝ) - (q : ℝ) > (1 : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h10 : |2 * x - 1| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1)
      have h11 : (1 : ℝ) - (q : ℝ) ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith [abs_le.mp (show |2 * x - 1| ≤ (1 : ℝ) by
          cases abs_cases (2 * x - 1) with
          | inl h =>
            nlinarith
          | inr h =>
            nlinarith
        )]
      linarith
    cases abs_cases (2 * x - 1) with
    | inl h =>
      have h12 : 2 * x - 1 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h.1]
      have h13 : 2 * x - 1 = (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by linarith [h.2, h2]
      have h14 : x = (1 - (q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      refine ⟨1 - q / 2, by
        rw [h14]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩
    | inr h =>
      have h12 : 2 * x - 1 < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith [h.1]

        nlinarith
      refine ⟨q / 2, by
        rw [h14]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)

  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q
    intro h

      rw [h_eq1]

        have h_eq1 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℝ) := h1
        have h_eq2 : (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by
          exact_mod_cast hr

    ⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, h_eq⟩

    have h_eq1 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by
      have h_eq2 : f x = (q : ℝ) := by
        exact_mod_cast h_eq
      rw [hfx] at h_eq2
      linarith
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by

    have h_eq2 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
      nlinarith
    cases abs_cases (2 * x - 1) with

        nlinarith
      have h_eq6 : ∃ r : ℚ, x = (r : ℝ) := by
        refine ⟨1 - (q / 2), by

        nlinarith
      have h_eq6 : ∃ r : ℚ, x = (r : ℝ) := by
        refine ⟨q / 2, by

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by

        have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        exact h2.1
      linarith
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ≤ 1 := by
        have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        exact h2.2
      linarith
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx]
    have h1 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := by 
      rw [show (x : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [hq]]
    have h2 : ∃ r : ℚ, (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by
      have h3 : ∃ s : ℚ, (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (s : ℝ) := by
        use (2 * q - 1 : ℚ)
        rw [h1]
        all_goals norm_num at hq ⊢
        all_goals try linarith
      rcases h3 with ⟨s, hs⟩
      have h4 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (|s| : ℝ) := by
        have h5 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (s : ℝ) := by
          linarith [hs]
        rw [h5]
      use (1 - |s| : ℚ)
      rw [show (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (1 - |s| : ℝ) by
        linarith [h4]
      ]
      all_goals norm_num at *
    rcases h2 with ⟨r, hr⟩
    refine ⟨r, by linarith⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ≥ 0 := by
        have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        exact h2.1
      linarith
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ≤ 1 := by
        have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
        exact h2.2
      linarith
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at hq
    have h1 : ∃ r : ℚ, (|2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by
      have h2 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by
        linarith [hq]
      have h3 : (|2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by
        linarith

      rw [h3]
      all_goals norm_num
    rcases h1 with ⟨r, hr⟩
    have h2 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) ∨ (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (-r : ℝ) := by
      cases abs_cases (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) with
      | inl h =>
        left
        linarith
      | inr h =>
        right
        linarith
    cases h2 with
    | inl h3 =>
      have h4 : ∃ s : ℚ, x = (s : ℝ) := by
        use (1 + r) / 2
        have h5 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h3]
        have h6 : (x : ℝ) = (1 + r) / 2 := by
          linarith
        linarith
      rcases h4 with ⟨s, hs⟩
      refine ⟨s, by linarith⟩
    | inr h3 =>
      have h4 : ∃ s : ℚ, x = (s : ℝ) := by
        use (1 - r) / 2
        have h5 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (-r : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h3]
        have h6 : (x : ℝ) = (1 - r) / 2 := by
          linarith
        linarith

      refine ⟨s, by linarith⟩

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  rcases hx with ⟨hx0, hx1⟩
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational number q such that x = q
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hx2 : x = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have hfx : f x = (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) := by
      specialize hf x
      simpa using hf
    have h1 : ∃ q' : ℚ, f x = (q' : ℝ) := by
      use (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℚ)
      rw [hfx]
      rw [show x = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
      by_cases h : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where $2q - 1 \geq 0$, so $|2q - 1| = 2q - 1$
        have habs : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h
        rw [habs]
        norm_num
      · -- Case where 2q - 1 < 0
        have habs : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_neg (lt_of_not_ge h)
        rw [habs]
        norm_num
    tauto
  · -- Assume there exists a rational number q such that f x = q
    rintro ⟨q, h_eq⟩
    have hfx : f x = (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) := by
      specialize hf x
      simpa using hf
    rw [hfx] at h_eq
    have h1 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by linarith
    cases' abs_cases (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) with h2 h2
    · -- Case where $2x - 1 \geq 0$, so $|2x - 1| = 2x - 1$
      have hx_eq : x = (1 - (q / 2) : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      refine ⟨1 - (q / 2 : ℚ), by
        rw [hx_eq]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩
    · -- Case where 2x - 1 < 0
      have hx_eq : x = (q / 2 : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      refine ⟨q / 2, by
        rw [hx_eq]
      ⟩

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :

    have hx2 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.2

    rw [hfx] at h_eq
    have h1 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
      linarith
    have h2 : (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
      have h3 : |2 * x - 1| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1)
      linarith [h1, h3]

        have h7 : 2 * x - 1 ≤ 1 := by

    have h12 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := h1

      have h17 : x = (q : ℝ) / 2 := by
        linarith
      have h18 : ∃ q' : ℚ, x = (q' : ℝ) := by
        use q / 2
        rw [h17]
        all_goals
          norm_num
      rcases h18 with ⟨q', h_eq'⟩
      exact ⟨q', h_eq'⟩
