      refine ⟨1 - (q / 2 : ℚ), by simp [hx_eq]⟩
    | inr h9 =>
      have hx_eq : x = (q / 2 : ℚ) : ℝ := by
        have h10 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = - (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by linarith [h9]
        have h11 : (2 * x : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by
          linarith
        have h12 : x = (q : ℝ) / 2 := by
          linarith
        have h13 : (q : ℝ) / 2 = (q / 2 : ℚ) : ℝ := by
          simp
        rw [h13] at h12
        linarith
      refine ⟨q / 2, by simp [hx_eq]⟩

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q, prove there exists a rational r such that f x = r
    rintro ⟨q, h⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.1
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.2
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    have h2 : ∃ r : ℚ, f x = (r : ℝ) := by
      use 1 - |2 * (q : ℚ) - 1|
      have h3 : f x = (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℝ) := by
        rw [hfx]
        have h4 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          have h5 : x = (q : ℝ) := by
            linarith
          rw [h5]
        rw [h4]
      rw [h3]
      all_goals norm_num
    tauto
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q, prove there exists a rational r such that x = r
    rintro ⟨q, h⟩
    have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.1
    have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.2
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    have h_eq : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith [hfx, h]
    have h4 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by
      have h5 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      have h6 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1 : ℝ)
      have h7 : (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
        nlinarith
      nlinarith
    cases' abs_cases (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) with h h <;> 
      try { 
        have hx_eq : x = (1 - (q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith
        refine ⟨1 - (q / 2 : ℚ), by
          norm_num at hx_eq ⊢
          all_goals try { linarith }⟩
      }
      try { 
        have hx_eq : x = ((q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith
        refine ⟨(q / 2 : ℚ), by
          norm_num at hx_eq ⊢
          all_goals try { linarith }⟩
      }

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q
    rintro ⟨q, hq⟩
    have hx0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hx_eq : x = (q : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast hq
    have hfx : f x = (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) := by
      specialize hf x
      simpa using hf
    rw [hfx]
    have h1 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
      have hx3 : x = (q : ℝ) := hx_eq
      rw [hx3]
    by_cases h : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
    · -- Case where 2q - 1 >= 0
      have h4 : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
        rw [abs_of_nonneg h]
      have h5 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        have h6 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := h1
        rw [h6]
        rw [h4]
        all_goals
          ring_nf
      have h7 : ∃ r : ℚ, (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by
        use (2 - 2 * q)
        rw [h5]
        all_goals
          norm_num
      rcases h7 with ⟨r, hr⟩
      refine ⟨r, by
        simp [hr]
      ⟩
    · -- Case where 2q - 1 < 0
      have h8 : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h9 : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
        rw [abs_of_neg h8]
      have h10 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        have h6 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := h1
        rw [h6]
        rw [h9]
        all_goals
          ring_nf
      have h7 : ∃ r : ℚ, (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (r : ℝ) := by
        use (2 * q)
        rw [h10]
        all_goals
          norm_num
      rcases h7 with ⟨r, hr⟩
      refine ⟨r, by
        simp [hr]
      ⟩
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q
    rintro ⟨q, hq⟩
    have hx0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.left
    have hx1 : x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.right
    have hfx : f x = (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) := by
      specialize hf x
      simpa using hf
    have h1 : (f x : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast hq
    rw [hfx] at h1
    have h3 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
      nlinarith
    by_cases h : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
    · -- Case where 2x - 1 >= 0
      have h4 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := by
        rw [abs_of_nonneg h]
      have h5 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        linarith [h3, h4]
      have h6 : x = (1 - (q / 2) : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      have h7 : ∃ r : ℚ, x = (r : ℝ) := by
        use (1 - (q / 2) : ℚ)
        rw [h6]
        all_goals
          norm_num
      exact h7
    · -- 2x - 1 < 0
      have h7 : (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h8 : |(2 * x - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) := by
        rw [abs_of_neg h7]
      have h9 : - (2 * x - 1 : ℝ) = (1 - (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        linarith [h3, h8]
      have h10 : x = ((q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      have h11 : ∃ r : ℚ, x = (r : ℝ) := by
        use (q / 2 : ℚ)
        rw [h10]
        all_goals
          norm_num
      exact h11

theorem subq_II_2
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :
    (∃ q : ℚ, x = (q : ℝ)) ↔ (∃ q : ℚ, f x = (q : ℝ)) := by
  constructor
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that x = q, we need to show there exists a rational q such that f x = q
    rintro ⟨q, h⟩
    have hx0 : x = (q : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast h
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx]
    rw [show x = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
    by_cases h2 : (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
    · -- In this case, |2q - 1| = 2q - 1
      have h3 : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h2
      have h4 : (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        rw [h3]
        all_goals ring_nf
      have h5 : ∃ q' : ℚ, (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℝ) = (q' : ℝ) := by
        refine ⟨2 - 2 * q, by
          norm_num at h4 ⊢
          all_goals try { linarith [h4] }
        ⟩
      exact h5
    · -- Case where 2q - 1 < 0
      have h3 : |(2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_neg (show (2 * (q : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) < 0 by linarith)
      have h4 : (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℝ) = (2 * (q : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
        rw [h3]
        all_goals ring_nf
      have h5 : ∃ q' : ℚ, (1 - |2 * (q : ℝ) - 1| : ℝ) = (q' : ℝ) := by
        refine ⟨2 * q, by
          norm_num at h4 ⊢
          all_goals try { linarith [h4] }
        ⟩
      exact h5
  · -- Assume there exists a rational q such that f x = q, we need to show there exists a rational q such that x = q
    rintro ⟨q, h⟩
    have hfx : f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1| := hf x
    rw [hfx] at h
    have hx1 : 0 ≤ x := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.1
    have hx2 : x ≤ 1 := by
      have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
      exact h1.2
    have h1 : (1 - |2 * x - 1| : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith
    have h2 : |2 * x - 1| = (1 - (q : ℝ)) := by
      nlinarith
    cases eq_or_eq_neg_of_abs_eq h2 with
    | inl h3 =>
      have h4 : x = (1 - (q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith
      refine ⟨1 - q / 2, by
        norm_num at h4 ⊢
        all_goals try { linarith [h4] }
      ⟩
    | inr h3 =>
      have h4 : x = ((q : ℝ) / 2 : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith
      refine ⟨q / 2, by
        norm_num at h4 ⊢
        all_goals try { linarith [h4] }
      ⟩

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      all_goals
        simp
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have h3 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3, h_eq]
      by_cases h : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < (1 / 2 : ℝ)
      · -- Case where `f^[k] x` is in the left side of the interval
        have h4 : 0 ≤ (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
          have h8 : ∀ (m : ℕ), f^[m] x ≥ (0 : ℝ) ∧ f^[m] x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
            intro m
            induction m with
            | zero =>
              constructor
              · -- Show f^0 x ≥ 0
                have h9 : f^[0] x = x := by
                  simp
                rw [h9]
                linarith [h1.1]
              · -- Show f^0 x ≤ 1
                have h9 : f^[0] x = x := by
                  simp
                rw [h9]
                linarith [h1.2]
            | succ k' ihk' =>
              have h11 : f^[k' + 1] x = f (f^[k'] x) := by
                simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
              rw [h11]
              constructor
              · -- Show f (f^[k'] x) ≥ 0
                have h13 : f (f^[k'] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := by
                  apply hf
                rw [h13]
                have h14 : -1 ≤ (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ) ∧ (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
                  constructor
                  · -- Show -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1
                    nlinarith [ihk'.1, ihk'.2]
                  · -- Show 2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 ≤ 1
                    nlinarith [ihk'.1, ihk'.2]
                have h15 : |(2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ)| ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
                  apply abs_le.mpr
                  constructor <;> linarith
                have h16 : (1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| : ℝ) ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
                  linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ), h15]
                linarith
              · -- Show f (f^[k'] x) ≤ 1
                have h13 : f (f^[k'] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := by
                  apply hf
                rw [h13]
                have h14 : |(2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ)| ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
                  apply abs_nonneg
                have h15 : (1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| : ℝ) ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
                  linarith
                linarith
          have h9 : f^[k] x ≥ (0 : ℝ) := (h8 k).1
          nlinarith
        have h7 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < (1 / 2 : ℝ) := h
        have h8 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h10 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) < (0 : ℝ) := by
            nlinarith
          have h11 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h10]
          have h12 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h12, h11]
          ring_nf
        use (2 * a), (2 * b)
        rw [h8]
        all_goals
          ring_nf
      · -- Case where `f^[k] x` is in the right side of the interval
        have h4 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by
          by_contra h
          push_neg at h
          have h7 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by linarith
          tauto
        have h5 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
          have h8 : ∀ (m : ℕ), f^[m] x ≥ (0 : ℝ) ∧ f^[m] x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
            intro m
            induction m with
            | zero =>
              constructor
              · -- Show f^0 x ≥ 0
                have h9 : f^[0] x = x := by
                  simp
                rw [h9]
                linarith [h1.1]
              · -- Show f^0 x ≤ 1
                have h9 : f^[0] x = x := by
                  simp
                rw [h9]
                linarith [h1.2]
            | succ k' ihk' =>
              have h11 : f^[k' + 1] x = f (f^[k'] x) := by
                simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
              rw [h11]
              constructor
              · -- Show f (f^[k'] x) ≥ 0
                have h13 : f (f^[k'] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := by
                  apply hf
                rw [h13]
                have h14 : -1 ≤ (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ) ∧ (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
                  constructor
                  · -- Show -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1
                    nlinarith [ihk'.1, ihk'.2]
                  · -- Show 2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 ≤ 1
                    nlinarith [ihk'.1, ihk'.2]
                have h15 : |(2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ)| ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
                  apply abs_le.mpr
                  constructor <;> linarith
                have h16 : (1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| : ℝ) ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
                  linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ), h15]
                linarith
              · -- Show f (f^[k'] x) ≤ 1
                have h13 : f (f^[k'] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := by
                  apply hf
                rw [h13]
                have h14 : |(2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ)| ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
                  apply abs_nonneg
                have h15 : (1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| : ℝ) ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
                  linarith
                linarith
          have h9 : f^[k] x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := (h8 k).2
          have h10 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
            nlinarith [h_eq, h9]
          linarith
        have h6 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h7 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := h4
          have h8 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≤ (1 : ℝ) := h5
          have h9 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
            nlinarith
          have h11 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_nonneg h9]
          have h12 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h12, h11]
          ring_nf
        use (-2 * a), (2 - 2 * b)
        rw [h6]
        all_goals
          ring_nf
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ k ihk =>
      rcases ihk with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have h3 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      rw [h_eq]
      have h4 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [h4]
      by_cases h : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≥ 0
        have h5 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg]
          linarith
        rw [h5]
        have eq1 : (1 - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1) : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * (a : ℝ) * x - 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          ring_nf
        rw [eq1]
        refine' ⟨-2 * a, 2 - 2 * b, ?_⟩
        field_simp
        all_goals ring_nf
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 < 0
        have h6 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg]
          linarith
        rw [h6]
        have eq2 : (1 - (- (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1)) : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          ring_nf
        rw [eq2]
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, ?_⟩
        field_simp
        all_goals ring_nf
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by 
  refine ⟨0, (0 : ℤ), by
    norm_num [Function.iterate_succ_apply', hf, Set.mem_Icc] at hx ⊢
  ⟩

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have eq1 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [eq1]
      rw [h_eq]
      have h3 : f ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [h3]
      by_cases h : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≥ 0
        have h4 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg h]
        rw [h4]
        have eq2 : (1 - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1) : ℝ) = (2 : ℝ) - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          nlinarith
        rw [eq2]
        refine' ⟨-2 * a, (2 : ℤ) - 2 * b, ?_⟩
        field_simp at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 < 0
        have h5 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg (show (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) < 0 by linarith)]
        rw [h5]
        have eq3 : (1 - (- (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1)) : ℝ) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          nlinarith
        rw [eq3]
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, ?_⟩
        field_simp at *
        all_goals nlinarith
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
    have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
    exact h1.1
  have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
    have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
    exact h1.2
  have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h⟩
      have h2 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h2]
      rw [h]
      by_cases h3 : (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where $2a x + 2b - 1 \geq 0$
        have h4 : |(2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ))| = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg]
          linarith
        have eq1 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) := by
          have h5 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h5]
          have h6 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) := by ring
          rw [h6]
          rw [h4]
        have eq2 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = (-2 * (a : ℝ)) * x + (2 - 2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          linarith [eq1]
        use -2 * a, 2 - 2 * b
        rw [eq2]
        all_goals
          simp
          all_goals
            ring_nf
      · -- Case where $2a x + 2b - 1 < 0$
        have h4 : |(2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ))| = - (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg]
          linarith
        have eq1 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 + (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) := by
          have h5 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h5]
          have h6 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) := by ring
          rw [h6]
          rw [h4]
          all_goals
            ring
        have eq2 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = (2 * (a : ℝ)) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          linarith [eq1]
        use 2 * a, 2 * b
        rw [eq2]
        all_goals
          simp
          all_goals
            ring_nf
  specialize h1 n
  simpa using h1

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have eq1 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [eq1]
      rw [h_eq]
      have h3 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        specialize hf ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ))
        simpa using hf
      rw [h3]
      by_cases h : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0
      · -- Case where $2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0$
        have h4 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg]
          linarith
        rw [h4]
        use -2 * a, 2 - 2 * b
        field_simp at h ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith [h1.1, h1.2]
      · -- Case where $2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0$
        have h5 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = 1 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h6 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) < 0 := by linarith
          rw [abs_of_neg h6]
          all_goals nlinarith
        rw [h5]
        use 2 * a, 2 * b
        field_simp at h ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith [h1.1, h1.2]
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h⟩
      have h3 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      rw [h]
      by_cases h4 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 2 : ℝ)
      · -- Case where $y \geq 1/2$
        have h5 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h6 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := h4
          have h7 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h8 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_nonneg h7]
          have h9 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h9, h8]
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h5]
        use (-2 * a), (2 - 2 * b)
        field_simp at *
        ring_nf
      · -- Case where $y < 1/2$
        have h5 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h6 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by linarith
          have h7 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0 := by linarith
          have h8 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h7]
          have h9 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h9, h8]
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h5]
        use (2 * a), (2 * b)
        field_simp at *
        ring_nf
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      refine ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have h3 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      rw [h_eq]
      by_cases h : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < (1 / 2 : ℝ)
      · -- Case where `f^n x` is less than 1/2
        have h4 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h5 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by linarith
          have h6 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0 := by
            nlinarith
          have h7 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h6]
          rw [hf]
          rw [h7]
          all_goals ring_nf
        rw [h4]
        use (2 * a), (2 * b)
        field_simp at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      · -- Case where `f^n x` is greater or equal to 1/2
        have h8 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by
          by_contra h9
          push_neg at h9
          have h10 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by linarith
          linarith
        have h9 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h10 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := h8
          have h11 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0 := by
            nlinarith
          have h12 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_nonneg h11]
          rw [hf]
          rw [h12]
          all_goals ring_nf
        rw [h9]
        use (-2 * a), (2 - 2 * b)
        field_simp at *
        all_goals nlinarith
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

      rw [h_eq]

        rw [h4]

theorem subq_II_4_a

            apply abs_of_nonneg
            linarith
          rw [h5]

            ring_nf
        rw [h3]
        refine ⟨-2 * a, (2 - 2 * b : ℤ), by
          simp [mul_add, add_mul]

        ⟩

          all_goals

        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3, h]
      by_cases h4 : (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) ≥ 0

        have h5 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1) := by
          have h6 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0 := by
            nlinarith

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      refine ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have h3 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3, h_eq]
      have h4 : 0 ≤ (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ∧ (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
        have h8 : f^[k] x ≥ (0 : ℝ) ∧ f^[k] x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
          have h5 : ∀ (n : ℕ), f^[n] x ≥ 0 ∧ f^[n] x ≤ 1 := by
            intro n
            induction n with
            | zero =>
              constructor
              · linarith [h1.left, h1.right]
              · linarith [h1.left, h1.right]
            | succ k ihk =>
              have h7 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
                simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
              have h8 : 0 ≤ f^[k] x ∧ f^[k] x ≤ 1 := by
                tauto
              have h9 : 0 ≤ f (f^[k] x) ∧ f (f^[k] x) ≤ 1 := by
                have h10 : f (f^[k] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| := by
                  apply hf
                rw [h10]
                have h11 : -1 ≤ (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ) ∧ (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
                  have h12 : 0 ≤ f^[k] x := h8.left
                  have h13 : f^[k] x ≤ 1 := h8.right
                  constructor
                  · nlinarith
                  · nlinarith
                have h17 : |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| ≤ 1 := by
                  have h18 : -1 ≤ (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ) := by linarith [h11.left]
                  have h19 : (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by linarith [h11.right]
                  apply abs_le.mpr
                  constructor <;> linarith
                constructor
                · -- Show 0 ≤ 1 - |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1|
                  linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1), h17]
                · -- Show 1 - |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| ≤ 1
                  linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1), h17]
              tauto
          specialize h5 k
          tauto
        have h13 : f^[k] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h_eq]
        rw [h13] at h8
        tauto
      have h14 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      by_cases h : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≥ 0
        have h15 : |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg h]
        have h16 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [h14, h15]
          all_goals
            nlinarith
        have h17 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = (-2 * (a : ℝ)) * x + (2 - 2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          nlinarith
        rw [h17]
        refine ⟨-2 * a, 2 - 2 * b, by simp⟩
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 < 0
        have h18 : |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg (show 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0 by linarith)]
        have h19 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [h14, h18]
          all_goals
            nlinarith
        have h17 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = (2 * (a : ℝ)) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          nlinarith
        rw [h17]
        refine ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, by simp⟩
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

        have abs_eq : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by
          have h4 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by ring
          rw [h4]
          rw [abs_of_neg (show (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) < 0 by linarith)]
        rw [abs_eq]
        use 2 * a, 2 * b
        field_simp at *
        ring_nf
  exact h1 n

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :

  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by

      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ k ih =>

        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [eq1]
      rw [h_eq]
      have h3 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [h3]
      by_cases h : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≥ 0

          rw [abs_of_nonneg h]
        rw [h4]
        have eq2 : (1 : ℝ) - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1) = (-2 * (a : ℝ)) * x + (-2 * (b : ℝ) + 2) := by
          ring_nf
        rw [eq2]
        refine' ⟨-2 * a, -2 * b + 2, by simp_all [mul_add, add_mul]⟩
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 < 0
        have h5 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg (show (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) < 0 by linarith)]
        rw [h5]
        have eq3 : (1 : ℝ) - (- (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1)) = (2 * (a : ℝ)) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          ring_nf
        rw [eq3]
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, by simp_all [mul_add, add_mul]⟩
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : x ≥ 0 := by
    have h2 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
    exact h2.1
  have h2 : x ≤ 1 := by
    have h3 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
    exact h3.2
  have h3 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h⟩
      have h4 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h4]
      rw [h]
      have h5 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [h5]
      by_cases h6 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) ≤ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≤ 0
        have h7 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - 2 * (a * x) - 2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonpos h6]
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h7]
        use (2 * a), (2 * b)
        field_simp at *
        ring_nf
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 > 0
        have h8 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) > 0 := by linarith
        have h9 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (a * x) + 2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_pos h8]
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h9]
        use (-2 * a), (2 - 2 * b)
        field_simp at *
        ring_nf
  specialize h3 n
  simpa using h3

    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by

        specialize hf ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) )
        simpa using hf
      rw [h2]
      by_cases h : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where $2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0$
        have h3 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by

        refine' ⟨-2 * a, 2 - 2 * b, by

        ⟩

        have h3 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) : ℝ) := by
          have h4 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) < 0 := by linarith
          rw [abs_of_neg h4]
          all_goals nlinarith
        rw [h3]
        have h4 : (1 : ℝ) - (1 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) : ℝ) = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith
        rw [h4]
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, by
          simp [mul_add, add_mul]

        ⟩

  simpa using h1

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by

    | succ k ihk =>
      rcases ihk with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have h3 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      rw [h_eq]
      have h4 : 0 ≤ (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ∧ (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
        have h8 : ∀ (n : ℕ), f^[n] x ≥ 0 ∧ f^[n] x ≤ 1 := by
          intro n
          induction n with
          | zero =>
            constructor
            · linarith [h1.1]
            · linarith [h1.2]
          | succ k' ihk' =>
            have h9 : f^[k' + 1] x = f (f^[k'] x) := by
              simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
            rw [h9]
            have h10 : f (f^[k'] x) ≥ 0 := by
              have h11 : f^[k'] x ≥ 0 := (ihk').1
              have h12 : f^[k'] x ≤ 1 := (ihk').2
              have h13 : f (f^[k'] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := by
                apply hf
              rw [h13]
              cases' abs_cases (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1) with h h <;> 
                all_goals
                  linarith
            have h14 : f (f^[k'] x) ≤ 1 := by
              have h11 : f^[k'] x ≥ 0 := (ihk').1
              have h12 : f^[k'] x ≤ 1 := (ihk').2
              have h13 : f (f^[k'] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := by
                apply hf
              rw [h13]
              cases' abs_cases (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1) with h h <;> 
                all_goals
                  linarith
            constructor
            · linarith
            · linarith
        specialize h8 k
        tauto
      by_cases h : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≥ 0
        have h7 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h8 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h8]
          rw [abs_of_nonneg h]
          all_goals
            linarith
        have eq1 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = (-2 * (a : ℝ) : ℝ) * x + (2 - 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          rw [h7]
          ring_nf
        have eq2 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = ((-2 * a : ℤ) : ℝ) * x + ((2 - 2 * b : ℤ) : ℝ) := by
          rw [eq1]
        refine' ⟨-2 * a, 2 - 2 * b, by
          simp_all [Function.iterate_succ_apply', eq2]
        ⟩
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 < 0
        have h7 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h8 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h8]
          have h9 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
          rw [abs_of_neg h9]
          all_goals
            linarith
        have eq1 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = (2 * (a : ℝ) : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          rw [h7]
          ring_nf
        have eq2 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = ((2 * a : ℤ) : ℝ) * x + ((2 * b : ℤ) : ℝ) := by
          rw [eq1]
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, by
          simp_all [Function.iterate_succ_apply', eq2]
        ⟩
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)

      · -- Show that x ≤ 1

    | succ n ih =>

      have h10 : f (f^[n] x) ≥ 0 := by

          nlinarith
      have h11 : f (f^[n] x) ≤ 1 := by
        have h12 : f (f^[n] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[n] x) - 1| := by
          apply hf
        rw [h12]
        cases abs_cases (2 * (f^[n] x) - 1) with
        | inl h =>
          nlinarith
        | inr h =>
          nlinarith
      constructor
      · -- Show that f^[n + 1] x ≥ 0
        rw [h7]
        linarith
      · -- Show that f^[n + 1] x ≤ 1
        rw [h7]
        linarith
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have h3 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      rw [h_eq]
      have h6 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
        have h7 : f^[n] x ≥ 0 := by
          exact (h4 n).left
        have h8 : f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
          linarith
        linarith
      have h7 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
        have h8 : f^[n] x ≤ 1 := by
          exact (h4 n).right
        have h9 : f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
          linarith
        linarith
      have h10 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      by_cases h : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < (1 / 2 : ℝ)
      · -- Case where (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < 1/2
        have h11 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [h10]
          have h12 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0 := by
            nlinarith
          rw [abs_of_neg h12]
          all_goals
            linarith
        have eq1 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = (2 * a : ℝ) * x + (2 * b : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h11]
        use (2 * a), (2 * b)
        rw [eq1]
        all_goals
          norm_num
      · -- Case where (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≥ 1/2
        have h12 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [h10]
          have h13 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0 := by
            nlinarith
          rw [abs_of_nonneg h13]
          all_goals
            linarith
        have eq2 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = (-2 * a : ℝ) * x + (2 - 2 * b : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h12]
        use (-2 * a), (2 - 2 * b)
        rw [eq2]
        all_goals
          norm_num
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  rcases h1 with ⟨hx0, hx1⟩
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      refine' ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have eq1 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [eq1]
      rw [h_eq]
      by_cases h : (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2*a*x + 2*b - 1 ≥ 0
        have eq2 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
          apply hf
        rw [eq2]
        have eq3 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by ring
        rw [eq3] at *
        have eq4 : |(2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ)| = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg h]
        rw [eq4]
        refine' ⟨-2 * a, 2 - 2 * b, by
          field_simp at *
          linarith
        ⟩
      · -- Case where 2*a*x + 2*b - 1 < 0
        have eq2 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
          apply hf
        rw [eq2]
        have eq3 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by ring
        rw [eq3] at *
        have eq4 : |(2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ)| = - (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg (show (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) < 0 by linarith)]
        rw [eq4]
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, by
          field_simp at *
          linarith
        ⟩
  exact h2 n

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
    have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
    exact h1.1
  have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
    have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
    exact h1.2
  have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      refine ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨c, d, h2⟩
      have h3 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      rw [h2]
      have h4 : f (c * x + d : ℝ) = 1 - |2 * (c * x + d : ℝ) - 1| := by
        specialize hf (c * x + d : ℝ)
        simpa using hf
      rw [h4]
      by_cases h : (2 * (c * x + d : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (c * x + d) - 1 ≥ 0
        have h5 : |(2 * (c * x + d : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (c * x + d : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h
        rw [h5]
        use -2 * c
        use (2 - 2 * d : ℤ)
        field_simp at *
        ring_nf
      · -- Case where 2 * (c * x + d) - 1 < 0
        have h6 : |(2 * (c * x + d : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * (c * x + d : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_neg (show (2 * (c * x + d : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ) < 0 by linarith)
        rw [h6]
        use (2 * c : ℤ)
        use (2 * d : ℤ)
        field_simp at *
        ring_nf
  apply h1 n

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by

    | zero =>

    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have eq1 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [eq1]
      rw [h_eq]
      have eq2 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [eq2]
      by_cases h : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0
      · -- Case where $2 * (a x + b) - 1 \geq 0$
        have abs_eq : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg]
          linarith
        rw [abs_eq]
        have eq3 : (1 : ℝ) - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1) = (-2 * (a : ℝ)) * x + (2 - 2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          ring_nf
        rw [eq3]
        refine' ⟨-2 * a, 2 - 2 * b, by simp_all [mul_add, add_mul]⟩
      · -- Case where $2 * (a x + b) - 1 < 0$
        have abs_eq : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg]
          linarith
        rw [abs_eq]
        have eq3 : (1 : ℝ) - (- (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1)) = (2 * (a : ℝ)) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) := by
          ring_nf
        rw [eq3]
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b - 1, by simp_all [mul_add, add_mul]⟩
  apply h2 n

          rw [h6]

  simpa using h2

      have h4 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [h4]
      by_cases h : (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where the argument is non-negative
        have h5 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by
          have h6 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by ring
          rw [h6]
          rw [abs_of_nonneg h]
        rw [h5]
        use -2 * a, 2 - 2 * b
        field_simp at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      · -- Case where the argument is negative
        have h5 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by
          have h6 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by ring
          rw [h6]
          rw [abs_of_neg (show (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) < 0 by linarith)]
        rw [h5]
        use 2 * a, 2 * b
        field_simp at *
        all_goals nlinarith
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have h3 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      rw [h_eq]
      by_cases h4 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≤ (1 / 2 : ℝ)
      · -- if a*x + b ≤ 1/2, then f(a*x + b) = 2*(a*x + b)
        have h4' : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h5 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≤ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := h4
          have h6 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≤ 0 := by linarith
          have h7 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_nonpos h6]
            all_goals linarith
          rw [hf]
          rw [h7]
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h4']
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, ?_⟩
        field_simp at h_eq ⊢
        nlinarith [h_eq, h1.left, h1.right]
      · -- if a*x + b > 1/2, then f(a*x + b) = 2 - 2*(a*x + b)
        have h4' : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h5 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) > (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by linarith
          have h6 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 > 0 := by linarith
          have h7 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_pos h6]
          rw [hf]
          rw [h7]
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h4']
        refine' ⟨-2 * a, (2 - 2 * b : ℤ), ?_⟩
        field_simp at h_eq ⊢
        nlinarith [h_eq, h1.left, h1.right]
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have eq1 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [eq1]
      rw [h_eq]
      have eq2 : f ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) = 1 - |2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [eq2]
      by_cases h : 2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1 ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≥ 0
        use -2 * a, 2 - 2 * b
        have h3 : |(2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg h]
        have eq3 : (1 - |2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1| : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * (a : ℝ) * x - 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          calc
            (1 - |2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1| : ℝ) = 1 - (2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
              rw [h3]
            _ = (2 - 2 * (a : ℝ) * x - 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
              ring_nf
        have eq4 : (2 - 2 * (a : ℝ) * x - 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) = ((-2 * a : ℝ) * x + (2 - 2 * b : ℝ)) := by
          simp at *
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        rw [eq3, eq4]
        all_goals
          norm_num
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 < 0
        use 2 * a, 2 * b
        have h4 : |(2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg (show 2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1 < (0 : ℝ) by linarith)]
        have eq5 : (1 - |2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1| : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          calc
            (1 - |2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1| : ℝ) = 1 + (2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1 : ℝ) := by
              rw [h4]
              all_goals
                ring_nf
            _ = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
              ring_nf
        have eq6 : (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) = ((2 * a : ℝ) * x + (2 * b : ℝ)) := by
          simp at *
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        rw [eq5, eq6]
        all_goals
          norm_num
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have hx0 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
        simpa using hx
      have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), f^[n] x ≥ 0 ∧ f^[n] x ≤ 1 := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          constructor
          · linarith [hx0.left]
          · linarith [hx0.right]
        | succ n ih2 =>
          have h3 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
            simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
          rw [h3]
          have h4 : 0 ≤ f^[n] x ∧ f^[n] x ≤ 1 := ih2
          have h5 : f (f^[n] x) ≥ 0 := by
            have h6 : f (f^[n] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[n] x) - 1| := hf (f^[n] x)
            rw [h6]
            have h7 : -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[n] x) - 1 ∧ 2 * (f^[n] x) - 1 ≤ 1 := by
              constructor
              · linarith [h4.left, h4.right]
              · linarith [h4.left, h4.right]
            have h8 : |(2 * (f^[n] x) - 1 : ℝ)| ≤ 1 := by
              apply abs_le.mpr
              constructor <;> linarith
            linarith
          have h9 : f (f^[n] x) ≤ 1 := by
            have h6 : f (f^[n] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[n] x) - 1| := hf (f^[n] x)
            rw [h6]
            have h10 : |(2 * (f^[n] x) - 1 : ℝ)| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[n] x) - 1)
            linarith
          constructor
          · linarith
          · linarith
      have h3 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      have h4 : f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
        simpa using h_eq
      rw [h3, h4]
      have h5 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [h5]
      by_cases h : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
      · -- If 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≥ 0, then f(a * x + b) = 2 - 2a x - 2b
        have h8 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg h]
        have eq1 : (1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * (a : ℝ) * x - 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          rw [h8]
          nlinarith
        rw [eq1]
        refine' ⟨-2 * a, 2 - 2 * b, ?_⟩
        field_simp at *
        nlinarith
      · -- Case 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 < 0
        have h9 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h10 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg h9]
        have eq2 : (1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          rw [h10]
          nlinarith
        rw [eq2]
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, ?_⟩
        field_simp at *
        nlinarith
  apply h1 n

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by 
  use (0 : ℤ), (0 : ℤ)
  simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply', hf]
  all_goals try { linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * x - 1), abs_le.mp (show |2 * x - 1| ≤ 1 by
    have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
      simpa using hx
    have h2 : -1 ≤ 2 * x - 1 := by linarith
    have h3 : 2 * x - 1 ≤ 1 := by linarith
    apply abs_le.mpr
    constructor <;> linarith
  )] }

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h⟩
      have h3 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      rw [h]
      have h4 : 0 ≤ x := h1.1
      have h5 : x ≤ 1 := h1.2
      by_cases h6 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≥ 0
        have h7 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg]
          linarith
        have h8 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * (a : ℝ) * x - 2 * (b : ℝ) := by
          have h9 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h9]
          rw [h7]
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        use -2 * a, 2 - 2 * b
        simp [h8]
        all_goals
          ring_nf
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 < 0
        have h7 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg]
          linarith
        have h8 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * (a : ℝ) * x + 2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 := by
          have h9 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h9]
          rw [h7]
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        use 2 * a, 2 * b - 1
        simp [h8]
        all_goals
          ring_nf
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
      all_goals linarith [hx.1, hx.2]
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have hx0 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
        simpa using hx
      have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), f^[n] x ≥ (0 : ℝ) ∧ f^[n] x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          simp at *
          all_goals
            try linarith [hx0.1, hx0.2]
        | succ k' ih2 =>
          have h3 : f^[k' + 1] x = f (f^[k'] x) := by
            simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
          rw [h3]
          constructor
          · -- Show that f (f^[k'] x) ≥ 0
            have h4 : f (f^[k'] x) ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
              have h5 : f^[k'] x ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
                exact (ih2.1)
              have h6 : f^[k'] x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
                exact (ih2.2)
              have h7 : 0 ≤ 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := by
                have h8 : |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
                  cases abs_cases (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1) with
                  | inl h9 =>
                    nlinarith
                  | inr h9 =>
                    nlinarith
                nlinarith
              have h8 : f (f^[k'] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := by
                apply hf
              linarith [h8, h7]
            linarith
          · -- Show that f (f^[k'] x) ≤ 1
            have h4 : f (f^[k'] x) ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
              have h5 : f^[k'] x ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
                exact (ih2.1)
              have h6 : f^[k'] x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
                exact (ih2.2)
              have h7 : 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
                have h8 : |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
                  apply abs_nonneg
                nlinarith
              have h8 : f (f^[k'] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := by
                apply hf
              linarith [h8, h7]
            linarith
      have h2 : f^[k] x ≥ (0 : ℝ) := by
        have h11 := (h1 k).1
        simpa using h11
      have h4 : f^[k] x ≤ (1 : ℝ) := by
        have h11 := (h1 k).2
        simpa using h11
      have h3 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      have h7 : f (f^[k] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [h7]
      by_cases h10 : (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≥ 0
        have h11 : |(2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg h10]
        rw [h11]
        have eq1 : (1 - (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1) : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * (f^[k] x) : ℝ) := by
          linarith
        have eq2 : (f^[k] x : ℝ) = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h_eq]
        have eq3 : (1 - (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1) : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) : ℝ) := by
          rw [show (f^[k] x : ℝ) = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]]
        have eq4 : (1 - (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1) : ℝ) = (2 - 2 * (a : ℝ) * x - 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith [eq3]
        use (-2 * a), (2 - 2 * b)
        have eq5 : (1 - (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1) : ℝ) = ((-2 * a : ℝ) * x + (2 - 2 * b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith [eq4]
        nlinarith [eq5, eq1]
      · -- Case where 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 < 0
        have h11 : |(2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_neg (show (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ) < 0 by linarith)]
        rw [h11]
        have eq1 : (1 - (- (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1)) : ℝ) = (2 * (f^[k] x) : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith
        have eq2 : (f^[k] x : ℝ) = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h_eq]
        have eq3 : (1 - (- (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1)) : ℝ) = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) : ℝ) := by
          rw [show (f^[k] x : ℝ) = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]]
        have eq4 : (1 - (- (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1)) : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith [eq3]
        use (2 * a), (2 * b)
        have eq5 : (1 - (- (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1)) : ℝ) = ((2 * a : ℝ) * x + (2 * b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith [eq4]
        nlinarith [eq5, eq1]
  specialize h1 n
  simpa using h1

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have eq1 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [eq1]
      rw [h_eq]
      by_cases h : (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1 : ℝ)) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where $2*a*x + 2*b - 1 \geq 0$.
        have eq2 : f ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) = (2 - 2 * (a : ℝ) * x - 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          have h_eq : f ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) = 1 - |2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h_eq]
          have abs_eq : |(2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ)| = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_nonneg]
            linarith
          have eq3 : (2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by ring
          rw [eq3]
          rw [abs_eq]
          all_goals nlinarith
        rw [eq2]
        use -2 * a, 2 - 2 * b
        field_simp at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      · -- Case where $2*a*x + 2*b - 1 < 0$.
        have eq2 : f ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + 2 * (b : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
          have h_eq : f ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) = 1 - |2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h_eq]
          have abs_eq : |(2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ)| = - (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg]
            linarith
          have eq3 : (2 * ( (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ) - 1 : ℝ) = (2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ) - 1) : ℝ) := by ring
          rw [eq3]
          rw [abs_eq]
          all_goals nlinarith
        rw [eq2]
        use 2 * a, 2 * b
        field_simp at *
        all_goals nlinarith
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have hx0 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
        simpa using hx
      have h5 : ∀ (k : ℕ), 0 ≤ f^[k] x ∧ f^[k] x ≤ 1 := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero =>
          constructor
          · linarith [hx0.1]
          · linarith [hx0.2]
        | succ k ih8 =>
          have h6 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
            simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
          rw [h6]
          constructor
          · -- Show that f(f^k(x)) ≥ 0
            have h7 : 0 ≤ f^[k] x := by
              exact (ih8.1)
            have h8 : f^[k] x ≤ 1 := by
              exact (ih8.2)
            have h9 : f (f^[k] x) ≥ 0 := by
              rw [hf]
              have h10 : 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≥ -1 := by
                nlinarith
              have h11 : 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≤ 1 := by
                nlinarith
              have h12 : |(2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ)| ≤ 1 := by
                apply abs_le.mpr
                constructor
                · linarith
                · linarith
              have h13 : (1 - |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
                linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ), h12]
              linarith
            linarith
          · -- Show that f(f^k(x)) ≤ 1
            have h7 : 0 ≤ f^[k] x := by
              exact (ih8.1)
            have h8 : f^[k] x ≤ 1 := by
              exact (ih8.2)
            have h9 : f (f^[k] x) ≤ 1 := by
              rw [hf]
              have h10 : 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≥ -1 := by
                nlinarith
              have h11 : 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≤ 1 := by
                nlinarith
              have h12 : |(2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ)| ≥ 0 := by
                apply abs_nonneg
              have h13 : (1 - |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
                nlinarith [abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ)]
              linarith
            linarith
      have h5_n : 0 ≤ f^[n] x ∧ f^[n] x ≤ 1 := h5 n
      have h_eq2 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h_eq2]
      have h14 : f (f^[n] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[n] x) - 1| := by
        specialize hf (f^[n] x)
        simpa using hf
      rw [h14]
      have h15 : f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
        simpa using h_eq
      rw [h15]
      by_cases h : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≥ 0
        have h16 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg]
          linarith
        have h17 : 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| = -2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 - 2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [h16]
          nlinarith
        rw [h17]
        refine' ⟨-2 * a, 2 - 2 * b, ?_⟩
        field_simp
        all_goals nlinarith
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 < 0
        have h18 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = 1 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h19 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0 := by linarith
          rw [abs_of_neg h19]
          all_goals nlinarith
        have h19 : 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| = 2 * (a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [h18]
          nlinarith
        rw [h19]
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, ?_⟩
        field_simp
        all_goals nlinarith
  apply h1 n

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := by
    have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
    exact h1.1
  have hx1 : x ≤ 1 := by
    have h1 : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := hx
    exact h1.2
  have h2 : ∀ (k : ℕ), 0 ≤ f^[k] x ∧ f^[k] x ≤ 1 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      constructor
      · -- Show 0 ≤ x
        linarith
      · -- Show x ≤ 1
        linarith
    | succ k ihk =>
      have h3 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : 0 ≤ f^[k] x ∧ f^[k] x ≤ 1 := ihk
      have h5 : 0 ≤ f (f^[k] x) := by
        have h6 : f (f^[k] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| := by
          apply hf
        rw [h6]
        have h7 : -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ∧ 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≤ 1 := by
          constructor
          · -- Show -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1
            nlinarith [h4.1, h4.2]
          · -- Show 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≤ 1
            nlinarith [h4.1, h4.2]
        have h8 : |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| ≤ 1 := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · -- Show -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1
            linarith [h7.1]
          · -- Show 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≤ 1
            linarith [h7.2]
        nlinarith [abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1)]
      have h6 : f (f^[k] x) ≤ 1 := by
        have h6 : f (f^[k] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| := by
          apply hf
        rw [h6]
        have h7 : -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ∧ 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≤ 1 := by
          constructor
          · -- Show -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1
            nlinarith [h4.1, h4.2]
          · -- Show 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≤ 1
            nlinarith [h4.1, h4.2]
        have h8 : |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1)
        have h9 : |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| ≤ 1 := by
          apply abs_le.mpr
          constructor
          · -- Show -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1
            linarith [h7.1]
          · -- Show 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≤ 1
            linarith [h7.2]
        nlinarith
      tauto
  have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h⟩
      have h2 : 0 ≤ (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ∧ (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
        have h3 : f^[k] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h]
        have h4 : 0 ≤ f^[k] x ∧ f^[k] x ≤ 1 := (h2 k)
        have h5 : 0 ≤ (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h3, h4.1]
        have h6 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
          linarith [h3, h4.2]
        tauto
      have h3 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      have h4 : f^[k + 1] x = f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
        calc
          f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
            rw [h3]
          _ = f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
            rw [show f^[k] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) by linarith [h]]
      have h7 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [h4]
      by_cases h9 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0
        have h10 : |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg h9]
        have h11 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [h7]
          rw [h10]
          all_goals
            nlinarith
        have h12 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = (-2 * a : ℝ) * x + (2 - 2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [h11]
          ring_nf
        rw [h12]
        refine ⟨-2 * a, 2 - 2 * b, by simp⟩
      · -- Case where 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0
        have h10 : |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| = 1 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h11 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0 := by linarith
          rw [abs_of_neg h11]
          all_goals nlinarith
        have h11 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [h7]
          rw [h10]
          all_goals
            nlinarith
        have h12 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = (2 * a : ℝ) * x + (2 * (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [h11]
          ring_nf
        rw [h12]
        refine ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, by simp⟩
  specialize h1 n
  simpa using h1

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have hx01 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
        simpa using hx
      have h2 : ∀ (k : ℕ), 0 ≤ f^[k] x ∧ f^[k] x ≤ 1 := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero =>
          constructor
          · linarith [hx01.1]
          · linarith [hx01.2]
        | succ k ihk =>
          have h3 : 0 ≤ f^[k] x ∧ f^[k] x ≤ 1 := ihk
          have h4 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
            simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
          rw [h4]
          have h5 : 0 ≤ f^[k] x := h3.1
          have h6 : f^[k] x ≤ 1 := h3.2
          by_cases h7 : f^[k] x ≥ 1 / 2
          · -- Case where f^[k] x ≥ 1/2
            have h8 : f (f^[k] x) = 2 - 2 * (f^[k] x) := by
              rw [hf]
              have h9 : 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h10 : |(2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h9
              rw [h10]
              all_goals linarith
            rw [h8]
            constructor
            · -- Show 0 ≤ 2 - 2 * (f^[k] x)
              nlinarith
            · -- Show 2 - 2 * (f^[k] x) ≤ 1
              nlinarith
          · -- Case where f^[k] x < 1/2
            have h8 : f (f^[k] x) = 2 * (f^[k] x) := by
              rw [hf]
              have h9 : 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 < 0 := by
                have h10 : f^[k] x < 1 / 2 := by linarith
                linarith
              have h10 : |(2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ)| = 1 - 2 * (f^[k] x) := by
                rw [abs_of_neg h9]
                all_goals linarith
              rw [h10]
              all_goals linarith
            rw [h8]
            constructor
            · -- Show 0 ≤ 2 * (f^[k] x)
              nlinarith
            · -- Show 2 * (f^[k] x) ≤ 1
              nlinarith
      have h7 : 0 ≤ f^[n] x ∧ f^[n] x ≤ 1 := h2 n
      have h8 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h8]
      by_cases h71 : f^[n] x ≥ 1 / 2
      · -- Case where f^n x ≥ 1/2
        have h9 : f (f^[n] x) = 2 - 2 * (f^[n] x) := by
          rw [hf]
          have h9 : 2 * (f^[n] x) - 1 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h71, h7.1, h7.2]
          have h10 : |(2 * (f^[n] x) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (f^[n] x) - 1 : ℝ) := abs_of_nonneg h9
          rw [h10]
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h9]
        have h10 : f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
          simpa using h_eq
        use -2 * a, 2 - 2 * b
        rw [h10]
        all_goals ring_nf
      · --  Case where f^n x < 1/2
        have h9 : f (f^[n] x) = 2 * (f^[n] x) := by
          rw [hf]
          have h9 : 2 * (f^[n] x) - 1 < 0 := by
            have h10 : f^[n] x < 1 / 2 := by linarith
            linarith
          have h10 : |(2 * (f^[n] x) - 1 : ℝ)| = 1 - 2 * (f^[n] x) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h9]
            all_goals linarith
          rw [h10]
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h9]
        have h10 : f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
          simpa using h_eq
        use 2 * a, 2 * b
        rw [h10]
        all_goals ring_nf
  apply h1 n

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ k ihk =>
      rcases ihk with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have eq1 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [eq1]
      rw [h_eq]
      have eq2 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
        apply hf
      rw [eq2]
      by_cases h : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * y - 1 ≥ 0, so |2 * y - 1| = 2 * y - 1
        have abs_eq : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
          rw [abs_of_nonneg]
          linarith
        rw [abs_eq]
        use -2 * a, 2 - 2 * b
        field_simp at *
        all_goals ring_nf
      · -- Case where 2 * y - 1 < 0, so |2 * y - 1| = 1 - 2 * y
        have abs_eq : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) : ℝ) := by
          have h' : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0 := by linarith
          rw [abs_of_neg h']
          all_goals linarith
        rw [abs_eq]
        use 2 * a, 2 * b
        field_simp at *
        all_goals ring_nf
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : x ≥ 0 ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
    simpa using hx
  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n

      have h3 : f^[n + 1] x = f (f^[n] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      rw [h_eq]
      by_cases h : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < 1 / 2
      · -- Case where a * x + b < 1/2
        have h4 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h5 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h5]
          have h6 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0 := by
            linarith
          have h7 : |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| = 1 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h6]
            all_goals linarith
          rw [h7]
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        use (2 * a), (2 * b)
        rw [h4]
        field_simp
        all_goals
          ring_nf
      · -- Case where a * x + b ≥ 1/2
        have h4 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          have h5 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h5]
          have h6 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0 := by
            linarith
          have h7 : |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 := by
            rw [abs_of_nonneg h6]
          rw [h7]
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        use (-2 * a), (2 - 2 * b)
        rw [h4]
        field_simp
        all_goals
          ring_nf
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  rcases hx with ⟨hx0, hx1⟩
  have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have h2 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h2]
      rw [h_eq]
      by_cases h : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < (1 / 2 : ℝ)
      · -- Case where `f^[k] x` is less than 1/2
        have h3 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [hf]
          have h4 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) < 0 := by linarith
          have h5 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = 1 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
            rw [abs_of_neg h4]
            all_goals linarith
          rw [h5]
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h3]
        use (2 * a), (2 * b)
        field_simp at *
        ring_nf
      · -- Case where `f^[k] x` is greater or equal to 1/2
        have h6 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h7 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
          rw [hf]
          have h8 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h9 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_nonneg h8]
          rw [h9]
          all_goals linarith
        rw [h7]
        use (-2 * a), (2 - 2 * b)
        field_simp at *
        ring_nf
  specialize h1 n
  simpa using h1

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by

  have h2 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by

    | succ k ih =>

      have eq1 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']

          have h5 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) ≥ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := h3
          have h6 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 ≥ 0 := by linarith

        rw [h4]

        ring_nf
      · -- Case where `f (a * x + b)` is `2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ))`.
