          have h5 : (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) < (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by linarith
          have h6 : 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 < 0 := by linarith
          rw [hf]
          rw [abs_of_neg h6]
          all_goals ring_nf
        rw [h4]
        refine' ⟨2 * a, 2 * b, ?_⟩
        field_simp at *
        ring_nf
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)
    (x : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) (n : ℕ) :
    ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
  have h1 : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ a b : ℤ, f^[n] x = (a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ) := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      use 1, 0
      simp
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨a, b, h_eq⟩
      have hx0 : 0 ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 1 := by
        simpa using hx
      have h2 : ∀ (k : ℕ), f^[k] x ≥ 0 ∧ f^[k] x ≤ 1 := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero =>
          constructor
          · linarith [hx0.left]
          · linarith [hx0.right]
        | succ k' ihk =>
          have h3 : f^[k' + 1] x = f (f^[k'] x) := by
            simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
          rw [h3]
          have hf_k_x : 0 ≤ f^[k'] x ∧ f^[k'] x ≤ 1 := by
            tauto
          have h4 : f (f^[k'] x) ≥ 0 := by
            have h5 : f (f^[k'] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := hf (f^[k'] x)
            rw [h5]
            have h6 : -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 ∧ 2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 ≤ 1 := by
              constructor
              · linarith [hf_k_x.left, hf_k_x.right]
              · linarith [hf_k_x.left, hf_k_x.right]
            have h7 : |(2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ)| ≤ 1 := by
              apply abs_le.mpr
              constructor <;> linarith
            have h8 : (1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by
              linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1), h7]
            linarith
          have h9 : f (f^[k'] x) ≤ 1 := by
            have h5 : f (f^[k'] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| := hf (f^[k'] x)
            rw [h5]
            have h6 : -1 ≤ 2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 ∧ 2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 ≤ 1 := by
              constructor
              · linarith [hf_k_x.left, hf_k_x.right]
              · linarith [hf_k_x.left, hf_k_x.right]
            have h7 : |(2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1 : ℝ)| ≤ 1 := by
              apply abs_le.mpr
              constructor <;> linarith
            have h8 : (1 - |2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1| : ℝ) ≤ 1 := by
              linarith [abs_nonneg (2 * (f^[k'] x) - 1), h7]
            linarith
          constructor
          · linarith
          · linarith
      have h3 : f^[k + 1] x = f (f^[k] x) := by
        simp [Function.iterate_succ_apply']
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : f^[k] x ≥ 0 ∧ f^[k] x ≤ 1 := h2 k
      by_cases h : f^[k] x ≥ 1 / 2
      · -- Case where f^k(x) >= 1/2
        have hf_k_x : f (f^[k] x) = 2 - 2 * (f^[k] x) := by
          have h10 : f (f^[k] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| := hf (f^[k] x)
          rw [h10]
          have h11 : 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 ≥ 0 := by
            linarith
          have h12 : |(2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_nonneg h11]
          rw [h12]
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        rw [hf_k_x]
        rw [h_eq]
        use -2 * a, 2 - 2 * b
        field_simp at *
        all_goals
          nlinarith
      · -- Case where f^k(x) < 1/2
        have hf_k_x : f (f^[k] x) = 2 * (f^[k] x) := by
          have h10 : f (f^[k] x) = 1 - |2 * (f^[k] x) - 1| := hf (f^[k] x)
          rw [h10]
          have h11 : 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 < 0 := by
            linarith
          have h12 : |(2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ)| = (1 - 2 * (f^[k] x) : ℝ) := by
            have h13 : 2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 < 0 := h11
            have h14 : |(2 * (f^[k] x) - 1 : ℝ)| = -(2 * (f^[k] x) - 1) := by
              rw [abs_of_neg h13]
            rw [h14]
            all_goals
              ring_nf
          rw [h12]
          all_goals
            ring_nf
        rw [hf_k_x]
        rw [h_eq]
        use 2 * a, 2 * b
        field_simp at *
        all_goals
          nlinarith
  specialize h1 n
  simpa using h1

theorem subq_II_4_a
    (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf : ∀ x, f x = 1 - |2 * x - 1|)

      have h12 : f^[n] x ≤ 1 := (h10.2)
      by_cases h : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 ≥ 0
        have h13 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 - 2 * (a : ℝ) * x - 2 * (b : ℝ) := by
          have h14 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h14]
          have h15 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) := by
            rw [abs_of_nonneg]
            linarith
          rw [h15]
          nlinarith
        use -2 * a, 2 - 2 * b
        rw [h13]
        all_goals
          field_simp at *
          all_goals ring_nf
      · -- Case where 2 * (a * x + b) - 1 < 0
        have h13 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 2 * (a : ℝ) * x + 2 * (b : ℝ) := by
          have h14 : f ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) = 1 - |2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1| := by
            apply hf
          rw [h14]
          have h15 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = 1 - 2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) := by
            have h16 : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) < (0 : ℝ) := by
              by_contra h17
              push_neg at h17
              have : (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by linarith
              tauto
            have h17 : |(2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1 : ℝ)| = - (2 * ((a : ℝ) * x + (b : ℝ)) - 1) := by
              rw [abs_of_neg h16]
            rw [h17]
            all_goals nlinarith
          rw [h15]
          all_goals nlinarith
        use 2 * a, 2 * b
        rw [h13]
        all_goals
          field_simp at *
          all_goals ring_nf
  specialize h2 n
  simpa using h2

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have htan_nonneg : 0 ≤ Real.tan (θ / 2) := by
    apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
    · linarith
    · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos]]
  have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h6 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h6]
    have h7 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h8 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by 
        rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
      have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have hcosp : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by linarith, show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos]]
        · linarith [show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos], show θ / 2 > 0 by linarith]
      have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [htan2]
        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
        field_simp
      have h11 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [h10]
        have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith
        field_simp
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h16 : (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
        have h17 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h11
        rw [h17]
        have h18 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (1 - Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h19 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h10
          rw [h19]
          have h20 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 - Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by linarith [h9]
          rw [h20]
        rw [h18]
        have h19 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith
        field_simp
        nlinarith
      linarith
    linarith
  have h7 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h6 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h6]
    have h8 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
    have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have hcosp : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by linarith, show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos]]
      · linarith [show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos], show θ / 2 > 0 by linarith]
    have h11 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [htan2]
        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
        field_simp
      have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith
      rw [h10]
      field_simp
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h10 : (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h17 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h11
      have h18 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
      rw [h17, h18]
      have h19 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith
      field_simp
      all_goals nlinarith
    linarith
  constructor
  · exact h5
  constructor
  · exact h7
  · intro q h_eq
    have ht_eq : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h10 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h5' : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h5
      rw [h5']
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht_eq]]
    -- norm_num
      all_goals norm_num
    have h11 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h7' : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h7
      rw [h7']
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht_eq]]
      all_goals norm_num
    constructor
    · exact h10
    · exact h11

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h6 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h6]
      have h7 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - (t) ^ 2) / (1 + (t) ^ 2) := by
        have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          constructor
          · nlinarith [show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, Real.pi_pos, h4]
          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
        have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
          apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
          · linarith
          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
        have h11 : (1 - (t) ^ 2) / (1 + (t) ^ 2) = 2 * (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 - 1 := by
          have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
          rw [ht1]
          have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [htan2]
          have h13 : (1 - (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) / (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) = ( (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 - (Real.sin (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ) / ( (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 + (Real.sin (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ) := by
            field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith]
            all_goals nlinarith
          rw [h13]
          have h14 : (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 + (Real.sin (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
          have h15 : (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 - (Real.sin (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 2 * (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 - 1 := by
            nlinarith
          rw [h14, h15]
          all_goals field_simp [h14]
        have h6 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 - 1 := by
          rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
        linarith [h6, h11]
      linarith
    exact h5
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h8 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h6 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h6]
      have h7 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          constructor
          · nlinarith [show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, Real.pi_pos, h4]
          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
        have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
          apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
          · linarith
          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
        have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          rw [ht1]
          rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
        have h11 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
        have h12 : (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          have ht1 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
          rw [ht1]
          have h14 : (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 + (Real.sin (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
          field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith]
          all_goals nlinarith [sq_nonneg (Real.cos (θ / 2) - Real.sin (θ / 2)), sq_nonneg (Real.cos (θ / 2) + Real.sin (θ / 2))]
        linarith [h11, h12]
      linarith
    exact h8
  · -- Proof that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q h_eq
    constructor
    · -- Show that cos θ is rational
      have h13 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
        have ht1 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h14 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
            have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h2.1
          have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
            have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h3.2
          have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
          have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h6 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
            rw [h6]
            have h7 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - (t) ^ 2) / (1 + (t) ^ 2) := by
              have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
              have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
                constructor
                · nlinarith [show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, Real.pi_pos, h4]
                · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
              have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
                apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
                · linarith
                · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
              have h11 : (1 - (t) ^ 2) / (1 + (t) ^ 2) = 2 * (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 - 1 := by
                have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
                rw [ht1]
                have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
                  rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
                rw [htan2]
                have h13 : (1 - (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) / (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) = ( (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 - (Real.sin (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ) / ( (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 + (Real.sin (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ) := by
                  field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith]
                  all_goals nlinarith
                rw [h13]
                have h14 : (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 + (Real.sin (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
                have h15 : (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 - (Real.sin (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 2 * (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 - 1 := by
                  nlinarith
                rw [h14, h15]
                all_goals field_simp [h14]
              have h6 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 - 1 := by
                rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
              linarith [h6, h11]
            linarith
          linarith
        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]] at h14
        refine ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
          simp [h14]
        ⟩
      exact h13
    · -- Show that sin θ is rational
      have h14 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
        have ht1 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h15 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
            have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h2.1
          have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
            have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h3.2
          have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
          have h8 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h6 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
            rw [h6]
            have h7 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
              have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
              have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
                constructor
                · nlinarith [show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, Real.pi_pos, h4]
                · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
              have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
                apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
                · linarith
                · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
              have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
                rw [ht1]
                rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
              have h11 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
                rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
              have h12 : (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
                have ht1 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
                rw [ht1]
                have h14 : (Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 + (Real.sin (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
                field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith]
                all_goals nlinarith [sq_nonneg (Real.cos (θ / 2) - Real.sin (θ / 2)), sq_nonneg (Real.cos (θ / 2) + Real.sin (θ / 2))]
              linarith [h11, h12]
            linarith
          linarith
        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]] at h15
        refine ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
          simp [h15]
        ⟩
      exact h14

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h6 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
        have h13 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
        rw [h13]
        rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
        exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
        rw [htan]
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
        · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
      have h9 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
        calc
          1 + t ^ 2 = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
            rw [show t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [htan2]]
          _ = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            ring_nf
          _ = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            field_simp
            all_goals nlinarith
          _ = (1 : ℝ) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have h7' : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
              exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
            have : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
              linarith
            rw [this]
      have h11 : (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
        have h12 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h9
        have h13 : (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) = (1 - t ^ 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          rw [h12]
          field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by positivity]
        have h14 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (t ^ 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          have h15 : t ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
            rw [show t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [htan2]]
          have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h8
          have h17 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
          calc
            Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) * (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              field_simp
            _ = (t ^ 2) * (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              have h18 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) = t ^ 2 := by
                have h19 : (t : ℝ) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
                  linarith [h15]
                have h20 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                  ring_nf
                rw [h19, h20]
              rw [h18]
        have h15 : 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 = 1 - 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          have h16 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
            exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
          nlinarith
        rw [h13]
        have h17 : (1 - t ^ 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 - 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          have h18 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (t ^ 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := h14
          nlinarith [h7]
        nlinarith
      rw [h6, h11]
    exact h5
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t²)
    have h5 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h6 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have h13 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
        rw [h13]
        rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
      have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
        rw [htan]
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
        · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
      have h9 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
        calc
          1 + t ^ 2 = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
            rw [show t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [htan2]]
          _ = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            ring_nf
          _ = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            field_simp
            all_goals nlinarith
          _ = (1 : ℝ) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have h7' : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
              exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
            have : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
              linarith
            rw [this]
      have h11 : (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have h12 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h9
        have h13 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
        rw [h12, h13]
        have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h8
        have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
        field_simp
        all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
      rw [h6, h11]
    exact h5
  · -- Proof of the rationality of cos θ and sin θ when t is rational
    intro q hq
    have htq : t = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith [hq]
    have h10 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
      have h11 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h12 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          tauto
        rw [h12]
        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [htq]]
      refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        simp [h11]
      ⟩
    have h11 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
      have h12 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h13 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          tauto
        rw [h13]
        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [htq]]
      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        simp [h12]
      ⟩
    constructor
    · exact h10
    · exact h11

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have hcosp : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have hsinp : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
  have h6 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
    have h7 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h7]
    rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
  have h7 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    have h8 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h8]
    rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
  have h8 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    rw [htan]
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith [hcosp]
    field_simp [h9]
    nlinarith [h5]
  have h9 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    rw [h6]
    have h10 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h8
    have h11 : 1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have ht2' : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
        rw [htan]
      rw [ht2']
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith [hcosp]
      field_simp [h9]
      all_goals nlinarith [h5]
    rw [h10, h11]
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith [hcosp]
    field_simp [h9]
    nlinarith [h5]
  have h10 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    rw [h7]
    have h10 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h8
    have ht : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan
    rw [h10, ht]
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith [hcosp]
    field_simp [h9]
    nlinarith [h5, hcosp, hsinp]
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Show cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
    exact h9
  constructor
  · -- Show sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    exact h10
  · -- Show that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q ht
    have ht' : (Real.tan (θ / 2) : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith [ht]
    have hcos : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h12 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h9
      rw [h12]
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht']]
    have hsin : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h13 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h10
      rw [h13]
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht']]
    constructor
    · -- Show exists qx : ℚ such that cos θ = qx
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [hcos]
      all_goals norm_num
    · -- Show exists qy : ℚ such that sin θ = qy
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [hsin]
      all_goals norm_num

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
      nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
    · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
      nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
  have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
    · nlinarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have ht1 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have ht2 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) / (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) := by
    have h10 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h11 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
        rw [← Real.cos_two_mul]
      linarith
    have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) := by
      have ht4 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
      rw [ht4]
      have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have h17 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
        rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [ht1]]
      have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) = 1 := by
        have h17 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
          have h18 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h13
          have h19 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
            field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith [h8]]
          nlinarith
        have h18 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) := by
          ring
        rw [h18] at h17
        rw [h17] at h17
        linarith
      field_simp [(show 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
        have ht18 : (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 : ℝ) > 0 := by
          have ht19 : (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
          nlinarith
        linarith
      )] at h16 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h10, h11]
    field_simp [(show 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
      have ht18 : (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 : ℝ) > 0 := by
        have ht19 : (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
        nlinarith
      linarith
    )]
    all_goals nlinarith
  have ht3 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ) / (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) := by
    have h18 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h19 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [← Real.sin_two_mul]
      linarith
    rw [h18]
    have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have ht4 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
      have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h8
      field_simp [ht4, show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith]
    rw [h11]
    have h17 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) := by
      have ht4 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
      have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have h17 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
        rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [ht1]]
      have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) = 1 := by
        have h17 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
          have h18 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h13
          have h19 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
            field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith [h8]]
          nlinarith
        have h18 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) := by
          ring
        rw [h18] at h17
        rw [h17] at h17
        linarith
      field_simp [(show 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
        have ht18 : (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 : ℝ) > 0 := by
          have ht19 : (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
          nlinarith
        linarith
      )] at h16 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have ht18 : 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have ht19 : (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
      nlinarith
    field_simp [h17, ht18]
    all_goals nlinarith
  constructor
  · exact ht2
  constructor
  · exact ht3
  · intro q h_eq
    have ht10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith [h_eq]
    have hc : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have ht11 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        rw [show Real.cos θ = (1 - (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) / (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) by linarith [ht2]]
        rw [ht10]
      rw [ht11]
    have hs : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have ht12 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        rw [show Real.sin θ = (2 * (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ) / (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) by linarith [ht3]]
        rw [ht10]
      rw [ht12]
    exact ⟨hc, hs⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)

      have h8 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
        rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = t by linarith [ht11]]
      have h9 : 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
        rw [h11]
        have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
          have h13 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h14 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · nlinarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1], Real.pi_pos]
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          linarith
        field_simp [h10, h12]
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h13 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h14 : 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h9

        have h19 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo

          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
        positivity
      field_simp at h13 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h5, h7]
    have h10 : 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
      have ht11 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := ht11
      have h11 : t ≥ 0 := by
        have h12 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h13 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
        have h14 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
          apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two

        have h15 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by linarith

    field_simp [h10]

  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    have h1 : 0 ≤ θ := by

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Show that cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have htan' : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h3 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
        have h9 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
        rw [h9]
        rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
      have htan_eq : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [htan']
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have hcosp' : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        have hθ1 : 0 ≤ θ := by
          have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h1.1
        have hθ2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
          have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h1.2
        have h1 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith
        have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
        have hcosp : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          constructor
          · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]]
          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
        linarith
      have hcosp'' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_nonneg_of_mem_Icc
    constructor
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have ht1 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have h7 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have ht1' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
    rw [ht1']
    have h8 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      rw [←Real.cos_two_mul]
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
    have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
      have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
        · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
      linarith
    have eq1 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
      ring_nf
    have eq2 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
      field_simp [h10]
      all_goals nlinarith [h9]
    have eq3 : (1 - (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) / (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) = (1 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      rw [eq1, eq2]
    have eq4 : (1 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) = Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
      field_simp [h10]
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h11 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
      have h11 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := h8
      have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h9
      nlinarith
    rw [eq3, eq4]
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h8 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have ht1' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
    rw [ht1']
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
    have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
      have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
        · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
      linarith
    have h11 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [←Real.sin_two_mul]
    have eq1 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
      ring_nf
    have eq2 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
      field_simp [h10]
      all_goals nlinarith [h9]
    have eq3 : (2 * (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2))) / (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) = (2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) / (1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      rw [eq2]
    have eq4 : (2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) / (1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      field_simp [h10]
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h12 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h11
    rw [eq3, eq4]
    all_goals nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
    exact h7
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t^2)
    exact h8
  · -- Proof of the rationality condition
    intro q h_eq
    have ht_eq : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith [h_eq]
    have hcos : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [h7]
      rw [ht_eq]
    have hsin : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [h8]
      rw [ht_eq]
      all_goals ring_nf
    constructor
    · -- Existence of rational qx such that cos θ = qx
      refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        norm_num at hcos ⊢
        all_goals try linarith
      ⟩
    · -- Existence of rational qy such that sin θ = qy
      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        norm_num at hsin ⊢
        all_goals try linarith
      ⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  intro t
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have htan_nonneg : 0 ≤ t := by
    apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
    · linarith
    · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
  have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
    have h6 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by 
      rw [← Real.cos_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = t := by rfl
      have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      rw [htan2] at htan
      have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by linarith, show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]]
        · linarith
      field_simp [h8] at htan ⊢
      linarith
    have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
    rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h7]] at h8
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + t^2) = 1 := by
        nlinarith
      field_simp at h10 ⊢
      nlinarith
    rw [h6]
    have h11 : 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
      rw [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) by linarith [h9]]
      field_simp
      <;> nlinarith
    linarith
  have h10 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
    have h7 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [← Real.sin_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = t := by rfl
      have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      rw [htan2] at htan
      have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by linarith, show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]]
        · linarith
      field_simp [h8] at htan ⊢
      linarith
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h8' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
      rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h8]] at h8'
      have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + t^2) = 1 := by
        nlinarith
      field_simp at h10 ⊢
      nlinarith
    rw [h7]
    rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h8]]
    have h11 : 2 * (t * Real.cos (θ / 2)) * Real.cos (θ / 2) = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := h9
      calc
        2 * (t * Real.cos (θ / 2)) * Real.cos (θ / 2) = 2 * t * (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by ring
        _ = 2 * t * (1 / (1 + t^2)) := by rw [h12]
        _ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by field_simp
    linarith
  have h13 : ∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
      (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ)) := by
    intro q htq
    have h14 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := h5
    have h15 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := h10
    have htq' : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have hc : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
      use (1 - (q ^ 2 : ℚ)) / (1 + (q ^ 2 : ℚ))
      rw [h14]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [htq']]
      norm_num
    have hs : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
      use (2 * (q : ℚ)) / (1 + (q ^ 2 : ℚ))
      rw [h15]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [htq']]
      norm_num
    constructor
    · exact hc
    · exact hs
  constructor
  · exact h5
  constructor
  · exact h10
  · exact h13

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Show that cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h2 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
            have h1 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by
              have h2 : θ ≥ 0 := by
                have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                exact h3.1
              linarith
            have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
              have h3 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
                have h4 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                exact h4.2
              linarith [Real.pi_pos]
            have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
              apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
              constructor
              · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ ≥ 0 by
                  have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                  exact h3.1
                ]
              · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 by
                  have h4 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                  exact h4.2
                ]
            linarith
          have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
          field_simp [h5]
          nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) - Real.cos (θ / 2)), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) + Real.cos (θ / 2))]
        rw [h4]
        rw [htan]
      exact h3
    exact h1
  constructor
  · -- Show that sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h2 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h4 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
            have h1 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by
              have h2 : θ ≥ 0 := by
                have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                exact h3.1
              linarith
            have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
              have h3 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
                have h4 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                exact h4.2
              linarith [Real.pi_pos]
            have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
              apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
              constructor
              · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ ≥ 0 by
                  have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                  exact h3.1
                ]
              · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 by
                  have h4 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                  exact h4.2
                ]
            linarith
          have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
          rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
          rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          field_simp [h5]
          nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) - Real.cos (θ / 2)), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) + Real.cos (θ / 2))]
        rw [h4]
        rw [htan]
      exact h3
    exact h1
  · -- Show that if q is a rational such that t = q, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q hq
    constructor
    · -- Show that cos θ is rational
      have h1 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
        have hcos : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
          have htan : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith [hq]
          have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h2 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
            rw [h2]
            have h3 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
              have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
              have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
                  have h1 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by
                    have h2 : θ ≥ 0 := by
                      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                      exact h3.1
                    linarith
                  have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
                    have h3 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
                      have h4 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                      exact h4.2
                    linarith [Real.pi_pos]
                  have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
                    constructor
                    · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
                      nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ ≥ 0 by
                        have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                        exact h3.1
                      ]
                    · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
                      nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 by
                        have h4 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                        exact h4.2
                      ]
                  linarith
                have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
                field_simp [h5]
                nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) - Real.cos (θ / 2)), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) + Real.cos (θ / 2))]
              rw [h4]
              rw [htan]
            exact h3
          rw [h1]
          rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [hq]]
        refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
          norm_num at hcos ⊢
          all_goals try linarith
        ⟩
      exact h1
    · -- Show that sin θ is rational
      have h1 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
        have hsin : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
          have htan : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith [hq]
          have h1 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h2 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
            rw [h2]
            have h3 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
              have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
              have h4 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
                  have h1 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by
                    have h2 : θ ≥ 0 := by
                      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                      exact h3.1
                    linarith
                  have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
                    have h3 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
                      have h4 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                      exact h4.2
                    linarith [Real.pi_pos]
                  have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
                    constructor
                    · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
                      nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ ≥ 0 by
                        have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                        exact h3.1
                      ]
                    · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
                      nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 by
                        have h4 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
                        exact h4.2
                      ]
                  linarith
                have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
                rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
                rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
                field_simp [h5]
                nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) - Real.cos (θ / 2)), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) + Real.cos (θ / 2))]
              rw [h4]
              rw [htan]
            exact h3
          rw [h1]
          rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [hq]]
        refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
          norm_num at hsin ⊢
          all_goals try linarith
        ⟩
      exact h1

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)

        have ht11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith

        have ht12 : 1 - (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have ht11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith

        have ht15 : 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 = Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          nlinarith
        have ht16 : (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 : ℝ) / (1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2)) = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) * (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          field_simp
        nlinarith [ht14, ht15, ht16, show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by nlinarith]
      nlinarith [ht11, htan4]
    linarith
  have h9 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have htan1 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have htan4 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h10 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h10]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    have ht18 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := htan'
    have ht18' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
    rw [htan1]
    have htan7 : (2 * (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ) / (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have ht10 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have ht11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
        field_simp [ht11]
        <;> nlinarith [Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)]
      have ht11 : (2 * (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ) / (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [show 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) by linarith [ht10]]
        have ht12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
          have ht13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := ht18
          nlinarith
        field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith]
        all_goals nlinarith
      linarith
    nlinarith [htan7, htan4]
  constructor
  · -- Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
    exact h8
  constructor
  · -- Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
    exact h9
  · -- Assume t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q h_eq
    have h10 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]] at h8
      linarith
    have h11 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]] at h9
      linarith
    constructor
    · -- Show existence of rational qx such that Real.cos θ = (q x : ℝ)
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [h10]
      all_goals norm_num
    · -- Show existence of rational qy such that Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ)
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [h11]
      all_goals norm_num

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by linarith, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]]
  have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two; all_goals linarith
  have htan1 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
    have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
    nlinarith
  have hcos : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have hcos2 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h1 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h1]
      rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
    have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have htan4 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have htan5 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
        calc
          1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by 
            rw [htan4]
          _ = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by 
            field_simp
            <;> nlinarith
          _ = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
            rw [h9]
            all_goals field_simp
      have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
      field_simp at htan5 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [hcos2]
    rw [h8]
    field_simp
    all_goals nlinarith
  have hsin : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2) ) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h1 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h9 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h9]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have htan4 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have htan5 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
        calc
          1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by 
            rw [htan4]
          _ = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by 
            field_simp
            <;> nlinarith
          _ = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
            rw [h9]
            all_goals field_simp
      have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
      field_simp at htan5 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have htan4 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h8' : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [htan4]
      field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith [show Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 by linarith [h7]]]
    rw [h1]
    rw [h8']
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h8
    field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 by linarith [h7]]
    all_goals nlinarith
  constructor
  · exact hcos
  constructor
  · exact hsin
  · intro q h_eq
    have htanq : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith [h_eq]
    have hcosq : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h10 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := hcos
      rw [h10]
      rw [htanq]
    have hsinq : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h11 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2) ) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := hsin
      rw [h11]
      rw [htanq]
    constructor
    · -- Show existence of rational qx such that cos θ = qx
      refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        norm_num at hcosq ⊢
        all_goals try linarith
      ⟩
    · -- Show existence of rational qy such that sin θ = qy
      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        norm_num at hsinq ⊢
        all_goals try linarith
      ⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Show that $\cos \theta = \frac{1 - t^2}{1 + t^2}$
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
      rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
      have h6 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
        have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan
        have h7 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) / (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) := by
          have h8 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
            rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
          have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
          have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
            have h12 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := h3
            have h13 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := h4
            have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
              apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
              constructor
              · -- Show that $-\pi/2 < \theta/2$
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h12, h13]
              · -- Show that $\theta/2 < \pi/2$
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h12, h13]
            linarith
          have h14 : 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have h10' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := h10
            rw [h10']
            have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := h11
            field_simp [h15]
            <;> nlinarith [h9]
          have h15 : (1 - (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) / (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
            rw [show 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) by linarith [h14]]
            have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := h11
            field_simp [h16]
            <;> nlinarith [h9]
          nlinarith
        rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = t by linarith [htan2]]
      linarith
    exact h5
  constructor
  · -- Show that $\sin \theta = \frac{2t}{1 + t^2}$
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h5 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
      rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
      have h6 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
        have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan
        have h7 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          constructor
          · -- Show that $-\pi/2 < \theta/2$
            nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
          · -- Show that $\theta/2 < \pi/2$
            nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
        have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
          apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
          · -- Show that $0 \leq \theta/2
            linarith
          · -- Show that $\theta/2 \leq \pi
            nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
        have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
        have h14 : 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [h10]
          have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := h13
          field_simp [h15]
          <;> nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
        have h15 : (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan2
          rw [htan2]
          have h17 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [h17]
          have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := h13
          field_simp [h16]
          <;> nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2), h11, h12]
        rw [h7]
        linarith
      linarith
    exact h5
  · -- Show that if $t$ is rational, then $\cos \theta$ and $\sin \theta$ are rational
    intro q h_eq
    have h13 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h14 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
        have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
          have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h2.1
        have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
          have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h3.2
        have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        -- First part proves cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
        have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
          rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
          have h6 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
            have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan
            have h7 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) / (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) := by
              have h8 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
                rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
              have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
              have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
                rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
              have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
                have h12 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := h3
                have h13 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := h4
                have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                  apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
                  constructor
                  · -- Show that $-\pi/2 < \theta/2
                    nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h12, h13]
                  · -- Show that $\theta/2 < \pi/2
                    nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h12, h13]
                linarith
              have h14 : 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                have h10' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := h10
                rw [h10']
                have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := h11
                field_simp [h15]
                <;> nlinarith [h9]
              have h15 : (1 - (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) / (1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
                rw [show 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) by linarith [h14]]
                have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := h11
                field_simp [h16]
                <;> nlinarith [h9]
              nlinarith
            rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = t by linarith [htan2]]
          linarith
        exact h5
      rw [h14]
      have htan : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith [h_eq]
      rw [htan]
    have h14 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ) ) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h14 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
        have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
          have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h2.1
        have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
          have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h3.2
        have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h5 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
          rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
          have h6 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
            have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan
            have h7 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
            have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
              apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
              constructor
              · -- Show that $-\pi/2 < \theta/2
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
              · -- Show that $\theta/2 < \pi/2
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
            have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
              apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
              · -- Show that $0 \leq \theta/2
                linarith
              · -- Show that $\theta/2 \leq \pi
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
            have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
            have h14 : 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
                rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
              rw [h10]
              have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := h13
              field_simp [h15]
              <;> nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
            have h15 : (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan2
              rw [htan2]
              have h17 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
                rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
              rw [h17]
              have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := h13
              field_simp [h16]
              <;> nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2), h11, h12]
            rw [h7]
            linarith
          linarith
        exact h5
      rw [h14]
      have htan : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith [h_eq]
      rw [htan]
    constructor
    · -- Show that $\cos \theta$ is rational
      refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        rw [h13]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩
    · -- Show that $\sin \theta$ is rational
      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        rw [h14]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)

          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
