    have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h2 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h5 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            rw [Real.cos_two_mul, Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
            field_simp [h6]
            all_goals nlinarith [h6]
          linarith
        rw [h4, htan]
      linarith
    linarith
  constructor
  · -- Show that sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    have h1 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h2 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h4 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h5 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            rw [Real.sin_two_mul, Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
            field_simp [h6]
            all_goals nlinarith [h6]
          linarith
        rw [h4, htan]
      linarith
    linarith
  · -- Show that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q h_eq
    have ht : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h1 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have hcos : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := (by
        have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
          have h2 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
          rw [h2]
          have h3 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
            have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              have h5 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                rw [Real.cos_two_mul, Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
                have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
                field_simp [h6]
                all_goals nlinarith [h6]
              linarith
            rw [h4, htan]
          linarith
        linarith
      )
      rw [hcos]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
      all_goals norm_num
    have h2 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have hsin : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := (by
        have h1 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h2 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
          rw [h2]
          have h3 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
            have h4 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              have h5 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                rw [Real.sin_two_mul, Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
                have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
                field_simp [h6]
                all_goals nlinarith [h6]
              linarith
            rw [h4, htan]
          linarith
        linarith
      )
      rw [hsin]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
      all_goals norm_num
    constructor
    · exact h1
    · exact h2

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Show that $\cos \theta = \frac{1 - t^2}{1 + t^2}$.
    have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h2 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by
        ring_nf
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
        rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
      rw [h3]
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have h4 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
        exact Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
      have h11 : 0 ≤ θ := by
        have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
        exact h1.1
      have h12 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
        have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
        exact h1.2
      have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith
      have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h12]
      have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, Real.pi_gt_three]
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4, Real.pi_gt_three]
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
      have h5 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have htan' : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan
        rw [htan']
        have htan2' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
        rw [htan2']
        have h4' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h4
        field_simp [h9]
        nlinarith
      have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h5' : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h5
        field_simp at h5' ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h8 : 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
        have h5' : 1 + t ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by
          have ht1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      field_simp [h7, h8]
      all_goals nlinarith
    exact h1
  constructor
  · -- Show that $\sin \theta = \frac{2t}{1 + t^2}$.
    have h2 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h3 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by
        ring_nf
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
      rw [h4]
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have h4' : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        have h1 : 0 ≤ θ := by
          have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h1.1
        have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
          have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h1.2
        have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith
        have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
        have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          constructor
          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, Real.pi_gt_three]
          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4, Real.pi_gt_three]
        linarith
      have h5' : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
        apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
        · linarith
        · have h6 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
            nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ ≤ Real.pi by nlinarith [Real.pi_gt_three, h2]]
          nlinarith
      have h6 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have htan' : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan
        rw [htan']
        have htan2' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
        rw [htan2']
        have h4 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
          exact Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
        field_simp [h9]
        nlinarith
      have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have htan' : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan
        have htan2' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
        rw [htan'] at *
        rw [htan2']
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h4'
        field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith]
      have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h5' : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h6
        field_simp at h5' ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h9 : 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
        have h5' : 1 + t ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by
          have ht1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
      calc
        2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) = 2 * (t * Real.cos (θ / 2)) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by rw [h7]
        _ = 2 * t * (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by ring
        _ = 2 * t * (1 / (1 + t ^ 2)) := by rw [h8]
        _ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by field_simp [h9]
    exact h2
  · -- Show that if $t$ is rational, then both $\cos \theta$ and $\sin \theta$ are rational.
    intro q h_eq
    constructor
    · -- Show that $\cos \theta$ is rational
      have h10 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        tauto
      have htan : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h11 : (1 - t ^ 2 : ℝ) / (1 + t ^ 2) = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
      refine ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        rw [h10]
        rw [h11]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩
    · -- Show that $\sin \theta$ is rational
      have h20 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        tauto
      have htan : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h21 : (2 * t : ℝ) / (1 + t ^ 2) = (2 * (q : ℝ) ) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
      refine ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        rw [h20]
        rw [h21]
        all_goals norm_num
      ⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
    have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · linarith
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
    have htan : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [show t = Real.tan (θ / 2) by rfl]
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h8 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      rw [htan]
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
      field_simp
      <;> nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
    have h9 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h10 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
        rw [←Real.cos_two_mul]
        all_goals ring_nf
      linarith
    rw [h9]
    have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h11 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h8
      field_simp at h11 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h10]
    field_simp
    all_goals nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
    have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · linarith
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
    have htan : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [show t = Real.tan (θ / 2) by rfl]
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h8 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      rw [htan]
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
      field_simp
      <;> nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
    have h9 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h10 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [←Real.sin_two_mul]
        all_goals ring_nf
      linarith
    rw [h9]
    have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h11 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h8
      field_simp at h11 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan
      have h6' : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
      field_simp at htan2 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h11]
    rw [h10]
    field_simp
    all_goals nlinarith
  · -- Proof of rationality
    intro q ht
    constructor
    · -- Proof of existence of rational qx
      have h10 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h11 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by

        rw [h11]
        have ht1 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith

    · -- Proof of existence of rational qy
      have h11 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h12 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by

        rw [h12]
        have ht1 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
        rw [ht1]
      refine ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        rw [h11]
        all_goals norm_num⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by

    have h6 : Real.tan (Real.pi / 4) = 1 := Real.tan_pi_div_four
    nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Show that cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
    have h7 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h8 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
        rw [← Real.cos_two_mul]
        all_goals ring_nf
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
        have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by

        field_simp [h11, h10, h14]
        <;> nlinarith
      rw [h8, h9]
      field_simp
      ring_nf
    simpa using h7
  constructor
  · -- Show that sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    have h10 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h11 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [← Real.sin_two_mul]
        all_goals ring_nf
      have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have h13 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by

        have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by

          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h14, h15]

        field_simp [h13, h14]
      have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
        have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          have h14 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith

          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo

          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h14, h15]

  · -- Show that if t is rational, then both cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q h_eq
    constructor
    · -- Show that cos θ is rational
      have h14 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h7 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h8 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
            rw [← Real.cos_two_mul]
            all_goals ring_nf
          have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
            have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
              have h14 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h15 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith
              apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
              constructor
              · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h14, h15]
              · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h14, h15]
            field_simp [h11, h10, h14]
            <;> nlinarith
          rw [h8, h9]
          field_simp
          ring_nf
        have h_eq' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h_eq]
        rw [h7, h_eq']
      have h15 : (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) = ( (1 - q^2) / (1 + q^2) : ℚ) := by
        simp
      rw [h14, h15]
      refine' ⟨ (1 - q^2) / (1 + q^2), by simp ⟩
    · -- Show that sin θ is rational
      have h15 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h10 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h11 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [← Real.sin_two_mul]
            all_goals ring_nf
          have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            have h13 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
              have h14 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h15 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith
              apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
              constructor
              · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h14, h15]
              · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h14, h15]
            field_simp [h13, h14]
          have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
            have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
              have h14 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
              have h15 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith
              apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
              constructor
              · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h14, h15]
              · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h14, h15]
            field_simp [h11, h10, h14]
            <;> nlinarith
          rw [h11, h12, h13]
          field_simp
          ring_nf
        have h_eq' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
          linarith [h_eq]
        rw [h10, h_eq']
      have h16 : (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) = ( (2 * q) / (1 + q^2) : ℚ) := by
        simp
      rw [h15, h16]
      refine' ⟨ (2 * q) / (1 + q^2), by simp ⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
    have h3 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
      have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
        rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
      have h5 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
        exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [htan]
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have hcos : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
        have h1 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1]
        have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h2]
        have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          constructor
          · linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
          · linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
        linarith
      have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := hcos
        field_simp [h7] at htan2 ⊢
        nlinarith [htan2]
      have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h5
      have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h6
        have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h7
        rw [h9] at h10
        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + t ^ 2) = 1 := by
          nlinarith
        have htan2_pos : 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
          have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
          have h2 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by linarith
          linarith
        field_simp at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h6
        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h8
        calc
          Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (t * Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by rw [h10]
          _ = t ^ 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by ring
          _ = t ^ 2 * (1 / (1 + t ^ 2)) := by rw [h11]
          _ = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by field_simp
      have h10 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 1 - 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
        rw [Real.cos_two_mul, Real.sin_sq]
        all_goals ring_nf
      rw [h4]
      rw [h9] at h10
      have h11 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        rw [h10]
        field_simp [(show 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
          have htan2_pos : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
            have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
            linarith
          linarith
        )]
        all_goals nlinarith
      linarith [h11]
    exact h3
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
    have h3 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h4 : θ = 2 * (θ / 2) := by ring
      rw [h4]
      have h5 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
      have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
          have h1 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1]
          have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h2]
          have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
            · linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
          linarith
        have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          rw [htan]
          rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
        field_simp [h7] at htan2 ⊢
        nlinarith [htan2]
      have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
          exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
        have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h6
        rw [h9] at h8
        have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + t ^ 2) = 1 := by
          nlinarith
        have htan2_pos : 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
          have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
          have h2 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by linarith
          linarith
        field_simp at *
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h8 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        rw [h5, h6]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h7
        field_simp [show 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
          have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
          have h2 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by linarith
          linarith
        ]
        all_goals nlinarith [h9]
      linarith [h8]
    exact h3
  · -- Proof of ∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) → (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))
    intro q hq
    have htan2 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h1 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h10 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := (by
        have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
          have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h2.1
        have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
          have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h3.2
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
        have h3 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
          have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
            rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
          have h5 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
            exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
          have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [htan]
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          have hcos : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
            have h1 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1]
            have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h2]
            have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
              apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
              constructor
              · linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
              · linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
            linarith
          have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := hcos
            field_simp [h7] at htan2 ⊢
            nlinarith [htan2]
          have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h5
          have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h6
            have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h7
            rw [h9] at h10
            have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + t ^ 2) = 1 := by
              nlinarith
            have htan2_pos : 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
              have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
              have h2 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by linarith
              linarith
            field_simp at *
            all_goals nlinarith
          have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h6
            have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h8
            calc
              Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (t * Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by rw [h10]
              _ = t ^ 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by ring
              _ = t ^ 2 * (1 / (1 + t ^ 2)) := by rw [h11]
              _ = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by field_simp
          have h10 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 1 - 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
            rw [Real.cos_two_mul, Real.sin_sq]
            all_goals ring_nf
          rw [h4]
          rw [h9] at h10
          have h11 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            rw [h10]
            field_simp [(show 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
              have htan2_pos : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
                have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
                linarith
              linarith
            )]
            all_goals nlinarith
          linarith [h11]
        exact h3
      )
      rw [h10]
      rw [htan2]
      all_goals norm_num
    have h2 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h11 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := (by
        have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
          have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h2.1
        have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
          have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h3.2
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
        have h3 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h4 : θ = 2 * (θ / 2) := by ring
          rw [h4]
          have h5 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
          have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
              have h1 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1]
              have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h2]
              have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
                constructor
                · linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
                · linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
              linarith
            have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              rw [htan]
              rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            field_simp [h7] at htan2 ⊢
            nlinarith [htan2]
          have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
              exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
            have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h6
            rw [h9] at h8
            have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + t ^ 2) = 1 := by
              nlinarith
            have htan2_pos : 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
              have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
              have h2 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by linarith
              linarith
            field_simp at *
            all_goals nlinarith
          have h8 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            rw [h5, h6]
            have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h7
            field_simp [show 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
              have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
              have h2 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by linarith
              linarith
            ]
            all_goals nlinarith [h9]
          linarith [h8]
        exact h3
      )
      rw [h11]
      rw [htan2]
      all_goals norm_num
    constructor
    · exact h1
    · exact h2

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h2]
  have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have h7 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
    have h8 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h8]
    rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
  have h9 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    have h10 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h10]
    rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
  have ht2 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan
    rw [htan2]
    have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
      nlinarith
    field_simp [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h10 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have eq1 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := h7
    have eq2 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
    have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h12 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
      field_simp at h12 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [eq1]
    have h13 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
      nlinarith
    have eq3 : (2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 : ℝ) = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      rw [h11]
      field_simp [show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by nlinarith]
      all_goals nlinarith
    exact eq3
  have h11 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have eq1 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      linarith [h9]
    have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan
    have h11' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h12 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
      field_simp at h12 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have eq3 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht
      have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h5
      field_simp [htan2]
    rw [eq1, eq3]
    have h13 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
      nlinarith
    have eq4 : (2 * (Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) ) * Real.cos (θ / 2) : ℝ) = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2) ) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h11' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h11'
      calc
        2 * (Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) ) * Real.cos (θ / 2) = 2 * Real.tan (θ / 2) * (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by ring_nf
        _ = 2 * Real.tan (θ / 2) * (1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2)) := by rw [h11']
        _ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2) ) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by field_simp [show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by nlinarith]
    linarith [eq4]
  constructor
  · -- Prove the formula for cos θ
    exact h10
  constructor
  · -- Prove the formula for sin θ
    exact h11
  · -- Prove that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q htan

    · linarith
  have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have h7 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
    have h8 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h8]
    rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
  have h9 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    have h10 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h10]
    rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
  have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have h11 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have htan2' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
    rw [htan2']
    have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith [h5]
    field_simp [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
    <;> nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
  have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h11' : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h11
    field_simp at h11' ⊢
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h13 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h7' : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := h7
    rw [h7']
    have h12' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h12
    rw [h12']
    field_simp
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h14 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h9' : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h9
    rw [h9']
    have htan2' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
    have h12' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h12
    have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h5
    have h16 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h17 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
      have h18 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h5
      field_simp [h17] at *
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h16]
    field_simp [h12', htan2']
    all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2), h5]
  constructor
  · -- Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
    intro t
    exact h13
  constructor
  · -- Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    intro t
    exact h14
  · -- ∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) → (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))
    intro q hq
    have h15 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
      simpa using hq
    have h16 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h13' : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h13
      rw [h13']
      have h17 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := h15
      rw [h17]
      all_goals norm_num
    have h17 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h14' : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h14
      rw [h14']
      have h18 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := h15
      rw [h18]
      all_goals norm_num
    exact ⟨h16, h17⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h1.left
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h1.right
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
      rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
      have h6 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by 
        rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
      have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by 
        exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [htan]
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have hcosp : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
          nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
        · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
          nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
      have h8 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [htan2]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := hcosp
        field_simp [h9]
        <;> nlinarith [h7]
      have h10 : 1 - t^2 = (2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1) * (1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2)) := by
        rw [htan2]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := hcosp
        field_simp [h9]
        nlinarith [h7]
      rw [h6]
      rw [h8] at *
      rw [h10]
      field_simp [hcosp]
      <;> nlinarith [h7]
    exact h5
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h1.left
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h1.right
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h5 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
      rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
      have h6 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
        rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
      have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by 
        exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [htan]
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have hcosp : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
          nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
        · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
          nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
      have h8 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [htan2]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := hcosp
        field_simp [h9]
        <;> nlinarith [h7]
      rw [h6]
      rw [htan2]
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := hcosp
      field_simp [h9]
      nlinarith [h7]
    exact h5
  · -- Proof that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q ht
    constructor
    · -- Proof that cos θ is rational
      have h1 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
        have htq : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
        have hcos : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
          have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
            have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h1.left
          have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
            have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h1.right
          have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
          have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
          have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
            rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
            have h6 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by 
              rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
            have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by 
              exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
            have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              rw [htan]
              rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            have hcosp : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
              apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
              constructor
              · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
              · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
            have h8 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              rw [htan2]
              have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := hcosp
              field_simp [h9]
              <;> nlinarith [h7]
            have h10 : 1 - t^2 = (2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1) * (1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2)) := by
              rw [htan2]
              have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := hcosp
              field_simp [h9]
              nlinarith [h7]
            rw [h6]
            rw [h8] at *
            rw [h10]
            field_simp [hcosp]
            <;> nlinarith [h7]
          exact h5
        have hcos' : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
          rw [hcos]
          rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [htq]]
        refine' ⟨(1 - q^2) / (1 + q^2), by
          norm_num at hcos' ⊢
          all_goals try linarith⟩
      exact h1
    · -- Proof that sin θ is rational
      have h2 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
        have htq : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
        have hsin : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
          have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
            have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h1.left
          have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
            have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h1.right
          have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
          have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
          have h5 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
            rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
            have h6 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
              rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
            have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by 
              exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
            have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              rw [htan]
              rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            have hcosp : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
              apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
              constructor
              · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
              · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
                nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
            have h8 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              rw [htan2]
              have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := hcosp
              field_simp [h9]
              <;> nlinarith [h7]
            rw [h6]
            rw [htan2]
            have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := hcosp
            field_simp [h9]
            nlinarith [h7]
          exact h5
        have hsin' : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
          rw [hsin]
          rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [htq]]
        refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q^2), by
          norm_num at hsin' ⊢
          all_goals try linarith⟩
      exact h2

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have hcos : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have hsin : 0 ≤ Real.sin (θ / 2) := by
    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos, Real.pi_nonneg]
  have ht1 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    have htan'' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan
    have hcos' : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := hcos
    field_simp [htan'', hcos']
  have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    exact Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
  have ht2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have ht1' : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
    have h5' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h5
    rw [ht1'] at h5'
    have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 1 := by
      nlinarith
    have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      field_simp [(show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by positivity)]
      all_goals nlinarith
    exact h7
  have h8 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h9 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      rw [←Real.cos_two_mul]
    rw [h9]
    have ht2' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
    rw [ht2']
    field_simp [(show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by positivity)]
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h10 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h11 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [←Real.sin_two_mul]
    rw [h11]
    have ht1' : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
    rw [ht1']
    have ht2' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
    field_simp [(show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by positivity), hcos]
    all_goals nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Show cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
    simpa using h8
  constructor
  · -- Show sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t^2)
    simpa using h10
  · -- Show that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q ht
    have h8' : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht]] at h8
      linarith
    have h10' : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht]] at h10
      linarith
    constructor
    · -- Show existence of rational qx such that cos θ = qx
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [h8']
      all_goals norm_num
    · -- Show existence of rational qy such that sin θ = qy
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [h10']
      all_goals norm_num

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have ht1 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have ht2 : Real.sin (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.sin_pos_of_pos_of_lt_pi
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have ht3 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have h5 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
    have h7 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h7]
    rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
  have h6 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    have h7 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h7]
    rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
  have ht4 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have ht5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have ht6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
    have ht7 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht4
    have ht8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by nlinarith [ht1]
      field_simp [ht7, h9]
    rw [ht8] at ht6
    have ht9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 1 := by
      nlinarith [ht6, sq_pos_of_pos ht1]
    have ht10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      field_simp [(show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by positivity)]
      nlinarith
    exact ht10
  have h7 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    rw [h5]
    have ht8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht5
    rw [ht8]
    field_simp [(show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by positivity)]
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h8 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    rw [h6]
    have ht8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht5
    have ht9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have ht7 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht4
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by nlinarith [ht1]
      field_simp [ht7, h9]
    rw [ht9]
    field_simp [ht8, (show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by positivity)]
    all_goals nlinarith [sq_pos_of_pos ht1, sq_pos_of_pos ht2]
  constructor
  · -- Show that cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    simpa using h7
  constructor
  · -- Show that sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t²)
    simpa using h8
  · -- Show that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q h_eq
    have ht11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith [h_eq]
    have h9 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht11]] at h7
      linarith
    have h10 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht11]] at h8
      linarith
    constructor
    · -- Show existence of rational qx such that cos θ = qx
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      field_simp at h9 ⊢
      all_goals try { linarith }
    · -- Show existence of rational qy such that sin θ = qy
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      field_simp at h10 ⊢
      all_goals try { linarith }

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have h7 : 0 ≤ Real.sin (θ / 2) := by
    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h4, Real.pi_pos, Real.pi_gt_three]
  have ht1 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have ht2 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
      nlinarith [h6]
    have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
    rw [htan2]
    have h14 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = (1 : ℝ) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      field_simp [h13]
      <;> nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
    linarith
  have ht3 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h15 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h16 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h16]
      rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
    have h17 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
    have h18 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h19 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h17
      field_simp [(show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by nlinarith)] at h19 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h15]
    have h19 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have ht20 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
      nlinarith
    have h20 : (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 2 * (1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2)) - 1 := by
      field_simp
      <;> nlinarith
    have h21 : 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h23 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h18
      rw [h23]
      linarith [h20]
    linarith
  have ht4 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h15 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h16 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h16]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    have h17 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
    have h18 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h19 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h17
      field_simp [(show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by nlinarith)] at h19 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h19 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
      have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
      field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by nlinarith] at htan2 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith [htan2]
    rw [h15]
    have h19' : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have ht20 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
      nlinarith
    have h20 : (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 2 * (Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2)) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h18' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h18
      field_simp [show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by nlinarith, show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by nlinarith]
      all_goals nlinarith [h18']
    have h21 : 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h22 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h19
      rw [h22]
      linarith [h20]
    linarith
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
    exact ht3
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    exact ht4
  · -- Proof that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q ht
    constructor
    · -- Proof that ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)
      have h13 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have ht3' : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht3
        have ht' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
          linarith [ht]
        rw [ht'] at ht3'
        linarith
      refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        norm_num at h13 ⊢
        all_goals linarith⟩
    · -- Proof that ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ)
      have h14 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have ht4' : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht4
        have ht' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
          linarith [ht]
        rw [ht'] at ht4'
        linarith
      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        norm_num at h14 ⊢
        all_goals linarith⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof for cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · -- Show that θ/2 > 0
        nlinarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
      · -- Show that θ/2 < Real.pi/2
        nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
    have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
      · nlinarith [h4, Real.pi_pos]
    have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      rw [htan]
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h7 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have ht2 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
      nlinarith
    have h8 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h9 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h9]
      rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have ht2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
      rw [ht2]
      have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h5
      have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have h12 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 + 1 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        field_simp [ne_of_gt h10]
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) := by
        have h14 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 + 1 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h12
        have h15 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by linarith
        field_simp [ne_of_gt h10] at h15 ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h13
    rw [h8]
    rw [h9]
    field_simp
    nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Proof for sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · -- Show that θ/2 > 0
        nlinarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
      · -- Show that θ/2 < Real.pi/2
        nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
    have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
      · nlinarith [h4, Real.pi_pos]
    have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      rw [htan]
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h14 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h15 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h15]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    have h15 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have ht2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
      have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h5
      field_simp [ne_of_gt h10] at ht2 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have ht2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
      rw [ht2]
      have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h5
      have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have h12 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 + 1 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        field_simp [ne_of_gt h10]
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2) := by
        have h14 : (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 + 1 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h12
        have h15 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by linarith
        field_simp [ne_of_gt h10] at h15 ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact h13
    rw [h14]
    rw [h15]
    have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h9
    field_simp [h16]
    nlinarith
  · -- Proof that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q hq
    constructor
    · -- Show that cos θ is rational
      have h8 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h9 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          tauto
        rw [h9]
        have htan2 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
        rw [htan2]
      refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        simp [h8]
      ⟩
    · -- Show that sin θ is rational
      have h14 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h15 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          tauto
        rw [h15]
        have htan2 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
        rw [htan2]
      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        simp [h14]
      ⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof for cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : Real.cos θ = 1 - 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
      have h4 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h4]
      rw [Real.cos_two_mul, Real.sin_sq]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
    have ht2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      exact Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
    have ht4 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
      · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
    have ht5 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
      · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
    have ht3 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have ht6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have ht7 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht3
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = t by linarith [ht1]] at ht7
      have ht8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith [ht4]] at ht7 ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact ht8
    have ht7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := by
      have ht8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := ht2
      have ht9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht6
      have ht10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
        rw [ht9]
        ring_nf
      rw [ht10] at ht8
      have ht11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := by
        have ht12 : 1 + t^2 > 0 := by
          have ht14 : t^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
          nlinarith
        field_simp at ht8 ⊢
        nlinarith
      rw [ht11] at ht10
      have ht12 : 1 + t^2 > 0 := by
        have ht14 : t^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
        nlinarith
      field_simp at ht10 ⊢
      nlinarith
    rw [h3]
    rw [ht7]
    have ht14 : 1 + t^2 > 0 := by
      have ht14 : t^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
      nlinarith
    field_simp at *
    nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Proof for sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h4 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h4]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
    have ht2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      exact Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
    have ht4 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]

    have ht5 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
      · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
    have ht3 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have ht6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have ht7 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht3
      rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = t by linarith [ht1]] at ht7
      have ht8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith [ht4]] at ht7 ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      exact ht8
    have ht7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := by
      have ht8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := ht2
      have ht9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht6
      have ht10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
        rw [ht9]
        ring_nf
      rw [ht10] at ht8
      have ht12 : 1 + t^2 > 0 := by
        have ht14 : t^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
        nlinarith
      field_simp at ht8 ⊢
      nlinarith
    have ht16 : Real.sin θ = 2 * t / (1 + t^2) := by
      calc
        Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h3
        _ = 2 * (t * Real.cos (θ / 2)) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by rw [ht6]
        _ = 2 * t * (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by ring_nf
        _ = 2 * t * (1 / (1 + t^2)) := by rw [ht7]
        _ = 2 * t / (1 + t^2) := by field_simp [show 1 + t^2 > 0 by
            have ht14 : t^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
            nlinarith

    linarith
  · -- Proof about existence of rational numbers when t is rational
    intro q hq
    have h1 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    constructor
    · -- Existence of rational qx
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :

    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]

    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have ht1 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]

    have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)

    rw [ht1']
    have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
      nlinarith
    field_simp [h8]
    nlinarith

    have h10 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h11 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf

      nlinarith [h8, Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) - Real.cos (θ / 2)), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) + Real.cos (θ / 2))]
    linarith
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo

      · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
      · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
    have h4 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]

    have ht2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [show t = Real.tan (θ / 2) by rfl]

    have h5 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h6 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h6]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    have ht3 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      rw [ht2]
      have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
      field_simp [h7]
      <;> nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
    have ht4 : (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) = Real.sin θ := by
      rw [ht3]
      have h8 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h5
      have h9 : (2 * t : ℝ) / (1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) = (2 * t) * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
        field_simp
      rw [h9]
      have ht5 : t = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) : ℝ) := by
        linarith [ht2]
      rw [ht5]
      have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
      have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      field_simp [h10]
      nlinarith [h8, Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) - Real.cos (θ / 2)), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) + Real.cos (θ / 2))]
    linarith
  · -- Proof about rationality when t is rational
    intro q hq
    constructor
    · -- Show that cos θ is rational
      have htq : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
      have h11 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h12 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by

        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by simp [h11]⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)

          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Show that cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by

    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by

    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl

        have h7 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
        rw [h7]
        rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
      have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        rw [htan2] at *

          have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith

        have h10 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [h10]
          have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
          field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith]
          nlinarith
        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
          have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h14

        field_simp at h10 ⊢

      field_simp

    assumption
  constructor
  · -- Show that sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h5 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h6 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have h7 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
        rw [h7]
        rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
      have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        rw [ht1] at *
        have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo

          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]

        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
        have h10 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [h10]

        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by

        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
          have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith

            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]

        have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl

          rw [ht1]
          have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
          apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
          · linarith
          · linarith [Real.pi_pos]
        have h15 : 1 + t ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by nlinarith
        positivity
      field_simp [h7, h11]

    assumption
  · -- Show that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q hq
    constructor
    · -- Show that cos θ is rational
      have h14 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by

    · -- Show that sin θ is rational
      have h15 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by

        have h17 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]

    apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
    · linarith
    · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]

    have h5 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
    nlinarith
  have h6 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h7 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      rw [← Real.cos_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
      have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
        have h13 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h14 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith
        have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
        linarith
      have h13 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have h14 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h13 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
          rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          ]
        rw [h13]
        have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
          have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h15
          positivity
        field_simp [h15]
        nlinarith [h11]
      field_simp at h14 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h7, h8]
    field_simp
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h7 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2) ) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h8 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [← Real.sin_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h9 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
      have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
        have h13 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h14 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith
        have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
        linarith
      have h13 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have h14 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h13 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
          rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          ]
        rw [h13]
        have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by

        field_simp [h15]
        nlinarith [h11]

      all_goals nlinarith
    have h15 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h16 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := h9
      have h17 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
        have h13 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h14 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith
        have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          constructor
          · nlinarith
          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
        linarith
      field_simp at h16 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h8, h15, h10]
    have h17 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      have h13 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
      have h14 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith
      have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · nlinarith
