      linarith
    field_simp [show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by linarith, sq_pos_of_pos h17]
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h8 : ∀ q : ℚ, Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) → (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ)) := by
    intro q h_eq
    constructor
    · -- Show existence of rational qx
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)

        have h6 : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h6
        rw [h6]

      norm_num at h6' ⊢
      all_goals try linarith
    · -- Show existence of rational qy
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h7' : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ) ) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h7 : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2) ) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h7
        rw [h7]
        rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]]
      norm_num at h7' ⊢
      all_goals try linarith
  exact ⟨h6, h7, h8⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  have h1 : 0 ≤ θ := by
    have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ

  have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
    have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ

    have h8 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h9 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith

      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h8, h9]
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h8, h9, Real.pi_gt_three]
    linarith
  have ht2 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0  := by
    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith
    · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4, Real.pi_gt_three]
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have htan4 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      rw [←Real.cos_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have htan5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      have ht7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h13 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
        have h14 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          rw [h13]
          field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by nlinarith [ht1]]
        have h15 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          field_simp [h14, show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by nlinarith [ht1]]
          all_goals nlinarith [h12]
        field_simp [h15, show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by nlinarith [ht1]]
      rw [ht1] at *
      linarith
    rw [htan4, htan5]
    field_simp
    all_goals nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t²)
    have htan4 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [←Real.sin_two_mul]

    have ht5 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by

        have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)

              rw [h13]
              field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by nlinarith [ht1]]
            have h15 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by

            field_simp [h15, show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by nlinarith [ht1]]
          rw [ht1] at *

        rw [htan4, htan5]

    · -- Show that sin θ is rational
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have ht1 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
      rw [show Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) by

            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          have ht8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [show t = Real.tan (θ / 2) by linarith [ht1]]
            field_simp [ht7, show Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 by linarith [ht1]]
          linarith
        have ht6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
          have ht7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
            have h13 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            have h14 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
              rw [h13]
              field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by nlinarith [ht1]]
            have h15 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
              field_simp [h14, show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by nlinarith [ht1]]
              all_goals nlinarith [h12]
            field_simp [h15, show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by nlinarith [ht1]]
          rw [ht1] at *

        nlinarith
      field_simp [h11]
      nlinarith [h10]
    have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      field_simp [(show 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
        have ht2_pos : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
          have ht2 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
          nlinarith
        linarith
      )]
      all_goals nlinarith [ht2]
    rw [h8]
    rw [h13]
    field_simp [(show 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
      have ht2_pos : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
        have ht2 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
        nlinarith
      linarith
    )]
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h10 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
    have h11 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h12 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h12]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    rw [h11]
    have ht2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
    have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have ht2 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have ht2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
        rw [ht2]
        have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
          have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos, h4]
            · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos, h4, Real.pi_gt_three]
          nlinarith
        field_simp [h11]
        nlinarith [h10]
      field_simp [(show 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
        have ht2_pos : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
          have ht2 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
          nlinarith
        linarith
      )]
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h14 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have ht2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
      have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos, h4]
        · linarith [h3, Real.pi_pos, h4, Real.pi_gt_three]
      field_simp at ht2 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    calc
      2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) = 2 * (t * Real.cos (θ / 2)) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h14]]
      _ = 2 * t * (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by ring
      _ = 2 * t * (1 / (1 + t ^ 2)) := by
        rw [h13]
      _ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        field_simp [(show 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
          have ht2_pos : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
            have ht2 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
            nlinarith
          linarith
        )]
  constructor
  · exact h7
  constructor
  · exact h10
  · intro q h_eq
    have ht_eq : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have hc : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h7' : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := h7
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht_eq]] at h7'
      linarith
    have hs : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h10' : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := h10
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht_eq]] at h10'
      linarith
    constructor
    · -- Show existence of rational qx
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [hc]
      all_goals norm_num
    · -- Show existence of rational qy
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [hs]
      all_goals norm_num

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Show that cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have ht1 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · nlinarith [show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, Real.pi_pos, h2]
      · nlinarith [show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have ht2 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · linarith
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have ht3 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [show t = Real.tan (θ / 2) by rfl]
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have ht4 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h1 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h1]
      rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
    have ht7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have ht8 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht3
      rw [ht8] at *
      have ht9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
      have ht11 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
        have ht12 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          field_simp
        rw [ht12]
        have ht13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have ht14 : 1 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          field_simp
          all_goals nlinarith
        rw [ht14]
        rw [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 by linarith [ht13]]
        all_goals field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 by positivity]
      have ht12 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := ht11
      field_simp at ht12 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [ht4, ht7]
    field_simp
    all_goals nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Show that sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ

    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith

    have ht1 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by

    have ht2 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by

      have ht9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity

    have ht11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by

          rw [ht11]

          · linarith
          · positivity
        rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ t by linarith)]
      rw [ht16]
    have ht12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have ht13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := ht7
      have ht14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := ht1
      have ht15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith)]

    rw [ht4, ht11, ht12]

  · -- Show that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)

          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
    · linarith [h3, h4, Real.pi_pos]
  have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have h7 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by 
    have h8 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h8]
    rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
  have h9 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
    have h10 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h10]
    rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Prove that cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
    have htan3 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      simpa using htan2
    have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have htan4 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan3
      have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith [h5]] at htan4 ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h11]] at h12
      have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + t ^ 2) = 1 := by
        nlinarith
      field_simp at h13 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h14 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      rw [h7]
      have h15 : 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h10
        rw [h16]
        field_simp
        all_goals nlinarith
      linarith
    exact h14
  constructor
  · -- Prove that sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    have htan3 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      simpa using htan2
    have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan4 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan3
      field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith [h5]] at htan4 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have htan4 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan3
      have h11' : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        field_simp [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith [h5]] at htan4 ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h11']] at h12
      have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 * (1 + t ^ 2) = 1 := by
        nlinarith
      field_simp at h13 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h14 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      rw [h9]
      have h15 : 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h11]]
        have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h10
        field_simp at h16 ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith [h5]
      linarith
    exact h14
  · -- Prove the rationality part
    intro q hq
    have htan3 : t = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith [hq]
    have h14 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h15 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        tauto
      rw [h15]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [htan3]]
    have h16 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h17 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        tauto
      rw [h17]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [htan3]]
    constructor
    · -- Show that cos θ is rational
      refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        simp [h14]
      ⟩
    · -- Show that sin θ is rational
      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        simp [h16]
      ⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Show that $\cos \theta = \frac{1 - t^2}{1 + t^2}$
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have h5 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h6 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h6]
      rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
    have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      have h8 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [show t = Real.tan (θ / 2) by linarith [htan2]]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
          linarith
        have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 + 1 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [h11]
          have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
          field_simp [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
        nlinarith
      field_simp at h8 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h5, h7]
    have h8 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith
      have h14 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h7' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h7
        field_simp at h7' ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      rw [h14]
      positivity
    field_simp at *
    nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Show that $\sin \theta = \frac{2t}{1 + t^2}$
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have h5 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h6 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h6]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      have h8 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [show t = Real.tan (θ / 2) by linarith [htan2]]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
          linarith
        have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 + 1 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [h11]
          have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by nlinarith

        nlinarith
      field_simp at h8 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith

      have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo

        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
      linarith
    have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · linarith
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      rw [h7] at h11
      have h12 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
        have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith
        have h14 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h7' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h7
          field_simp at h7' ⊢
          all_goals nlinarith
        rw [h14]
        positivity
      field_simp at h11 ⊢
      nlinarith [h12]
    have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h12 : 1 + t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by positivity
      have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h9

      have h15 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.sin (θ / 2) by linarith)]
      rw [h15, h14]
      have htan2 : t ≥ 0 := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by
          have h15 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl

        rw [htan]
        have h16 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h17 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
          apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two

          · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
        linarith
      have h16 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h17 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_div (by
            have h12 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
              have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith
              have h14 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                have h7' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h7
                field_simp at h7' ⊢
                all_goals nlinarith
              rw [h14]
              positivity
            linarith
          )]
        rw [h17]
        have h18 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) = t := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ t by linarith [htan2])]
        rw [h18]
      rw [h16]
    rw [h5, h11, h7]
    have h12 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith
      have h14 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h7' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h7
        field_simp at h7' ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      rw [h14]
      positivity
    field_simp at *
    nlinarith
  · -- Show that if $t$ is rational, then $\cos \theta$ and $\sin \theta$ are rational
    intro q h_eq
    constructor
    · -- Show that $\cos \theta$ is rational
      have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have htan : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith [h_eq]
        have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
            have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h2.1
          have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
            have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h3.2
          have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have h5 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
            have h6 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
            rw [h6]
            rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
          have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by
              have h15 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
              linarith
            have h8 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              rw [show t = Real.tan (θ / 2) by linarith [htan2]]
              have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
                have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by

              have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 + 1 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by

                rw [h11]
                have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
                field_simp [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]

            field_simp at h8 ⊢
            all_goals nlinarith
          rw [h5, h7]
          have h8 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
            have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith
            have h14 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              have h7' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h7
              field_simp at h7' ⊢
              all_goals nlinarith
            rw [h14]
            positivity
          field_simp at *
          nlinarith
        rw [htan]
      have h2 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
        use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
        rw [h1]
        all_goals norm_num

          have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith

          have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by

          have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by

            rw [h7] at h11
            have h12 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof that cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
        nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
      · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
        nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
    have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :

  intro t

      have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := ht4

        have eq2 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (t * Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
          rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [ht5]]
        nlinarith [ht3, eq2]

        nlinarith
      field_simp at eq3 ⊢
      nlinarith
    have ht7 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h10 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
        rw [←Real.cos_two_mul]
        all_goals ring_nf
      linarith

    rw [ht6]

    nlinarith

  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.left
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.right
    have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h3 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
      have h4 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
      rw [h4]
      have ht2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := ht1
      have ht3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have ht4 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := ht1
        rw [ht4] at *
        have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          field_simp [Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq, Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
        linarith
      have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
        apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
        · linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
        · linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
      have ht3 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
        rw [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) by linarith [ht3]] at h8
        field_simp at h8 ⊢
        nlinarith [show t ^ 2 ≥ 0 by positivity]
      have ht4 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have ht5 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h6
        have ht6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := ht3
        have ht7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 by linarith)]
        rw [ht7, ht6]
        have ht8 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
        rw [ht8]
        have ht9 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) = abs t := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs]
        rw [ht9]
        have ht10 : t ≥ 0 := by
          have ht11 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
          have ht12 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
            linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
          have ht13 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
            apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
            · linarith
            · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]]
          have ht14 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
          linarith
        have ht11 : abs t = t := abs_of_nonneg ht10
        rw [ht11]
      have ht8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have ht9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_nonneg_of_mem_Icc
          constructor
          · linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
          · linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
        have ht10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := ht3
        have ht11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ 0 by linarith)]
        rw [ht11, ht10]
        have ht12 : Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
        linarith
      rw [ht4, ht8]
      field_simp
      nlinarith
    exact h3
  · -- Proof about rationality when t is rational
    intro q h_eq
    constructor
    · -- Show cos θ is rational
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h11 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
          have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h2.left
        have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
          have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h3.right
        have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h3 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
          have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
            rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
          rw [h4]
          have ht2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := ht1
          have ht3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have ht4 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := ht1
            rw [ht4] at *
            have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              field_simp [Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq, Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            linarith
          rw [ht3]
          field_simp
          nlinarith
        linarith
      rw [h11]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]]
      all_goals norm_num
    · -- Show sin θ is rational
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h11 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
          have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h2.left
        have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
          have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h3.right
        have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h3 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          rw [show θ = 2 * (θ / 2) by ring]
          have h4 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
          rw [h4]
          have ht2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := ht1
          have ht3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have ht4 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := ht1
            rw [ht4] at *
            have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              field_simp [Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq, Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
            linarith
          have h6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
            apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
            · linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
            · linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
          have ht3 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
            rw [show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) by linarith [ht3]] at h8
            field_simp at h8 ⊢
            nlinarith [show t ^ 2 ≥ 0 by positivity]
          have ht4 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have ht5 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h6
            have ht6 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := ht3
            have ht7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 by linarith)]
            rw [ht7, ht6]
            have ht8 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
              field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
            rw [ht8]
            have ht9 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) = abs t := by
              rw [Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs]
            rw [ht9]
            have ht10 : t ≥ 0 := by
              have ht11 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
              have ht12 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
                linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
              have ht13 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
                apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
                · linarith
                · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]]
              have ht14 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
              linarith
            have ht11 : abs t = t := abs_of_nonneg ht10
            rw [ht11]
          have ht8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have ht9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
              apply Real.cos_nonneg_of_mem_Icc
              constructor
              · linarith [h1, Real.pi_pos]
              · linarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
            have ht10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := ht3
            have ht11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ 0 by linarith)]
            rw [ht11, ht10]
            have ht12 : Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
              field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
            linarith
          rw [ht4, ht8]
          field_simp
          nlinarith
        linarith
      rw [h11]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [h_eq]]
      all_goals norm_num

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ := by linarith
  have h4 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by linarith
  have h5 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith
  have h6 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
  have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
    · linarith
    · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [Real.pi_pos]]
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Show cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h7 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h8 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h8]
      rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      rw [htan]
      have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        field_simp [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos, Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq]
      exact h10
    rw [h7, h9]
    field_simp
    nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Show sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
    have h11 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h12 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h12]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h14 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      have h19 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
        have h16 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h17 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
        have h18 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
          constructor
          · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]]
          · linarith [show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]]
        linarith
      have h14' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      rw [h14] at *
      have h15 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = (t) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have h16 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        rw [h16]
        rw [h14']
        field_simp [h19]
      linarith
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      rw [htan]
      have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        field_simp [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos, Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq]
      exact h10
    rw [h11, h13]
    field_simp [h9]
    nlinarith
  · -- Show that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q ht
    constructor
    · -- Show there exists a rational number qx such that cos θ = qx
      have h7 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h7 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          tauto
        rw [h7]
        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht]]
      have h8 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
        use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
        rw [h7]
        all_goals norm_num
      tauto
    · -- Show there exists a rational number qy such that sin θ = qy
      have h11 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h11 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          tauto
        rw [h11]
        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht]]
      have h12 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
        use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
        rw [h11]
        all_goals norm_num
      tauto

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h2]
  have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
    · linarith
    · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]
  have htan2 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
    have htan2_pos : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
    nlinarith
  have hcos : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h1 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      rw [←Real.cos_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have hcos2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
      have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
      have h4 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
        rw [htan]
      have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
      have h6 : (1 : ℝ) + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [h4]
        field_simp [h5]
        nlinarith
      field_simp at h6 ⊢
      nlinarith
    rw [h1, hcos2]
    field_simp
    all_goals nlinarith
  have hsin : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have h1 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [←Real.sin_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have hcos2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
      have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
      have h4 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
        rw [htan]
      have h5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
      have h6 : (1 : ℝ) + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [h4]
        field_simp [h5]
        nlinarith
      field_simp at h6 ⊢
      nlinarith
    have hsin2 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 - Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
        have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        linarith
      rw [h7, hcos2]
      field_simp
      all_goals nlinarith
    have hcos_pos : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
    have hsin_nonneg : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3]
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
    have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan
      rw [htan2]
      have h14 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have h19 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := hcos_pos
      have h19' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
      have h17' : (1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 : ℝ) = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        field_simp [h19']
        all_goals nlinarith
      field_simp [h17', h19']
      all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
    rw [h1, show 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) = 2 * (Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2)) by ring]
    rw [h8]
    all_goals ring_nf
  constructor
  · -- First part of the conjunction: identity for cos θ
    exact hcos
  constructor
  · -- Second part of the conjunction: identity for sin θ
    exact hsin
  · -- Third part: if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q h_eq
    have ht : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith
    have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have hcos : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        exact hcos
      rw [hcos]
      rw [ht]
    have h2 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have hsin : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        exact hsin
      rw [hsin]
      rw [ht]
    constructor
    · -- Show existence of rational qx such that cos θ = qx
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [h1]
      all_goals norm_num
    · -- Show existence of rational qy such that sin θ = qy
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [h2]
      all_goals norm_num

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)

  set t := Real.tan (θ / 2) with ht
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h3 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h4 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h4]
      have h17 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        have h7 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h8 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ Real.cos (Real.pi / 4) := by
          apply Real.cos_le_cos_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
          all_goals linarith [h7, h8, Real.pi_pos]
        have h10 : Real.cos (Real.pi / 4) > 0 := by

          constructor
          · linarith [Real.pi_pos]
          · linarith [Real.pi_pos]

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)

      have h12 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf

    rw [h11, h13]
    have h14 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by

      have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := ht1
      have h14 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))

    constructor
    · exact hc

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :

  intro t

    have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by

        have h3 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
        rw [h3]

          have h1 : 0 ≤ θ := by
            have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ

          have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by

            simp at h2 ⊢

          have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith
          have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have hc1 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · -- Show that -π/2 < θ/2
              nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3]
            · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2
              nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]

        have hp : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h4 : 1 + (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by

        have h7 : (1 - (Real.tan (θ / 2)) ^ 2 : ℝ) = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by

            rw [Real.cos_two_mul]

            have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)

            · -- Show that θ/2 < π/2

          have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith

        have h7 : (2 * (Real.tan (θ / 2)) : ℝ) = (2 * (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ) := by
          have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [htan2]
        have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith

  · -- Proof of rationality
    intro q hq

    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h1.right
    have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h5 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      rw [← Real.cos_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
    have htan' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [htan]
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have hc : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
      field_simp at htan' ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h8' : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h8]] at h8'
      have hc2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith [h6]
      field_simp at *
      nlinarith
    have h10 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      rw [h5]
      rw [h9]
      field_simp
      all_goals nlinarith
    exact h10
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : 0 ≤ θ := by
      have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ

    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by

      exact h1.right
    have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith

    have h11 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [← Real.sin_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
    have htan' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [htan]
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have hc : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
      field_simp at htan' ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h8' : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h8]] at h8'
      have hc2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith [h6]
      field_simp at *
      nlinarith
    have h12 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      rw [h11]
      rw [h8]
      field_simp at h9 ⊢
      nlinarith [h6]
    exact h12
  · -- Proof that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q ht
    have ht' : (t : ℝ) = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h10 : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by

        have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
        exact h1.left
      have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by

        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
      have htan' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [htan]
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have hc : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
        field_simp at htan' ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h8' : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
        rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h8]] at h8'
        have hc2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith [h6]
        field_simp at *
        nlinarith
      have h10 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        rw [h5]
        rw [h9]
        field_simp
        all_goals nlinarith
      rw [h10]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht']]
    have h12 : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      have h1 : 0 ≤ θ := by
        have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
        exact h1.left
      have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
        have h1 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
        exact h1.right
      have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith
      have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl

        rw [← Real.sin_two_mul]
        all_goals ring_nf
      have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h3, h4]
      have htan' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [htan]
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have hc : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
        field_simp at htan' ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h8' : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
        rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h8]] at h8'
        have hc2 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by nlinarith [h6]

        nlinarith
      have h12 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        rw [h11]
        rw [h8]
        field_simp at h9 ⊢
        nlinarith [h6]
      rw [h12]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht']]

    · -- Show that cos θ is rational
      refine ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by

    · -- Show that sin θ is rational

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  have h1 : 0 ≤ θ := by
    have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ

  have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by

  constructor
  · -- Show cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h3 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
      rw [htan]
      have h4 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h4]
      have h5 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have h6 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
          rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
        have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
          exact Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
        have h8 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
          have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1]
          have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
            linarith [h2]
          have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · -- Show that $-\pi/2 < \theta/2$
              nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
            · --  Show that $\theta/2 < \pi/2$
              nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h11]
          linarith
        have h10 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [htan2]
          have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
            exact Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
          field_simp [h9]
          nlinarith
        have h11 : (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
          have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [htan2]
          have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
            exact Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
          field_simp [h9]
          nlinarith
        rw [h11] at *
        nlinarith
      exact h5
    exact h3
  constructor
  · -- Show sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
    have h3 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
      rw [htan]
      have h4 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf

            · -- Show that $-\pi/2 < \theta/2$

            · --  Show that $\theta/2 < \pi/2$

        have h11 : (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
          have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by

          rw [htan2]
          have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by

          field_simp [h9]
          nlinarith
        rw [h11] at *

    exact h3
  · -- Show that if t is rational, then both cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q ht
    constructor
    · -- Show ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)
      have hcos : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        have h3 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by

          have h4 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
          rw [h4]
          have h5 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have h6 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by

            have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by

                  nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h11]

            have h10 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
                rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
              rw [htan2]
              have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by

            have h11 : (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by

      have h1 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by

      exact h1
    · -- Show ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ)
      have hsin : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by

                · --  Show that $\theta/2 < \pi/2$

            have h10 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by

            have h11 : (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)

  intro t

    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by

    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have ht1 : t ≥ 0 := by

        apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two

        · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]]

        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            field_simp [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos, Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq]
            all_goals nlinarith
          exact h9
        rw [htan] at h8

    exact h5
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ formula
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ

    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have ht1 : t ≥ 0 := by
      have htan_nonneg : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by

        · linarith
        · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]]
      simpa using ht1
    have h5 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h6 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [← Real.sin_two_mul]
        all_goals ring_nf
      have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            field_simp [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos, Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq]
            all_goals nlinarith
          exact h9
        rw [htan] at h8
        linarith
      have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 - Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
          linarith
        rw [h9, h7]
        field_simp
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
        apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
        · linarith
        · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]]
      have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h8
        have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h9
        have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.sin (θ / 2) by linarith)]
        rw [h13, h11]
        have h14 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_div (by
            have h17 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
              have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
              nlinarith
            positivity
          )]
        rw [h14]
        have ht1 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) = t := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ t by linarith [ht1])]
        rw [ht1]
      have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_nonneg_of_mem_Icc
        constructor
        · linarith [show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, Real.pi_pos]
        · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h4], Real.pi_pos]
      have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h7
        have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h11
        have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith)]
        rw [h15, h13]
        have h16 : Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h17 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
            have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
            nlinarith
          field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
        rw [h16]
      rw [h6, h10, h12]
      have h18 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
        have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
        nlinarith
      field_simp [h18]
      all_goals nlinarith
    exact h5
  · -- Proof about rationality
    intro q h_eq
    have ht_eq : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith [h_eq]
    constructor
    · -- Show that cos θ is rational
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
          have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ

        have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
          have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h3.2
        have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
        have ht1 : t ≥ 0 := by
          have htan_nonneg : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
            apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
            · linarith
            · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]]
          simpa using ht1
        have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h6 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
            rw [← Real.cos_two_mul]
            all_goals ring_nf
          have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
            have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                field_simp [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos, Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq]
                all_goals nlinarith
              exact h9
            rw [htan] at h8
            linarith
          rw [h6, h7]
          field_simp
          all_goals nlinarith
        exact h5
      rw [h5, ht_eq]
      all_goals norm_num
    · -- Show that sin θ is rational
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h5 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
          have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
          exact h2.1
        have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
          have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ

        have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
        have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
        have ht1 : t ≥ 0 := by
          have htan_nonneg : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by

            · linarith
            · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]]
          simpa using ht1
        have h5 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h6 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [← Real.sin_two_mul]
            all_goals ring_nf
          have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
            have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                field_simp [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos, Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq]
                all_goals nlinarith
              exact h9
            rw [htan] at h8
            linarith
          have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 - Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
              have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
              linarith
            rw [h9, h7]
            field_simp
            all_goals nlinarith
          have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
            apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
            · linarith
            · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h4]]
          have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h8
            have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h9
            have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
              rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.sin (θ / 2) by linarith)]
            rw [h13, h11]
            have h14 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
              rw [Real.sqrt_div (by
                have h17 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
                  have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
                  nlinarith
                positivity
              )]
            rw [h14]
            have ht1 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) = t := by
              rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ t by linarith [ht1])]
            rw [ht1]
          have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_nonneg_of_mem_Icc
            constructor
            · linarith [show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, Real.pi_pos]
            · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h4], Real.pi_pos]
          have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h7
            have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h11
            have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by

              have h17 : 1 + t ^ 2 > 0 := by
                have h1 : t ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t

              field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h2 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h2]
      have h3 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
          have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan
          have hcos : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
          have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            have htan' : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan2
            rw [htan']
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            have h1 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by
              linarith [hθ.1, hθ.2, Real.pi_pos]
            have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
              linarith [hθ.1, hθ.2, Real.pi_pos]
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · linarith [show θ / 2 > -Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, hθ.1, hθ.2]]
            · linarith [show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, hθ.1, hθ.2]]
          have hcosne0 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
            linarith [h3]
          have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
            rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
          have ht2 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2'
            rw [htan2']
            field_simp [hcosne0]
            all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
          have ht3 : 1 - t^2 = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
            have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2'
            rw [htan2']
            field_simp [hcosne0]
            all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
          rw [h4, ht2, ht3]
        exact h4
      exact h3
    exact h1
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    have h2 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h1 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h1]
      have h4 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
      have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        rw [htan]
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        have h1 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by
          linarith [hθ.1, hθ.2, Real.pi_pos]
        have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
          linarith [hθ.1, hθ.2, Real.pi_pos]
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · linarith [show θ / 2 > -Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, hθ.1, hθ.2]]
        · linarith [show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, hθ.1, hθ.2]]
      have hcosne0 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
        linarith [h3]
      have ht2 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
        rw [htan2']
        field_simp [hcosne0]
        all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
      have ht4 : (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        have ht5 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
        rw [ht5, ht2]
        field_simp [hcosne0]
        all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
      rw [h4, ht4]
    exact h2
  · -- Proof of rationality
    intro q hq
    have htq : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    constructor
    · -- Real.cos θ is rational
      have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
        have h1 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
          have h2 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
          rw [h2]
          have h3 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
            have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
            have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
              have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan
              have hcos : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
              have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
                have htan' : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan2
                rw [htan']
                rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
              have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                have h1 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by
                  linarith [hθ.1, hθ.2, Real.pi_pos]
                have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
                  linarith [hθ.1, hθ.2, Real.pi_pos]
                apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
                constructor
                · linarith [show θ / 2 > -Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, hθ.1, hθ.2]]
                · linarith [show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, hθ.1, hθ.2]]
              have hcosne0 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
                linarith [h3]
              have h4 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
                rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
              have ht2 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2'
                rw [htan2']
                field_simp [hcosne0]
                all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
              have ht3 : 1 - t^2 = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
                have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2'
                rw [htan2']
                field_simp [hcosne0]
                all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
              rw [h4, ht2, ht3]
            exact h4
          exact h3
        exact h1
      rw [h1]
      have htq' : (1 - t^2 : ℝ) / (1 + t^2) = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [htq]]
      rw [htq']
      refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by simp⟩
    · -- Real.sin θ is rational
      have h2 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
        have h1 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
          have h1 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
          rw [h1]
          have h4 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
          have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
            rw [htan]
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            have h1 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by
              linarith [hθ.1, hθ.2, Real.pi_pos]
            have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by
              linarith [hθ.1, hθ.2, Real.pi_pos]
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · linarith [show θ / 2 > -Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, hθ.1, hθ.2]]
            · linarith [show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, hθ.1, hθ.2]]
          have hcosne0 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
            linarith [h3]
          have ht2 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
            have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
            rw [htan2']
            field_simp [hcosne0]
            all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
          have ht4 : (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            have ht5 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
            rw [ht5, ht2]
            field_simp [hcosne0]
            all_goals nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)]
          rw [h4, ht4]
        exact h1
      rw [h2]
      have htq' : (2 * t : ℝ) / (1 + t^2) = (2 * (q : ℝ) ) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
        rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [htq]]

      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by simp⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  intro t
  have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
