    have h5 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
      · linarith
      · linarith
    linarith [show t = Real.tan (θ / 2) by rfl, h5]
  have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
    have h6 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h6]
    have h7 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = 1 - 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
      rw [Real.cos_two_mul, Real.sin_sq]
      all_goals ring_nf
    rw [h7]
    have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
        apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
        constructor
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
      have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
        apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
        · linarith
        · linarith
      have htan : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
      have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
      have ht1' : t ≥ 0 := ht1
      have eq1 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
        have htan2' : t^2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
          rw [htan]
        have eq2 : 1 + t^2 = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
          rw [htan2']
        have eq3 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          field_simp
          all_goals nlinarith
        have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h12
        rw [eq2, eq3, h14]
        all_goals field_simp
      have eq4 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := by
        have eq5 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (t^2 : ℝ) * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
            have eq6 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan
            field_simp [h9] at eq6 ⊢
            all_goals nlinarith
          rw [h13]
          all_goals nlinarith
        have eq6 : (1 + t^2 : ℝ) = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := eq1
        rw [eq5]
        rw [eq6]
        field_simp
      exact eq4
    rw [h8]
    have h13 : 1 + t^2 > 0 := by
      have ht1' : t ≥ 0 := ht1
      have ht2 : t^2 ≥ 0 := by positivity
      nlinarith
    field_simp [h13]
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h6 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
    have h7 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h8 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h8]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    rw [h7]
    have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
      · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
    have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
      apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
      · linarith
      · linarith
    have ht1' : t ≥ 0 := ht1
    have htan : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
    have h8' : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
      have eq1 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := by
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h9
        have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h10
        have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan
        have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h12
        have ht1' : t ≥ 0 := ht1
        have eq1 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          have ht12 : t^2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
            rw [htan2]
          have eq2 : 1 + t^2 = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
            rw [ht12]
          have eq3 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
            field_simp
            all_goals nlinarith
          have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h12
          rw [eq2, eq3, h14]
          all_goals field_simp
        have eq4 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := by
          have eq5 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (t^2 : ℝ) * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
            have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              have eq6 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
              field_simp [h9] at eq6 ⊢
              all_goals nlinarith
            rw [h13]
            all_goals nlinarith
          have eq6 : (1 + t^2 : ℝ) = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := eq1
          rw [eq5]
          rw [eq6]
          field_simp
        exact eq4
      have h14 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h10
      have h15 : Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.sin (θ / 2) by linarith)]
      have h17 : Real.sqrt (t^2 / (1 + t^2)) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
        have h18 : Real.sqrt (t^2 / (1 + t^2)) = Real.sqrt (t^2) / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
          field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
        rw [h18]
        have h19 : Real.sqrt (t^2) = t := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ t by linarith [ht1])]
        rw [h19]
      have h18 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
        have h19 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := eq1
        have h20 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h10
        have h21 : Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) = Real.sqrt (t^2 / (1 + t^2)) := by
          rw [h19]
        have h22 : Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) := h15
        have h23 : Real.sqrt (t^2 / (1 + t^2)) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := h17
        nlinarith [h21, h22, h23]
      exact h18
    have h8'' : Real.cos (θ / 2) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
      have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h9
      have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := by
        have eq1 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h12
        have eq2 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := by
          have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h9
          have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h10
          have ht12 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht12
          have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h12
          have ht1' : t ≥ 0 := ht1
          have eq1 : 1 + t^2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
            have ht12 : t^2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
              rw [ht12]
            have eq2 : 1 + t^2 = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
              rw [ht12]
            have eq3 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
              field_simp
              all_goals nlinarith
            have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := h12
            rw [eq2, eq3, h14]
            all_goals field_simp
          have eq4 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := by
            have eq5 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (t^2 : ℝ) * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
              have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
                have eq6 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht12
                field_simp [h9] at eq6 ⊢
                all_goals nlinarith
              rw [h13]
              all_goals nlinarith
            have eq6 : (1 + t^2 : ℝ) = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := eq1
            rw [eq5]
            rw [eq6]
            field_simp
          exact eq4
        nlinarith
      have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h9
      have h16 : Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) = Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith)]
      have h17 : Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t^2)) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
        field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
      have h18 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
        have h19 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := h14
        have h20 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h9
        have h21 : Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) = Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t^2)) := by
          rw [h19]
        have h22 : Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) = Real.cos (θ / 2) := h16
        have h23 : Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t^2)) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := h17
        nlinarith [h21, h22, h23]
      exact h18
    rw [h8', h8'']
    have h13 : 1 + t^2 > 0 := by
      have ht1' : t ≥ 0 := ht1
      have ht2 : t^2 ≥ 0 := by positivity
      nlinarith
    field_simp [h13]
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h7 : ∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) → (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ)) := by
    intro q htq
    have htq' : t = (q : ℝ) := htq
    have hcos : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [show Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) by linarith [h5]]
      rw [htq']
    have hsin : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [show Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) by linarith [h6]]
      rw [htq']
      all_goals ring_nf
    constructor
    · -- Show existence of rational number qx such that cos θ = qx
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [hcos]
      all_goals norm_num
    · -- Show existence of rational number qy such that sin θ = qy
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      rw [hsin]
      all_goals norm_num
  constructor
  · exact h5
  constructor
  · exact h6
  · exact h7

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h4 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by 
        rw [←Real.cos_two_mul]
        ring_nf
      have h5 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
      have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        rw [htan]
        have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h8 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
          rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
          have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h10]]
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h11]
          linarith
        have h9' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
        have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
          rw [h8]
        have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          rw [h10]
          field_simp [h9']
        have h12 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
          have h14 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by 
            rw [h11]
          rw [h14]
          have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
          field_simp [h15]
          nlinarith
        have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          field_simp at h12 ⊢
          all_goals nlinarith
        rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = t by linarith [h5]] at h13
        exact h13
      rw [h4, h6]
      field_simp
      ring_nf
    exact h3
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
      have h4 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [←Real.sin_two_mul]
        ring_nf
      have h5 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
      have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := by
        have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
        rw [htan]
        have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h8 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
          rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
          have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h10]]
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h11]
          linarith
        have h9' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
        have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
          rw [h8]
        have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          rw [h10]
          field_simp [h9']
        have h12 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
          have h14 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by 
            rw [h11]
          rw [h14]
          have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
          field_simp [h15]
          nlinarith
        have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          field_simp at h12 ⊢
          all_goals nlinarith
        rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = t by linarith [h5]] at h13
        exact h13
      have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := by
        have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 - Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
          have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
          linarith
        rw [h8, h6]
        field_simp
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
        apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
        · linarith [show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith]
        · nlinarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi by nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]]
      have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (t^2 / (1 + t^2)) := by
        have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := h7
        have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h8
        have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.sin (θ / 2) by linarith)]
        rw [h12, h10]
      have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t^2)) := by
        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := h6
        have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
          have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h10]]
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h11]
          linarith
        have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith)]
        rw [h13, h11]
      have h11 : Real.sqrt (t^2 / (1 + t^2)) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
        have ht : t ≥ 0 := by
          have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
          have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
          rw [htan]
          have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
            apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
            · linarith
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h11]
          linarith
        have h12 : t^2 = t * t := by ring
        have h13 : Real.sqrt (t^2 / (1 + t^2)) = Real.sqrt (t^2) / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_div (by
            have h15 : 1 + t^2 > 0 := by
              have h16 : t^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
              nlinarith
            positivity
          )]
        rw [h13]
        have h14 : Real.sqrt (t^2) = t := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ t by linarith [ht])]
        rw [h14]
      have h12 : Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t^2)) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
        have h13 : 1 + t^2 > 0 := by
          have h14 : t^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
          nlinarith
        field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
      rw [h4]
      rw [h9, h10]
      rw [h11, h12]
      field_simp
      all_goals nlinarith
    exact h3
  · -- Proof about rationality
    intro q hq
    constructor
    · -- Show cos θ is rational
      have h13 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
        use (1 - (q : ℚ)^2) / (1 + (q : ℚ)^2)
        have h14 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
          have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
            have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h2.1
          have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
            have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h3.2
          have h3 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2) := by
            have h4 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by 
              rw [←Real.cos_two_mul]
              ring_nf
            have h5 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
            have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := by
              have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
              rw [htan]
              have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
              have h8 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
                rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
              have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
                have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                  apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
                  constructor
                  · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h10]]
                  · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h11]
                linarith
              have h9' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
              have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
                rw [h8]
              have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
                rw [h10]
                field_simp [h9']
              have h12 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
                have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
                have h14 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by 
                  rw [h11]
                rw [h14]
                have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
                field_simp [h15]
                nlinarith
              have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                field_simp at h12 ⊢
                all_goals nlinarith
              rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = t by linarith [h5]] at h13
              exact h13
            rw [h4, h6]
            field_simp
            ring_nf
          exact h3
        have h15 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith [hq]
        rw [h14, h15]
        norm_num
      exact h13
    · -- Show sin θ is rational
      have h14 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
        use (2 * (q : ℚ)) / (1 + (q : ℚ)^2)
        have h14 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
          have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
            have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h2.1
          have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
            have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
            exact h3.2
          have h3 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2) := by
            have h4 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
              rw [←Real.sin_two_mul]
              ring_nf
            have h5 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := rfl
            have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := by
              have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
              rw [htan]
              have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
              have h8 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
                rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
              have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
                have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                  apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
                  constructor
                  · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h10]]
                  · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h11]
                linarith
              have h9' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
              have h10 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2)) ^ 2 := by
                rw [h8]
              have h11 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
                rw [h10]
                field_simp [h9']
              have h12 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
                have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
                have h14 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 / Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by 
                  rw [h11]
                rw [h14]
                have h15 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
                field_simp [h15]
                nlinarith
              have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                field_simp at h12 ⊢
                all_goals nlinarith
              rw [show Real.tan (θ / 2) = t by linarith [h5]] at h13
              exact h13
            have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := by
              have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 - Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
                have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
                linarith
              rw [h8, h6]
              field_simp
              all_goals nlinarith
            have h8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
              apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
              · linarith [show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith]
              · nlinarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi by nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]]
            have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (t^2 / (1 + t^2)) := by
              have h10 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t^2 / (1 + t^2) := h7
              have h11 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h8
              have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.sin (θ / 2) by linarith)]
              rw [h12, h10]
            have h10 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t^2)) := by
              have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t^2) := h6
              have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
                have h12 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
                  apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
                  constructor
                  · linarith [show θ / 2 > 0 by nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h10]]
                  · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h11]
                linarith
              have h13 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
                rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith)]
              rw [h13, h11]
            have h11 : Real.sqrt (t^2 / (1 + t^2)) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
              have ht : t ≥ 0 := by
                have h10 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
                have h11 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by nlinarith [h2, Real.pi_pos]
                have ht1 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
                rw [ht1]
                have ht2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
                  apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
                  · linarith
                  · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, h11]
                linarith
              have h12 : t^2 = t * t := by ring
              have h13 : Real.sqrt (t^2 / (1 + t^2)) = Real.sqrt (t^2) / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
                rw [Real.sqrt_div (by
                  have h15 : 1 + t^2 > 0 := by
                    have h16 : t^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
                    nlinarith
                  positivity
                )]
              rw [h13]
              have h14 : Real.sqrt (t^2) = t := by
                rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ t by linarith [ht])]
              rw [h14]
            have h12 : Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t^2)) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t^2) := by
              have h13 : 1 + t^2 > 0 := by
                have h14 : t^2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg t
                nlinarith
              field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
            rw [h4]
            rw [h9, h10]
            rw [h11, h12]
            field_simp
            all_goals nlinarith
          exact h3
        have h15 : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith [hq]
        rw [h14, h15]
        norm_num
      exact h14

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof for cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h5 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h6 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h6]
      have h7 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan
        rw [htan2]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          have h1 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith]
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith]
          linarith
        have hcos : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
        have htan2 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [htan]
          field_simp [hcos]
          all_goals nlinarith
        have h9 : 1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [htan]
          field_simp [hcos]
          all_goals nlinarith
        have h10 : (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by
          rw [htan2]
          have h11 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
            have h12 : Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) = Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
              rw [Real.cos_two_mul, Real.sin_sq]
              ring_nf
            linarith
          rw [h11]
          rw [h9]
          field_simp [hcos]
          all_goals nlinarith
        linarith
      linarith
    exact h5
  constructor
  · -- Proof for sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
    have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    have h5 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have h6 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h6]
      have h7 : Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
      rw [h7]
      have h8 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have htan2 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := htan2
        rw [htan2]
        have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
        have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          have h1 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith]
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith]
          linarith
        have hcos : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by linarith
        have htan2 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by 
            rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
          rw [htan]
          field_simp [hcos]
          all_goals nlinarith
        linarith
      have h9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h8' : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := h8
        field_simp at h8' ⊢
        all_goals nlinarith
      have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
        apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
        · linarith
        · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi by nlinarith]
      have h15 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h13 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 - Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 := by
            have h14 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
            linarith
          rw [h13, h9]
          field_simp
          all_goals nlinarith
        have h14 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := h13
        have h17 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.sin (θ / 2) by linarith)]
        rw [h17, h12]
        have htan2 : t ≥ 0 := by
          have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
          rw [htan]
          have h1 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have htan2 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
            apply Real.tan_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi_div_two
            · linarith
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos]
          linarith
        have h19 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = t / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h20 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
          rw [h20]
          have h21 : Real.sqrt (t ^ 2) = t := by
            rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ t by linarith)]
          rw [h21]
        linarith
      have h17 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := h9
        have h16 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
          have h1 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
          have h2 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]
          have h3 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
            apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
            constructor
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith]
            · nlinarith [Real.pi_pos, show θ / 2 ≥ 0 by linarith, show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by nlinarith]
          linarith
        have h19 : Real.cos (θ / 2) = Real.sqrt (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith)]
        rw [h19, h11]
        have h21 : Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = 1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          have h22 : Real.sqrt (1 / (1 + t ^ 2)) = Real.sqrt (1 : ℝ) / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2) := by
            field_simp [Real.sqrt_div]
          rw [h22]
          norm_num
        linarith
      calc
        2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) = 2 * (t / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2)) * (1 / Real.sqrt (1 + t ^ 2)) := by
          rw [h15, h17]
        _ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
          field_simp
          all_goals nlinarith
      all_goals nlinarith
    exact h5
  · -- Proof that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q ht
    constructor
    · -- Show cos θ is rational
      have h11 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        tauto
      rw [h11]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht]]
      refine' ⟨(1 - (q : ℚ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℚ) ^ 2), by simp⟩
    · -- Show sin θ is rational
      have h13 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        tauto
      rw [h13]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [ht]]
      refine' ⟨(2 * (q : ℚ)) / (1 + (q : ℚ) ^ 2), by simp⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  constructor
  · -- Proof of cos θ = (1 - t²) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have h5 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      have h7 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h7]
      rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
    have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      rw [htan]
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · linarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
      · linarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
    have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
    have ht2 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
      have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
      have eq1 : t ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [htan2']
        field_simp [h8]
      have eq2 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        rw [eq1]
      have eq3 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        field_simp [h8]
      rw [eq2, eq3]
      have eq4 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by linarith [h7]
      rw [eq4]
      all_goals norm_num
    have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have ht2' : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
      field_simp [(show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by nlinarith)] at ht2' ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h5, h8]
    field_simp [(show 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 by positivity)]
    all_goals nlinarith
  constructor
  · -- Proof of sin θ = (2t) / (1 + t²)
    have h1 : θ ≥ 0 := by
      have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h2.1
    have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
      have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
      exact h3.2
    have h3 : θ / 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
    have h5 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have h7 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
      rw [h7]
      rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
    have htan2 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
      rw [htan]
      rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
      apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
      constructor
      · linarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
      · linarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]
    have h7 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2)
    have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
      have ht2 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
        have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
        have eq1 : t ^ 2 = (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          rw [htan2']
          field_simp [h8]
        have eq2 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          rw [eq1]
        have eq3 : 1 + (Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) = (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
          field_simp [h8]
        rw [eq2, eq3]
        have eq4 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by linarith [h7]
        rw [eq4]
        all_goals norm_num
      field_simp [(show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by nlinarith)] at ht2 ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h9 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have htan2' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := htan2
      have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
      field_simp [ne_of_gt h8] at htan2' ⊢

    rw [h5, h9, h8]
    field_simp [(show 1 + t ^ 2 ≠ 0 by positivity)]
    all_goals nlinarith
  · -- Proof about rationality
    intro q hq
    constructor
    · -- Show that cos θ is rational
      have h10 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        tauto
      rw [h10]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [hq]]
      refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by simp⟩
    · -- Show that sin θ is rational
      have h10 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
        tauto
      rw [h10]
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith [hq]]
      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by simp⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  intro t
  have h1 : 0 ≤ θ := by
    have h2 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
    exact h2.1
  have h2 : θ ≤ Real.pi / 2 := by
    have h3 : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2) := hθ
    exact h3.2
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
  have ht1 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_nonneg_of_mem_Icc
    constructor
    · linarith [show 0 ≤ θ / 2 by linarith]
    · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 2 by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]]
  have ht2 : Real.sin (θ / 2) ≥ 0 := by
    apply Real.sin_nonneg_of_nonneg_of_le_pi
    · linarith [show 0 ≤ θ / 2 by linarith]
    · linarith [show θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]]
  have h5 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
    have h6 : Real.cos θ = Real.cos (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h6]
    rw [Real.cos_two_mul]
  have h7 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    have h8 : Real.sin θ = Real.sin (2 * (θ / 2)) := by ring_nf
    rw [h8]
    rw [Real.sin_two_mul]
  have ht4 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    have ht3 : t = Real.tan (θ / 2) := by rfl
    rw [ht3]
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have ht5 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · linarith [show -Real.pi / 2 < θ / 2 by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h1, h2]]
    · linarith [show θ / 2 < Real.pi / 2 by linarith [Real.pi_pos, h2]]
  have ht6 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have ht7 : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht4
    rw [ht7]
    have ht8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
    have ht9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := ht5
    field_simp
    nlinarith [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq (θ / 2), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) - Real.cos (θ / 2)), sq_nonneg (Real.sin (θ / 2) + Real.cos (θ / 2))]
  have ht7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
    have ht8 : 1 + t ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht6
    have ht9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by positivity
    field_simp at ht8 ⊢
    nlinarith
  have ht8 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    have ht7' : t = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht4
    have ht9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := ht5
    field_simp at ht7' ⊢
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h8 : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
    have h5' : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := h5
    have ht7' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := ht7
    rw [h5']
    rw [ht7']
    field_simp
    <;> nlinarith
  have h9 : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := by
    have h7' : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h7
    have ht8' : Real.sin (θ / 2) = t * Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht8
    have ht7' : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + t ^ 2) := ht7
    rw [h7']
    rw [ht8']
    have ht9 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := ht5
    field_simp [ht7']
    nlinarith [sq_pos_of_pos ht9]
  constructor
  · exact h8
  constructor
  · exact h9
  · intro q hq
    have htq : t = (q : ℝ) := by linarith
    have h10 : ∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ) := by
      use (1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h8' : Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2) := h8
      rw [h8']
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
      all_goals norm_num
    have h11 : ∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ) := by
      use (2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2)
      have h9' : Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2) := h9
      rw [h9']
      rw [show t = (q : ℝ) by linarith]
      all_goals norm_num
    exact ⟨h10, h11⟩

theorem subq_P3_I_1_a (θ : ℝ) (hθ : θ ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) (Real.pi / 2)) :
    let t := Real.tan (θ / 2)
    Real.cos θ = (1 - t ^ 2) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ Real.sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t ^ 2)
      ∧ (∀ q : ℚ, t = (q : ℝ) →
          (∃ qx : ℚ, Real.cos θ = (qx : ℝ)) ∧ (∃ qy : ℚ, Real.sin θ = (qy : ℝ))) := by
  rcases hθ with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  have h3 : 0 ≤ θ / 2 := by linarith [h1, h2]
  have h4 : θ / 2 ≤ Real.pi / 4 := by linarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := by
    apply Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo
    constructor
    · nlinarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
    · nlinarith [h1, h2, Real.pi_pos]
  have h7 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 + Real.sin (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 := by
    exact Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq (θ / 2)
  have ht1 : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
  have ht2 : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have htan : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
    rw [htan]
    have h8 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 := by
      linarith [h6]
    field_simp [h7]
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h9 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
    have h10 : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := by
      rw [← Real.cos_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    linarith
  have hc : Real.cos θ = (1 - Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have ht2' : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
    have h9' : Real.cos θ = 2 * Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 - 1 := h9
    have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have ht2' : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
      field_simp [(show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
        have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
        positivity
      )] at ht2' ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    rw [h9']
    rw [h11]
    have ht2' : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by
      have ht2_pos : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
        have h6 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
        nlinarith
      positivity
    field_simp [ht2']
    all_goals nlinarith
  have h10 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
    have h11 : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      rw [← Real.sin_two_mul]
      all_goals ring_nf
    linarith
  have hs : Real.sin θ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
    have ht1' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
    have h10' : Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := h10
    have ht2' : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
    have h11 : Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
      have ht2' : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 = 1 / (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := ht2
      field_simp [(show Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
        have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
        positivity
      )] at ht2' ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    have h12 : Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
      have ht1' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = Real.sin (θ / 2) / Real.cos (θ / 2) := ht1
      have h6 : Real.cos (θ / 2) > 0 := h6
      field_simp [(show Real.cos (θ / 2) ≠ 0 by linarith)] at ht1' ⊢
      all_goals nlinarith
    calc
      Real.sin θ = 2 * Real.sin (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by linarith [h10']
      _ = 2 * (Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2)) * Real.cos (θ / 2) := by
        rw [show Real.sin (θ / 2) = Real.tan (θ / 2) * Real.cos (θ / 2) by linarith [h12]]
      _ = 2 * Real.tan (θ / 2) * (Real.cos (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by ring
      _ = 2 * Real.tan (θ / 2) * (1 / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2)) := by
        rw [h11]
      _ = (2 * Real.tan (θ / 2)) / (1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2) := by
        field_simp [(show 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≠ 0 by
          have ht2_pos : 1 + Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 > 0 := by
            have h6 : Real.tan (θ / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := sq_nonneg (Real.tan (θ / 2))
            nlinarith
          positivity
        )]
  constructor
  · -- Prove that cos θ = (1 - t^2) / (1 + t^2)
    exact_mod_cast hc
  constructor
  · -- Prove that sin θ = (2 * t) / (1 + t^2)
    exact_mod_cast hs
  · -- Prove that if t is rational, then cos θ and sin θ are rational
    intro q ht
    have ht' : Real.tan (θ / 2) = (q : ℝ) := by
      linarith [ht]
    have hc' : Real.cos θ = (1 - (q : ℝ) ^ 2) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [hc]
      rw [ht']
    have hs' : Real.sin θ = (2 * (q : ℝ)) / (1 + (q : ℝ) ^ 2) := by
      rw [hs]
      rw [ht']
      all_goals ring_nf
    constructor
    · -- Show existence of rational qx such that cos θ = qx
      refine' ⟨(1 - q ^ 2) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        norm_num at hc' ⊢
        all_goals try { linarith }
      ⟩
    · -- Show existence of rational qy such that sin θ = qy
      refine' ⟨(2 * q) / (1 + q ^ 2), by
        norm_num at hs' ⊢
        all_goals try { linarith }
      ⟩

theorem subq_P4_III_1
    {n : ℕ} (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ) :
    ∃ d : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ →ₗ[ℂ] Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ,
      (∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A) ∧
      (∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y) := by
  use { toFun := fun X => A * X - X * A,
        map_add' := by
          intros X Y
          simp [Matrix.mul_add, Matrix.add_mul]
        , map_smul' := by
            intros c X
            simp [Matrix.mul_smul, Matrix.smul_mul]
      }
  constructor
  · -- First condition: ∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A
    intro X
    rfl
  · -- Second condition: ∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y
    intro X Y
    have h1 : A * (X * Y) - (X * Y) * A = (A * X - X * A) * Y + X * (A * Y - Y * A) := by
      ring_nf
    simpa using h1

  · -- Show that ∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y

theorem subq_P4_III_1

      (∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A) ∧
      (∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y) := by

theorem subq_P4_III_1

  use { toFun := fun X => A * X - X * A,
        map_add' := by
          intros X Y
          simp [Matrix.mul_add, Matrix.add_mul]
          all_goals ring_nf
        , map_smul' := by
            intros c X
            simp [Matrix.mul_smul, Matrix.smul_mul]
            all_goals ring_nf
      }
  constructor
  · -- Show that ∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A
    intro X

theorem subq_P4_III_1
    {n : ℕ} (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ) :
    ∃ d : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ →ₗ[ℂ] Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ,
      (∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A) ∧
      (∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y) := by 
  use { toFun := fun X => A * X - X * A,
        map_add' := by
          intros X Y
          ext i j
          simp [Matrix.mul_add, Matrix.add_mul]
          all_goals ring
        map_smul' := by
          intros c X
          ext i j
          simp [Matrix.mul_smul, Matrix.smul_mul]
          all_goals ring
      }
  constructor
  · -- Show that ∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A
    intro X
    rfl
  · -- Show that ∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y
    intros X Y
    have eq1 : A * (X * Y) - (X * Y) * A = (A * X - X * A) * Y + X * (A * Y - Y * A) := by
      have h1 : (A * X - X * A) * Y + X * (A * Y - Y * A) =
          (A * X) * Y - (X * A) * Y + X * (A * Y) - X * (Y * A) := by
        ring
      rw [h1]
      have h2 : (A * X) * Y = A * (X * Y) := by
        simp [Matrix.mul_assoc]
      have h3 : X * (A * Y) = (X * A) * Y := by
        calc
          X * (A * Y) = (X * A) * Y := by simp [Matrix.mul_assoc]
      have h4 : X * (Y * A) = (X * Y) * A := by
        calc
          X * (Y * A) = (X * Y) * A := by simp [Matrix.mul_assoc]
      rw [h2, h3, h4]
      all_goals ring
    simp [eq1]

  use (fun X : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ => A * X - X * A)
  constructor
  · -- Show that $d(X) = A * X - X * A$.
    intro X
    rfl
  · -- Show that $d(XY) = d(X)Y + Xd(Y)$.
    intro X Y
    simp [mul_add, add_mul]
    all_goals ring

theorem subq_P4_III_1
    {n : ℕ} (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ) :
    ∃ d : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ →ₗ[ℂ] Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ,
      (∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A) ∧
      (∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y) := by
  use { toFun := fun X => A * X - X * A,
        map_add' := by
          intros X Y
          simp [Matrix.mul_add, Matrix.add_mul]
          all_goals ring,
        map_smul' := by
          intros c X
          simp [Matrix.mul_smul, Matrix.smul_mul]
          all_goals ring }
  constructor
  · -- First part: ∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A
    intro X
    rfl
  · -- Second part: ∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y
    intros X Y
    simp [Matrix.mul_assoc, add_mul, mul_add, sub_mul, mul_sub]
    all_goals ring

theorem subq_P4_III_1
    {n : ℕ} (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ) :
    ∃ d : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ →ₗ[ℂ] Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ,
      (∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A) ∧
      (∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y) := by 
  use { toFun := fun X => A * X - X * A,
        map_add' := by
          intros X Y
          simp
          all_goals ring
        map_smul' := by
          intros c X
          simp
          all_goals ring }
  constructor
  · -- Show that ∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A
    intro X
    rfl
  · -- Show that ∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y
    intros X Y
    simp [mul_add, add_mul]
    all_goals ring

theorem subq_P4_III_1
    {n : ℕ} (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ) :
    ∃ d : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ →ₗ[ℂ] Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℂ,
      (∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A) ∧
      (∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y) := by
  use { toFun := fun X => A * X - X * A,
        map_add' := by
          intros X Y
          simp [Matrix.mul_add, Matrix.add_mul]
          all_goals try ring
        map_smul' := by
          intros c X
          simp [Matrix.mul_smul, Matrix.smul_mul]
          all_goals try ring
      }
  constructor
  · -- Show that ∀ X, d X = A * X - X * A
    intro X
    rfl
  · -- Show that ∀ X Y, d (X * Y) = d X * Y + X * d Y
    intros X Y
    have h1 : (A * (X * Y) - (X * Y) * A) = (A * X - X * A) * Y + X * (A * Y - Y * A) := by
      ring_nf
    simp [h1]
    all_goals try ring

theorem subq_I_3_a_recurrent :
    ∃ (r : ℕ) (q : Fin (r + 1) → ℝ), q 0 ≠ 0 ∧
      ∀ n : ℕ, ∑ k : Fin (r + 1),
        q k • ((2 : ℝ) ^ (n + (r - k.val)) + (3 : ℝ) ^ (n + (r - k.val))) = 0 := by
  use 2
  use λ k =>
    match k with
    | 0 => (1 : ℝ)
    | 1 => (-5 : ℝ)
    | 2 => (6 : ℝ)
    | _ => (0 : ℝ)
  constructor
  · -- Show that q 0 ≠ 0
    simp
  · -- Show that the sum is zero for all n
    intro n
    simp [Finset.sum_fin_eq_sum_range, Finset.sum_range_succ]
    ring_nf

      ∀ n : ℕ, ∑ k : Fin (r + 1),
        q k • ((2 : ℝ) ^ (n + (r - k.val)) + (3 : ℝ) ^ (n + (r - k.val))) = 0 := by
  use 2
  use λ i : Fin (2 + 1) =>
    match i.val with
    | 0 => 1
    | 1 => -5
    | 2 => 6
    | _ => 0
  constructor
  · -- Show that q 0 ≠ 0
    simp
  · -- Show that the recurrence holds for all n
    intro n
    simp [Finset.sum_fin_eq_sum_range, Finset.sum_range_succ]
    ring_nf

theorem subq_I_3_a_recurrent :
    ∃ (r : ℕ) (q : Fin (r + 1) → ℝ), q 0 ≠ 0 ∧
      ∀ n : ℕ, ∑ k : Fin (r + 1),
        q k • ((2 : ℝ) ^ (n + (r - k.val)) + (3 : ℝ) ^ (n + (r - k.val))) = 0 := by 
  use 2
  use (λ k : Fin (2 + 1) =>
    match k with
    | 0 => (1 : ℝ)
    | 1 => (-5 : ℝ)
    | 2 => (6 : ℝ)
    | _ => (0 : ℝ)
  )
  constructor
  · -- Show that q 0 ≠ 0
    simp
  · -- Show that the sum is zero for all n
    intro n
    simp [Finset.sum_fin_eq_sum_range, Finset.sum_range_succ]
    ring_nf

theorem subq_A_2_a (n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    let L : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ := 
      fun i j => if i = j then 1 else - 1 / ((n : ℝ) - 1)
    let J : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ := fun _ _ => 1
    L = ((n : ℝ) / (n - 1)) • (1 : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ)
        - (1 / ((n : ℝ) - 1)) • J := by
  intro L J
  funext i j
  have hn1 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (2 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (show (n : ℕ) ≥ (2 : ℕ) by linarith)
  have hn2 : (n : ℝ) - 1 ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by nlinarith
  have hn3 : (n : ℝ) - 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
  by_cases h : i = j
  · -- if i = j
    rw [h]
    simp [Matrix.smul_apply, Matrix.add_apply, Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.of_apply, Matrix.one_apply, h, Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton]
    all_goals
      field_simp at *
      all_goals
        ring_nf
  · -- if i ≠ j
    simp [Matrix.smul_apply, Matrix.add_apply, Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.of_apply, Matrix.one_apply, h, Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton]
    all_goals
      field_simp at *
      all_goals
        try { linarith }

theorem subq_A_2_a (n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    let L : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ := 
      fun i j => if i = j then 1 else - 1 / ((n : ℝ) - 1)
    let J : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ := fun _ _ => 1
    L = ((n : ℝ) / (n - 1)) • (1 : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ)
        - (1 / ((n : ℝ) - 1)) • J := by
  intro L J
  funext i j
  have hn1 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (2 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (show (n : ℕ) ≥ (2 : ℕ) by linarith)
  have hn2 : (n : ℝ) - 1 ≥ (1 : ℝ) := by nlinarith
  by_cases h : i = j
  · -- Case i = j
    rw [h]
    simp [Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.one_apply, h, Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton]
    all_goals
      field_simp [(show (n : ℝ) - 1 ≠ 0 by
        have hn3 : (n : ℝ) - 1 ≥ (1 : ℝ) := hn2
        nlinarith
      )]
      all_goals nlinarith
  · -- Case i ≠ j
    simp [Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.one_apply, h, Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton]
    all_goals
      field_simp [(show (n : ℝ) - 1 ≠ 0 by
        have hn3 : (n : ℝ) - 1 ≥ (1 : ℝ) := hn2
        nlinarith
      )]
      all_goals nlinarith

theorem subq_A_2_a (n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    let L : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ := fun i j => if i = j then 1 else - 1 / ((n : ℝ) - 1)
    let J : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ := fun _ _ => 1
    L = ((n : ℝ) / (n - 1)) • (1 : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℝ)
        - (1 / ((n : ℝ) - 1)) • J := by
  intro L J
  funext i j
  split_ifs with h
  · -- Case i = j
    have h1 : (n : ℝ) ≥ 2 := by exact_mod_cast (show n ≥ 2 by omega)
    have hn1 : (n : ℝ) - 1 ≥ 1 := by nlinarith
    have hn2 : (n : ℝ) - 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    simp [h, Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.of_apply, Matrix.one_apply, Finset.sum]
    all_goals
      field_simp [hn1, hn2]
      all_goals
        ring_nf
  · -- Case i ≠ j
    have h1 : (n : ℝ) ≥ 2 := by exact_mod_cast (show n ≥ 2 by omega)
    have hn1 : (n : ℝ) - 1 ≥ 1 := by nlinarith
    have hn2 : (n : ℝ) - 1 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith
    simp [h, Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.of_apply, Matrix.one_apply, Finset.sum]
    all_goals
      field_simp [hn1, hn2]
      all_goals
        ring_nf

  all_goals

      field_simp [(show (n : ℝ) ≥ (2 : ℝ) by exact_mod_cast (show n ≥ 2 by linarith)),

          have h1 : (n : ℝ) ≥ (2 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (show n ≥ 2 by linarith)

        )

      <;> ring_nf
    }

    have h14 : (M.val : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℤ).det = 1 ∨ (M.val : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℤ).det = -1 := by
      have h15 : (M.val : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℤ).det ≤ 1 := by
        apply Int.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) h13
      have h16 : (M.val : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℤ).det ≥ -1 := by
        have h17 : - ( (M.val : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℤ).det ) ∣ 1 := by
          exact Int.neg_dvd.2 h13
        have h18 : - ( (M.val : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℤ).det ) ≤ 1 := by
          apply Int.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) h17
        omega
      interval_cases h : (M.val : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℤ).det <;> tauto
    exact h14
  simpa using h12

theorem subq_22
    (k_z : WithTop ℕ∞) (one_le_k_z : 1 ≤ k_z)
    (z : ℝ → ℂ) (z_contDiff : ContDiff ℝ k_z z)
    (z_regular : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv z t ≠ 0)
    (l_z : ℝ) (l_z_pos : 0 < l_z)
    (z_periodic : Function.Periodic z l_z)
    (l_z_minimal : ∀ T : ℝ, 0 < T → T < l_z → ¬ Function.Periodic z T)
    (z_simple : Set.InjOn z (Set.Ico 0 l_z))
    (k_w : WithTop ℕ∞) (one_le_k_w : 1 ≤ k_w)
    (w : ℝ → ℂ) (w_contDiff : ContDiff ℝ k_w w)
    (w_regular : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv w t ≠ 0)
    (l_w : ℝ) (l_w_pos : 0 < l_w)
    (w_periodic : Function.Periodic w l_w)
    (l_w_minimal : ∀ T : ℝ, 0 < T → T < l_w → ¬ Function.Periodic w T)
    (w_simple : Set.InjOn w (Set.Ico 0 l_w))
    (φ ψ : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hφ_smooth : ContDiff ℝ 1 φ) (hψ_smooth : ContDiff ℝ 1 ψ)
    (hφψ_left : Function.LeftInverse ψ φ) (hφψ_right : Function.RightInverse ψ φ)
    (hφ_mono : StrictMono φ)
    (hzw_phi : ∀ t : ℝ, z t = w (φ t))
    (hsupp : z '' Set.univ = w '' Set.univ)
    (α_z α_w : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hα_z_cont : ContinuousOn α_z (Set.Icc 0 l_z))
    (hα_z_lift : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_z,
      deriv z t / (‖deriv z t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_z t * Complex.I))
    (hα_w_cont : ContinuousOn α_w (Set.Icc 0 l_w))
    (hα_w_lift : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_w,
      deriv w t / (‖deriv w t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_w t * Complex.I)) :
    (α_z l_z - α_z 0) / (2 * Real.pi) = (α_w l_w - α_w 0) / (2 * Real.pi) := by
  have eq1 : ∀ t : ℝ, z t = w (φ t) := by
    intro t
    specialize hzw_phi t
    simpa using hzw_phi
  have h3 : z 0 = z l_z := by
    have h2 := z_periodic 0
    simpa using h2
  have h4 : z 0 = w (φ 0) := by
    apply eq1 0
  have h5 : z l_z = w (φ l_z) := by
    apply eq1 l_z
  have h6 : w (φ 0) = w (φ l_z) := by
    calc
      w (φ 0) = z 0 := by rw [show z 0 = w (φ 0) by exact h4]
      _ = z l_z := by rw [h3]
      _ = w (φ l_z) := by rw [show z l_z = w (φ l_z) by exact h5]
  -- From $w(\phi 0) = w(\phi l_z)$, and $w$ being injective on $Ico 0 l_w$, it follows that $\phi 0 \equiv \phi l_z \pmod {l_w}$
  have h7 : ∃ k : ℤ, φ l_z = φ 0 + k * l_w := by
    -- This needs more work
    refine' ⟨0, by
      nlinarith
    ⟩
  rcases h7 with ⟨k, hk⟩
  -- Now, we need to show that $k = 1$
  have h8 : k = 1 := by
    -- This needs more work
    nlinarith
  have h9 : φ l_z = φ 0 + l_w := by
    rw [hk]
    have h10 : (k : ℝ) = 1 := by
      exact_mod_cast h8
    rw [h10]
    all_goals
      ring
  -- Now we can show that $\alpha_z(l_z) - \alpha_z(0) = \alpha_w(l_w) - \alpha_w(0)$
  have h14 : α_z l_z - α_z 0 = α_w l_w - α_w 0 := by
    -- This needs more work
    nlinarith
  linarith

theorem subq_22
    (k_z : WithTop ℕ∞) (one_le_k_z : 1 ≤ k_z)
    (z : ℝ → ℂ) (z_contDiff : ContDiff ℝ k_z z)
    (z_regular : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv z t ≠ 0)
    (l_z : ℝ) (l_z_pos : 0 < l_z)
    (z_periodic : Function.Periodic z l_z)
    (l_z_minimal : ∀ T : ℝ, 0 < T → T < l_z → ¬ Function.Periodic z T)
    (z_simple : Set.InjOn z (Set.Ico 0 l_z))
    (k_w : WithTop ℕ∞) (one_le_k_w : 1 ≤ k_w)
    (w : ℝ → ℂ) (w_contDiff : ContDiff ℝ k_w w)
    (w_regular : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv w t ≠ 0)
    (l_w : ℝ) (l_w_pos : 0 < l_w)
    (w_periodic : Function.Periodic w l_w)
    (l_w_minimal : ∀ T : ℝ, 0 < T → T < l_w → ¬ Function.Periodic w T)
    (w_simple : Set.InjOn w (Set.Ico 0 l_w))
    (φ ψ : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hφ_smooth : ContDiff ℝ 1 φ) (hψ_smooth : ContDiff ℝ 1 ψ)
    (hφψ_left : Function.LeftInverse ψ φ) (hφψ_right : Function.RightInverse ψ φ)
    (hφ_mono : StrictMono φ)
    (hzw_phi : ∀ t : ℝ, z t = w (φ t))
    (hsupp : z '' Set.univ = w '' Set.univ)
    (α_z α_w : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hα_z_cont : ContinuousOn α_z (Set.Icc 0 l_z))
    (hα_z_lift : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_z,
      deriv z t / (‖deriv z t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_z t * Complex.I))
    (hα_w_cont : ContinuousOn α_w (Set.Icc 0 l_w))
    (hα_w_lift : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_w,
      deriv w t / (‖deriv w t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_w t * Complex.I)) :
    (α_z l_z - α_z 0) / (2 * Real.pi) = (α_w l_w - α_w 0) / (2 * Real.pi) := by
  have h1 : z = fun t => w (φ t) := by
    funext t
    exact hzw_phi t
  have h2 : deriv z = fun t => deriv w (φ t) * deriv φ t := by
    rw [h1]
    funext t
    apply HasDerivAt.deriv
    apply HasDerivAt.comp
    · -- Prove that w has a derivative at φ t
      have h3 : DifferentiableAt ℝ w (φ t) := by
        apply w_contDiff.differentiableAt
        all_goals
          simp at *
      assumption
    · -- Prove that φ has a derivative at t
      have h4 : DifferentiableAt ℝ φ t := by
        apply hφ_smooth.differentiableAt
      assumption
  have h3 : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv z t = deriv w (φ t) * deriv φ t := by
    intro t
    rw [h2]
  have h4 : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv φ t > 0 := by
    intro t
    apply hφ_mono.deriv_pos
    all_goals
      try {
        apply hφ_smooth.differentiableAt
      }
  have h5 : ∀ t : ℝ, ‖deriv z t‖ = ‖deriv w (φ t)‖ * (deriv (φ : ℝ → ℝ) t : ℝ) := by
    intro t
    have h6 : deriv z t = deriv w (φ t) * deriv φ t := h3 t
    rw [h6]
    have h7 : deriv φ t > 0 := h4 t
    have h8 : ‖(deriv w (φ t) * deriv (φ : ℝ → ℝ) t : ℂ)‖ = ‖(deriv w (φ t) : ℂ)‖ * (deriv φ t : ℝ) := by
      simp [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq]
    exact h8
  have h6 : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_z, α_z t = α_w (φ t) := by
    intro t ht
    have h7 : t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_z := ht
    have ht1 : 0 ≤ t := by
      have h1 : t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_z := ht
      exact h1.1
    have ht2 : t ≤ l_z := by
      have h1 : t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_z := ht
      exact h1.2
    have h13 : deriv z t = deriv w (φ t) * deriv φ t := h3 t
    have h14 : ‖deriv z t‖ = ‖deriv w (φ t)‖ * (deriv φ t : ℝ) := h5 t
    have h15 : deriv z t / (‖deriv z t‖ : ℂ) = deriv w (φ t) / (‖deriv w (φ t) : ℂ) := by
      rw [h13, h14]
      have h16 : deriv φ t > 0 := h4 t
      field_simp [h16]
      all_goals
        ring_nf
    have h17 : deriv z t / (‖deriv z t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_z t * Complex.I) := by
      apply hα_z_lift t
      exact ht
    have h18 : deriv w (φ t) / (‖deriv w (φ t) : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_w (φ t) * Complex.I) := by
      have h19 : φ t ≥ 0 := by
        have h20 : φ 0 ≥ 0 := by
          have h21 : z 0 = w (φ 0) := by
            apply hzw_phi
          have h22 : z 0 ∈ z '' Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_z := by
            apply Set.mem_image_of_mem
            exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
          have h23 : z 0 ∈ w '' Set.univ := by
            rw [show z '' Set.univ = w '' Set.univ by exact hsupp]
            exact Set.mem_univ (z 0)
          have h24 : ∃ s : ℝ, z 0 = w s := by
            simpa using h23
          rcases h24 with ⟨s, hs⟩
          have h25 : w (φ 0) = w s := by
            rw [show z 0 = w (φ 0) by linarith [h21]] at *
            linarith [hs]

theorem subq_22
    (k_z : WithTop ℕ∞) (one_le_k_z : 1 ≤ k_z)
    (z : ℝ → ℂ) (z_contDiff : ContDiff ℝ k_z z)
    (z_regular : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv z t ≠ 0)
    (l_z : ℝ) (l_z_pos : 0 < l_z)
    (z_periodic : Function.Periodic z l_z)
    (l_z_minimal : ∀ T : ℝ, 0 < T → T < l_z → ¬ Function.Periodic z T)
    (z_simple : Set.InjOn z (Set.Ico 0 l_z))
    (k_w : WithTop ℕ∞) (one_le_k_w : 1 ≤ k_w)
    (w : ℝ → ℂ) (w_contDiff : ContDiff ℝ k_w w)
    (w_regular : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv w t ≠ 0)
    (l_w : ℝ) (l_w_pos : 0 < l_w)
    (w_periodic : Function.Periodic w l_w)
    (l_w_minimal : ∀ T : ℝ, 0 < T → T < l_w → ¬ Function.Periodic w T)
    (w_simple : Set.InjOn w (Set.Ico 0 l_w))
    (φ ψ : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hφ_smooth : ContDiff ℝ 1 φ) (hψ_smooth : ContDiff ℝ 1 ψ)
    (hφψ_left : Function.LeftInverse ψ φ) (hφψ_right : Function.RightInverse ψ φ)
    (hφ_mono : StrictMono φ)
    (hzw_phi : ∀ t : ℝ, z t = w (φ t))
    (hsupp : z '' Set.univ = w '' Set.univ)
    (α_z α_w : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hα_z_cont : ContinuousOn α_z (Set.Icc 0 l_z))
    (hα_z_lift : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_z,
      deriv z t / (‖deriv z t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_z t * Complex.I))
    (hα_w_cont : ContinuousOn α_w (Set.Icc 0 l_w))
    (hα_w_lift : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_w,
      deriv w t / (‖deriv w t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_w t * Complex.I)) :
    (α_z l_z - α_z 0) / (2 * Real.pi) = (α_w l_w - α_w 0) / (2 * Real.pi) := by
  have h1 : Function.Injective φ := by
    intro x y h
    have h2 : φ x = φ y := by linarith
    have h3 : ψ (φ x) = ψ (φ y) := by rw [h2]
    have h4 : x = y := by
      have h5 : ψ (φ x) = x := by
        apply hφψ_left
      have h6 : ψ (φ y) = y := by
        apply hφψ_left
      rw [h5, h6] at h3
      all_goals linarith
    all_goals linarith
  have h2 : φ 0 < φ l_z := by
    apply hφ_mono
    all_goals linarith
  have h3 : w (φ 0) = w (φ l_z) := by
    have h4 : z 0 = z l_z := by
      have h7 : z 0 = z (0 + l_z) := by
        rw [show (0 : ℝ) + l_z = (0 : ℝ) + l_z by ring]
        exact z_periodic 0
      have h8 : (0 : ℝ) + l_z = l_z := by ring
      rw [h8] at h7
      linarith
    have h4' : z 0 = w (φ 0) := by
      specialize hzw_phi 0
      simpa using hzw_phi
    have h5' : z l_z = w (φ l_z) := by
      specialize hzw_phi l_z
      simpa using hzw_phi
    rw [h4', h5'] at h4
    all_goals try linarith
  -- Now, we need to show that φ 0 ∈ Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w
  have h13 : φ 0 ≥ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    -- Suppose φ 0 < 0
    have h12 : z 0 = w (φ 0) := by
      specialize hzw_phi 0
      simpa using hzw_phi
    -- z 0 ∈ w '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w because z 0 ∈ z '' Ico 0 l_z and the image of z is contained in w '' Ico 0 l_w
    have h14 : z 0 ∈ w '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w := by
      have h15 : z 0 ∈ z '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_z := by
        use 0
        constructor
        · -- Show 0 ∈ Ico 0 l_z
          exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
        · -- Show z 0 = z 0
          rfl
      -- From hsupp: z '' univ = w '' univ, so z '' Ico 0 l_z ⊆ w '' univ
      have h16 : z '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_z ⊆ w '' Set.univ := by
        have h17 : z '' Set.univ = w '' Set.univ := hsupp
        have h18 : z '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_z ⊆ z '' Set.univ := by
          apply Set.image_subset
          exact Set.Ico_subset_univ (0 : ℝ) l_z
        rw [h17] at h18
        exact h18
      -- But w '' univ = w '' Ico 0 l_w because w is periodic and injective on Ico 0 l_w
      have h17 : w '' Set.univ = w '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w := by
        have h18 : Function.Periodic w l_w := w_periodic
        have h19 : w '' Set.univ = w '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w := by
          have h20 : ∀ x : ℝ, w x = w (x % l_w) := by
            intro x
            have h21 : w (x % l_w) = w x := by
              have h22 : w (x % l_w + (x / l_w : ℝ) * l_w) = w (x % l_w) := by
                have h23 : w (x % l_w + (x / l_w : ℝ) * l_w) = w (x % l_w) := by
                  have h24 : ∃ k : ℤ, x % l_w + (x / l_w : ℝ) * l_w = x % l_w + k * l_w := by
                    refine' ⟨(x / l_w : ℝ) / l_w, by
                      field_simp
                      all_goals
                        nlinarith
                    ⟩
                  rcases h24 with ⟨k, hk⟩
                  rw [hk]
                  have h25 : w (x % l_w + k * l_w) = w (x % l_w) := by
                    have h26 : Function.Periodic w l_w := w_periodic
                    have h27 : w (x % l_w + k * l_w) = w (x % l_w) := by
                      have h28 : ∀ (k : ℤ), w (x % l_w + k * l_w) = w (x % l_w) := by
                        intro k
                        induction k with
                        | ofNat k =>
                          simp [Function.Periodic]
                          all_goals try { nlinarith }
                        | negSucc k =>
                          simp [Function.Periodic]
                          all_goals try { nlinarith }
                      apply h28 k
                    linarith
                  linarith
                have h23 : x % l_w + (x / l_w : ℝ) * l_w = x := by
                  have h24 : x % l_w + (x / l_w : ℝ) * l_w = x := by
                    have h25 : x % l_w = x - (x / l_w : ℝ) * l_w := by
                      field_simp
                    nlinarith
                  linarith
                rw [h23] at h21
                linarith
              linarith
            linarith
          have h21 : w '' Set.univ = w '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w := by
            ext y
            simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_Ico]
            constructor
            · -- Assume y ∈ w '' univ, need to show y ∈ w '' Ico 0 l_w
              rintro ⟨x, hx⟩
              use x % l_w
              constructor
              · -- Show x % l_w ∈ Ico 0 l_w
                have h22 : 0 ≤ x % l_w := by
                  apply Real.emod_nonneg
                  all_goals linarith
                have h23 : x % l_w < l_w := by
                  apply Real.emod_lt_of_pos
                  all_goals linarith
                exact ⟨h22, h23⟩
              · -- Show w (x % l_w) = y
                have h24 : w (x % l_w) = w x := by
                  have h21 : w (x % l_w) = w x := h20 x
                  linarith
                have h25 : w x = y := by
                  linarith [hx]
                linarith
            · -- Assume y ∈ w '' Ico 0 l_w, need to show y ∈ w '' univ
              rintro ⟨x, ⟨hx1, hx2⟩, hxy⟩
              use x
              all_goals try linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      -- Therefore z 0 ∈ w '' Ico 0 l_w
      have h18 : z 0 ∈ w '' (Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w) := by
        have h19 : z 0 ∈ z '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_z := h15
        have h20 : z '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_z ⊆ w (Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w) := by
          have h21 : z '' Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_z ⊆ w '' Set.univ := by
            apply Set.image_subset
            intro x hx
            have h22 : x ∈ Set.univ := by
              simp
            have h23 : z x ∈ w '' Set.univ := by
              have h24 : z x ∈ z '' Set.univ := by
                simp
              have h25 : z '' Set.univ = w '' Set.univ := h17
              rw [h25] at h24
              tauto
            tauto
          have h22 : w '' Set.univ = w '' (Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w) := h17
          rw [h22] at h21
          exact h21
        exact h19
      tauto
    rcases h14 with ⟨t, ht1, ht2⟩
    have h15 : t ≥ 0 := by
      have h16 : t ∈ Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w := ht1
      exact h16.1
    have h16 : t < l_w := by
      have h17 : t ∈ Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w := ht1
      exact h17.2
    have h17 : w t = w (φ 0) := by
      have h18 : w t = z 0 := by
        linarith [ht2]
      have h19 : z 0 = w (φ 0) := h12
      linarith
    -- Since w is injective on Ico 0 l_w and t, φ 0 ∈ Ico 0 l_w
    have h18 : t = φ 0 := by
      have h19 : w t = w (φ 0) := h17
      have h20 : t ∈ Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w := ht1
      have h21 : φ 0 ∈ Set.Ico (0 : ℝ) l_w := by
        exfalso
        have h22 : φ 0 < (0 : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h23 : φ 0 ≥ 0 := by
          have h24 : t ≥ 0 := h15
          have h25 : w t = w (φ 0) := h17

theorem subq_22
    (k_z : WithTop ℕ∞) (one_le_k_z : 1 ≤ k_z)
    (z : ℝ → ℂ) (z_contDiff : ContDiff ℝ k_z z)
    (z_regular : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv z t ≠ 0)
    (l_z : ℝ) (l_z_pos : 0 < l_z)
    (z_periodic : Function.Periodic z l_z)
    (l_z_minimal : ∀ T : ℝ, 0 < T → T < l_z → ¬ Function.Periodic z T)
    (z_simple : Set.InjOn z (Set.Ico 0 l_z))
    (k_w : WithTop ℕ∞) (one_le_k_w : 1 ≤ k_w)
    (w : ℝ → ℂ) (w_contDiff : ContDiff ℝ k_w w)
    (w_regular : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv w t ≠ 0)
    (l_w : ℝ) (l_w_pos : 0 < l_w)
    (w_periodic : Function.Periodic w l_w)
    (l_w_minimal : ∀ T : ℝ, 0 < T → T < l_w → ¬ Function.Periodic w T)
    (w_simple : Set.InjOn w (Set.Ico 0 l_w))
    (φ ψ : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hφ_smooth : ContDiff ℝ 1 φ) (hψ_smooth : ContDiff ℝ 1 ψ)
    (hφψ_left : Function.LeftInverse ψ φ) (hφψ_right : Function.RightInverse ψ φ)
    (hφ_mono : StrictMono φ)
    (hzw_phi : ∀ t : ℝ, z t = w (φ t))
    (hsupp : z '' Set.univ = w '' Set.univ)
    (α_z α_w : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hα_z_cont : ContinuousOn α_z (Set.Icc 0 l_z))
    (hα_z_lift : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_z,
      deriv z t / (‖deriv z t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_z t * Complex.I))
    (hα_w_cont : ContinuousOn α_w (Set.Icc 0 l_w))
    (hα_w_lift : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_w,
      deriv w t / (‖deriv w t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_w t * Complex.I)) :
    (α_z l_z - α_z 0) / (2 * Real.pi) = (α_w l_w - α_w 0) / (2 * Real.pi) := by
  have h1 : ∀ t : ℝ, z t = w (φ t) := hzw_phi
  have h2 : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv z t = deriv w (φ t) * (deriv φ t : ℂ) := by
    intro t
    have h3 : z = fun x => w (φ x) := by

theorem subq_22
    (k_z : WithTop ℕ∞) (one_le_k_z : 1 ≤ k_z)
    (z : ℝ → ℂ) (z_contDiff : ContDiff ℝ k_z z)
    (z_regular : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv z t ≠ 0)
    (l_z : ℝ) (l_z_pos : 0 < l_z)
    (z_periodic : Function.Periodic z l_z)
    (l_z_minimal : ∀ T : ℝ, 0 < T → T < l_z → ¬ Function.Periodic z T)
    (z_simple : Set.InjOn z (Set.Ico 0 l_z))
    (k_w : WithTop ℕ∞) (one_le_k_w : 1 ≤ k_w)
    (w : ℝ → ℂ) (w_contDiff : ContDiff ℝ k_w w)
    (w_regular : ∀ t : ℝ, deriv w t ≠ 0)
    (l_w : ℝ) (l_w_pos : 0 < l_w)
    (w_periodic : Function.Periodic w l_w)
    (l_w_minimal : ∀ T : ℝ, 0 < T → T < l_w → ¬ Function.Periodic w T)
    (w_simple : Set.InjOn w (Set.Ico 0 l_w))
    (φ ψ : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hφ_smooth : ContDiff ℝ 1 φ) (hψ_smooth : ContDiff ℝ 1 ψ)
    (hφψ_left : Function.LeftInverse ψ φ) (hφψ_right : Function.RightInverse ψ φ)
    (hφ_mono : StrictMono φ)
    (hzw_phi : ∀ t : ℝ, z t = w (φ t))
    (hsupp : z '' Set.univ = w '' Set.univ)
    (α_z α_w : ℝ → ℝ)
    (hα_z_cont : ContinuousOn α_z (Set.Icc 0 l_z))
    (hα_z_lift : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_z,
      deriv z t / (‖deriv z t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_z t * Complex.I))
    (hα_w_cont : ContinuousOn α_w (Set.Icc 0 l_w))
    (hα_w_lift : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) l_w,
      deriv w t / (‖deriv w t‖ : ℂ) = Complex.exp (α_w t * Complex.I)) :
    (α_z l_z - α_z 0) / (2 * Real.pi) = (α_w l_w - α_w 0) / (2 * Real.pi) := by
  have h1 : ∀ t : ℝ, z t = w (φ t) := hzw_phi
  have h2 : z 0 = z l_z := by
    have h11 : Function.Periodic z l_z := z_periodic
    specialize h11 0
    simpa using h11
  have h3 : w (φ 0) = w (φ l_z) := by
    calc
      w (φ 0) = z 0 := by rw [show z 0 = w (φ 0) by apply h1]
      _ = z l_z := by rw [h2]
      _ = w (φ l_z) := by rw [show z l_z = w (φ l_z) by apply h1]
  have h4 : ∃ k : ℤ, φ l_z = φ 0 + k * l_w := by
    have h5 : w (φ 0) = w (φ l_z) := h3
    -- We need to show that `φ l_z - φ 0` is a multiple of `l_w`.
    -- Let's assume `T = φ l_z - φ 0`.
    -- We know that `w(φ 0) = w(φ 0 + T)`.
    -- If `T` is not a multiple of `l_w`, then there exists some `0 < r < l_w` such that `T = k * l_w + r` for some integer `k`.
    -- But since `w` is periodic with minimal period `l_w`, this would mean that `w(φ 0 + k * l_w) = w(φ 0 + k * l_w + r)`.
    -- Since `k * l_w` is a multiple of the period, this implies `w(φ 0) = w(φ 0 + r)`.
    -- But since `0 < r < l_w`, this contradicts the minimality of the period.
    -- Therefore, `T` must be a multiple of `l_w`.
    have h10 : ∃ k : ℤ, φ l_z - φ 0 = k * l_w := by
      by_cases h : l_w > 0
      · -- Assume l_w > 0
        by_contra h14
        push_neg at h14
        -- Let T = φ l_z - φ 0
        set T := φ l_z - φ 0
        -- Assume T is not a multiple of l_w
        have h11 : T % l_w > 0 := by
          by_contra h14
          push_neg at h14
          -- If T % l_w ≤ 0, then T % l_w = 0 since T % l_w ≥ 0
          have h12 : T % l_w = 0 := by
            have h13 : T % l_w ≥ 0 := by
              apply Real.rpow_mod_nonneg
              all_goals nlinarith
            linarith
          -- This contradicts the assumption that T is not a multiple of l_w
          exfalso
          have h13 : ∃ k : ℤ, T = k * l_w := by
            refine' ⟨T / l_w, by
              have h14 : l_w > 0 := by linarith
              have h15 : T % l_w = 0 := h12
              have h16 : T = l_w * (T / l_w) + T % l_w := by
                rw [Real.div_add_mod T l_w]
              rw [h15] at h16
              have h17 : T = l_w * (T / l_w) := by linarith
              have : (T : ℝ) = (T / l_w : ℤ) * l_w := by
                have h18 : (T / l_w : ℝ) = (T / l_w : ℤ) := by
                  have h19 : T / l_w = (T / l_w : ℤ) := by
                    have h20 : T % l_w = 0 := h12
                    have h21 : T = l_w * (T / l_w) := by linarith
                    -- Show that T / l_w is an integer
                    have h22 : ∃ k : ℤ, T = k * l_w := by
                      refine' ⟨T / l_w, by
                        have h14 : l_w > 0 := by linarith
                        have h15 : T % l_w = 0 := h12
                        have h16 : T = l_w * (T / l_w) + T % l_w := by
                          rw [Real.div_add_mod T l_w]
                        rw [h15] at h16
                        have h17 : T = l_w * (T / l_w) := by linarith
                        have : (T : ℝ) = (T / l_w : ℝ) * l_w := by
                          linarith

    (hα_z_lift  :  ∀  t  ∈  Set.Icc (0  :  ℝ)  l_z,
      deriv  z  t  /  (‖deriv  z  t  ‖  :  ℂ)  =  Complex.exp  (α_z  t  *  Complex.I))
    (hα_w_cont  :  ContinuousOn  α_w  (Set.Icc  0  l_w))
    (hα_w_lift  :  ∀  t  ∈  Set.Icc (0  :  ℝ)  l_w,

    (α_z  l_z  -  α_z  0)  /  (2  *  Real.pi)  =  (α_w  l_w  -  α_w  0)  /  (2  *  Real.pi)  :=  by
  have  h17  :  α_z  l_z  -  α_z  0  =  α_w  l_w  -  α_w  0  :=  by

theorem subq_22

    · -- Show that φ t - k * l_w ≤ l_w
